title: Empowerment, Inc.
description:
We might think we are taking the steps to manifest more money, a happy relationship, peace with our family members, and being able to stick to a healthy diet…but unless that’s what is showing up, then something is probably getting lost in translation. This is the kind of relationship that most of us have with our own unconscious mind. 

NLP is the study of excellent communication–both with yourself, and with others. Neuro-Linguistic Programming is a user’s manual for your mind. Learning NLP provides you with the tools and techniques to become fluent in that language of your mind so that your unconscious mind will finally understand what you actually want out of life. 

Our mission, put simply is to empower the planet. How does teaching NLP help us do that? Because after being in business for 40 years, we’ve spent that time gathering all of the best concepts and techniques to help you get in control of your mind, your emotional state, and your life. Let Dr. Matt and the Empowerment, Inc. team guide you to achieve the results that you have struggled with in the past. Whatever you think you are, you are more than that.

SUBSCRIBE FOR FULL ACCESS:

Empowered Membership Package 
Pay 9.99 a month with a 7-day free trial, auto renewing monthly.*

This video app / vid-app is proudly powered by Vidapp.

title: SEB cares
description:
“SEB cares” is here to serve you better. Update or download the app today to use the app with a brand-new look!

Easily perform your electricity-related transactions by:

•	Viewing your bills and pay anytime through the app
•	Reporting your customer service and technical issues using the ‘Make a Report’ feature, and keeping track of the status
•	Tracking your electricity consumption for 3, 6 and 12 months in a single screen
•	Receiving real-time alerts on planned and unplanned power outages
•	Subscribing to our e-Bill service to receive electronic bills on time
•	Getting in touch with our virtual assistant CARINA
•	Accessing in three (3) different languages – English (default), Bahasa Malaysia and Mandarin

Best of all, the app is free! Get the app now and stay connected with Sarawak Energy wherever you go.

text:
[TITLE] Learn Spanish - 11,000 Words
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Learn 11,000 words & sentences with our advanced vocabulary builder.
[DESCRIPTION]
Learn Spanish from 61 native languages, for free & offline, with FunEasyLearn.

Learn to READ 📖 WRITE ✍ and SPEAK Spanish 💬
Discover the fun & easy way to learn all the reading rules, all the words you’ll ever need and all the useful phrases in the Spanish language.

🚀 Contents
• 6,000 Spanish words (constantly growing): the most common nouns, verbs, adjectives, etc., categorized into 7 levels and 200 topics;
• 5,000 Spanish phrases (frequently used): the most important phrases for daily conversations and travelling, categorized into 10 levels and 120 topics.

Enhance your vocabulary by learning words, sentences and expressions for beginner, intermediate and advanced learners. 

🔔 Why learn Spanish with FunEasyLearn?
FunEasyLearn reinvents language learning. Our team of linguists and teachers have developed a unique language learning strategy. The secret lies in combining an alphabet with all the reading rules, all the necessary words and a practical phrasebook into one app. This allows our users to read a word or phrase, pronounce it correctly, associate it with an illustration and practice it with listening, writing and speaking games. 

🏆 Top features
Hand-drawn illustrations – memorize the new vocabulary faster with intuitive illustrations;
Professional audio recordings – listen to audios recorded by native speakers;
Detailed statistics – analyze your results and track your progress;
Review manager – review everything you learn;
Smart search – find quickly the words and phrases you need;
Hide what you know – hide the content you already know;
Speech recognition – improve your pronunciation;
Offline – use the app anywhere in the world, with no internet connection.

💼 Spanish for business
Get access to special Spanish lessons created for your business. We provide specialized courses for taxi drivers, hotel & restaurant staffs, flight-attendants, shop-assistants, etc.

✈ Spanish for travelling
Learn how to book a hotel room, order a meal in a restaurant, ask for directions, carry out a conversation and speak confidently with the native speakers.

🙌 Spanish for adults
We adapt the contents depending on the age of the learner. Both you and your kid can learn Spanish and have fun.

FunEasyLearn Free
[RECENT_CHANGES]
- Report all the issues/mistakes you can find;- Recommend our app and get rewarded;- Hide the words you already know;New native languages, contents, levels and features are added regularly.Our bee fixes bugs instantly.Follow us on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram

title: Stardust Period Tracker
description:
Stardust is a free period tracker and cycle tracker that helps you understand your period and every phase of your menstrual cycle. We blend science, ancient wisdom, astronomy, and AI to make period tracking feel simple, intuitive, and meaningful. Track your period, log symptoms, follow hormonal changes, discover how your cycle flows day by day, and sync with the moon. 

Whether you’re predicting your next period, spotting PMS patterns, or deepening your relationship with your menstrual cycle, Stardust is the cycle tracker that turns daily period tracking into real self-understanding.
Beyond period tracking, Stardust also supports ovulation prediction, fertility awareness, and pregnancy tracking. Use this cycle tracker to find fertile windows, plan or avoid pregnancy, track pregnancy symptoms, and explore how your cycle and hormones sync with the moon. From ovulation forecasts to Pregnancy Mode, Stardust goes beyond a standard period tracker to support your full hormonal journey.

Key features:
 • Personal daily insights based on your menstrual cycle and hormone patterns
 • Accurate predictions for your period, PMS, cravings, moods, and fertility
 • Social cycle tracker to sync period tracking with friends
 • Tools for cycle syncing and aligning your menstrual cycle with lunar phases
 • Moon calendar with symbolism and folklore mapped to your cycle
 • Invite partners to stay in sync with your period and hormonal voyage
 • Enhanced cycle tracking insights using sleep data

Pregnancy Mode is now available
 • Daily affirmations and symptom tracking throughout pregnancy
 • Weekly insights on health, exercise, nutrition, and ancient wisdom
 • Hormone and moon-based insights with zodiac sign matchups

Founded and led by women, Stardust is a period tracker built with privacy at its core. Your cycle data and menstrual cycle history are protected. We never sell or share your personal information.
short_description: Menstrual cycle, pregnancy & hormone tracker synced with moon, built by women.

title: Getcontact
description:
Stop Guessing Who's Calling: Getcontact
 
Are you annoyed by the "Who could it be?" stress whenever your phone rings or unnecessary spam calls? With Getcontact, those days are over. Filter your calls, focus only on the people you want to reach, and set your own boundaries in the digital world.
 
Take Control with Getcontact:
 
Caller Identification: Know who is calling instantly, even if the number is not saved in your contacts. End the "Should I answer or not?" dilemma.
 
Spam Blocker: Block fraud attempts, endless ad calls, and all numbers that bother you before your phone even rings.
 
Goodbye to Unnecessary SMS: Automatically clean up spam messages occupying your inbox, and see only important notifications.
 
Secure Chat: Don't compromise your privacy while messaging or video chatting. Everything is end-to-end encrypted, everything is free.
 
Community Power: Protect yourself and your loved ones from unwanted calls with alerts from millions of users.
 
In Summary: Getcontact controls your calls, filters out the unnecessary ones, and opens room only for genuine communication.

title: SuperWalk-Step counter&Rewards
description:
■ Earn Rewards by Exercising After Installation
• Earn SuperMoney and SuperCash simply by walking a certain number of steps.
• Use SuperMoney to enter SuperDraw for a variety of prizes, from gift cards to home appliances. SuperCash can be used to purchase gift cards.
• Over 14,452 prizes were awarded to SuperWalk users just by walking during a 3-month period!
• Install SuperWalk now, take care of your health, and earn rewards through app-based earning.
(Tracking period: January 1, 2023 – March 31, 2023)

■ Earn Even More by Purchasing Shoe NFTs
• Level up your own Shoes and earn WALK Coins.
• For a true app-based earning experience, purchase a Shoe NFT and exercise in Pro Mode to see your WALK Coins accumulate in real time!
• Even with a low-cost NFT, you can earn an average of 1 USD in just 15 minutes of walking.
(Tracking period: January 1, 2023 – January 31, 2023)

■ Accurate Tracking of Your Workouts!
• When you walk in Pro Mode using a Shoe NFT, the SuperWalk app accurately tracks your workout with GPS and phone sensors, automatically saving your data.
• Check your records anytime to maintain a consistent exercise habit while earning money. SuperWalk is a smart healthcare app!

■ Enjoy Fun Competitions with Friends on the Leaderboard!
• View your friends’ workout records in real time.
• Get motivated by seeing how many points your friends have accumulated and enjoy healthy competition together!
• Exercising is more fun with friends!

title: Abena AI: African AI Assistant
description:
New: Free Phone Calls & Chat - No Internet, No Airtime needed

Meet Abena. Africa's first hands-free Offline Voice Assistant. Made by Africans for Africa, to solve African problems

Abena is fast and works without the internet. Just Say "Abena, Dɛn na wobetumi ayɛ?" Or “What you go fit do?“

*It supports the Ghanaian Akan Twi, Ghana English Accent, Nigerian English Accent and Pidgin English languages. Other African languages coming soon

Speak to your phone in Twi or English or Ghana Pidgin English to make calls, check your credit(airtime) or internet data balance, buy or send credit, buy or send data, send money, check MTN Momo, Telecel cash, AT money balance, get weather info, get twitter trends or Ghana news, set reminders, set alarms, set timers, control smart home, smart lights like Philips hue bulbs, tv, record voice notes, send instant messages, chit-chat, open third party apps, play music, games like Twi Proverbs challenge

Works like magic!

Speak to your house to control lights & devices (Check out the Video). No need to rewire your home or require any electrician. It takes only 2 minutes to setup.
Say "Abena, Sɔ kanea no ma me" or “On my lights gimme”

Voice tech has become one of the main ways people interact with devices but the world’s most popular voice assistants, Siri, Alexa & Google Gemini, still don’t support a single native African language. Millions of people who speak African languages can’t use voice tech to do something as simple as checking the weather

Abena is here to solve this problem. Abena isn't just a Twi Siri, Alexa or Twi ChatGPT clone - Abena solves problems faced by africans in Africa. Best part is - unlike other popular virtual assistants - Abena.ai works offline; saving you money & protecting your privacy. A voice assistant for African languages

What can Abena do?

Local Voice AI E.g ChatGPT in Twi or Pidgin English:

Speak or type to chat in Twi, Pidgin English or Normal English with offline voice support. It's fast!

Convert Video into local languages (Video Dubbing)

Select videos, such as those in English or any language at all. Abena AI will magically convert and dub the videos into local language without any extra step. Just one click

Text to Speech -Offline Audio Generation

- Type, Paste Text to Generate Audio in local languages
- Convert any website link to Audio
- Upload a document to get Audio

For voice-overs, audio books, eBook narration, podcasts, translations, twi translator, content creation, movie dubbing, education, entertainment, churches, tourism, sports commentary, news, ads etc

-Twitter(X) trends & Ghana News?

Abena AI can read out trends and Ghana news to you in Twi or English

Weather

Abena can provide weather forecast from any location. English to Twi translator Twi to English translator

Check Credit or Airtime balance: (No internet required)

You can check MTN/Telecel/AT Credit without internet:

Buy Credit or Airtime: (No internet)

Buy MTN airtime, Telecel, AT credit without internet

Transfer Credit or Airtime

Send credit or airtime to others without internet

Check MOMO balance (All networks)

Check Momo or Mobile money balance without internet. All networks, MTN MoMo, Telecel cash, AirtelTigo Money

Transfer Money:

Transfer MoMo to other users, no internet.

Also buy data, transfer data, check data balance

Set Reminders:

Set reminders

Set Alarms:

Set alarms, timers etc

Smart Home (Control lights)

Connect Abena AI to smart home devices like the Philips hue lights and hub and control such devices just by talking in your local language

Twi Proverbs Battle, akan proverbs etc

*Accessibility Service api is used by Abena AI for screen reading to enable blind or visually impaired Ghanaians check their call credit & data plans. Abena does this by e.g dialing USSD short code *124# and reading out loud the call credit/data text upon a voice command
short_description: Offline AI Voice Assistant. Talk to your phone in Twi English to get things done
recent_changes_text: -You can now play music for free:Just say "Abena, Bɔ nnwom ma me" to get started.Abena allows you to play Music in the background, so you can close the app while listening to music.- e-levy charges are now displayed after sending momo for free for all networks.- Abena can now mention negative credits on MTN (if you owe mtn)- Other features added include bluetooth support, google search, adding reminders to calendars etcDon't forget to give Abena AI a five star rating :)Enjoy!

Speak to your phone in Twi or English or Ghana Pidgin English to make calls, check your credit(airtime) or internet data balance, buy or send credit, buy or send data, send money, check MTN Momo, Telecel cash, AT money balance, get weather info, get twitter trends or Ghana news, set reminders, set alarms, set timers, control smart home, smart lights like Philips hue bulbs, tv, record voice notes, send instant messages, chit-chat, open third party apps, play music, games like Twi Proverbs challenge

Works like magic!

Speak to your house to control lights & devices (Check out the Video). No need to rewire your home or require any electrician. It takes only 2 minutes to setup.
Say "Abena, Sɔ kanea no ma me" or “On my lights gimme”

Voice tech has become one of the main ways people interact with devices but the world’s most popular voice assistants, Siri, Alexa & Google Gemini, still don’t support a single native African language. Millions of people who speak African languages can’t use voice tech to do something as simple as checking the weather

Abena is here to solve this problem. Abena isn't just a Twi Siri, Alexa or Twi ChatGPT clone - Abena solves problems faced by africans in Africa. Best part is - unlike other popular virtual assistants - Abena.ai works offline; saving you money & protecting your privacy. A voice assistant for African languages

What can Abena do?

Local Voice AI E.g ChatGPT in Twi or Pidgin English:

Speak or type to chat in Twi, Pidgin English or Normal English with offline voice support. It's fast!

Convert Video into local languages (Video Dubbing)

Select videos, such as those in English or any language at all. Abena AI will magically convert and dub the videos into local language without any extra step. Just one click

Text to Speech -Offline Audio Generation

- Type, Paste Text to Generate Audio in local languages
- Convert any website link to Audio
- Upload a document to get Audio

For voice-overs, audio books, eBook narration, podcasts, translations, twi translator, content creation, movie dubbing, education, entertainment, churches, tourism, sports commentary, news, ads etc

-Twitter(X) trends & Ghana News?

Abena AI can read out trends and Ghana news to you in Twi or English

Weather

Abena can provide weather forecast from any location. English to Twi translator Twi to English translator

Check Credit or Airtime balance: (No internet required)

You can check MTN/Telecel/AT Credit without internet:

Buy Credit or Airtime: (No internet)

Buy MTN airtime, Telecel, AT credit without internet

Transfer Credit or Airtime

Send credit or airtime to others without internet

Check MOMO balance (All networks)

Check Momo or Mobile money balance without internet. All networks, MTN MoMo, Telecel cash, AirtelTigo Money

Transfer Money:

Transfer MoMo to other users, no internet.

Also buy data, transfer data, check data balance

Set Reminders:

Set reminders

Set Alarms:

Set alarms, timers etc

Smart Home (Control lights)

Connect Abena AI to smart home devices like the Philips hue lights and hub and control such devices just by talking in your local language

Twi Proverbs Battle, akan proverbs etc

*Accessibility Service api is used by Abena AI for screen reading to enable blind or visually impaired Ghanaians check their call credit & data plans. Abena does this by e.g dialing USSD short code *124# and reading out loud the call credit/data text upon a voice command
[RECENT_CHANGES]
-You can now play music for free:Just say "Abena, Bɔ nnwom ma me" to get started.Abena allows you to play Music in the background, so you can close the app while listening to music.- e-levy charges are now displayed after sending momo for free for all networks.- Abena can now mention negative credits on MTN (if you owe mtn)- Other features added include bluetooth support, google search, adding reminders to calendars etcDon't forget to give Abena AI a five star rating :)Enjoy!

title: Canary Mail - AI Email App
description:
Canary is the AI email app made to help you do more with your conversations. Draft emails, prioritize threads, silence spam, and more in just a few taps. Avoid manually organizing your different accounts and manage your contacts, files and profiles all in one place. Say hello to a better, faster way to send your digital mail. Say hello to your Inbox Copilot!

With Canary, you can compose emails with just a tap thanks to Copilot AI generated suggestions. Write professional emails easily with sentence recommendations and custom drafts that Canary saves when frequently used. Our AI helper can also help you organize conversations, manage calendar events, and send you smart notifications for only the most important conversations. Canary introduces a smart alternative to multiple mail apps.

You can also start a chat directly with your Inbox Copilot AI assistant for the most efficient way to interact with your mail. Just ask to unsubscribe from newsletters, get a summary of people or topics that have appeared in emails, see a list of your highest priority emails, and more!

Safely mail client letters, contracts, important documents, and more with PGP encryption, keeping your conversations private. With Canary, you can contact everyone from any of your emails with universal account support – from Gmail, iCloud, Office365, and more! Pin important emails at the top of your inbox and set up your favorites for easy access to the people that matter most. Canary brings you an AI email experience designed to work for you.

Download Canary today for a smart and innovative new way to manage emails to get more done.

CANARY FEATURES

CONVERSATIONAL AI EMAIL ASSISTANT
- Avoid time wasted sifting through emails with summaries of any person or topic
- Get a recap of important details like upcoming bills or contacts waiting for a response 
- Never miss an appointment with AI powered calendar functionality
- Quick access to powerful mail management tools

SEND EMAILS SEAMLESSLY
- Access all of your mail contacts and information easily in one place
- Universal support lets you link all your accounts to one incorporated inbox
- Get notified as soon as your emails are read with read receipts
- Draft easily with previously used templates for repeat emails

AI EMAIL ASSISTANT
- Write emails with the help of Canary’s AI powered app and get quick suggestions
- Our email app helps you organize contacts, threads, and accounts in just a tap
- Receive smart notifications for the most important conversations
- Get access to custom thread actions that best suit your workflow

MAIL APP THAT WORKS FOR YOU
- PGP encryption keeps all of your conversations private and secure
- Manage mail threads, calendars, and events all in one app
- Compose emails without the eye strain, thanks to Canary’s new true dark composer
- Snooze emails, review attachments, manage conversations easily. The possibilities are endless.

Download Canary for an all-in-one email tool made to help you get more done when it matters. Explore the power of the ultimate AI email assistant.

title: MyJio: For Everything Jio
description:
MyJio is your one stop destination for recharges, UPI & payments, managing Jio devices, entertainment, news, games & a lot more!

• MyJio Home:
A snapshot to your Jio Digital Life; from recharge & balance reminders, JioTunes, latest music albums, news and more!

• Mobile & Fiber accounts:
i. Balance & usage: Get real-time data balance and usage updates
ii. Recharge & payments: Get reminder for your due recharges and bills!
iii. Multiple accounts: Easily link and manage Jio accounts using your profile
iv. Manage devices: Manage your Fiber Wi-Fi names, passwords and connected devices

• Settings:
i. Profile settings: Customise your personal profile, manage your contact details & payment settings with ease
iii. App language: Available in your language

• JioPay:
i. Payment and wallets: Link & pay with saved cards, JioMoney, Paytm and PhonePe wallets, & saved UPI IDs
ii. JioAutoPay: Set up AutoPay for hassle free payments

• JioCare:
i. Live chat with us, in English or Hindi, for instant resolution
ii. Troubleshoot your network, recharge or any other issues and find resolution with ease
iii. Find answers to all your queries with comprehensive FAQs, How-to Videos & Helpful tips
iv. Tap on the ‘HelloJio’ floater and talk to your advanced voice assistant in English, Hindi & Marathi to find answers.

• UPI: For your all payments
i. Transfer money, pay rent or your milkman or electricity bills – all from one place
ii. Scan and pay conveniently when you shop
iii. All your transactions are secured with UPI PIN

• Jio Payments Bank:
i. Open a Savings Account, Current Account, or PPI Wallet as per your banking needs
ii. Enjoy handsome interest rates on your deposits
iii. Transfer funds digitally using UPI, IMPS, NEFT
iv. Works on Android 6.0 and above

• JioMart:
Enjoy the best deals, offers and a wide selection of products at unbelievable prices!

• JioHealth:
One stop solution for your healthcare needs. Easy video consultation with doctors, stay-at-home lab tests, vaccine finder, secured medical reports and many more.

• JioCloud:
FREE ONLINE STORAGE for automatic backup of both existing & new files based on user settings, with the ability to select the backup network (mobile/Wi-Fi) & file types.

• Entertainment:
i. Explore a music library of more than 45 million songs. Enjoy music for every mood! Feeling happy, blue or in love, we've got you covered!
ii. Browse through popular movies and blockbusters, latest trailers, original web series, your favourite TV shows and more

• JioNews:
i. Home: Get breaking news in 13+ languages from top news sources and free access to 250+ e-papers
ii. Magazine: 800+ magazines on various category including Politics, Sports, Entertainment, Business, Technology, World News, Money, Jobs, Health, Kids & more
iii. Videos: Trending videos from 10+ genres including Bollywood, Fashion, Health, Technology, Sports & more
iv. Live TV: Watch live news and videos from 190+ channels

• Games & JioEngage:
We have boxes full of amazing prizes – just for you. Play exciting games, participate in quizzes and win them all!

• Stories:
From magazines to health tips, learning English to cooking fish, we have curated a list of videos and reads well over from 80+ popular papers & magazines

• Not on Jio yet?
i. Get SIM or Fiber: Get a new Jio SIM or port into Jio or book your Fiber connection!
ii. Track order: Know the status of your Jio orders
iii. Quick Recharge/Payment: Recharge or pay bills for any Jio number

• Universal QR:
Link accounts save contacts and much more with the Smart QR scanner.

title: Expiry Notify Product Scanner
description:
Add your products and receive notifications before expiration date! You won’t forget about products anymore on your shelf so they won't expire!

Xpiry brings a minimalistic, simple and innovative way for you to get notified before your products expire! Easily add products, keep tracking of them and customise the periods of time when to receive notifications before one expires.

Generate food recipes ideas based on your selected expiring products with the help of AI ChatGPT support! Generate PDF file with your products.

Simple, easy to use and straightforward to the point! Xpiry provides an all-in-one expiration management system. Night (dark) mode supported!

It solves the problem of wasting your products.

Features:

- Add products. You can set product name, expiration date, category, quantity, notes and add a photo of the product (take picture or save get from gallery). You can save the product only if you select the expiration date!
- Set notifications trigger time before they expire
- Get a notification for each expiring product. Notifications will be fired automatically based on your settings inside Xpiry
- View the list of your expiring products
- Generate up to 5 food recipes based on your selected products using ChatGPT support
- Generate PDF file with products based on your sorting preferences
- Sort the list by name, date added or expiration date
- Search products by name
- Filter products by category
- Swipe left to delete a product and then you can undo the deletion of a product
- Swipe right to edit a product
- Click on a product to check its details, copy the product or insert product on Quick-Add page
- View the period of time until products expire
- Have more options to set the time for getting notified
- Select after how many days Xpiry should auto delete expired products
- Set hour and minute for when to get the notifications
- Set the date format displayed in the application
- Add and remove categories
- Support for multiple languages: English (en), Arabic (ar), Spanish (es), French (fr), Hindi (hi), Indonesian (in), Italian (it), Japanese (ja), Korean (ko), Malay (ms), Filipino (phi), Portuguese (pt), Romanian (ro), Russian (ru), and Chinese (zh)

title: Birdbuddy: ID & Collect Birds
description:
Birdbuddy is the world’s most recognized app for discovering and learning about birds – whether you’re using our smart bird feeder in your backyard or identifying birds anywhere with just your phone.

Powered by artificial intelligence, Birdbuddy instantly recognizes bird species by photo or sound. Snap a picture, record a song, or let the smart feeder do the work for you. Get alerts when a bird visits, receive collectible postcard photos, and learn fascinating facts about each species.

Join a global community of bird lovers and enjoy live bird photos from 500,000+ feeders in over 120 countries – all while contributing valuable data to bird conservation efforts.

Key Features:
• Identify birds by photo or sound – Use your phone’s camera or microphone to get an instant ID. No feeder required.
• Smart feeder integration – Pair with the Birdbuddy feeder for automatic photos, videos, alerts, and postcards.
• Collect and learn – Build your collection with each new bird. Explore facts about appearance, diet, calls, and more.
• Explore a global birdwatching network – Discover moments of nature shared by our community.
• Support conservation – Each bird you identify helps researchers track populations and migrations.

Birdbuddy brings the joy of birdwatching to curious beginners and seasoned nature lovers alike. Whether you’re exploring your backyard or out on a trail, Birdbuddy helps you connect with birds — and the world around you.
short_description: Identify birds by sound, photo or camera - or connect a Birdbuddy smart feeder.

[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Identify birds by sound, photo or camera - or connect a Birdbuddy smart feeder.
[DESCRIPTION]
Birdbuddy is the world’s most recognized app for discovering and learning about birds – whether you’re using our smart bird feeder in your backyard or identifying birds anywhere with just your phone.

Powered by artificial intelligence, Birdbuddy instantly recognizes bird species by photo or sound. Snap a picture, record a song, or let the smart feeder do the work for you. Get alerts when a bird visits, receive collectible postcard photos, and learn fascinating facts about each species.

Join a global community of bird lovers and enjoy live bird photos from 500,000+ feeders in over 120 countries – all while contributing valuable data to bird conservation efforts.

Key Features:
• Identify birds by photo or sound – Use your phone’s camera or microphone to get an instant ID. No feeder required.
• Smart feeder integration – Pair with the Birdbuddy feeder for automatic photos, videos, alerts, and postcards.
• Collect and learn – Build your collection with each new bird. Explore facts about appearance, diet, calls, and more.
• Explore a global birdwatching network – Discover moments of nature shared by our community.
• Support conservation – Each bird you identify helps researchers track populations and migrations.

Birdbuddy brings the joy of birdwatching to curious beginners and seasoned nature lovers alike. Whether you’re exploring your backyard or out on a trail, Birdbuddy helps you connect with birds — and the world around you.

title: Kiwi.com - Book Cheap Flights
description:
Fly for less, Guaranteed!

Tired of cross-checking websites, dates, google flights and destinations when planning a trip or a holiday? With Kiwi.com you can book cheap flights and find great flight deals for connecting flights, buses and trains to wherever you want to go. Book tickets and travel for less - your ultimate travel itinerary planner. Cheap flight finder with one click and enjoy your next trip!

Kiwi.com’s flight finder, powered by our Kiwi-Code, gives you the flight tickets prices airlines won’t advertise. Find flights with a few taps and use our itinerary planner for the most exclusive flight deals:
✔ Find the lowest prices for trains, buses and plane tickets.
✔ Use Deals to get tailored recommendations for cheap flights to popular destinations.
✔ Set price alerts for a selected route so you don’t miss out on flight tickets at the lowest prices.

Use our travel tracker to get the best flights deals.
✔ Throwaway ticketing – book a cheaper round-trip flight ticket instead of a more expensive one-way fare.
✔ Itineraries with self-transfer – combine separate flights for a lower price compared to carrier connections, or find itineraries with different modes of transport operated by carriers that don’t usually cooperate.
✔ Hidden cities – book cheap flights with a layover in your intended destination instead of overpaying for direct plane tickets.

Save all your travel in one place.
✔ View your itinerary planner, change details and add extras to your flight booking.
✔ Access all your boarding documents offline.
✔ Get instant alerts about the cheapest flight deals.

Download our flight scanner app now and get low-cost tickets for your next journey. For questions and

title: Salem
description:
Introduction to the application
It is an application that aims to teach children how to pronounce Arabic letters and words until how to recite Surat Al-Fatihah .. within an interesting story for children, using of the state of the art Artificial Intelligence techniques of Speech Recognition with automatic correction for the child when reading the letters and words or when reciting Surat Al-Fatehah

The main idea of the application
The application is in the form of a story that revolves around a hero named (Salem), a sports hero who enjoys high energy, intelligence and good manners. Through the application, he seeks to recover the boxes of light that were stolen by a group of evil creatures and flew those creatures to the forest. The hero accompanies his friend ( a funny bird ) on a journey full of excitement to recover the boxes.
During the Hero's journey, he learns Arabic letters and words, plays various games, and then at the end of his journey he learns to recite the Al-Fatehah 

Application contents
* Levels of graduated difficulty
* Interesting educational lessons
* Fun and useful animations
* Lots of of games
* and more

The current version of the application
Thanks to ALLAH , this preliminary introductory version of the app has been completed, and it is a limited version, to be followed by successive versions, Inshaa ALLAH.
short_description: - Teaching kids Arabic Alphabet and the recitation of Al-Fateha in an easy way
recent_changes_text: Teaching kids the Arabic Letters and their forms and how to pronounce them with different Diacritics (Fatha , Damma , and Kasra) , In addition to Teaching the recitation of Al-fateha

text:
[TITLE] Learn Chinese - 11,000 Words
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Learn 11,000 words & sentences with our advanced vocabulary builder.
[DESCRIPTION]
Learn Chinese from 61 native languages, for free & offline, with FunEasyLearn.

Learn to READ 📖 WRITE ✍ and SPEAK Chinese 💬
Discover the fun & easy way to learn all the reading rules, all the words you’ll ever need and all the useful phrases in the Chinese language.

🚀 Contents
• 6,000 Chinese words (constantly growing): the most common nouns, verbs, adjectives, etc., categorized into 7 levels and 200 topics;
• 5,000 Chinese phrases (frequently used): the most important phrases for daily conversations and travelling, categorized into 10 levels and 120 topics.

Enhance your vocabulary by learning words, sentences and expressions for beginner, intermediate and advanced learners. 

🔔 Why learn Chinese with FunEasyLearn?
FunEasyLearn reinvents language learning. Our team of linguists and teachers have developed a unique language learning strategy. The secret lies in combining an alphabet with all the reading rules, all the necessary words and a practical phrasebook into one app. This allows our users to read a word or phrase, pronounce it correctly, associate it with an illustration and practice it with listening, writing and speaking games. 

🏆 Top features
Hand-drawn illustrations – memorize the new vocabulary faster with intuitive illustrations;
Professional audio recordings – listen to audios recorded by native speakers;
Detailed statistics – analyze your results and track your progress;
Review manager – review everything you learn;
Smart search – find quickly the words and phrases you need;
Hide what you know – hide the content you already know;
Speech recognition – improve your pronunciation;
Offline – use the app anywhere in the world, with no internet connection.

💼 Chinese for business
Get access to special Mandarin lessons created for your business. We provide specialized courses for taxi drivers, hotel & restaurant staffs, flight-attendants, shop-assistants, etc.

✈ Chinese for travelling
Learn how to book a hotel room, order a meal in a restaurant, ask for directions, carry out a conversation and speak confidently with the native speakers.

🙌 Chinese for adults
We adapt the contents depending on the age of the learner. Both you and your kid can learn Mandarin and have fun.

FunEasyLearn Free
[RECENT_CHANGES]
- Report all the issues/mistakes you can find;- Recommend our app and get rewarded;- Hide the words you already know;New native languages, contents, levels and features are added regularly.Our bee fixes bugs instantly.Follow us on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram

title: Aviso AI
description:
Aviso’s AI-powered mobile app brings together predictive forecasting, pipeline management, deal guidance, conversational intelligence and other capabilities to help revenue teams close more revenue and lower CRM burden and cost. Using the power of Aviso’s predictive machine learning platform, revenue team members, from CFOs and CROs, to Sales Managers and Revenue Operations, to Field reps and Go-to-Market team members can accelerate growth, win more deals, and reduce risk:

- Apply individual and team forecast judgment across any business, product, or team hierarchy
- Track progress towards quota attainment with a real-time AI pacing chart
- Get a quick overview of your business at a single glance
- Update deals and forecasts directly into Aviso and sync directly to CRM
- Inspect pipeline health and quality and get visibility across run rate business
- Get conversation insights for offline and online meetings
- Take early actions to update next steps and via contextual nudges and daily digests
- Send and log emails with native CRM integration
- Call any CRM contact and create post-meeting tasks or events
- Keep a pulse across your deals and account portfolio 

Aviso AI delivers integrated revenue intelligence to Sales and GTM teams. With demonstrated results across industry leaders such as Honeywell, Seagate, Elastic, Armis, RingCentral, and Marlin Equity Partners, Aviso works at the frontier of AI across deep learning, speech recognition, decision science, and computer vision and has generated over 505B insights, analyzed over $1Trillion in the pipeline, and over $550B total won deals across our customers.

Interested in knowing more about how Aviso can act as One platform for all your revenue operations? Visit us at

title: Firstrade: Invest & Trade
description:
One Platform, Unlimited Opportunities.

Firstrade App offers all the investment products you need, all commission-free - Invest in Stocks/ETFs and Options.

COMMISSION-FREE TRADING

ZERO Commission trades on Stocks/ETFs, Options and Mutual Funds
ZERO Options contract fees. Trade Options easily and securely
No minimum deposit requirement for Brokerage and IRA Accounts
No inactivity Fees

MANAGE MULTIPLE ACCOUNTS IN ONE APP

Brokerage Account
Sign-up for a brokerage account & invest in a wide selection of asset types, including stocks/ETFs, options.
No-Fee IRAs
Grow your retirement savings with a Traditional, Roth, or Rollover IRA. Enjoy the benefit of no annual, setup, or maintenance fees.

TRADE SMARTER, FASTER

Fractional share trading - Invest in your favorite company's stocks with as little as $5 to get started.
Real-time quotes, company profiles, historical charts, news and event calendars.
Centralize your research and boost confidence in your financial analysis with FirstradeGPT, a personal AI-powered copilot that empowers trading decision-making.
Get AI-driven sentiment analysis with Market Buzz, including Sentiment Scores and Signals. Access stock details, performance analysis, and trade directly from the new "Analysis" feature.
Identify trends and patterns quickly with Technical Insight®, featuring "Most Popular," "Trending Now," "Most Viewed Bullish," and "Most Viewed Bearish" lists. Access stock analysis from the Overview and Markets pages.
Discover and invest in stocks categorized by themes like 5G, AI, Autonomous Vehicles, Defense, ESG, and more.
Make smarter options trades with rolling options.
View key metrics with the options analytics tool: Greeks, IV, Max Profit/Loss & Breakeven.
Track price movements with custom price alerts
Switch advanced charts to landscape view and add indicator overlays for precise stock tracking.
Uncover investment opportunities through premium research from Morningstar and Trading Central, complemented by real-time news updates.
 
Trade beyond market hours with extended hours and overnight trading: 
Day+ Extended Hours: (8 AM to 8 PM ET)
Overnight trading hours: from 8 PM – 4AM ET, Sunday to Friday
 
Available on mobile, iPad and desktop. House all your investments under one roof and diversify your stocks, options & mutual fund investments. Create an Individual Brokerage account or IRA account on Firstrade to start your investment journey today!

RELIABLE & SECURE

Our customer support representatives are ready to assist you via phone and email. We protect your personal information using advanced encryption and cybersecurity technologies. Firstrade Securities, Inc. has been a member of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Securities Investor Protection Corporation (SIPC) and Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) since 1985. Securities in your account are insured by SIPC for up to $500,000 (including $250,000 for claims for cash).

DISCLOSURES
Firstrade Securities Inc. offers free trade for stocks/ETFs, options, and mutual funds through its mobile application and website. Relevant SEC & FINRA or other fees may still apply. Please see Firstrade’s Pricing and Fee Schedule at to learn more.

No content in the Firstrade App shall be considered a recommendation or solicitation for the purchase or sale of securities, options or other investment products, and all information provided is for reference only.

text:
[TITLE] Firstrade: Invest & Trade
[CATEGORY] Finance
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] A stocks, options broker providing you tools to buy, sell and trade.
[DESCRIPTION]
One Platform, Unlimited Opportunities.

Firstrade App offers all the investment products you need, all commission-free - Invest in Stocks/ETFs and Options.

COMMISSION-FREE TRADING

ZERO Commission trades on Stocks/ETFs, Options and Mutual Funds
ZERO Options contract fees. Trade Options easily and securely
No minimum deposit requirement for Brokerage and IRA Accounts
No inactivity Fees

MANAGE MULTIPLE ACCOUNTS IN ONE APP

Brokerage Account
Sign-up for a brokerage account & invest in a wide selection of asset types, including stocks/ETFs, options.
No-Fee IRAs
Grow your retirement savings with a Traditional, Roth, or Rollover IRA. Enjoy the benefit of no annual, setup, or maintenance fees.

TRADE SMARTER, FASTER

Fractional share trading - Invest in your favorite company's stocks with as little as $5 to get started.
Real-time quotes, company profiles, historical charts, news and event calendars.
Centralize your research and boost confidence in your financial analysis with FirstradeGPT, a personal AI-powered copilot that empowers trading decision-making.
Get AI-driven sentiment analysis with Market Buzz, including Sentiment Scores and Signals. Access stock details, performance analysis, and trade directly from the new "Analysis" feature.
Identify trends and patterns quickly with Technical Insight®, featuring "Most Popular," "Trending Now," "Most Viewed Bullish," and "Most Viewed Bearish" lists. Access stock analysis from the Overview and Markets pages.
Discover and invest in stocks categorized by themes like 5G, AI, Autonomous Vehicles, Defense, ESG, and more.
Make smarter options trades with rolling options.
View key metrics with the options analytics tool: Greeks, IV, Max Profit/Loss & Breakeven.
Track price movements with custom price alerts
Switch advanced charts to landscape view and add indicator overlays for precise stock tracking.
Uncover investment opportunities through premium research from Morningstar and Trading Central, complemented by real-time news updates.
 
Trade beyond market hours with extended hours and overnight trading: 
Day+ Extended Hours: (8 AM to 8 PM ET)
Overnight trading hours: from 8 PM – 4AM ET, Sunday to Friday
 
Available on mobile, iPad and desktop. House all your investments under one roof and diversify your stocks, options & mutual fund investments. Create an Individual Brokerage account or IRA account on Firstrade to start your investment journey today!

RELIABLE & SECURE

Our customer support representatives are ready to assist you via phone and email. We protect your personal information using advanced encryption and cybersecurity technologies. Firstrade Securities, Inc. has been a member of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Securities Investor Protection Corporation (SIPC) and Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) since 1985. Securities in your account are insured by SIPC for up to $500,000 (including $250,000 for claims for cash).

DISCLOSURES
Firstrade Securities Inc. offers free trade for stocks/ETFs, options, and mutual funds through its mobile application and website. Relevant SEC & FINRA or other fees may still apply. Please see Firstrade’s Pricing and Fee Schedule at to learn more.

No content in the Firstrade App shall be considered a recommendation or solicitation for the purchase or sale of securities, options or other investment products, and all information provided is for reference only.

Securities products and services offered by Firstrade Securities Inc., Member FINRA/SIPC, are not insured by the FDIC and are subject to investment risk, including the possible loss of the principal invested.

System response and account access times may vary due to a variety of factors, including trading volumes, market conditions, system performance, and other factors.

title: Dslr Blur Image Background
description:
Blur Photo Background Editor is an AI powered automatic image blurring app.With its artificial intelligence capability it can automatically detect the focus area and background of an image. Then it applies the DSLR like blur effect instantly. So, Using this Blur image background app you can easily give blur effect on your favourite image background.

This photo blur editor is the alternative of your any blur camera apps. If you have an image taken with no blur camera or blur effects no problem. You can now put blur background photo effect according to your demand with so many blurring styles. Currently, This Photo blur editor has some additional blurring effects such as basic gaussian blur, Box blur, point blur, pixelate blur, Zoom blur, motion blur and Cartoon effect blur. We will be adding more blurring effects over time.

This auto blur editor has both AI(auto) and manual photo blur editor to adjust your blurring area. With the manual blur editor you can adjust or change your blurring area for more perfection. 

It's very fast and powerful image background blur editor. Totally hassle free and very easy to apply blur background effect. Enjoy using this app.

title: ID Austria
description:
The "ID Austria" app allows you to sign documents with your electronic identity and also log in to digital applications.

Authentication is the focus
The "ID Austria" app focuses on fast and secure identification and authentication with your ID Austria.

Guide to numerous services
The app offers an easy route to government services and services from private companies that can be used with your ID Austria.

Access to your personal data
The "My Personal Data" feature allows you to view extensive personal data from the ID Austria system, such as registration or ID data.

EU-wide use of administrative services
ID Austria can also be used outside of Austria for online applications in other EU member states. You can also use the app to confirm registrations with digital administrative services in other EU countries.

How to use the "ID Austria" app:
1. Download the free app.
2. Link your ID Austria or the electronic identity card (eID) of another EU member state to the app.
3. You can now enjoy all the benefits of the "ID Austria" app without restrictions.

Your benefits:
• Conveniently access digital government services and business services online at any time
• Access online services from various providers using your ID Austria login credentials
• View your own personal data, such as registration or ID card details
• Use your device password/device PIN code as an identification factor in addition to biometrics
• If you have any questions, ask chatbot Mona for help

ID Austria is the next generation of the mobile phone signature. If you don't yet have ID Austria, you can find comprehensive information at This section also provides information about the ongoing app development.
short_description: ID Austria is your key to administrative and business services.
recent_changes_text: Dieses Update enthält ein Push Notification-Service und Verbesserungen des Service „Wohnsitzänderung“. Push Notifications informieren auf Wunsch:• über den Ablauf von Reisepass oder Personalausweis, im Rahmen des Ausweis-Erinnerungsservice• über die Nacherfassung im Zentralen Personenstandsregister, im Rahmen des Digitalen BabypointsIm Service Wohnsitzänderung wurden die Adresssuche verbessert und Sicherheitsfunktionen erweitert.

title: Sea battle 2: Warship Online
description:
Sea Battle 2 is the ultimate battleship and naval combat game where you can battle players from around the globe, build your own port city, and customize your fleet! Relive the classic board game from your childhood with exciting new features and modern gameplay.

⚓ ONLINE BATTLES

Challenge players worldwide in real-time naval combat! Test your strategy and tactics to sink their fleet before they sink yours.

⚓ BUILD YOUR PORT CITY

Create a thriving port city with military bases, shipyards, factories, and iconic landmarks. Unlock new buildings and rewards as you progress!

⚓ CUSTOMIZE YOUR FLEET

Personalize your battleships and arsenal with unique skins, ranging from World War I classics to modern designs. Choose your fleet's name, avatar, and flag to stand out on the battlefield.

⚓ RANK UP & BECOME AN ADMIRAL

Win battles to climb the ranks and earn prestigious titles, from Sailor to Admiral. Prove your skills and dominate the leaderboards!

⚓ PLAY WITH FRIENDS

Invite friends to play online or via Bluetooth. You can even play on the same device, taking turns to outsmart each other.

⚓ TRAIN WITH AI

Hone your skills by battling AI opponents. Choose from different difficulty levels to prepare for real-world challenges.

⚓ TOURNAMENTS & TROPHIES

Compete in thrilling tournaments, win trophies, and showcase your achievements in your trophy room.

⚓ MULTIPLE GAME MODES

Choose between classic mode or advanced mode with additional weapons and strategies.

⚓ CHAT & EMOJIS

Communicate with opponents during battles using chat and emojis. Trash-talk or make allies—it's up to you!

⚓ GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS

Climb the ranks and become the top player in the world based on your victories!

Sea Battle 2 combines nostalgic notebook-style graphics with modern effects, creating a unique and unforgettable strategy game experience. The game is free to play, with optional

description:
Encyclopedic Dictionary of Russian Language (Great Encyclopedic Dictionary) - a free offline dictionary with easy and functional interface, covering more than 70,000 words
- The publication is a continuation of the newspaper "Soviet encyclopedia" after the collapse of the USSR and the formation of the publishing house "The Big Russian Encyclopedia".

Characteristic:
• Very efficient, fast and with a good performance.
• High speed search
• Search Filter - search suffix, prefix (start / end)
• Voice Recognition (Text-to-speech engine)

• You can add a word marked as a favorite.
• Ability to create bookmarks and add the word to your favorites
• Save scanned words in stories (day, month ...)
• Ability to create bookmarks and add the word to your favorites
• The ability to share in other applications
• Sounding a word or selected text

description window opens when you click on the word. You can wrap and unwrap the description window function swipe.
• Search option, the audio and the possibility to share a word selected in the Description window.

- Settings

• Optional interface changes color
• Cleaning option lists Bookmarks, Favorites, History

title: Orion - Horoscope & Tarot
description:
Unlock daily guidance and self-discovery with Orion — the all-in-one astrology & tarot app powered by advanced AI. Get accurate daily horoscopes, in-depth birth-chart insights, on-demand tarot readings, a soulmate sketch, compatibility checks, dream interpretation, numerology, and a complete lunar calendar — all in one place.

Personalized Horoscope & Astrology
Orion delivers ultra-personalized horoscopes (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) for every zodiac sign: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces. Insights adapt to your birth chart (natal chart) and preferences, covering love, relationships, career, money, health, and wellbeing. Track trends, transits, and energy shifts to plan your day with confidence.

AI Astrologer & Instant Chat
Chat 24/7 with your AI-powered astrologer and get clear, friendly answers in seconds. Ask anything: daily horoscope follow-ups, compatibility advice, birth-chart analysis, retrogrades explained, lucky days, timing tips, or “what should I focus on today?”. It’s like having an astrologer in your pocket.

Tarot Readings & Spiritual Guidance

title: Spider Identifier: Insect ID
description:
Spider identifier is a community application along with Machine Learning algorithms that will help you correctly identify any species of spiders 
Key Features:
- Instantly Identify 1000+ species of spiders
- Identification accuracy rate of 90.28%
- Rich learning source about insects
- Intuitive interface with friendly tips
- Keep track of identified species in your personal collection.
- Read blogs on different Species of spider
- Post your questions and get answered by specialists

Welcome to Spider Finder: Insect Identifier – Your Ultimate Companion for Exploring the Fascinating World of Spiders and Insects!

Are you fascinated by the world of insects and spiders? Do you encounter these tiny creatures and wonder about their names, characteristics, and potential risks? Look no further, because the "Identify Spider: Bug Finder" app is here to satisfy your curiosity and help you navigate the world of bugs and insects like never before!

Spider identification app give Predictions on a spider's biology, behavior, and ecology that can be made as soon as you know your order. But how do you know which order a spider belongs to? A spider can be identified in several ways. Get the Picture Insect Spider app today and join a community of over 3 million insect enthusiasts worldwide.

Bug Identifier:
Whether you're a nature enthusiast, a curious observer, or simply someone who wants to learn more about the bugs and insects around you, our insect app provides a bug identification experience. With the latest advancements in image recognition technology, simply snap a picture of the bug or insect you've encountered, and let our app do the rest! From identifying spiders to other creepy crawlies, we've got you covered.

Photo Cam for Quick Identification: 
Photo Cam feature lets you snap pictures of bugs and spiders on the go. No need to browse through your gallery – capture and identify insects and spiders in real time with ease.

Bug and Spider Chart:
Compare species side by side, and gain insights into their similarities and differences. Become a bug and spider expert with a few swipes!

Insect and Spider Database: 
With an extensive database featuring thousands of species, you'll discover a world of fascinating creatures at your fingertips. Explore detailed information on each insect and spider, including taxonomy, behavior, habitat, and more.
Insect and Spider Finder: 
Whether you're out in nature, exploring your garden, or just curious about the critters in your home, our app is your trusty insect and spider finder.

Picture Insect and Spider: 
Share your bug and spider discoveries with friends and fellows. Our bug app allows you to share pictures of your finds directly from the app, fostering a community of bugs and spiders.

Learning Hub for Bugs and Spiders:
Identify Spider: Bug Finder isn't just about identifying bugs; it's about learning and exploration. With detailed descriptions, high-quality images, and even audio clips, you'll gain a deeper understanding of these fascinating creatures that share our world.

Bug Bites and Spider Bites: 
Worried about insect or spider bites? Our app provides essential information on common bug bites and spider bites, including symptoms and first aid tips. Stay informed and protect yourself and your loved ones from danger.

Bug Identification Made Easy: 
No more sifting through field guides or searching the web for answers. Bug Finder simplifies bug identification with a user-friendly interface and lightning-fast results.

User-Friendly and Interactive:
Navigating the app is a breeze, thanks to its user-friendly interface and interactive features. Use the spider chart to identify spider species, compare different bugs and insects side by side, and even test your own identification skills with the integrated quizzes and challenges.

Become the ultimate bug and spider expert with Identify Insect: Spider Finder – your insect and spider identification companion!

title: Social Keyboard - AI Keyboard
description:
Social Keyboard isn't just a keyboard; it's your assistant, translator, and communicator rolled into one! We use the power of AI, leveraging GPT-4 technology, to transform how you write, react, and interact.

Translate Seamlessly into 32 Languages
Communication knows no bounds with Social Keyboard. Need to chat with a friend in French? Or respond to a business query in Japanese? Our keyboard app lets you type in your language and translates your text into 32 different languages instantly. We've covered you, from the most widely spoken to the less common languages.

Switch Voices with GPT-4 Powered Tones
With 13 different voice and tone options powered by GPT-4, you can adapt your message to suit any situation. You can use a professional tone for your business correspondences, a friendly tone for chatting with pals, a sales tone to pitch your ideas, and much more! This feature can even help you draft customer service responses or easily convey technical information.

Personalize Your Texting Experience
Social Keyboard also offers customization options to create a unique texting experience. Set your desired voices, languages, or tones as defaults and use whatever you want within seconds.

Effortless Installation and Use
Downloading and setting up Social Keyboard is a breeze. Once installed, it integrates seamlessly with your device, making it your default keyboard for all applications. You don't need to switch apps or interrupt your workflow - just type, translate, and communicate!

Join the Social Keyboard community today and take your texting experience to the next level. Enjoy seamless translations, intelligent AI-powered tones, and a world of personalization right at your fingertips!

title: Russian Dating: Meet Singles
description:
Are you attracted to Russian people or are you looking to meet people in Russia? We have a great new app for you.

Russia Social is a great way to meet people around you in Russia, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. 

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes Russia Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video-based social app because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete themselves forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. Want to help break the ice? Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other.

Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video, and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: Jenji - Expense reports
description:
Life is too short to spend time on doing business expenses!

Got receipts, per-diem, invoices, travel expenses, mileage claims? 

Use our receipt tracker/receipt scanner on your business expenses to get the reimbursements, import your digital invoices, claim per diems or just track your business/work mileage with our mile logger.

The best part of it, it’s that Jenji is a free expense reporting app!

• It’s Paperless: 
Adopt an ecological and economical approach by going paperless on your expense tracker just by using our receipt scanner and our receipt tracker.

• It’s Automated: 
All your business receipts and invoices are processed automatically, without errors after using the Jenji receipt scanner and our mileage tracker for your work or daily routine.

• It uses AI: 
Jenji artificial intelligence allows you to analyze all your data and gives you a global view of your expenses. It’s much more than just an expense tracker, receipt scanner or a mileage tracker/logger.

• It’s easy to integrate: 
Our Jenji Platform and app integrates all your internal and external data sources into a single point, making your expense reimbursement faster.

Companies and people can benefit from one of the fastest expense/receipt scanners of the market and a precise mileage tracker, giving you real-time data and visibility through a paperless and automated expense management app.

Nowadays more than 35.000 companies all over the world trust Jenji! 

We ensure a smooth migration from your current expense management software to Jenji: Zoho, SAP Concur, Expensify, Notilus, Cleemy, N2F, Expensya, Rydoo, Captio, Spendesk, Certify, Chrome River, etc.

Start improving your company business expenses today, download the app or get in contact with us on our website:

text:
[TITLE] Learn Japanese - 11,000 Words
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Learn 11,000 words & sentences with our advanced vocabulary builder.
[DESCRIPTION]
Learn Japanese from 61 native languages, for free & offline, with FunEasyLearn.

Learn to READ 📖 WRITE ✍ and SPEAK Japanese 💬
Discover the fun & easy way to learn all the reading rules, all the words you’ll ever need and all the useful phrases in the Japanese language.

🚀 Contents
• 6,000 Japanese words (constantly growing): the most common nouns, verbs, adjectives, etc., categorized into 7 levels and 200 topics;
• 5,000 Japanese phrases (frequently used): the most important phrases for daily conversations and travelling, categorized into 10 levels and 120 topics.

Enhance your vocabulary by learning words, sentences and expressions for beginner, intermediate and advanced learners. 

🔔 Why learn Japanese with FunEasyLearn?
FunEasyLearn reinvents language learning. Our team of linguists and teachers have developed a unique language learning strategy. The secret lies in combining an alphabet with all the reading rules, all the necessary words and a practical phrasebook into one app. This allows our users to read a word or phrase, pronounce it correctly, associate it with an illustration and practice it with listening, writing and speaking games. 

🏆 Top features
Hand-drawn illustrations – memorize the new vocabulary faster with intuitive illustrations;
Professional audio recordings – listen to audios recorded by native speakers;
Detailed statistics – analyze your results and track your progress;
Review manager – review everything you learn;
Smart search – find quickly the words and phrases you need;
Hide what you know – hide the content you already know;
Speech recognition – improve your pronunciation;
Offline – use the app anywhere in the world, with no internet connection.

💼 Japanese for business
Get access to special Japanese lessons created for your business. We provide specialized courses for taxi drivers, hotel & restaurant staffs, flight-attendants, shop-assistants, etc.

✈ Japanese for travelling
Learn how to book a hotel room, order a meal in a restaurant, ask for directions, carry out a conversation and speak confidently with the native speakers.

🙌 Japanese for adults
We adapt the contents depending on the age of the learner. Both you and your kid can learn Japanese and have fun.

FunEasyLearn Free

title: Vietnamese English Dictionary
description:
Burn the words like a dragon with Dragoma!
 
The free Offline Vietnamese English Dictionary & Translator application. Internet connection is not required! If you want to learn Vietnamese or English the most effective way, there's no better choice than Dragoma! Dragoma shows the definition/meaning of Vietnamese or English words as pop up without opening dictionary app ever. No hassle of switching between apps. You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the Offline Vietnamese English Dictionary & Translator / Offline Tiếng Anh Tiếng Việt Tự điển & Người dịch
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both Vietnamese - English and English - Vietnamese directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.

Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 

Facebook: 

Twitter: 

Instagram:

Email: 

DISCLAIMER:
The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.
If not installed, your device may ask you to install the TTS engine. An internet connection may be required. We recommend installing it before traveling as roaming data tariffs may be very expensive.

title: Havells DigiTap
description:
1. Havells offers complete Smart Home automation solution with a single Digitap App.
2. Control your smart devices from anywhere, including outside home, inside home or on the move.
3. Entire Range of Smart products including Fans, Air conditioners, Smart Plugs, Bulbs controlled from single app. 
4. Smart, secure and Reliable cloud based solution to control multiple devices at tap of button.
5. Control your Smart Home devices from Alexa, Google Home and half a dozen other Voice assistants.
6. Set various Home Automation scenarios using inbuilt Digitap based rules and events.
7. Integrate with Third party services using IFTTT.
8. Get instant notifications and Real time control of devices.
9. Share devices, Group devices and more using Digitap App.

title: GRAVITY: Anonymous Chat & Play
description:
Featured on Mezamashi TV!
The next-generation SNS that’s set to go viral—GRAVITY!

The No.1 Anonymous SNS
A friendly and easy-to-use social network, even for beginners! Since it's anonymous, you can express yourself freely. Need advice? Get instant solutions through AI chat or the Q&A box!

Why Choose GRAVITY?
* Connect with like-minded people through hobby-based communities
* Beginner-friendly and welcoming for all users
* Ensures anonymity while allowing free expression
* A positive atmosphere with well-mannered users
* Easy to post and interact with others through likes and comments
* Partnered with NPOs to support mental well-being

What is GRAVITY?
A relaxed and friendly social network where you can:
* Communicate freely
* Enjoy stress-free interactions
* Maintain high anonymity
* Connect through shared interests
GRAVITY is the first SNS to integrate a 16-personality test, offering personalized content recommendations based on your personality type to enhance your communication experience.
Features
Hobby Communities
Join communities (planets) based on shared interests like music, movies, and more! You can also create your own planet and start fun conversations.

Posting
Share everyday thoughts, ask questions, or show off something exciting—easily and freely!

Messaging
Enjoy casual DMs with other users. Chat about anything, from “I have work tomorrow…” to “You got this!”

Discover
See posts that match your interests first. Check out trending posts within the app too!

16-Personality Test
Answer 12 simple questions to discover your personality type and receive content recommendations tailored to you!

 Voice Rooms
Chat freely with others via voice and text! Talk about daily life, music, ghost stories, and more.

Star Connection
Share worries or questions you don’t want to post publicly. Someone will catch them and offer kind advice!

Space Calls
Need someone to listen? Just start a Space Call and talk to someone right away!

Who Should Try GRAVITY?
* Those who want to casually share their thoughts
* People looking to connect over hobbies
* Anyone seeking a supportive space to talk about their worries
* Users who enjoy late-night calls before falling asleep
* People wanting to build hobby-based communities
* Those interested in casual chats, advice, or even relationship discussions
* Users looking to connect with people of the same generation

Rising in Popularity!
GRAVITY is gaining traction, especially among women in their 20s and 30s, and is on the verge of becoming the next trending SNS!

GRAVITY Premium Plan
GRAVITY STAR
Enjoy an ad-free experience, send images in voice rooms, back up messages, and more.
Pricing (tax included):
* 1 month: $8.99
* 3 months: $15.99
* 12 months: $43.99 (*Prices are subject to change.)
Important Guidelines
* Do not engage in harassment or disruptive behavior
* Avoid offensive, defamatory, or sexual content in posts or profiles
* Violating our

title: Burkozel HD Online
description:
Burkozel is a card game and a variation of the game Bura. The objective of the game is simple: to collect the most tricks. Burkozyol is played with 2 to 4 people.

In our version, you will find:
Online:
★ Online mode for 2 to 4 players, you can play with friends through private tables
☆ Ability to play shortened games (up to 6 or 8 points)
★ Pair versus pair game mode
☆ You can enable or disable reshuffling or playing in the dark
★ In-game chat (can be turned off in table settings)
☆ Ability to add users to friends and communicate with them outside of the online game

Offline:
★ Advanced intelligence of bots
☆ Additional settings: the ability to play in the dark or reshuffle when the player has all 4 cards of the same suit

In addition, the game features:
★ Great graphics
☆ Many sets of cards and game tables

A little bit about the game:
There are many card games where you need to take tricks. The most famous ones are Preference, Goat, Bura, Thousand, King, Deberc, and among them, Burkozel.

Burkozel is an intellectual game. Winning this game on luck alone is difficult. You need to adhere to certain strategies, analyze possible combinations in the hands of opponents, and remember the cards that have been played.

In our version of the game, you can play without the internet, in which case the role of opponents will be played by artificial intelligence. The game has quite complex and interesting rules. Their description is in the game itself, and if you have never played Burkozyol, we strongly recommend that you first familiarize yourself with them.

Have a great game!
short_description: A classic card game with beautiful graphics and a variety of game modes

A little bit about the game:
There are many card games where you need to take tricks. The most famous ones are Preference, Goat, Bura, Thousand, King, Deberc, and among them, Burkozel.

Burkozel is an intellectual game. Winning this game on luck alone is difficult. You need to adhere to certain strategies, analyze possible combinations in the hands of opponents, and remember the cards that have been played.

In our version of the game, you can play without the internet, in which case the role of opponents will be played by artificial intelligence. The game has quite complex and interesting rules. title: Community Compass
description:
An app to help the residents of Indiana find food resources such as SNAP locations, Food Pantries, WIC Clinics, and Free Groceries & Meals. It also provides a calendar with all the latest food resource events near you. 

If you can't find what you are looking for via the intuitive map system, then just ask Shelly, the AI-enabled chatbot to guide you to the resources you need.

title: Grifols Plasma Donor Hub
description:
Your Plasma Donation experience just got smoother! 🩸✨ Grifols DonorHubTM is your go-to place for all your plasma donor needs. 
Use Grifols DonorHub™ to:
• 📊 Check your donation and compensation history - Details of your most recent donation are available in Grifols DonorHub™ 24 hours after your visit. 
• 📲 Stay up-to-date on all things Grifols Plasma- Enable push notifications to never miss an update. 
• 💡 Receive tips to help prepare for your next plasma donation. 
• 🔍 Learn what happens to your plasma after your donation. 
• 📅 Schedule your donation appointments.
• Refer a Friend: Spread the Word & Earn Rewards: Easily refer friends and family to become plasma donors.
• Ask the Chatbot any question you have

Tips for a Better Donation Experience
1.	Drink at least 12-to-24 ounces of water or a sports drink 30-to-60 minutes before your donation. Proper hydration helps ensure the procedure is well-tolerated and recovery is quicker.
2.	Limit caffeinated beverages and milk on the day of your donation, as they reduce iron absorption and can elevate your pulse.
3.	Avoid alcohol the day before and the day of your donation to prevent dehydration.
4.	Avoid foods high in saturated fats and cholesterol the night before your donation, as they can make the donation process longer.
5.	Get a good night’s rest before your donation to aid in quicker recovery.
6.	Discontinue and avoid all tobacco products before donating, as they may increase your blood pressure and heart rate.
Getting started is easy:
If you're already registered in Grifols DonorHub™:
Just download the app and log in! The Grifols DonorHub™ app has all the features found in the web version. If you're not registered yet:
Download the Grifols DonorHub™ app.
Register for Grifols DonorHub™: Enter your registration number, name, date of birth, mobile phone number, email address, and choose a password.
Don’t forget to turn on notifications for Grifols DonorHub™!
Stay connected with us:
🌐 Visit our website: 
📘
