title: SkyKing - Simple Plane
description:
“Though there's one motor gone
We can still carry on,
Comin' in on a wing and a prayer.” 

The lyrics of this song inspired us to create a remake of the game called FLY - Sopwith Camel from the ’80 of the last century about a cool small airplane. Simple and clear mechanics of the game are able to fascinate you for hours of fun.

Fasten your seat belts, put on your helmet, goggles and get ready for a flight. Your trouble-free heavy machine gun and your favorite bombs will surely lead you to success. Your seemingly simple warplane is capable to force to reckon with yourself and become a real bomber, bringing destruction to your enemies from behind the clouds or hitting targets in the midst of the clear sky. You are not holding a simulator - you are holding in your hands some stunning explosions, air chases, incessant shots and fantastic air pirouettes.

Game features:
★Dynamics of a classic old school plane game Sopwith Camel. This is really cool plane game.
☆ Convenient and elegant controls of your aircraft.
★ Detailed training will remove all ambiguities.
☆Shoot a machine gun at the enemy and drop bombs at him, and at the same time dodge both enemy bullets and bombs and sometimes your own.
★ Various enemies with various levels of aggressiveness and artificial intelligence. As Air Balloons which can be destroyed in different ways, Fokker E.I, Red Baron, etc. 
☆ Modern animation, graphics and sound effects.
★ Support for Google Play Games Services - a wide range of various achievements, leaderboard provides the opportunity to compete with your friends.
☆ Everything is completely free.

Become a real ace and the best of the best!
Conquer skies and red-hot metal - hit your target!
You are not afraid of Fokker E.I and Red Baron,
Because you are the Sky King!!!

This 2D game is made in 3D with Unity and adapted to all phones and tablets resolutions.

If you love aircrafts as we do and you have for us any ideas, wishes, suggestions, or just wish to chat, drop us a line:

Don’t forget to check out our resources to stay up-to-date with our latest news:

title: kitUP: Audiobook Summaries
description:
Discover Knowledge in 15 Minutes – With KitUP

Welcome to KitUP, your ultimate destination for learning faster and smarter through powerful book summaries. KitUP delivers the core ideas of the world’s best non-fiction books in just 15 minutes. Read or listen — your choice. This is your compact mobile library packed with thousands of titles across countless categories.

With access to over 2,000 expertly curated non-fiction books and summaries spanning 20+ categories—like business, health, leadership, relationships, parenting, productivity, and much more—KitUP empowers you to grow every day. It’s a platform built for self-learners, busy professionals, lifelong readers, and anyone looking to expand their knowledge without dedicating hours.

🚀 Why Choose KitUP?

Bite-Sized Learning: Absorb the essence of bestselling books in quick, 15-minute reads or audiobooks.

Expansive Library: Explore a constantly growing bookshelf featuring more than 2,000 top-rated titles.

Listen Anywhere, Anytime: Use KitUP like your personal audiobook player while walking, driving, exercising, or cooking.

Personalized Categories: From parenting to leadership, economy to love & relationships, our collections cater to every goal and lifestyle.

Build Better Habits: Stay consistent and track your progress with built-in tools like the book tracker.

Smart Suggestions: Receive tailored recommendations based on your interests and reading patterns.

📚 What You’ll Get:

Impactful Summaries: Clear, structured, and designed for maximum retention and inspiration.

Professional Audio: High-quality voiceovers bring the content to life, helping you learn on the go.

User-Friendly Experience: Save your favorites, highlight insights, and create your own custom bookshelf.

Popular Trends: Dive into titles trending on booktok, discover viral reads, and keep up with what's buzzing.

Curated Playlists: Browse themed reading lists and audio playlists to match your mood or goals.

Whether you aim to sharpen your business acumen, boost emotional intelligence, enhance personal growth, or explore psychology and history, KitUP makes it accessible. Our content categories include:

Business & Strategy
Health & Wellness
Love & Relationships
Parenting
Productivity
Psychology
Communication
History & Society
Motivation
Sports & Fitness
Career Growth
Creativity
Money & Finance
Mindfulness & Spirituality

🔊 Audio Summaries On The Go

Don't have time to sit down and read? Simply press play and let our summaries guide you through life’s most valuable ideas. Enjoy a premium audiobook experience through short, engaging, and insightful content designed for mobile use.

🧠 Learn Smarter, Not Harder

Stop spending hours trying to finish one book. With KitUP, you unlock the wisdom of hundreds of books in less time. Absorb critical concepts quickly to elevate your thinking, make smarter decisions, and stay informed without the overwhelm.

🌍 Your Personal Learning Companion

text:
[TITLE] kitUP: Audiobook Summaries
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Read and listen to top non-fiction audio book summaries in just 15 minutes daily
[DESCRIPTION]
Discover Knowledge in 15 Minutes – With KitUP

Welcome to KitUP, your ultimate destination for learning faster and smarter through powerful book summaries. KitUP delivers the core ideas of the world’s best non-fiction books in just 15 minutes. Read or listen — your choice. This is your compact mobile library packed with thousands of titles across countless categories.

With access to over 2,000 expertly curated non-fiction books and summaries spanning 20+ categories—like business, health, leadership, relationships, parenting, productivity, and much more—KitUP empowers you to grow every day. It’s a platform built for self-learners, busy professionals, lifelong readers, and anyone looking to expand their knowledge without dedicating hours.

🚀 Why Choose KitUP?

Bite-Sized Learning: Absorb the essence of bestselling books in quick, 15-minute reads or audiobooks.

Expansive Library: Explore a constantly growing bookshelf featuring more than 2,000 top-rated titles.

Listen Anywhere, Anytime: Use KitUP like your personal audiobook player while walking, driving, exercising, or cooking.

Personalized Categories: From parenting to leadership, economy to love & relationships, our collections cater to every goal and lifestyle.

Build Better Habits: Stay consistent and track your progress with built-in tools like the book tracker.

Smart Suggestions: Receive tailored recommendations based on your interests and reading patterns.

📚 What You’ll Get:

Impactful Summaries: Clear, structured, and designed for maximum retention and inspiration.

Professional Audio: High-quality voiceovers bring the content to life, helping you learn on the go.

User-Friendly Experience: Save your favorites, highlight insights, and create your own custom bookshelf.

Popular Trends: Dive into titles trending on booktok, discover viral reads, and keep up with what's buzzing.

Curated Playlists: Browse themed reading lists and audio playlists to match your mood or goals.

Whether you aim to sharpen your business acumen, boost emotional intelligence, enhance personal growth, or explore psychology and history, KitUP makes it accessible. Our content categories include:

Business & Strategy
Health & Wellness
Love & Relationships
Parenting
Productivity
Psychology
Communication
History & Society
Motivation
Sports & Fitness
Career Growth
Creativity
Money & Finance
Mindfulness & Spirituality

🔊 Audio Summaries On The Go

Don't have time to sit down and read? Simply press play and let our summaries guide you through life’s most valuable ideas. Enjoy a premium audiobook experience through short, engaging, and insightful content designed for mobile use.

🧠 Learn Smarter, Not Harder

Stop spending hours trying to finish one book. With KitUP, you unlock the wisdom of hundreds of books in less time. Absorb critical concepts quickly to elevate your thinking, make smarter decisions, and stay informed without the overwhelm.

🌍 Your Personal Learning Companion

KitUP is more than an app — it’s your everyday library companion. Whether you're browsing trending reads from apple books, tracking your learning with a book tracker, or organizing your go-to titles in your bookshelf, it’s all streamlined in one beautiful interface.

title: Nearpeer
description:
Welcome to Nearpeer! We are an AI-powered ed-tech platform that offers a wide variety of video courses for CA, MDCAT, CSS, PMS, ISSB, ECAT, ACCA, FSc, FBISE, and many other fields. 

These courses include:
Video lectures: Study anytime, anywhere on any device
Quizzes: Test your knowledge and get instant results
Live sessions: Interact with your instructors every day
Assignments: Keep yourself on track with regular assignments
Notes: Quick revision has never been easier
AI-powered bot: Get instant answers to any questions you have, anytime, from any device
Nearpeer is the first ed-tech platform to introduce an AI-powered chatbot to assist you with your studies. If you have doubts about a particular topic, don't hesitate to ask - our bot is available to help you, free of cost!

Nearpeer’s learning App offers the following:

Stories: Get instant updates about what's happening at Nearpeer around CA, MDCAT, CSS, PMS, ISSB, ECAT, FSc, IELTS, and in education in general without any hassle.
Native content streaming: Use everything at Nearpeer without any delay or wait
Offline video streaming: Download everything in your app to stream it without the internet later.
Push notifications: Never miss anything important relevant to your course (CA, MDCAT, CSS, PMS, ISSB, ECAT, FSc) with our in-app and push notifications
Notes offering: Get access to all of your PDF notes with fully interactive controls like never before.
Community: Interact with instructors and other students through our discussion forums
Daily dose of free content: Get free content for your desired courses every day.

So, what are you waiting for? Download the application and join the new revolution of education!

A lot of under the hood changes to make your experience better.

title: Audio to Text Converter
description:
AI Audio to text converter transcribe Audio to text offline, audio transcriber
Most of the times you need to play audio in different languages and you cannot clearly understand the audio language, so we bring such a nice tool called Audio to Text Converter which allow you to extract text from audio. And you can easily convert it into your understandable language easily. Audio file to text converter app convert the extracted text to txt, Html and pdf form. All languages audio to text transcriber. One of the most significant problem now a days is to copy a text from audio and it is very hard to write text from listening long audio. The offline audio to text transcriber app brings such a nice feature to convert audio to text with accuracy in second. 
The Audio Transcriber app work with high accuracy you can convert any audio to text offline. First download model for offline mode to convert audio to text into 60+ languages. Audio to Text Converter has 60+ languages models to convert audio to text. Once you download language model, then easily convert audio to text or extract text from audio offline. 
The Audio to text translator app supports 24 languages; Chinese, Catalan, Czech, Dutch, English, Esperanto, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Indian English, Japanese, Kazakh, Korean, Portuguese, Polish, Persian, Russian, Spanish, Swedish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Uzbek, and Vietnamese. The audio to Text converter also translate the same extracted text from audio into 60+ other languages offline. 
Features of Audio to Text Converter 
• Select audio Folder and transcribe audio to text. 
• 24 Languages models available for audio to text transcription online
• 60+ languages models available for audio to text transcription offline 
• Spanish Audio to text Converter 
• English audio to text converter 
• German audio to text converter 
• Hindi audio to text converter 
• French audio to text converter 
• Italian audio to text converter’ 
• Japanese audio to text converter 
• Polish audio to text converter 
• Free audio to text converter 
• Convert audio text to pdf, txt and Html format 
• Save converted text in TXT, PDF, and HTML formats. 
• Open & share transcribe audio to text files 
• Rename & delete transcribe audio to text files. 
Note: For any Issue in the Audio to text converter & Translator app just send email at .

title: ServiceMax Go
description:
ServiceMax Go, available on smartphones and tablets, empowers technicians, field engineers, and maintenance personnel with everything they need to plan their work, execute it efficiently, and effectively communicate with customers and colleagues. 

ServiceMax Go’s modern design is purpose-built for field workers with easy navigation, intuitive screens, and powerful offline capabilities—enabling complete visibility for maximum productivity.

Access Data, Online or Offline: 
• Entitlement verifications
• Customer & product service history, location, contacts, estimates, warranties, parts, and more
• Industry-leading offline capabilities
• Flexible sync settings to control background and sync behavior, delivering fast, reliable app performance
• Advanced data and business rules validation during data entry ensures data integrity even if connectivity is not available

Interactive Calendar Views:
• Preview daily and weekly tasks
• Agenda calendar view
• Driving directions, travel times, appointment details, and more

Service Execution:
• Step-by-step instructions 
• Service Flow Manager drives business process automation for technicians 
• Templatized checklists with section navigation, progress status, and inline navigation for inspections, safety checks, diagnostics, and more
• Price list support for automated pricing validation on time and materials estimates 

Smart Document Generation:
• Create service reports, invoices, etc. for customers to sign while on-site to expedite processing
• Signature capture support

Collaborate Freely: 
• Instant access to documents, videos, and technician and expert collaboration
• Share photos and videos taken at the customer site, email service reports or contracts
• Seamlessly integrated with ServiceMax Zinc and ServiceMax Engage

Search:
• Locate parts and products in own or nearby technicians’ trunk stock, customer consignment, stocking hubs, spare parts, and more
• Search nearby for work orders, installed products, parts stock, and any other records

Intuitive, Modern UX:
• Intuitive, field-ready UI design enabling technicians to get work done with minimal clicks and taps 
• Push and SMS notifications 
• Allows for custom UI, extended navigation and functionality with Mobile Activity Space

** Enterprise App - Before submitting a review ensure your app is configured for your use by your mobile apps team **
short_description: Everything field teams need to plan, execute, and communicate about their work.
recent_changes_text: This release contains bug fixes and performance improvements. Please refer to the release notes for complete list of fixes included in the release.

title: Social Messenger All in One
description:
Social Messenger All in One app dedicated its time to offering all popular social media apps in one, alongside personalized features such as chat translator, call screen, edge lighting, wallpaper, emoji, camera translator, offline translation, phrasebook, and more...

You will be able to chat, make video calls, message and translate freely, fluently, and confidently on your messenger apps

FEATURES
* All popular messenger for ipad, chat, video call, voice call, social apps in one
* No last seen, no blue ticks on chat
* Read your messages without being seen by anyone.
* Message your friends on invisibly and incognito mode
* Chat & walk feature for convenient messaging while walking on the road
* Chat translator to translate your messages instantly
* Color Call Screen Themes
* Full screen Caller ID and special caller screen
* Edge Lighting to color your phone border
* Unique and stylish wallpapers collection
* View all messages and notifications from installed app in one screen
* Instant messaging with "All in One Messenger, Feed, AI"

You can open any popular social media, video call, and voice chat apps with one click whenever you want to have a messenger with your friends and families. Fb Messanger All in One, Feed, AI will show open times for each social media apps.

Fun and Joy with Massenger All in One, Feed, AI app that includes cute and fun emojis, smiley faces & emoticons. Video Chat with popular emojis and emoticons, and colorful themes, and live wallpapers. Download amazing 4K live wallpapers

You can find the best 4K Live Wallpapers and set your phone screen. Share live wallpapers with your loved ones. Surprise your friends and have fun while texting

Instant Messenger AIO Lite: Messages, Live Chat App provides colors phone screens, color edge lighting for incoming calls and LED Flash notifications. You will never miss a call with a fascinating caller id. Whole color call screen themes are free for you.

Ultimate Translate Features
* Camera translator, photo translate, object translation
* Text and Voice Translation
* Voice-to-voice conversation
* Speech to text or text to speech translation with accurate voice recognition
* Offline translation to use without internet
* Use it like a dictionary: Find and look up words, their meanings, and verb conjugations

Chat Translator
The chat messenger feature allows you to translate your chat message into your Kiss Messenger - msg app. You can translate chat on your messanger app instantly.

Text Chat translate function translates their messages to your language and translates your messages to their language such as English to French, English to Hindu, English to Spanish, and English to Bengali, etc... The chat translate menu makes it feel like you are chatting in the same language on your Massage: Video-Chat app.

Baby Language Translator
Simply the best translator of newborn cries. Every baby has five basic needs, and each one of these has a rather distinctive crying sound pattern. It’s a natural and instinctive language.

The baby translator identifies baby cries automatically, filtering out all other sounds. When the baby translator detects a cry, it analyzes it in a matter of seconds. The cry is translated, and the result is displayed on the phone screen.

Pet Translator
Great animal translator app to understand your furry friends. This cat and dog translator helps you communicate with dogs and cats of various breeds and understand their sounds. Did you know that your cat’s ‘meow’ might not be the same as your neighbor’s cat’s ‘meow’?

This mesenger - animal translator uses machine learning to decode your cat or dog language. It then translates them into the human language.

title: Mein E.ON
description:
The most important My E.ON services in this app from the service provider E.ON Energie Deutschland GmbH ©

With our free My E.ON app, you can easily manage your contract-related issues yourself – whether at home or on the go:

• Record your electricity and/or natural gas meter readings at any time and keep track of your consumption – use the photo function to prevent typos
• Easily adjust your monthly payment to your consumption

• With our online communication, you receive all your bills and contract documents conveniently and paperlessly in your inbox and can download them yourself if needed

• You can also adjust your bank details, update your personal information, and view your contract details at any time

• If you have any further questions or concerns, our chatbot Anna and our LiveChat team are happy to help

• As a My E.ON user, you also benefit from our rewards program with attractive offers and discounts

Further advantages of the My E.ON app:

• Easy and permanent login via Touch ID and Face ID (provided your smartphone supports this functionality)

You are already in Registered with My E.ON:

To use the app, log in as usual with your My E.ON login details.

Not yet registered with My E.ON:
Register with your contract account and the registration code at If you don't yet have the registration code, you can request it online on the same page. If you are not yet an E.ON customer, registration is unfortunately not possible.

Note on the award:

In 2024, ServiceValue GmbH, in cooperation with Focus Money, conducted an online survey on the most customer-friendly apps. The study of the 605 selected apps is based on 97,592 user responses. My E.ON achieved first place in the energy supplier category. The comprehensive study results can be viewed online at the following link: 

In 2025, DEUTSCHLAND TEST, in cooperation with Focus Money, conducted an online survey on German customer service. The study, conducted in 56 cities, is based on 247,053 customer reviews. E.ON achieved first place among energy providers. The comprehensive study results can be found in issue 42/2025 of FOCUS-MONEY, pages 66ff, or at the following link:

[TITLE] Mein E.ON
[CATEGORY] Tools
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] With the My E.ON app you do much about your contract.
[DESCRIPTION]
The most important My E.ON services in this app from the service provider E.ON Energie Deutschland GmbH ©

With our free My E.ON app, you can easily manage your contract-related issues yourself – whether at home or on the go:

• Record your electricity and/or natural gas meter readings at any time and keep track of your consumption – use the photo function to prevent typos
• Easily adjust your monthly payment to your consumption

• With our online communication, you receive all your bills and contract documents conveniently and paperlessly in your inbox and can download them yourself if needed

• You can also adjust your bank details, update your personal information, and view your contract details at any time

• If you have any further questions or concerns, our chatbot Anna and our LiveChat team are happy to help

• As a My E.ON user, you also benefit from our rewards program with attractive offers and discounts

Further advantages of the My E.ON app:

• Easy and permanent login via Touch ID and Face ID (provided your smartphone supports this functionality)

You are already in Registered with My E.ON:

title: HomeMate Smart
description:
One App - Limitless Possibilities

HomeMate Smart is a smart products management app to control your smart home products intelligently from anywhere in the world and to live smarter with comfort.

It allows you to control all the smart home devices like Smart Plugs, Smart IR remote, Smart Lights, Smart Switches, Smart Power Strips, Smart camera, Smart Locks and many more. This App is unified app developed and designed for easy and versatile use. 

Control, Schedule, Automate and Organise all your smart devices to create true smart home experience right at your fingertips.

Works with Voice Assistant, control individual device, groups and scenes through Alexa and Google Assistant.

Play with millions of colours and explore endless possibilities to transform your home with smart lighting products by changing colour, dimming and set them on pre-defined scenes.

Create Intelligent scenes simply by tapping few screens, execute them from app or set them as per conditions like time based, sunrise/sunset, humidity, etc. Let your home run in auto mode by Smart function in app.

Manage multiple smart places in one app by creating new home in Home Management and give access of complete home to other family members. You can also share individual devices with individual family members.

Visit to know more about application and products

In case you have any questions or problems connecting, please email us at

title: Daily Horoscope
description:
Daily Horoscope & Zodiac Signs

Even the greatest of our minds require credible guidance from time to time in order to make judgments that will help us attain our goals. It can be frequently seen in the form of an excellent horoscope, a daily horoscope that covers all elements of our everyday lives. You can eliminate many rash rationales by consulting a proper career horoscope, love horoscope, and finance horoscope before we start our day just with the help of the Daily Horoscope app.

With just one click, you can get the greatest Aries horoscope, Taurus horoscope, Cancer horoscope, Leo horoscope, Capricorn horoscope, Aquarius horoscope, Scorpio horoscope, Virgo horoscope, Libra horoscope, Gemini horoscope, Pisces horoscope, and Sagittarius horoscope. Weekly horoscopes, Monthly horoscopes, and Yearly horoscopes are also incorporated in this app.

Overview of App:

●	Daily horoscope for everyday routine 
●	Monthly horoscope for all new and previous transits in context 
●	Yearly horoscope to help you plan out your year. 
●	Instead of reading general interpretations, there are three categories to pick from: love horoscope, career horoscope, and Finance horoscope.

Tarot Card Reading

This app, which has a strong affinity for tarot, also advertises itself as a superb tarot app with a distinctive and magnificent open borders Tarot card reading option. App users can get a free regular daily tarot reading, Love Tarot Reading, Yes No Tarot Reading, tarot spreads, and much more. Furthermore, the program is always being updated with new features.

The following are some of the advantages of using this app for Tarot reading:

●	A clear set of indicators to assist you in balancing your viewpoints and judgments
●	For a quick summary and decision, read the YES or NO reading.
●	Tarot Spreads to assist you in gaining a better understanding of your circumstance.
●	Interpretation and intuition become more tuned as a result of the simple interface, and you are able to perceive better.

Numerology

Numerology, like tarot and horoscopes, is a gift to our world that can help us reap the same benefits. Using the features of Birth Number, Life Path Number, Expression Number, and Soul Urge Number, you may better understand your life and soul with the free numerology supplied by this program. Love Numerology, Career Numerology, and Finance Numerology are good places to start if you're looking for general information.

Why choose the Daily Horoscope app?

●	The app offers a simple UI that eliminates the need to read through a slew of instructions in order to use it.
●	Instead of void repeats, you'll obtain actual calculated outcomes and cards thanks to well-knowledgeable experts.
●	Choose from a variety of alternatives and confirm using Tarot, numerology, horoscope compatibility, daily horoscopes, weekly horoscopes, and yearly horoscopes.
●	With only one click, you can have a tarot reading to interpret all aspects of your life.
●	Horoscopes for everyday use to help you get the most out of your normal zodiac sign without having to gather too much information.
●	Daily, monthly, weekly horoscopes and horoscope compatibility can be check for all Aries, Taurus, Cancer, Leo, Capricorn, Aquarius, Scorpio, Virgo, Libra, Gemini, Pisces, and Sagittarius zodiac signs.

Simplistic to Use

●	App readings are less intimidating than in-person readings.
●	The application is user-friendly and its data is fully authorized and verified. 
●	The user experience has been created in such a way that users will have no trouble finding any type of reading. 
●	Instead of relying on others, you may effortlessly connect with your inner guide and read the cards. 
●	Assist you in developing your intuition so that you can work for yourself and become more in tune with your inner self and achieve success.

We also respect your privacy. We don’t require any special permission. We are not collecting any user personal information.

title: Fast Typing Keyboard
description:
Fast Typing Keyboard is the ultimate Android keyboard that puts the power of artificial intelligence at your fingertips. With a focus on Tappa Text, our intelligent GPT Assistant, our feature-packed app speeds up your typing experience and offers endless customization possibilities. 

★ Fast Typing: Writing is now faster and more accurate. Predictive text powered by Machine-Learning AI technology offers clever word suggestions in real time. The keys are more responsive than ever, allowing greater typing speed. Try it and let yourself be impressed!

★ Tappa Text: Meet Our ChatGPT-powered Assistant, your AI virtual companion. Ask questions, get answers and simply paste them in your chat right from your keyboard, without switching apps! 

★ Grammar check: Quickly check your spelling, rephrase your sentence and even get instant translation from the AI Assistant, always there for you while writing your texts.

★ Speech-to-Text: Dictate your messages and save time. 

★ In-Keyboard Browser: Say goodbye to switching between apps. Our in-keyboard browser allows you to search the web, find information, and effortlessly share links while staying within the keyboard interface. Stay connected and multitask seamlessly without interrupting your conversations. 

★ Stickers and GIFs: Express yourself in style with our extensive collection of stickers and GIFs. Choose from a wide range of content to add personality and fun to your chats. Let your creativity run wild and make your messages truly stand out. 

★ Clipboard: Copy-pasting made easy. Click and paste without the hassle of long taps, making your writing even faster. 

★ Limitless Customization: Personalize your typing experience with AI GPT Keyboard. Choose from a vast array of Keyboard Themes and Settings to suit your style. Customize the appearance, layout, keyboard sizes, key vibration, key sounds, the numbers row and more, making your keyboard an extension of your personality. 

With Fast Typing Keyboard, powered by Tappa Text, our ChatGPT-based Assistant, your mobile communication experience reaches new heights. Say goodbye to mundane keyboards and embrace a world of creativity and intelligent assistance. Download our app now and revolutionize the way you type with Fast Typing Keyboard - your ultimate typing companion.

title: Weeek
description:
WEEEK is a flexible platform for project, task and team management.
ONE TOOL FOR THE WHOLE TEAM. Manage tasks, projects and documents in one place. Everything to work faster, more efficiently and in sync with your team.

TASKS. An intuitive task manager for process control. There are three task view modes inside:

— Boards - for step-by-step processes, Agile and Scrum work
— Week - for current tasks and meetings
— List - for easy sorting by importance and deadline

Monitor progress on tasks in real time and communicate with the team in the comments.

KNOWLEDGE BASE. Internal service for storing documentation, instructions and regulations. Forget about gray canvases - add images, videos, headings, lists and color blocks. All the team's knowledge is accessible in seconds.

MORE STRUCTURE. No chaos - just a tree-like hierarchy for tasks and documents. Sub-tasks and nested documents help you build a clear system of work.

INTEGRATIONS. WEEEK adapts to your working style. Synchronize your space with Google, Apple or Yandex Calendar, insert attachments from Google Sheets/Docs, Miro and Figma.

SYNC ACROSS DEVICES. Work wherever you want - in the web version, Windows, Mac, Android and iOS apps. All your data is saved. And it's free.

Also:
— flexible privacy settings
— create custom fields in tasks
— task repetition
— in-app, email and Telegram notifications
— priority tags and task types
— and even more features in the web version

Everything you need to get started is free: up to 5 team members, 7 projects and 100 documents. And you can expand the possibilities in paid tariffs in the web version of WEEEK: app.weeek.net.
short_description: Task management app
recent_changes_text: Fixed app's signing in.

title: English-turkish dictionary
description:
TTdictionary english - turkish & turkish - english is a free offline dictionary (vocabulary) with easy and functional user interface, covers over 266.000 words. 

Features:
• Very efficient, fast and good performance. 
• Training feature (with flashcards)
• high-speed search options
• Search filters - search for suffix, prefix(starts with, ends with) 
• Voice recognition 
• Works offline

• Search in Clipboard
• You can add marked words to the favorite list
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark list
• Keeping of Looked-up words in history( as day,month ...)
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark
• Sharing in other apps
• Sounding of word or marked text (Text-to-speech engine)

Description window is opened as clicking on the word. You can minimize and maximize the description window with swipe function.
• The option of searching, sounding and sharing of marked word in the description window.
• Description of selected word are opened on the same window.
• Tablet UI Support

- Setting 
• Changing option of text size
• Changing option of UI color
• Clearing option of Bookmark, Favorite, History list
• You can change the size of text with clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change the color of UI with double clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change description view position on landscape mode (description view on left/right)

TTdic is offline dictionary, offline dictionary needs memory.

You can give suggestions, comments and legal questions related to dictionary to this address.

title: Arccos
description:
Arccos, golf’s #1 on-course tracking system, is the official game tracker of the PGA TOUR. Arccos provides the ability for golfers to capture their performance on more than 40,000 courses worldwide and track their game just like the pros. 

By simply pairing Arccos’ Smart Sensors with the Arccos App, golfers can automatically capture their on-course shots and receive personalized, tour-level data such as strokes gained analytics and smart club distances. Along with player-specific analytics, Arccos provides other powerful yet simple features including an A.I.-powered GPS rangefinder and custom caddie advice. By integrating automatic shot tracking and artificial intelligence Arccos can help golfers play smarter, shoot lower scores, and improve even faster. In fact, new members improve on average by 5.71 strokes within their first year.

Since its inception, Arccos members have collectively taken over 750 million shots across more than 16 million rounds, contributing to the largest on-course dataset in golf, which now encompasses an astounding 1.1 trillion unique data points.

The pioneer of big data and Artificial Intelligence for golf, Arccos Golf LLC is revolutionizing the golfing experience. Its automatic shot-tracking platform delivers unparalleled insights that help players maximize their potential. Players may track their shots using their phone, Arccos Link wearable, or Apple Watch. See your GPS distance with our Wear OS app.

Listed among the “World’s Most Innovative Companies” by Fast Company, ranking #3 in the Sports category globally. Arccos’ official partners include PING, TaylorMade, Cobra Golf, Srixon / Cleveland Golf, Club Champion, Me And My Golf, EA Sports and Golf Digest.

Elevate your Arccos Experience with LINK: 
The small, ultralight wearable allows Arccos players to capture their shot data without having to carry a phone on the course. LINK seamlessly pairs with the Arccos app and sensors. Worn on a player’s belt, waistband, or pocket, it tracks shots in real-time – including the club used and precise location – and automatically transfers the data to a player’s phone via Bluetooth, either during or after the round. This allows golfers to play the game their way, freeing them to keep their phone in a cart, bag, back pocket, or elsewhere.
short_description: Golf On-Course Shot Tracking System
recent_changes_text: Stability improvements and bug fixes

title: South African Dating: Chat app
description:
Take charge of your dating and love life, make it all happen with this 100% FREE online dating app where you can make friends and meet the great singles in South Africa. South African dating has never been so fun, so real, so easy. 

Discover a more visual interface, a more user-friendly chat system for meeting as many people as possible, take advantage of new apps for mobiles and tablets to stay constantly in touch with other South African singles from your region. South Africa is the most fun and easiest online dating app. 

Whether you have been out of a relationship for a long time or recently become single, separated or otherwise, having a single life for a long time can leave a deep void. Life can be so much more exciting and enjoyable when shared with someone you can really connect with. Your next chance happiness awaits in this app. The only thing missing is you. Want a first date with the view of spectacular wildlife in Kruger National Park? Leave it up to chance and let South Africa Social play its magic and have yourself an immortal memory of South Africa. 

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile. 

Through South Africa Social, we want you to finally and personally meet your special someone you can marvel with at the view of Robben Island. Find the perfect match whom you can bike with in Soweto. 

Many single people like you are looking for a fun time, romance, and maybe long-lasting relationships in the future. Make new friends you can explore the vineyards of Stellenbosch with, have your first romantic date with the view of Hermanus, and spend a wonderful time with great and fantastic local singles online. 

Go ahead and meet people just like you. This may be the first step to a newfound love, soulmate, or relationship. Download our dating app and give it a try! 

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes South Africa Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete itself forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. Want to help break the ice? Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe
description:
Welcome to the classic game 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe - Online Multiplayer, play with friends.
Who has not played this popular game in his childhood?
Online Multiplayer, play with friends.
The objective of the game is to connect 4 tiles of your color on the same line (vertical, horizontal or diagonal).
The chips or discs always fall from top to bottom as a result of the force of gravity.
Touch on a column to drop the tile of your color.
NEW: Now available a puzzles module. Resolve all the levels and nobody will beat you.

There are two game modes:
- "One player": You will play against the AI (Artificial Intelligence). There are 10 levels of difficulty. Will you be able to connect a 4-in-a-row against the most "intelligent" robot?
- "Two players": The classic duel in which each player is playing by turns their color chips. The first one that connects 4 in line wins.

What about our game:
- Game Connect Four, Connect 4 is FREE.
- Game Connect Four, Four In A Row is easy play for all ages.
- Game Four In A Row, 4 In A Row is awesome graphics && UI/UX.
- Game 4 In A Row, Connect Four helps you connect with anyone to play games.
- Game Connect Four ,4 In A Row play with awesome AI .

If you like this game (4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe), please rate it and leave a comment. I am an indie game developer and your support means a lot to me! Thank you for your help! If you don't like something in the game, please email me at and tell me why. I want to hear your

description:
Welcome to My AI Friend - A companion with artificial intelligence with which you will never be bored.

My AI Friend is an amazing virtual chatbot powered by artificial intelligence improving with time. All you have to do is keep talking to the AI and you will see how quickly it starts to develop and improve.

AI Friend can be good for chatting, voice talking like a real friend who will be in your pocket 24/7 and ready to listen to you, cheer you up with a joke or tell you something interesting and with AR you can spend time together in the real world!

Chat with AI Friend at any time, at any themes, discover new knowledge with AI conversation. Communicate by voice - AI Friend speaks and understands you and turns conversation in a new way.

You will be really impressed by AI Friend!

- Six AI companions

title: Voca Scanner - Word Quiz
description:
Have you ever found yourself spending more time organizing new vocabulary than actually memorizing English words? We want to help you save time. Now, you no longer need to manually write down each word - simply scan to generate your personalized vocabulary list for quicker and more efficient studying! This can be applied to all levels of English study - elementary, middle school, high school, SAT, TOEIC, TOEFL, TEPS, Public Service English, transfer exam English, IELTS, GRE, G-TELP, Cambridge English, PTE Academic, OET, etc.

✓ Scan a document and it instantly turns into a vocabulary list.
• Forget about the manual process of creating a vocabulary list; just snap a photo and it's transformed into your own personalized list.

✓ You can instantly check unfamiliar words.
• No need to separately organize unfamiliar word list; just by capturing a document, it will automatically classify words you might not know.
• You can set a word extraction filter so that easy words aren't extracted.
• Through word learning, mastered and unfamiliar words are automatically categorized and when scanning documents subsequently, you can instantly check only unfamiliar words.

✓ It automatically organizes idiomatic expressions.
• You might have experienced not being able to interpret despite knowing all the words clearly.
• This is due to idiomatic expressions, where meanings change when several words are combined, and the issue is not knowing which words are idioms.
• Vocabulary Scanner finds such idioms and automatically organizes them for you.

✓ You can quickly search with just part of the word spelling.
• Have you had trouble finding a word because you couldn't remember its spelling?
• Try quickly searching for words by entering only part of the spelling.
• It shows a list of related words every time you enter a spelling.

✓ Learn words through images.
• The left hemisphere of our brain primarily handles language processing, while the right mainly deals with image processing.
• If you simply memorize English words, only the left brain is used, which makes you forget the memorized words quickly.
• Custom images allow you to effectively memorize words, which can also aid long-term memory.

✓ Learn words by solving quizzes.
• We supports four types of learning methods: multiple-choice, flashcards, word lists, and spelling quiz.
• You can check your progress in the middle of a quiz and repeatedly learn words that are difficult to memorize.
• Once a quiz is complete, we gather all the words you answered incorrectly for you to review and study again.

✓ Listen to your own vocabulary list.
• You can listen to your own vocabulary list in the form of a media player.
• Just try to utilize it for 10 minutes while commuting to school or work!

✓ We support AI (Artificial intelligence) voices from over 50 countries worldwide.
• Korean
• English (United States of America)
• Enlgish (Australia)

title: PlanNet Reps
description:
Sharing your PlanNet Marketing Opportunities with your Leads, managing and tracking your business and achievements is the key to building a strong and prosperous business. The PlanNet Rep Mobile App is your tool to accomplish this and much more.
You can personally build your list of Leads from people you have met in your everyday life. Friends, relatives, past business associates, events, church members, the list goes on and on. Many of these people may already be in your phones contact list which you can use to share using this App. You can do this literally, with people in over 20 countries where PlanNet Marketing does business as well as through your Social Media accounts.
You can also build and manage a Rep Organization with the tools built into the App. 
If your Leads love to travel, then introduce them to your ITA Product by sharing your ITA Videos with them.
Check out the list of features:
 1. View Inspirational Messages from President & CFO Andy Cauthen
 2. Leads System 
 a. Build and manage a list of Leads
 b. Share your Business Card
 c. Share your Replicated website
 d. Share the PlanNet Facebook Site
 e. Share Marketing Videos in English and Spanish
 f. Keep individual Notes and Reminders on Leads
 g. Communicate with Leads via Text, Email or Phone
 h. Filter, Track and Delete Leads if they are converted or no longer interested
 i. View Lead Activity
 3. Rep Team
 a. Track your Rep Team’s Recent Activity/Sales
 b. Track your Rep Team’s Stats 
 c. View their Achievements and congratulate them via Text, Email or Phone
 d. Communicate with your Team Members via Text, Email or Phone
 4. ITA Sales
 a. Track your Personal ITA Sales 
 b. Filter by Active, Credit Hold or Cancelled
 c. Communicate with your ITAs via Text, Email or Phone
 5. Get Started - New Reps can start with by viewing this Video and then watch the Training Videos
 6. My Account & Business Snapshot
 a. Account Profile
 I. View your Account Profile
 II. View & Communicate with your Sponsor & Director via Text, Email or Phone
 b. My Business Snapshot
 I. View Commission Summary
 II. Rep Status
 III. ITA Status
 IV. Total Active ITA’s & Reps
 V. Purchase Summary
 VI. Auto Renewal Status & Next Date
 c. View your Achievements
 7. Info Center
 a. Company News 
 I. Sort by Calls or Events
 II. Read Articles
 III. Register for upcoming Zoom Calls from the Article
 b. Enter/Edit/Respond to Support Tickets, just like on the website
 c. Search the Knowledge Base for questions on Commissions, Genealogy, Rep Enrollment, ITA Enrollment, Website Management and much more
 d. Download Documents
 e. Visit PlanNet Websites
 f. Library
 I. Listen to the last 5 Audio recordings of ‘The Morning Call’
 II. View and Share on Social Media, US, UK & Spanish Videos for Training & Marketing
 g. Download Banners/Signage & Sign-In Sheets
 8. My Business (Reports)
 I. View your current Weekly & Monthly Commissions
 II. View Recent Downline Sales and communicate with the Sponsors
 III. View the Top Money Earners
 9. Manage Auto Renewals
 I. View/Manage your Auto Renewals
 10.

title: My ADHD
description:
This app brings Diagnostics and Tests including the ASRS 1.1 for adults and SNAP-IV for kids, this are the most reliables tools used worldwide by psychiatrists on the diagnosis of ADHD.

And much more features such as...

• Facial recognition through Artificial Intelligence with suggestions of activities customised by your current mood
• Various techniques with insights and tips on how to get the most out of each activity
• Translated videos will give you a richer visual representation on how to use the app
• Helpful tips for accomplishing your tasks and increasing productivity
• Organization, Health and Studies techniques
• Support for multiple languages including English, Spanish and Portuguese
• Dark Mode and a dedicated font tailored to improve the readability for people with dyslexia

title: InnoCaption Live Call Captions
description:
Make Every Call Clear and Accessible with InnoCaption!

Struggling to hear phone calls due to hearing loss? Never miss a word with InnoCaption’s call captioning service to live transcribe your call. Whether you prefer AI captions or captions from live stenographers (CART), ensure fast, accurate captions for all your phone conversations.

InnoCaption is a free, federally funded service designed for individuals who are deaf, hard of hearing, or have difficulty hearing phone calls. Stream phone calls directly to your Bluetooth compatible hearing aids or cochlear implants and get real-time, live transcriptions. InnoCaption works seamlessly with devices like Signia, Phonak, Beltone, ReSound, MED-EL, Oticon, and more*. Missed an important call? Read voicemail transcripts with InnoCaption’s visual voicemail. 

InnoCaption’s call captioning and text to speech technology makes phone calls accessible without needing ASL, offering an alternative to VRS for those who prefer captions. Our caption call app is perfect for seniors, veterans, hearing aid or cochlear implant users, or anyone experiencing hearing loss. Make and receive calls with clear captions using IP relay and teletype technology (TTY) on your phone, tablet, and computer!
Download InnoCaption today—the top solution for captioned calls!

INNOCAPTION FEATURES

Live Transcribe Phone Calls for Individuals With Hearing Loss
• Get clear captions and live transcribe your phone conversations 
• Closed captioning modes: Live stenographer or AI auto captions with teletype technology (TTY)
• Caption call service is available in Spanish, French, Chinese, Vietnamese, and more
• Caption calls on a computer with InnoCaption Web.

Make & Receive Phone Calls With Visual Voicemail and Auto Captions
• FCC certified and funded - InnoCaption is a FREE caption app for the deaf or individuals with hearing loss
• Setup call forwarding to make and receive calls using your own number
• Stream calls to your Bluetooth compatible hearing aid, cochlear implant, or other assistive listening device
• Sync contacts for convenient dialing & accessibility

Enhanced Accessibility Through Personalization
• Caption Alerts – Receive caption screen alerts when calls resume during long holds.
• Personalize your InnoCaption app - Customize the app to fit your accessibility needs

Hearing aid & cochlear implant compatibility with manufacturers such as:
• Oticon
• Phonak
• Starkey
• MED-EL
• Advanced Bionics
• Cochlear
• Resound
• Unitron
• Signia
• Widex
• Rexton
• and more!*

Voicemail & Transcripts
• Save caption call transcripts to review later
• Visual voicemail converts voicemail to text for convenient review and clear captions to reference

Spam Filter for Secure Calling
• Block high-risk calls and get alerts for potential spam calls

911 Calls
• Caption your emergency calls by dialing 911 from the app**

*Due to potential variations in hardware and software compatibility may vary by individual device.

**911 service may be limited or unavailable in the event of network disruptions or degradation, service connection or internet failure, or other circumstances. For more information visit: 

Cellular data plan or Wi-Fi connectivity is required for usage.

FEDERAL LAW PROHIBITS ANYONE BUT REGISTERED USERS WITH HEARING LOSS FROM USING INTERNET PROTOCOL (IP) CAPTIONED TELEPHONES WITH THE CAPTIONS TURNED ON. IP Captioned Telephone Service may use a live operator. The operator generates captions of what the other party to the call says. These captions are then sent to your phone. There is a cost for each minute of captions generated, paid from a federally administered fund.
short_description: Caption & live transcribe calls | Deaf, hard of hearing & tinnitus accessibility

title: WOMBO Dream - AI Art Generator
description:
Long Description:
 AI Art Generator - Turn text into AI generated paintings, beautiful AI drawings & stunning AI pictures! All you need to do is enter a prompt, pick an art style - and watch WOMBO Dream bring your idea to life in seconds. Want to create your own AI artwork? WOMBO Dream - AI Art Generator is your creative studio. Turn text into any AI image or AI photo you want.

 It's like magic: simply type in whatever you want Dream to paint - such as "Cosmic Dragon" or "Neon City" - pick a style (Realistic, Anime, Fantasy, Cartoon, Avatar etc.) and hit create!

 You don't need any drawing skills or art supplies to make beautiful AI paintings and AI drawings. Just bring your imagination and let WOMBO Dream - AI Art Generator unleash your creativity. 

 WOMBO Dream can create AI art for any purpose - wallpapers, logos, tattoo ideas, cartoon portraits, AI avatars, and AI profile pictures. Our AI image generator handles it all.

 Explore Art Styles with AI Photo Generator & AI Image Creator 
 Whether you're looking for vibrant AI paintings or darker dystopian AI art, WOMBO Dream has you covered. Our AI art generator offers dozens of styles - from anime and cartoon to realistic and abstract. Create AI drawings that match your unique vision.

 Edit Your AI Art with Text - AI Picture Generator 
 Customize your AI pictures and adjust details by writing simple instructions. Change hair color, add backgrounds, adjust lighting - the possibilities are endless. Our AI image generator gives you complete creative control over your AI artwork.

 Create AI Art from Photos - AI Image Generator 
 Start with an image as a visual base for your AI art. Upload a photo and watch our AI photo generator transform it into a masterpiece. Turn photos into AI paintings, create cartoon versions of yourself, or generate stunning AI portraits and AI avatars.

 Share Your AI Generated Art & Go Viral 
 Share your AI paintings, AI drawings, and AI pictures with friends and family. Join millions creating AI art on social media with the latest AI image generator technology.

 Powerful AI Painting & AI Drawing Tools 
 Our AI art generator uses advanced technology to create stunning AI images in seconds. Whether you want beautiful AI paintings, detailed AI drawings, or creative AI pictures - WOMBO Dream delivers. Create AI avatars, AI portraits, and AI artwork that reflects your unique style.

 The Best AI Art Generator App 
 Looking for a mobile alternative to Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion? WOMBO Dream is your ideal AI art generator. Create unlimited AI paintings, AI drawings, and AI images - all from your phone. Join over 100 million users who create AI art with Dream every day.

 Download WOMBO Dream and start creating AI art today. Your imagination is the only limit.

title: Quadropoly - Monopolist Tycoon
description:
Welcome to Quadropoly 3D, the unique and improved variant of the Classic Quadropoly - a property card trading board game that has captured the hearts and mind of millions of families across the World. Quadropoly offers a unique twist on the classic business board game: an ability to hone your financial management and negotiation skills and learn business strategies from the most patient and experienced teacher of all – an Artificial Intelligence. AI has been trained with Machine Learning models on all games played by millions of players since 2016. This innovative technology ensures that the game is challenging and engaging for players of all skill levels.

Modern graphics and simple user interface designed to provide players with a great way to spend quality time with family and friends, either offline or online in multiplayer mode. It will improve your financial confidence and business management skills by competing with other players and becoming a monopolist of the board. Quadropoly is not just a game, it is a strategic simulation exercise that can help players of all ages and social classes improve their investment and negotiation skills.

🔵 One of the main foundations of Quadropoly is its commitment to fair play. There is no cheating or re-rolling, and no hidden luck parameters. Instead, players rely on their business and negotiation skills to succeed. AI does not know whether their trading partner is another AI or a human, nor their intelligence regardless of the difficulty: trade offer evaluations depend on pretty much everything on the board, but not on who their opponent is.

📇 Quadropoly provides support for all official rules by the book. With AI advice available at any moment during gameplay, players can rapidly improve their own skills in any business online trading game. Anyone can learn the real value of properties, improve their negotiation skills, and manage their cashflow more effectively.

🎥 One of the most exciting features of Quadropoly is the ability to watch replays of completed games played by the best players from the Leaderboards. This is a great way to learn new tactics and become a better player. With extensive customization options, including support for hundreds of house rules, Quadropoly is a game you can play over and over for years.

🌠 The game's variants in animation speed make it possible to finish within 6-15 minutes, establishing it as a perfect pick for those desiring a fast-paced and thrilling experience. Every single AI in the game is unique, with its personality defining its risk-taking tendencies as well as its attitude towards property. The AIs are great at imitating real people, with the ability to become annoyed, desperate, or greedy.

🎭 With eight difficulty levels available, players can stop on a level they feel comfortable with and advance at their own pace. The number of scores given per game depends on the number of tactics used. This ensures the best players' ability to get a higher score per game, being able to advance 10 to 50 times faster than the beginner and unlock top levels quickly. With top AI levels capable of participating in World Championships, even the best players are guaranteed to find the game very challenging yet fair.
First 2 AI levels do not use Machine Learning models - they are very easy opponents. You can play offline.
The next 2 AI levels do not trade between each other - they are only permitted to trade with the player. 
The remaining 4 AI levels are allowed to use more tactics and have fewer penalties. Last 2 AI, Champions and Monopolists, attempt to trade with everyone every turn!

Quadropoly is not just a board game, it is a true experience. With its innovative features, exciting gameplay and commitment to fair play, it is a game that you will not want to put down. So come and join the fun, crush your opponents and experience the thrill of dominating the competition and becoming the ultimate monopolist in the world of Quadropoly!
short_description: 3D Classic board game online & offline. Learn Business and become a Monopolist!
recent_changes_text: Thank you for participating in Quadropoly3D Beta! - Added Fireworks on GameOver - Added random rewarding events in Prison for low difficulty levels - Many UI improvements - Bug fixesPlease email with any issues, suggestions and questions. Have a great day!

title: Evie - The eVoice book reader
description:
GIVE YOUR EYES A MUCH NEEDED REST
Evie uses Text To Speech (TTS) technologies to transform written text into an audible narration.

Evie is free. Really free, without any ads.
You can use for as long as you want, with any Text To Speech engine you have on your phone.

ENJOY THOSE BOOKS FOR WHICH YOU NEVER HAD TIME
• Listen to a book while commuting
• Listen to a book during your work-out
• When working in your garden
• Or go to sleep listening to a book

AUDIO PLAYER FEATURES
• Evie can read out loud even in background or with the screen turned off.
• You can control playback with your earphones buttons, either Bluetooth or wired.
• Evie integrates with your car stereo via Bluetooth. Play, Pause and Skip Forward or Backward from your car's buttons.
• You can control it from your lock screen or from the notifications drawer.
• Evie offers an Equaliser to fine tune the sound the way you like it.

EVIE ON YOUR SMART WATCH
Starting with version 16, Evie works on your Wear OS smart watch.
This is feature requires an Internet connection and an Evie account. 

DISCOVER AN APP YOU CAN TRUST
Evie does not require any permissions to run. 
It does not need access to your files, your contacts, or any other information and it does not read nor store cookies on your phone. 

TRY THE LIFE-LIKE AMAZON VOICES
Evie integrates with Polly, the excellent TTS engine from Amazon. 
Polly is a cloud service that uses deep learning technologies to synthesize speech that sounds like a human voice. 

This is a paid feature, and requires an Evie account. 
Evie offers simple

title: MyLP Driver
description:
MyLP App empowers fleet drivers like you to efficiently manage your company vehicle right from your mobile device. Plus, it’s designed to alert you of what you need to do when.

You get in-app maintenance reminders to keep your vehicle running smoothly. Access the locator to find network service centers near you. Simply present your approved services and authorization codes for easy transactions at the shop. Need to find the nearest, most cost-effective fueling station? The locator tool has you covered. And, when it’s time for a new vehicle, MyLP App will track your order every step of the way.

The redesigned mileage reporting tool makes it easier than ever to log your personal and business miles. The more intuitive user interface means easier scrolling and quicker access to your data. You’ll also get improved status views with new icons and labels for guidance-at-a-glance. Plus, in-app alerts and messages to keep you accurate and up to date. Need to set your preference for monthly or daily reporting? It’s a quick toggle. And, how about some of our most common interactions? Just swipe.

A Digital Glovebox stores your fuel card PIN, registration and insurance information for ready access and fast registration renewals. We can even help you assess and improve your performance as a fleet driver with our in-app OneScore ratings. Need policy support? Just ask your virtual assistant, Elle.

Save time. Stay informed. And upgrade your driving experience. Download the new MyLP App now.
short_description: Easier to manage your company vehicles with the MyLP app
recent_changes_text: MyLeasePlan went to the shop for a tune up and came back with minor updates. Our release notification process received some optimizations improving the driver experience.

title: Baltimore Ravens Mobile
description:
Stay Connected to the Flock – Anytime, Anywhere
The official team app of the Baltimore Ravens – built for the Flock to be your #1 source for 24/7/365 coverage of all things Ravens. At home, in the stadium and on the go, stay connected with breaking news, exclusive content and everything you need as a fan.

Get the Full Experience:
• Create Your Profile: Personalize your app experience and unlock exclusive features available only to logged in users.
• Stay Informed: Enable push notifications and automatic updates so you're always the first to know about breaking news, roster moves, giveaways and more. Set your preferences to get the alerts that matter the most to you.
• Get Local: Enable Location Services for live game content, enhanced in-stadium features and event alerts.

Key Features:
• Exclusive Access: Watch live and on-demand videos, read the latest news, browse photo galleries and listen to team podcasts.
• Tickets Hub: Securely and easily buy, sell, transfer and manage season and single-game tickets and parking.
• Ravens Reels & Stories: Dive into behind-the-scenes content and player highlights.
• Real-Time Gameday Coverage: Follow live scores, stats and in-game updates.
• FlockBot Virtual Assistant: Get instant answers to questions about gameday, M&T Bank Stadium, tickets, and team info — available 24/7.
• Team Info: Check the schedule, roster, depth chart, injury report and more.
• Virtual Reality: Take virtual photos with your favorite players and step into 360-degree video experiences.
• Games & Giveaways: Play in-app games and enter for chances to win autographed merchandise and other prizes.
• Team Store: Shop the latest Ravens gear directly from the app.
• Ravens Auctions: Bid on exclusive game-used and autographed Ravens memorabilia.

In-Stadium Experience:
• PSL Owner Hub: Take advantage of exclusive PSL Owner discounts and resources.
• Interactive Maps: View 3D seating charts and detailed maps to navigate the stadium with ease.
• Fan Services: Report issues, access fan guides, get help, view closed captioning and more.
• Exclusive In-Stadium Video: Watch NFL RedZone + instant replays and live game footage from multiple camera angles right from your seat.

+ Also check out our Ravens TV app for Roku, Fire TV and Apple TV.
short_description: The official app of the Baltimore Ravens.
recent_changes_text: This release includes a critical ticketing update required for all fans attending Ravens games in 2020.As we gear up for the return of football and the start of training camp, we tidied up some things and made a few minor tweaks and fixes that provide a smoother app experience.We also consolidated our push notification categories and enhanced location-based features. Be sure to enable both push and location services to take advantage of the improvements.ALWAYS MORE. NEVER LESS. #RavensFlock

title: Yatzy - Classic Fun Dice Game
description:
Play for free to the most famous and exciting dice game. Yatzy is popular across countries under different names such as Yams, Crag, Farkle, Balut, Yahtzee, Kismet, Generala, Cheerio, Yazy, Yatzi, Yatze, Yatzee...

Each turn, player's roll 5 dice up to 3 times trying to achieve 1 of the 13 combinations. Each combination must be played and scored only once. The goal is to get the highest score possible.

Yatzy comes with 4 modes :
Solo : practice and train yourself on 1 grid and try to beat your personal best
Double grid: play solo on 2 grids and reach the highest score
Versus opponent: challenge yourself and try to beat our bot, a friendly and smart AI
Local player: play with a friend on the same device turn by turn

Yatzy is designed to provide you with the best gaming experience with great graphics. Create your own and unique game with many customization options.

Download it now and play for free wherever and whenever you want! The app is free to use. We offer
short_description: Relax and fun for hours playing the original Yatzy dice game online or offline.

title: Keyboard Pro 2025
description:
Personalize your phone and tablet keypads with the new Keyboard Pro 2025, a small app that will bring a big transformation straight to your keyboard. 

♢ What you get when you use Keyboard Pro 2025!♢ 
 
• A whole new look - transform your Android device completely with this stylish keyboard theme. 

• TappaText - use the AI-powered chatbot to write anything from cover letters and emails to texts and social media captions. Ask Open AI and simply paste the answer in your chat.

• In-Keyboard Browser - explore the web without ever leaving your keyboard. Copy content or URL's and paste them directly in your chat!

• Clipboard - quickly copy content and text directly into your keyboard’s input field. No more long taps. One click and you are done!

• Themes - choose from a variety of fun themes and backgrounds to suit your style. 

• Stickers and GIFs- easily browse and send custom stickers and GIFs to all your friends. 

• Settings - adjust the keyboard size, input options and text correction from your settings. 

Keyboard Pro 2025 is a state-of-the-art keyboard that will change the way you write. Compatible with Whatsapp, Instagram, Facebook, Snapchat, Telegram and other messaging apps.

recent_changes_text: Fixed sticker packs.Added more themes.

Achieve your next career goal with LinkedIn Learning—the only skill development platform based on the real-time skill and career insights from LinkedIn.

With the LinkedIn Learning Android app, you can:
- Learn from industry experts on the most in-demand business, tech, and creative skills
- Get real-time advice with AI-powered coaching in your pocket
- Get personalized content recommendations based on your skills and goals
- Stay up-to-date on the latest skills with new courses added weekly
- Learn the way you want online or offline—with bite-sized video, audio, or full course options
- Start learning a little bit every day with Daily
- Earn Professional Certificates and Continuing Education Credits
- Add certificates of completion to your LinkedIn profile 
- Learn in the language that's best for you, including English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Chinese, Portuguese, Dutch, Indonesian, Polish, Turkish, and Korean

Trending topics include:
- Artificial intelligence and generative AI
- Business productivity and software
- Cybersecurity
- Diversity, equity, and inclusion
- Leadership and management
- Software development

The LinkedIn Learning app is free to download. With a

title: Missive
description:
Missive lets teams manage shared inboxes and collaborate around emails. Chat, share attachments and assign tasks right from your inbox. Use shared labels to organize conversations by project or department.

• Canned Responses - Create reusable templates to save time on repetitive emails.

• Collaborative Writing - Compose emails together and get reviewed in real time.

• Snooze - Set reminders on emails and chats to clean up your inbox.

• Send Later - Draft an email and schedule it to be sent at just the right time.

• Pinned Conversations - Drag important conversations to the sidebar for quick access.

• Rules - Apply filters to automatically archive or assign conversations to anyone in your organization.

• Integrations - OpenAI, Asana, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Todoist, Trello, and more.

And much more…

• Auto CC / BCC
• Snooze only if nobody replies
• Push notifications
• Rich text and HTML signatures
• Sharable conversation links
• Unified inbox
short_description: Missive lets teams manage shared inboxes and collaborate around emails.
recent_changes_text: Fixes:• Draft content not always being saved under certain circumstances• Removing conversations from labels not having undo banner• Drag icons visible with small desktop window width

title: Ling - Learn Burmese Language
description:
Learn Burmese with Ling in just 10 minutes a day!

DOWNLOAD FREE - LEARN WITH GAMES - SPEAK WITH NATIVE SPEAKERS

Our free Burmese language learning app is designed to make learning Burmese as easy and as fun as possible! Using a variety of mini-games and interactive learning techniques, you’ll be able to immerse yourself in the Burmese language using just your smartphone! 

Whether you’re a complete beginner hoping to learn the basics of the language, or you’re already pretty fluent and want to learn even more advanced Burmese phrases, or brush up on your knowledge – Ling has you covered! 

FEATURED IN

Yahoo • VOGUE • Forbes • NBC

Traditional Burmese language lessons can be tedious and dull. At Ling, we’ve made the learning process fun by using puzzles, games, challenges, and quizzes to teach you how to read, write, speak, and understand Burmese! 

-------------------------------------------------------
OUR Burmese COURSE HIGHLIGHTS
-------------------------------------------------------
- Flashcards to test your knowledge
- Quizzes to track your progress 
- AI chatbot to practice daily conversations
- Speaking exercises to improve your pronunciation
- Finger tracing via your smartphone screen to become familiar with writing
- Match pictures with the corresponding word
- Put sentences into the correct order
- Complete the unfinished sentence
… And much, much more! 

With so many mini-games, challenges, quizzes, and puzzles to teach you Burmese, you’ll have hours of fun learning a new language. It won’t even feel like learning at all! 

--------------------------------
KEY FEATURES OF LING
--------------------------------
- User-friendly interface
- Easy to navigate
- Lessons cover the four aspects of the language (reading, writing, speaking, and listening)
- Courses for all fluency levels, from absolute beginner to advanced
- Mini-games, flashcards, challenges, and interactive games to help you learn faster and more effectively
- All courses were created with the help of native speakers of each language
- Learn helpful grammar tips while playing fun, interactive games
- Learn how to write the alphabet with cutting-edge finger tracing technology
- Learn how to speak about a variety of different topics

Ling is available for 60+ different languages:

Learn Afrikaans, Learn Albanian, Learn Arabic, Learn Armenian, Learn Bengali, Learn Bosnian, Learn Bulgarian, Learn Burmese, Learn Cantonese, Learn Chinese, Learn Croatian, Learn Czech, Learn Danish, Learn Dutch, Learn English, Learn Estonian, Learn Finnish, Learn French, Learn Georgian, Learn German, Learn Greek, Learn Hebrew, Learn Hindi, Learn Hungarian, Learn Indonesian, Learn Irish, Learn Italian, Learn Japanese, Learn Kannada, Learn Khmer, Learn Korean, Learn Lao, Learn Latvian, Learn Lithuanian, Learn Malayalam, Learn Malaysian, Learn Marathi, Learn Mongolian, Learn Nepali, Learn Norwegian, Learn Persian, Learn Polish, Learn Portuguese, Learn Punjabi, Learn Romanian, Learn Russian, Learn Serbian, Learn Slovak, Learn Slovenian, Learn Spanish, Learn Swahili, Learn Swedish, Learn Tagalog, Learn Tamil, Learn Telugu, Learn Thai, Learn Turkish, Learn Ukrainian, Learn Urdu, Learn Vietnamese

If you have any suggestions or

Our free Burmese language learning app is designed to make learning Burmese as easy and as fun as possible! Using a variety of mini-games and interactive learning techniques, you’ll be able to immerse yourself in the Burmese language using just your smartphone! 

Whether you’re a complete beginner hoping to learn the basics of the language, or you’re already pretty fluent and want to learn even more advanced Burmese phrases, or brush up on your knowledge – Ling has you covered! 

FEATURED IN

Yahoo • VOGUE • Forbes • NBC

Traditional Burmese language lessons can be tedious and dull. At Ling, we’ve made the learning process fun by using puzzles, games, challenges, and quizzes to teach you how to read, write, speak, and understand Burmese!

-------------------------------------------------------
- Flashcards to test your knowledge
- Quizzes to track your progress 
- AI chatbot to practice daily conversations
- Speaking exercises to improve your pronunciation
- Finger tracing via your smartphone screen to become familiar with writing
- Match pictures with the corresponding word
- Put sentences into the correct order
- Complete the unfinished sentence
… And much, much more! 

With so many mini-games, challenges, quizzes, and puzzles to teach you Burmese, you’ll have hours of fun learning a new language. It won’t even feel like learning at all! 

--------------------------------
KEY FEATURES OF LING
--------------------------------
- User-friendly interface
- Easy to navigate
- Lessons cover the four aspects of the language (reading, writing, speaking, and listening)
- Courses for all fluency levels, from absolute beginner to advanced
- Mini-games, flashcards, challenges, and interactive games to help you learn faster and more effectively
- All courses were created with the help of native speakers of each language
- Learn helpful grammar tips while playing fun, interactive games
- Learn how to write the alphabet with cutting-edge finger tracing technology
- Learn how to speak about a variety of different topics
