title: German English Dictionary
description:
Burn the words like a dragon with Dragoma!
 
The free Offline German English Dictionary & Translator application. Internet connection is not required! If you want to learn German or English the most effective way, there's no better choice than Dragoma! Dragoma shows the definition/meaning of German or English words as pop up without opening dictionary app ever. No hassle of switching between apps. You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the Offline German English Dictionary & Translator / offline Englisch Deutsch Wörterbuch & Übersetzer
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both German - English and English - German directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.

Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 

Facebook: 

Twitter: 

Instagram:

Email: 

DISCLAIMER:
The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.
If not installed, your device may ask you to install the TTS engine. An internet connection may be required. We recommend installing it before traveling as roaming data tariffs may be very expensive.

title: Invoxia GPS
description:
Never worry about your valuables again! Track your Motorcycle, Car, Bike, Bags, Loved Ones, Pets, and more with Invoxia GPS Trackers. 24/7 Monitoring, real time anti-theft alerts, geofencing, activity monitoring and unlimited location history.

Get an Invoxia GPS Tracker, Bike Tracker, Pet Tracker or Mini Tracker now to put your mind at ease and protect what you care about! 
The Invoxia GPS App works with all Invoxia GPS Trackers. 

You can get an Invoxia GPS Tracker at our web shop: 

This app enables you to: 

*Track your vehicle, assets, loved ones, pets and more
*Receive theft alerts when your vehicle or assets are tilted or moved
*See your tracker’s complete location history 
*Set virtual geofences and configure entry/exit notifications
*Make your tracker ring to find it more easily
*Check your tracker’s battery level
*Adjust your tracker’s update frequency
*Monitor an unlimited number of Invoxia GPS Trackers
*Use the proximity radar for short-range location
*See an overview of your pet’s daily activity

***24/7 Tracking *** 
Keep a watchful eye on your car, motorcycle, or anything else you want to track. Know where your Invoxia GPS Tracker is from the app at any time. 

***Tilt and Motion alerts***
Instantly receive a notification when your motorcycle or other valuables equipped with an Invoxia GPS Tracker are tilted more than 30 degrees or if motion is detected.

***Interactive Map***
The interactive maps allow you to display the location of all your vehicles or valuables with trackers. You can zoom into the location of an individual tracker. With the Invoxia GPS app you can add an unlimited number of trackers. You can also switch between the standard map view and hybrid satellite view. 

***Regular updates***
While your tracker is in motion, receive regular updates of its position. Choose between three update frequencies (High, Medium, Low). Always know where your tracker is.

***Location History***
Consult your tracker’s location history for any time period you choose. See where your tracker has been and how quickly it got from point A to B.

***Geofencing (Safe Zones)*** 
Define geographic zones in the app for your important places: your home, the office, your children’s school, or anywhere else! Receive notifications when your Tracker enters or leaves these areas, so you’re always in the know. 

***Important Notifications*** 
Receive notifications via the app the second your vehicle begins to move, or your assets are being tampered with. 

***Pet Activity***
See a breakdown of your pet’s daily activity and better understand how they spend their time.

***Battery Status***
Always keep an eye on the battery status of your Invoxia GPS Tracker. The app displays how much battery is remaining and sends out reminder notifications if the battery runs low. 

***SOS Alerts***
Receive an instant alert and position update if the button on your Invoxia GPS Tracker is pressed. 

***Update your tracker***
Our team of engineers is constantly improving the functionality of our GPS Trackers. With the app, receive a notification and update the firmware of your tracker to enjoy the latest features. 

***Proximity Radar***
Are you near your tracker but can’t find it? The app includes a proximity radar that uses Bluetooth technology to help you navigate the last few feet. 

***IFTTT Compatible***
All Invoxia GPS Trackers are compatible with the IFTTT platform enabling you to design more complex automations and connect all of your connected devices together. With IFTTT, enable SMS and email notifications. 

No limit to the number of users using the same account: you can have multiple people monitoring your trackers

Notifications are sent through the app.

About Invoxia: 
Founded in 2010, lnvoxia designs and manufactures a range of sensors that integrate artificial intelligence. Invoxia offers a range of intelligent GPS trackers for vehicles (cars, motorcycles, trucks), pets and bicycles with ultra-long battery life.

title: WeWALK
description:
WeWALK is an innovative mobility platform developed by blind people for visually impaired and low-vision individuals. With the WeWALK Smart Cane and WeWALK App, you can confidently navigate your surroundings, discover nearby locations, and access a range of accessible services—all designed to enhance your independence. 

Key Features: 

Step-by-Step Navigation 

WeWALK offers accessible, step-by-step navigation, allowing visually impaired and low-vision users to easily find their way to any destination. You can explore different routes, choose your preferred path, and receive real-time instructions. 

Public Transportation Integration 

View nearby public transport stops, learn about the upcoming lines, and get notified when approaching your stop—ensuring you never miss your destination. 

Smart Cane Integration 

When paired with the WeWALK Smart Cane, the app takes navigation to the next level. The Smart Cane features enhanced obstacle detection (including head-height obstacles) and provides vibration
short_description: WeWALK: Your Smart Mobility Companion for Accessible Navigation
recent_changes_text: Previously, we did not provide warnings when you walked in the opposite direction during navigation. In this version, if you exceed 20 meters (66 feet) in the wrong direction, you will hear a warning. After hearing this warning, the navigation direction will be updated. For example, when you miss a turn to the left, you will hear the return warning and the direction will be updated as turn right.

title: Khakassia Organic Tractor Farm
description:
Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2021

Are you tired after a day’s work? Do you want to have fun in an idle relaxing game? Do you love ❤️ incremental games? Are you willing to take care of farms animals 🐣🐮 🐷 and work the land to provide for them? Well then, have we got a Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2021 game for you! Welcome to the world of farmers!! Play as a farmer whose job is to grow the crops, harvest and animals to earn cash & upgrade. You have different kinds of livestock like hens, sheep & cow to make your living even better where you can sell to earn cash & invest more in your farm. Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2020 is the best farming simulation game in which you can expand your farmland to produce pure & naturals foods in the country. It's a FREE Gameplay!!! Enjoy the world of cultivation.

You have a tractor trolleys full of cargo seed luggage also cultivators and trucks, form mowers and other harvester and farming tools which is useful for farming crops in the fields. Starts your farming drive from the village to the city bring seeds of corn and sunflower and go to the farms to help the farmers working in the farms. Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2020 is the real farming simulation farms sim driving game is one of the best tractors farming sim. You will drive tractor, trolley, truck, harvesters, water machine, plover and other driving vehicle also old horse carts simulator on the off-road, and the modern farming driving on the city roads for cargo transports. Also feed you animal like goat, cows and hens, you have your own animals farms and grind mills like a real new farmer has.
This farmer sim offers to drive real modern farming vehicles like tractors, cultivators, harvesters, plow machine, seed machine, water spray machine like a real new farmer do, also having horse carts driving sim. Your pet animals in your animals farms near grind mill will wait for food. Transport it in your cart to feed cows and goats.

Business strategy for the aspiring families of farmers! While starting your business empire you can have several different approaches. As you start the Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2020 game you’ll get some gems the easy way and afterwards you’ll receive 10 on every level-up. You can use these gems for some quick money by acquiring profit or speed multipliers, travel of time elixirs or you can invest them towards the mine that will produce a steady income of gems every day. It is a wise decision to invest the gems in either the Dairy or in speed/profit multipliers. While using a travel to time elixir to forward the time and getting easy profits sounds tempting, a more long-term well thought out plan will bring higher profits. Life on a farm can be hard when working alone. Hiring new managers, apart from business perfect automation, will also enable Rainbow new Power of Villages, the Rainbow Hunt Rain that will grant you increased profits! If you feel your profit generation is not up to par look for investment new opportunities! Farming ltd. companies are always looking for people eager to sell and start again. Sell your families farms and start anew with increased profits! Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2020 game is free to play but some advantages can be earned for real bunch of money. An active & fast Internet connection is required to play in order to prevent Leaderboard tampering.

Khakassia Mega Organics Tractor Farming SIM 2021 Game Features:

*Free Simulator Game to Play
*Unlock & Play the most amazing game
*Unique themes & tips available
*Raise adorable animal & manage farm of dairy 
*Plant fresh crops & cook delicious food
*Best Farming Game
*Eye catchy & high definition graphic

What are you waiting for? Get to work 👩‍🌾 farmers👨‍🌾!

description:
Are you attracted to Vietnamese people or are you looking to meet people in Vietnam? 

We have a great new app for you!

Vietnam Dating App is the best free dating app to connect with Vietnamese singles or to meet Viet singles from around the world. 

Vietnam Dating App is a great way to meet people around you in Vietnam, make new friends and mingle with them, or find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. 

Whether you are looking to see Vietnamese girls and their ‘Ao Dai’ or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Vietnam, Vietnam Dating App will have someone for you!

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile. 

💗 Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

💗 What makes Vietnam Dating App unique is this: 
- You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. 
- Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

💗 Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! 
They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! 

💗 Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

💗 We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. 
With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete itself forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

💗 Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? 
It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. 
If they like you back, we will connect both of you. 

💗 Want to help break the ice? 
Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other. 

💗 Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE!

- private inbox with photo, video and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: AI Chat - AI Character Chatbot
description:
Text Script - AI Character Chatbot is the ultimate text-based role playing adventure game (RPG) powered by GPT-4o & GPT-3 technology from OpenAI. Explore an unknown world and become any character you want! Get ready to dive into a world of AI-generated wonder where your imagination knows no bounds!

What sets Text Script - AI Chat Assistant apart? Picture this: heart-fluttering romantic escapades, the enchanting charm of medieval Europe, epic adventures that defy categorization, heart-pounding zombie apocalypses, mind-bending detective mysteries, and more. Plus, take on the thrilling 'Spend a Hundred Million Dollars' challenge! With Text Script - AI Character Chatbot, new adventures keep rolling in, offering endless excitement.

What's more important: you're not just a passive observer. You shape the story. Describe what your character sees, feels, and experiences. Make choices that alter the course of the tale or take command with your own directives, guiding your AI character's actions through the thrilling adventure.

But wait, there's more! As you journey through these adventures, immerse yourself in the ambiance—AI-generated images that perfectly match the mood and setting. And that's not all! With support for multiple languages, voice chats, speech-to-text capabilities, and the ability to export your chat records, the world driven by GPT is truly at your fingertips.

Are you ready to unleash your imagination, embark on quests, and explore uncharted territories? Join Text Script - AI Character Chatbot, where the adventure never ends and the possibilities are limitless!

Disclaimer
- This application is not officially affiliated with any third party, nor is it allowed to do so. This application only provides a mobile interface for interacting with AI Chat.
- This is not Chat GPT, we are in no way associated with OpenAI, ChatGPT or its affiliates.
- We are in no way associated with AI Dungeon, Character AI, Quillbot, Grammarly, Wordtune, Jasper AI, Copy.AI, Rytr, Ginger, AI Writer, Writesonic, Anyword, Hyperwrite, ChatGPT or their affiliates.
- We do not collect or store any data used in the application.

title: Pirate's Dice
description:
Challenge your friends with this fantastic dice game inspired by the ancient Peruvian mechanics also known as Perudo.

Play as one of your favorite pirates against opponents from around the world, to win your gold coins booty.

Pirate's Dice is a game for 2 to 4 players whose primary scope is to guess at every round how many dice (with a certain value) are present on the table. Early in the game each participant will have 5 6-sided dice, hidden under its container so that the values are known only by the owners. On each round, players make their bets in rotation until the dice are revealed and the "defeated" player will lose one of them... the last player to have at least one die in his possession will win the game...

CHARACTERISTICS:
- Large set of implemented rules with all known variants.
- Single Player mode: to play offline with 1 to 3 opponents controlled by the artificial intelligence.
- Multi Player mode: to challenge up to 3 of your friends on the network.
- Captivating cartoon graphics and ability to customize your portrait and emoticons to chat with your friends.
- Parrot's tricks (single player mode only): your parrot will look at your opponents dice, but be careful...the tip is not always the right one!

Have fun!
short_description: A fantastic dice game inspired by an ancient Peruvian mechanics.
recent_changes_text: - Online matches are working again;- Added cross-platform support for online matches;- Improved UI for different aspect ratios.

title: TravelBank - Travel & Expenses
description:
A smarter way to track expenses, book and manage business travel, and earn rewards. TravelBank is the last business travel and expense app you’ll ever need. Create and submit an expense report, book a flight, hotel, or car – all in minutes.

• Forbes: 6 Travel Apps to Help You Stay Organized While Traveling
• CNN: 15 Best Travel Apps
• Fast Company: 15 Apps to Help You Make and Save Money
• Yahoo Finance: A Better Way to Manage Spend

TravelBank is a free to use app that handles all your business expense and travel needs. Capture receipts on-the-go and we’ll automatically scan them into expenses. Invite your manager to automate approvals and reimbursement, or simply use as a business expense tracker for tax purposes. Find and book flights & hotels based on value, convenience, business amenities, and more. TravelBank is the smartest expense app because it predicts averages for business travel based on real-time data and pricing, while saving your company on travel & expenses costs at the same time.

• Dreading “Expense Report Friday,” spending hours painstakingly processing a stack of receipts into an expense report? Snap a picture of each receipt as you get it, then ditch the entire stack. We’ll scan them and automatically turn them into expenses. Turn a collection of expenses into an expense report and submit as often as you like.
• Automate expenses by syncing your credit card. Advanced machine learning magically pairs receipts with transactions.
• Receipts stuck in your email? Simply forward them to and we’ll create expenses out of those too.
• Find and book the perfect flights and hotels for your trip, knowing you’ll have access to wifi, power and other amenities you need to make your trip productive and comfortable. 
• See which flights your colleagues are on so you can book the same itinerary and save time.
• 24/7 customer support for travel bookings with US-based travel agents via phone, email and live chat so you can focus on taking care of business.
• Flexible policies and rewards for beating benchmarks incentivize better spending decisions.

The only mobile-first expense and travel manager. Get started in minutes for free today.

title: SMRT Operations Manager
description:
SMRT Operations Manager is the companion app to the SmartRent Work Management and Answer Automation platforms. SmartRent’s Smart Operations Solutions product suite provides software for building and managing multifamily communities. We believe that Great Teams = Great Communities, so we’re empowering leasing, resident service and maintenance team members with easy-to-use solutions to deliver exceptional service.

Our award-winning Smart Operations platform helps:

• Make Best Practices Common Practice - By combining work orders, inspections and preventive maintenance into one solution.

• Boost Resident Loyalty – With status updates and streamlined communications, residents stay in-the-know.

• Deliver Insights for Better Decision Making – Through a verified view into the actions that unlock portfolio value.

title: Memorizer: movies books series
description:
[Memorizer – Your Personal Cultural Assistant]

Memorizer is your personal cultural assistant. It helps you choose what to watch, read, or listen to, based on who you are and what you love.
Discover movies, series, books, music and cultural experiences with confidence, thanks to a powerful recommendation engine and a community of trusted reviews.

With Memorizer, you no longer waste time searching. You finally know what is truly worth your time.

[A Smarter Way to Explore Culture]

Memorizer learns your tastes and adapts to your habits.
It guides you with personalised suggestions across all cultural categories: cinema, series, books, music, theater, exhibitions and more.

You can access reviews from the Memorizer community, reviews from your friends, and professional reviews from AlloCiné.
Every decision is easier because you can compare multiple types of reviews in one place.

[Powerful Features to Improve Your Cultural Life]

• Personalised recommendations across all cultural categories
• Access to community reviews, friends’ reviews and AlloCiné reviews (multiple reviews sources combined)
• Smart lists to save what you want to watch, read or discover
• A clean profile that becomes your cultural identity
• Track your activities across cinema, books, series, music and more
• Statistics that show your habits and preferences
• Trends and discoveries from the whole Memorizer community
• A simple interface designed to reduce decision fatigue

This assistant does not only help you discover content. It helps you build a meaningful cultural life.

[Make Better Decisions]

Every recommendation on Memorizer is supported by reviews:

Reviews from the community

Reviews from your friends

AlloCiné reviews
This gives you a complete and trustworthy view of what’s worth watching or reading.

The word “reviews” is central to Memorizer, because Memorizer helps you rely on better reviews, more relevant reviews, and more diverse reviews.

[Your Cultural Profile, Reimagined]

Memorizer becomes your long-term cultural companion.
It records what you’ve watched or read, helps you remember your favourites, and gives you clarity over your cultural journey.

You can build collections, organise your tastes, and share your profile with friends.

[Join a New Way to Explore Culture]

Memorizer is not another platform.
It is a personal assistant that helps you stop scrolling and start enjoying.

Discover better. Decide faster. Live more culture.
short_description: Your cultural assistant to discover the best movies, series, and books

title: FaceBreak: Face Shape Analysis
description:
Artificial Intelligence in this app uses a Deep Learning Neural Network to predict your Age, Ancestry, Emotions and much more! 

Would you like to know whether your face is heart-shaped, diamond, oblong, round or pear-shaped? Our Artificial Intelligence can do a precise analysis of your face and let you know exactly!

The amazing Artificial Intelligence inside this app can give detailed analyses of your Hair Color, Eye Color, Hair Style and other Physical Features of your look and style. 

Want to know what your face reveals about your Ancestry? Upgrade to Premium and the app's Deep Learning algorithm will compare your facial features to the faces of tens of thousands of people from around the world to predict where your ancestors came from. 

The app's A.I. can even look deep into the depths of your Character and analyze the very nature of your personality! It's true! We wouldn't kid around about something like that. And its free! So much cheaper than psychotherapy.

Use your phone or tablet's camera to analyze live video, take pictures to analyze, or browse still images from your Gallery. Share them with friends and family.

The app's Artificial Intelligence algorithm runs entirely on your phone, tablet or other Android device. Your images are never sent over the Internet, unless you choose to Share them yourself.

So give yourself a Break today! Take a FaceBreak! Really, you work hard, you've earned it. You deserve this app. You want this app. You need this app! Download it today!

The app's awesome icons were provided by 

Face id icons created by inipagistudio - Flaticon

Crown icons created by Freepik - Flaticon

title: PressReader: News & Magazines
description:
Read 7,000+ of the world’s most popular newspapers and magazines on your Android smartphone or tablet. Enjoy unlimited reading on up to 3 devices with a 7-day free trial of PressReader Premium. 

PressReader is the best way to read your favorite magazines and newspapers in one place—from local stories to global news, and everything in between. Download complete issues and switch between the original print view and a mobile-optimized text view. Bring it all to life with Auto-Translate to over 30 languages or listen to stories with our text-to-speech features. 

Subscribe to PressReader Premium to get unlimited access to most publications in the catalog or purchase single issues of your favorite title. Individual

title: Sololearn: Learn to code
description:
Are you ready to enhance your coding skills and deepen your understanding of how to code? With Sololearn, you can start learning to code in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, and many other programming languages right away. Whether you're just beginning your coding journey or looking to improve your programming knowledge, Sololearn offers a wide range of courses designed to help you learn coding effectively and at your own pace. 

Why Choose Sololearn?

- Start Learning to Code with Ease: Sololearn’s extensive library of coding courses is designed to help you learn programming at your own pace. Start coding in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, and explore many other languages and technologies to build a strong foundation for your tech career. 

- Engage in Interactive Learning: Dive into hands-on programming practice with real-world projects, coding games, and challenges that make learning fun. From Python and JavaScript to HTML, CSS, and SQL, Sololearn offers engaging content to boost your coding and tech skills. 

- Experience AI-Powered Personalized Learning: Unlock personalized learning with Sololearn's AI-driven recommendations, helping you master coding, data analytics, and other in-demand skills tailored to your goals. 

- Practice Coding Anytime, Anywhere: Run and practice code on the go with Sololearn’s mobile code editor. Whether it's Python, JavaScript, or other programming languages, keep coding wherever you are. Key Features: 

- Courses in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL & More: Learn the most in-demand coding languages like Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and SQL, alongside many other programming languages and technologies. These courses are designed to boost your coding skills and prepare you for a successful career in tech. 

- Career-Focused Learning Paths: Whether you aim to become a Python specialist, a full-stack developer, or excel in data analytics, Sololearn provides structured learning paths across a wide variety of career tracks to guide your coding journey. 

- Practice Makes Perfect: Hone your coding skills with practice exercises, coding games, and projects in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, and many more languages and tools. 

- Earn Certificates: Showcase your coding expertise with certificates from Sololearn. Perfect for your professional portfolio and advancing your tech career. 

Join Millions of Learners Join over 35 million learners worldwide who trust Sololearn to help them learn to code and develop their programming skills. Whether you’re focused on Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, or exploring one of the many other languages and technologies available, Sololearn is the coding app that makes learning accessible and fun. 

What Users Say: 

- "Wow! Sololearn is the app I've been looking for! It's amazing for learning Python, JavaScript, and so many other programming languages. Whether you're a beginner or looking to advance your skills, this app has everything you need to start an exciting career in tech." - Eric D.

- "The best coding app for beginners and advanced learners alike! Sololearn makes learning Python, JavaScript, and HTML easy and fun." - Sarah K. 

Start Learning Today! Don’t wait to kickstart your tech career. 
Download Sololearn and start coding in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, and many more. With Sololearn, learning to code is just a tap away!

title: Fastic Weight Loss & Fasting
description:
TRANSFORM YOUR HEALTH JOURNEY WITH FASTIC
Unlock your weight loss journey with Fastic, the app that tailors fasting and nutrition to fit YOUR lifestyle and goals. Achieve your weight goal naturally and sustainably with Fastic, blending seamlessly into your daily routine. Whether you want to lose weight, maintain it, or simply live healthier, Fastic is here to support you.

NEW: 🧬 PROTEIN FASTING 🥚 

Your power mode for muscle maintenance and fat burning. With high-protein recipes, smart tracking, and matching courses right in the app. A recent clinical study (PMC10107279) shows: Intermittent fasting combined with high-protein nutrition results in significantly greater fat loss and better muscle retention than calorie restriction – even with equal calorie intake.

🎉 KEY FEATURES

✔ FOOD & CALORIE TRACKER: Easily log your meals, snacks, and drinks to monitor your calorie intake and support your weight loss goals. Track macros and gain insights into your eating habits.

✔ FASTIC FOOD SCANNER: Capture your meal with a snap and instantly access detailed nutrition info. Understand the impact of each meal on your goals.

✔ RESTAURANT MENU SCANNER: Eating out? Snap a photo of any menu and our AI suggests dishes that fit your dietary preferences – low-carb, vegan, or high-protein.

✔ PERSONALIZED FASTIC SCORE: Track progress across nutrition, activity, hydration, sleep, and more. Get personalized insights based on your lifestyle.

✔ AI-POWERED ASSISTANCE: Got questions? Our AI chatbot, Fasty, provides instant answers and helpful guidance.

✔ INTERMITTENT FASTING: Support your health with strategic meal timing. Fastic helps you build regular breaks between meals and align with your body’s natural rhythms.

✔ BODY STATUS TRACKING: Visualize how your body responds to fasting in real time. Stay motivated by learning about key phases like ketosis and fat burning.

🥇 ENHANCE YOUR EXPERIENCE WITH FASTIC PLUS

Unlock even more tools and support with Fastic Plus:

• RECIPE BOOK: Thousands of healthy, delicious recipes that fit your preferences – from low-carb to nutrient-packed meals.
• ADVANCED FOOD & MENU SCANNER: Get enhanced details to stay on track, even when dining out.
• IN-HOUSE ACADEMY: Learn about fasting, nutrition, and healthy habits with expert resources.
• CHALLENGES: Stay motivated with fun, goal-oriented challenges to build lasting routines.
• BUDDIES: Connect with friends, share progress, and get the motivation you need.
• EXCLUSIVE INSIGHTS: Access advanced analytics and refine your approach to reach your goals faster.

🚀 WHY FASTIC?

• Steady energy levels
• Avoid yo-yo dieting and build sustainable habits
• Works with keto, paleo, vegan & more
• Fits into your workouts, from cardio to strength training
• Includes a step counter, water tracker & reminders
• Regular updates with new features
• Syncs with Google Fit

Start your journey with Fastic, where your well-being comes first. Millions already trust Fastic to reach their health goals and live better every day.

______
short_description: Protein, Tracker, Nutrition
recent_changes_text: Attention Fastic Fans!We have made some small improvements in our latest update to help you reach your goals!You can now adjust your fasting time in various sections of the app, and we’ve added more information to our food database to make it even easier to log your meals!Thanks for being a part of Fastic and we wish you joy and success in reaching your goals.Stay healthy!

title: AI Mental Assistant: mindlee
description:
Unlock a happier, healthier you with mindlee, featuring Aura, your personal AI companion for mental well-being.

Feeling anxious, stressed, or just need someone to talk to? Aura is here to listen, understand, and guide you 24/7. Built on advanced AI, Aura goes beyond a simple chatbot to provide personalized, in-depth feedback that helps you truly understand your feelings and build a better life.

Core Features:

Chat with Your AI Companion: Talk to Aura about any topic. Whether you're navigating anxiety, dealing with work stress, or celebrating a win, Aura offers empathetic, supportive, and constructive conversation.

Personalized In-Depth Feedback: Aura doesn't just listen; it learns. Receive detailed insights and progress reports on key areas of your life, including Mindfulness, Relationships, Career, and Happiness.

Grow with Daily Practices: Use the integrated journal to log your mood, reflect on your day, and track your emotional patterns. See how you grow over time, one entry at a time.

Build Healthy Habits: Get gentle daily reminders for actions that support your well-being. From drinking water and practicing mindfulness to giving yourself affection, build positive habits that stick.

Learn & Practice: Access a curated library of self-help programs, inspiring advice, and practical guides. Discover "The Formula for Happiness," "7 Golden Rules for Success," and more.

Track Your Well-Being: Stay motivated by tracking your daily streaks, time spent on mindfulness, and overall progress. Join 85% of our users who feel more positive by dedicating just 15 minutes a day.

Your journey to mental wellness is personal. With mindlee and Aura, you’re never alone.

Download now and start your first conversation with Aura.

Medical Disclaimer: This app does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a qualified physician before making medical decisions or relying on information provided by this app.

title: French Coinche
description:
** PLAY FRENCH COINCHE ON YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE OR TABLET ! ***

Play to the popular French Coinche card game, also named Belote Contree on Belote Coinchee against opponents simulated by an high-level artificial intelligence.

All official rules are handled :
- Play with or without declarations.
- Play with No Trumps and All Trumps.
- Coinche at any time
- Surcoinche.
- Several scoring options.

*** HD GRAPHICS ***

Easy to use, the game is very fast and responsive, with card animation for a more realistic gameplay, and hd graphics.

*** AN HIGH-LEVEL ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE ***

Your opponents and teamates are simulated by an high-level artificial intelligence, that knows the common strategies used in french coinche card game. Therefore the game is very realistic, close to game with real players, and the challenge is high.

*** A CUSTOMIZABLE APPLICATION ***

- Many options to customize the rules.
- Change the player's name.
- Change the speed of the game.

*** AN APPLICATION THAT WILL MAKE YOU BECOME BETTER ***

A section with statistics is included in the application, allowing you to monitor the evolution of our performances. 

For beginners, rules of French Coinche are also included into the application.

Finally, you can at the end of the round see all the tricks, and replay the round if you want, to train and try new strategies.

For any question regarding the application : 

Have fun playing Coinche !

title: WiGLE WiFi Wardriving
description:
Open source network observation, positioning, and display client from the world's largest queryable database of wireless networks. Can be used for site-survey, security analysis, and competition with your friends. Collect networks for personal research or upload to WiGLE has been collecting and mapping network data since 2001, and currently has over 350m networks. WiGLE is *not* a list of networks you can use.

* Uses GPS to estimate locations of observed networks
* Observations logged to local database to track your networks found
* Upload and compete on the global WiGLE.net leaderboard
* Real-time map of networks found, with overlays from entire WiGLE dataset
* Free, open source, no ads (pull requestes welcome at )
* Export to CSV files on SD card (comma separated values)
* Export to KML files on SD card (to import into Google Maps/Earth)
* Bluetooth GPS support through mock locations
* Audio and Text-to-Speech alerting and "Mute" option to shut off all sound/speech

Current release notes notes:
short_description: Network stumbling and WiGLE.net database access for Android

title: Focus: Control Your ADD
description:
Customize for your specific brain type. Take the quiz to set the channel, select background images, session start sound, and timer length...and boom, get productive!

Our mission is to help you focus. We started Focus in 2011 to integrate music with productivity. We knew that music can be used for entertainment, our founder is a platinum selling songwriter with over 30 years in the music industry, but we wanted to try something new. So we hand-selected neuroscientists, musicians, and engineers to produce something that was one-of-a-kind.

Over the last 10 years we've helped over 2,000,000 people focus by tailoring brain music specifically to their brain type. Our proprietary AI engine is linked with the world's largest brain database, and our music is created by musicians specifically for productivity.

The music you find on Focus cannot be found anywhere else; we remaster, re-edit, and re-produce each track to remove all distracting elements so you can stay productive and focused.

What’s the value -- to your job, your success, your self-image -- of just one intensely-focused session where you filter out distractions and produce more work in two hours than you typically do in a day? Now, what if you multiplied that value over the course of a month, a year? That's what Focus helps you achieve.

This app gives you a 7-day full-feature free trial. Just install and run. Then have your best work session ever. On-demand.

How do I know if this will work for me? Our in-app assessment agent uses data from the biggest brain database in the world combined with our own data of over 10 years of music brain research to prescribe which specific music type and energy level will work best for you. If it doesn't, no worries we offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee!

Can I listen offline? Yes! We have offline mode.

Can I track my productivity? Yes! We have a built in productivity tracker.

Is there a focus timer? Yes! We encourage you to use the focus timer as a pomodoro timer, create work sessions and break times countless times a day.

Can I change the session start/end sound? Yes! Or turn them off completely.

Our subscribers are entrepreneurs, freelancers, writers, students, and include people that work in large corporations like; Google, Tesla, Apple, SpaceX and Microsoft.

Who we are: We're an independent neuroscience company based in Los Angeles, California. Our mission is to empower you to be the best version of yourself; have a healthy work/life balance; and create fulfillment and happiness in your life.

What sets us apart: We have a customized solution based on our connection to the biggest brain database in the world.

Every audio mix is different for every user, and all the sounds and music we deliver are unique to our system.

Our system manages the ratio between your endogenous attention (ie the task you are focusing on) and your exogenous attention (ie your reptile brain looking for potentially dangerous 'fight or flight' external stimuli). Every human is different, the type of music that helps calm this response is highly individual.

(Fun fact: the more easily distracted you are, the more energy you need to help you focus. Now you'll know why our ADHD channel is the way it is!)

Spotify, Apple Music, Pandora, etc., we're big fans - but not when we're trying to be productive! The focus playlists found in these streaming services is usually someone's vague idea of what worked for them. When you want to get stuff done Focus is the only option that was created specifically for productivity needs.
short_description: Personalized focus music to help you get stuff done.

title: LightPDF: PDF AI&Convert&Scan
description:
LightPDF, is an AI-powered PDF toolkit on the go. You can use it to analyze, summarize and chat with PDFs, documents, urls and scans, extracting key information from files in seconds; convert and scan documents and images into PDFs. The newest version comes with a powerful AI PDF watermark remover which can help to erase watermark from PDF, as well as an AI eraser to redact or whiteout sensitive info. LightPDF is always your best PDF summarizer, converter, reader, mobile scanner, cloud-based PDF storage, and ID photo maker. 

💖What LightPDF can do:
💡Remove watermarks from PDFs
● Instantly remove unwanted watermarks from your PDF files
● Preserve original clean and professional layout
● Process multiple files in bulk

💡Smart AI Analysis Assistant for PDFs
● Ask questions about your file and get answers with cited sources
● Quickly output results in markdown and table format
● Chat with PDFs, scans, Excel, Word, PPT, ePub and URLs
● Support 20+ languages

💡Intelligent Phone Scanner
● Take photos of your papers, cards, books and more to turn them into PDF format. Work as your pocket PDF scanner
● Extract and copy texts from paper works
● Remove handwriting from the test paper
● Redact unwanted sensitive info manually
● Advanced filters for better scanning result 

💡Powerful PDF Converter with OCR
● Convert PDF to Word, JPG, PNG, Excel, PPT, and TXT, and vice versa
● Utilize OCR tech to recognize text in scans and images as editable files for further editing and sharing
● Support multiple languages

💡Cloud-based PDF Reader and Organizer
● Compress PDF file size with a few touches 
● Combine multiple PDF documents into one
● Read PDFs, add bookmarks, and search
● Print PDFs directly from your devices
● Auto-sync PDFs to cloud, access and work with PDFs on any device with one LightPDF account

💡Handy ID Photo Maker
● Create ID and passport photos with ease, changing background color, and producing a new photo with your preset size
● Enhance and retouch the photo quality to make it clear

💡New Way for Teamwork
● Share files via links with your team and invite multiple people to view, edit, highlight, sign, and add comments on the same PDF at the same time
● Set permissions to keep PDF security under control
● Upload the file to the cloud, and access it on any device 
● Star files as favorites to quickly find and open them
● One account to access on all devices
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
If you need any help or have suggestions on LightPDF, please feel free to

title: SnakeSnap!
description:
What’s New:
Thanks for using SnakeSnap! We’ve made updates to streamline our submission process and add educational content. See the preview section below for more details!

Preview:
Take or upload a photo of any snake and get a fast accurate response with your snake's identity, diet, habitat, and a brief characteristic description from our expert panel. We use a combination of technology and human intelligence to confirm all snake submissions. Currently Artificial Intelligence (automation) is not 100% accurate every time. There are many variables when it comes to snake identification, and with over 3500 snake species in the world, we cannot afford to be wrong. Accuracy, timely responses, and education are our top priorities!

“I’ve used SnakeSnap about 10 times now. Every time I get an answer back quickly. And accurately! It’s great peace of mind knowing the information I receive is correct. These guys know their stuff. Have recommended the app to many neighbors” by Joe in Fl

“This app is so useful. I’ve received insanely quick responses to identify my snakes. I love that you can talk to a real person. I highly recommend this app. Great tool” by privateprivate

What Makes SnakeSnap Unique:
● Expert Panel: Consists of Authors, Biologists, Toxicologists, Herpetologists, Students, Field Herpers and Snake Hobbyists. Ask any question and we will personally respond
● Used in over 180 different countries
● As part of our service you will receive monthly information about snakes based on your
geographic location and other valuable information
● List of all snakes in the US broken down by state, with high quality pictures & information
● Resource connections to our International partners
● Removal Service Connections
● “Did You Know” and interesting facts about snakes and other wildlife

Check out more of our reviews and download SnakeSnap today!!! We will be waiting for your submission!

Cheers!
short_description: Accurate Snake Identification
recent_changes_text: + Added Location to Snap Feature!

title: Knowunity: AI Study & Homework
description:
Knowunity is the free AI study app trusted by 30 million students. Upload what you have. Get everything you need to finish your homework, understand it, practice with thousands of relevant practice sets, flip through flashcards and ace your next exam - all free to boost your grades!

Upload or scan your notes, favourite youtube videos, and lectures into flashcards, practice tests, quizzes, and summaries — free, in seconds.

How it works:

1. Tell us your courses & our AI companion will fully adapt to you and your courses - the best AI for students 
2. Get step by step homework solutions & follow up with practice questions
3. Prepare for your exams with course relevant practice tests, quizzes and flashcards that are relevant to your course, no matter if AP or not
4. Upload your notes, PDFs, images or record your favorite Youtube videos and get them summarized
5. Generate and follow a tailored final plan for any subject to nail that A
6. Knowunity AI instantly generates flashcards, summaries, and practice questions
7. Study smarter with spaced repetition, quiz modes, learning videos and mastery tracking

What you get — all free:

- AI Exam planner - generate your personal roadmap to success based on official College Board guidelines
- Homework Solver with best models for free - snap a problem, get a step-by-step solutionsn
- Flashcards — auto-generated from any material, ready to memorize anything
- AI Notes — key concepts pulled out and structured so nothing gets missed
- Practice Tests — exam-style questions based on your actual course
- Chat with Your Notes — ask follow-up questions and get answers grounded in your material
- 1M+ Study Notes from best students — browse and study from real notes shared by students in your subject and grade

Built for every subject: AP courses, Math, Sciences, Social Studies, English, World Languages, Computing, SAT and ACT prep, and more.

Why students choose Knowunity over the rest:

- Completely free — no paywalls on core study tools
- AI chat that is truly built for students, step by step explanations adapted to your courses
- Flashcards and quizzes that adapt to what you actually need to review
- Notes from real students alongside your own AI-generated materials
- Works with PDFs, PowerPoints, YouTube videos, photos, and handwritten notes

Whether you're cramming the night before or building a study plan weeks out, Knowunity gives you the tools to walk into every test confidently.

Download for free. Start studying in under a minute.
short_description: AI homework solver, notes & flashcards — free. Built for 30M+ students.

title: Couplier: Dating Ukraine
description:
Couplier is a Ukrainian dating app designed to find you a couple. No hidden likes or restrictions on sending messages, just you and people with the same purpose as yours. Voice greetings, numerous filters, as well as meetings by interests, will help you find the right person next to you

Why us?

🔸Our idea is freedom and simplicity. Everyone should be able to find a couple for themselves, regardless of the date of registration, popularity, or the presence of a premium account. Just write or like the person you like and he will know about it in a matter of seconds.

🔸We want you to find exactly the person you are looking for. Therefore, in the search you will only see people with the same purpose as yours. Numerous filters, as well as meetings by interests will help you in a couple of touches to find someone to go to the latest movies, play board games or go for a bike ride.

🔸Do you think that's it? It wasn't there! Now you can meet by voice. Record your voice greeting and people can get to know you much better. And updated individual list of new users will not let you get bored even for a minute.

🔸 But that's not all! Experience the power of artificial intelligence that will help you understand your compatibility with others and start an engaging conversation on topics that interest both of you.

Download the app and join Couplier, we are always open to your suggestions and we want you to find what you are looking for!

title: Brainly: AI Homework Helper
description:
Brainly, the AI Learning Companion
Brainly is a powerful Math solver app that can help you with your school doubts. Solve Math problems in Algebra, Trigonometry, & Geometry with correct & expert-verified answers instantly. With Brainly, you can find solutions to your math homework. Math answers have never been easier to find! Just use our math scanner, ask our community, or chat with a tutor for one-on-one help with step-by-step solutions for your math homework problems.

• 24/7 school homework app access - Unlimited access, anywhere, anytime with Brainly.
• Quick math problem solver - Math Questions are answered in minutes
• Expert-vetted answers - A team of subject experts moderators verify answers daily
• Ask by pic with math camera scanner feature
• Solve Math Problems by using Brainly Scan to Solve: learn math with step-by-step guidance on Algebra, Trigonometry, Geometry, & Calculus, including AP levels
• Find Math answers specific solutions created by our experts for your textbooks.
• Real-time help from pro math tutors with Brainly Tutor (Math, Physics, Chemistry, & Biology tutors)

Math Answer Scanner To Solve Math Problems
Do you ever wish you had a math helper? With Brainly, you'll get help instantly. Use our math scanner & word problem solver to find answers to complex problems. Brainly can work like a fraction calculator, a geometry solver, & an algebra practice tool. It’s like having a math helper in your pocket!
Deal with math concepts, & get instant math answers so you can say, “I’m done with my homework!” So, if you're stuck on a math problem, just use our math calculator as a problem solver.

Get Homework Help from a Community of Experts
With over 350M online study buddies ready to help, you won’t need a homework reminder to find the motivation to learn. Our community of helpful student experts can get your math homework answers in minutes.
It's like having millions of math word problem solvers all at once! All your questions deserve an answer! Our network of moderators ensures not only high-quality homework help but also makes sure that Brainly remains a safe place for learning & math practice.
With Brainly, you can turn learning into a fun challenge, show off your achievements & earn cool badges for answering the trickiest questions.

Get 1:1 Homework Help with Brainly Plus or Tutor
Sometimes, even a math calculator problem solver is not enough. If you're hungry for more quick math answers, you can upgrade to Brainly Tutor for Math, Physics, Chemistry, & Biology answers. With Brainly Tutor, you can instantly get connected to an expert to help you with your math problems. 

With Brainly Plus, you can use our math solver without any limits or ads. 

With Brainly, You are Learning Your Way! No matter what your math homework struggles are, we’re here to help you get unstuck in the easiest way possible.

Get fun updates from us on:
Instagram or Facebook & Twitter 

For any problems, reach out to our support team: | 
Marketing:
short_description: Quick Math Helper & Science Solutions | Get Homework Answers for School Doubts

title: The Passion Translation Bible
description:
The Passion Translation is the bible New Testament with Genesis, Joshua, Judges, Ruth, Psalms, Proverbs, and Song of Songs, Isaiah, Jeremiah, Lamentations, Ezekiel, Daniel books.
The Passion Translation is a modern, easy-to-read Bible translation that unlocks the passion of God’s heart and expresses his fiery love—merging emotion and life-changing truth.

KEY FEATURES . 
1. Bible is Fully offline - With No internet connection required to read the bible text once you download the App .
Bible comes with an advanced search feature . 
2. Scriptures sync with audio.
3. Bookmarking and highlighting feature . 

The android built-in TTS engine is Pico TTS engine. 
You can download and install Google Text-to-Speech Engine. The voice is better.

title: Deep Fragrance
description:
Deep Fragrance uses state-of-the-art Machine Learning and AI technology to find and recommend the most similar fragrance to any given fragrance by considering all the notes and accords of more than 50,000 fragrances/perfumes. 

To use the app, simply type the name of a perfume/fragrance like "Coco Chanel" and press the search button. First, the app shows top relevant search results and then clicking on your desired fragrance will take you to the recommendation page which an AI algorithm is used to find the most similar fragrances (ranked by the similarity score) searching through the detailed ingredients (notes/accords) of more than 50 thousands fragrances. The recommended fragrances should smell very similar to your searched fragrance.
short_description: Explore the most similar fragrances to your favorite fragrance.

title: Sports Betting Tips

The predictions we offer by analyzing hundreds of football and basketball matches every day are very successful and reliable.

GoldenGoal : Sports Betting Tips App Features

- Current football, basketball, tennis, volleyball sports betting tips
- More successful football betting tips with artificial intelligence technology
- Reliable football bet tips analyzed with scientific data
- Daily sports betting tips
- Live score tracking
- Stylish design and easy to use
- 24/7 customer support

Our prediction team offers you the best analysis using many betting options. As an example of predictions; Under/Over 2.5 Goals, Both Goals, Match Result 1/0/2...

Our betting prediction team closely monitors and analyzes many popular leagues. Examples of these leagues; UEFA Champions League, UEFA Europa League, Conference League, English Premier League, Spain LaLiga, Italy Serie A, Germany Bundesliga, France Ligue 1, Netherlands Eredivisie,
Turkey Super, Belgium Pro, Brazil Serie A, Danish Superliga, Russian Premier League, Portuguese Liga Portugal, NBA, EuroLeague.

You must be over 18 to use this app. The predictions presented are for informational and entertainment purposes only, not for monetization purposes.

title: Text to Speech by Storyteller
description:
Storyteller App brings your text to life! Storyteller's artificial intelligence helps you create and share stories with style and an authentic voice, making it the perfect solution for teachers, storytellers, parents, and anyone who wants to share their words in an entertaining way. 

No more boring, generic voice overs. With our diverse selection of voice actors and languages, you can make sure your story is told just the way you want. 

Storyteller App is simple enough for anyone to start telling their stories. Use for game development, films, YouTube, and more! 

HOW IT WORKS 
Storyteller uses artificial intelligence to transform text to speech. You can create stories within the app by using various voice actors to make your writings come to life. Storyteller can also be used to read back any text in most languages. Save and share audio clips with your friends, family, YouTube and more... 

"This app is great, this app inspired me to start writing again and even bolstered a renewed interest in publishing my future books!" - Vincent 
"Awesome App! So much fun I just can't get enough." - C.J. 

FEATURES LIST: 
• Transform Text-to-Speech and download AUDIO as MP3.
• Choose from 500+ voice actors.
 • Listen in 45+ languages & dialects. 
• Change voice actor’s style, pitch, speed & more. 
• Create engaging stories using multiple voice actors. 
• Create voiceovers for videos or content creating. 

CREATE SPEECH ANYTIME, ANYWHERE: 
• Copy and paste your text(s), select a voice-actor, and then listen while Storyteller delivers you high quality audio that sounds like real life people. 

CUSTOMIZE YOUR SPEECH: 
• Fine tune your content with 150+ voice actors, 45+ languages & dialects, and different stylizations all to your liking. 

SAVE TIME & MONEY: 
• How does this compare to pricing of professional voice actors? It is almost a quarter of a percent of what they charge! To hire a professional voice actor to read Tolstoy's War and Peace, you would be looking at a cool $20K! With The Storyteller, less than $60! It does not get better than that! 

UTILIZE YOUR AUDIO: 
Download MP3 for YouTube videos, gaming development, prototyping, TikTok, Instagram, and much more 

This app is perfect for YouTube VoiceOvers, Business Commercials, Game developers, Film makers, or anyone who would like a Voice Actor for any reason. Create amazing conversations between voice actors and save them to listen anytime. We cannot wait for you to discover the bountiful opportunities within Storyteller! 

- Happy Storytelling from the BuildLoop team. 

PREMIUM

title: Ghost Talker – Spirit Chat Box
description:
👻 Ghost Talker – Spirit Chat Box: Talk to Ghosts, Explore the Unknown
Ghost Talker – Spirit Chat Box is your ultimate companion for spirit communication. This powerful paranormal detector app combines modern ghost tech with intuitive design to let you talk to spirits using spirit words and real-time text-to-speech. Whether you're a curious explorer or a seasoned ghost hunter, this is the essential tool for every paranormal investigation.

🕵️‍♂️ Real-Time Spirit Talker Features
Start your session with a reliable ghost radar and spirit talker system. Ghost Talker works like a digital ghost radio, interpreting unseen energy to let you talk to ghosts. Powered by a 5,000-word spirit words dictionary, it translates supernatural signals into spoken messages—giving voices to what cannot be seen.

📡 Smart Detection with Paranormal Tech
Unlike ordinary apps, Ghost Talker integrates EMF patterns and environmental fluctuations, operating as both a paranormal activity detector and ghost radar. It offers confidence-based analysis, letting you talk to spirits and trust in the results during your ghost hunting sessions. Advanced algorithms deliver responsive, accurate interpretations for true enthusiasts of spirit communication.

🎛️ Fully Customizable Spirit Talker App
Customize your experience with stamina mode, visual effects, sound controls, and more. Ghost Talker adapts to your environment and style of ghost hunting, whether you're in a haunted house or conducting daytime research. Perfect for any ghost hunter, from beginners to pros, this spirit talker app supports EMF detectors, ghost radios, and external devices to enhance your encounters.

🔋 Long-Lasting Paranormal Detector Mode
Worried about battery drain? Ghost Talker’s energy-efficient mode supports longer hunts. Whether you’re scanning with a paranormal activity detector or using a ghost radar in the field, you can count on Ghost Talker to go the distance.

🎮 Easy to Use – Designed for Exploration
Ghost Talker is a user-friendly ghost hunting tool that integrates seamlessly with your setup. Use it as your primary paranormal detector or combine it with traditional equipment like ghost radios and EMF readers. This app is built to support every ghost hunter during real-time investigations.

🔮 Why Choose Ghost Talker?
Combines the power of a spirit talker, ghost radar, and ghost radio in one place

Lets you talk to ghosts with real-time voice simulation and spirit words translation

Functions as a full-featured paranormal activity detector for immersive exploration

Whether you're chasing shadows, seeking evidence, or simply intrigued by the unseen, Ghost Talker gives you the tools to connect, decode, and experience authentic spirit communication.

👁️ Start Your Ghost Hunting Adventure
Download Ghost Talker – Spirit Chat Box and step into the world of ghost hunting with confidence. Investigate the unknown, talk to spirits, and uncover messages hidden in the silence.

⚠️ Disclaimer: For Entertainment Purposes Only
Ghost Talker simulates paranormal detector responses for fun and entertainment. Please stay safe during your adventures and never rely on the app as a substitute for professional equipment or guidance.

title: Audivision: Doc Scan Read PDF
description:
Audivision is your all-in-one document accessibility and scanning app—built for blind and low-vision users, and also useful for anyone who wants to scan documents, extract text, and export/share quickly.

Whether you’re at home, in a store, or on the go, Audivision helps you capture text clearly, find what you need faster, and listen or export the results.

✅ Smart Text
Recognize text instantly like a product label, shop sign, or key heading.

✅ Find Text (Search in the real world)
Type a word (e.g., “Sugar”, “Shampoo” ) and move the camera—Audivision alerts you when it detects the match.

✅ Document Scan with Guidance
Scan documents and export to selectable text pdf or txt. Get guidance for full capture, then read aloud, pause/resume, and adjust speech rate. 

✅ Files (PDF / TXT / DOCX / Images)
Read pdf and other files on your phone. Export to selectable-text PDFs.
Use Recent and Exported tabs to quickly revisit past files.

✅ Explore
Identify multiple objects around you to better understand your surroundings.

✅ Street Info
Get cues about the street environment such as crowd and lighting conditions.

✅ Magnify (Low-vision support)
Zoom in on small text, use a flashlight for low light, and apply a readability filter for easier viewing.

✅ Date Detection (Experimental)
Detect likely date sections and possible dates (helpful for labels).
Please re-confirm important dates with a human.

✅ Voice commands &
short_description: PDF & Doc scanner and reader. OCR - scan to PDF, read text, export & share.
recent_changes_text: Stability improvements and extension of app availability to more devices.

title: Scopa - Classic Card Game
description:
Download now Scopa: the challenge, the traditional card game with millions of players and with many game modes, many different decks of cards, choice of the number of players, online matches to play... and much more! Play Scopa or Scopone online, even without registration, or log in with Facebook.

Here are the main features of Scopa the challenge:

Exciting online matches: Test your skills in Scopa or Scopone online matches via Wifi or 4G. Play with your friends or find random opponents and experience incredible challenges to the last card! You can also log in with Facebook or play as a guest without registration.

Customized game modes: Are you a true card game lover? Choose whether to start a Scopa game for 2 or a scientific Scopone match. Adapt the gaming experience to your preferences.

Single Player: Train in Scopa against the artificial intelligence (CPU). Keep your skills sharp while waiting for the next online game!

Special events: Participate in exciting special events on themed tables. Outdo your opponents and prove you're the undisputed Champion of Scopa!

Social experience: Share your passion for card games! Add friends, write, chat, and remove players, all in one dedicated section for your friends. Find players you get along with and invite them to your next Scopa game!

Monthly special tables: Unlock new special tables each month and discover a constantly fresh gaming experience. Become a Scopa master by unlocking them all!

Rankings and statistics: Track your scores and progress with rankings and statistics. Monitor your improvement and aim for the top to become the Scopa champion!

Collect trophies: Challenge yourself and collect all the trophies. Can you get them all? Prove you're a complete Scopa player!

Wide selection of regional card decks: Choose from 11 regional card decks, including the beloved Neapolitan Cards, French Cards, Piacentine Cards, and many others. Customize your gaming experience with your favorite deck of cards!
For your Scopa or Scientific Scopone games, there are many decks of cards available, from Neapolitan to Brescian cards!

Bergamasche Cards
Milanese Cards
Neapolitan Cards
Piacentine Cards
Sicilian Cards
Trevisan Cards
French Cards
Sardinian Cards
Tuscan Cards
Brescian Cards
Romagnole Cards

Scopa is one of the most beloved card games in Italy and boasts a vast community of millions of players worldwide. Accept the challenge and test yourself! Reach the top of the rankings and become the best Scopa player in all of Italy.

Are you a fan of online card games? Download Scopa now and show your skills.
For assistance, doubts, or error reports,
short_description: The original Scopa app, online and multiplayer!

title: Fidscore: AI Bet Predictions
description:
Join the Fidscore eco-system (former Fidelisbet) and discover the numerous Football data-driven features we offer to persons like you. We are not only a Livescores app, we are also a service that provides you the best game insights for the major football leagues.

All the Features we offer
Livescores - We offer live scores for more than 50 football competitions. Get goal alerts, corner alerts or only the final match results. The choice is yours and you can select whatever information you want to receive live from the games.

Live Stats - Open a game you want to analyze and check the extensive game data we have to offer. Exclusive match pressure amount of each team, team ball possession, corners, goals, yellow cards, red cards, dangerous attacks. You name it! We have all stats you need.

Historical Data - For each game, we have also an extensive historical data collection. Check team lineups, competition ranking, how many goals each team scored in the past games, how many wins and losses each team has in the competition. We even tell you how many cards each team usually receives per match. Everything in one place.

Live vs Historical Data - Imagine you could combine live game stats with historical data and decided based on that a potential match outcome. Yes, you are right. We offer that Live vs. Historical Data insights. At any time, you can see what is happening in a match and what will potentially happen.

Algorithm Alerts - Our team joined forces and produces several artificial intelligence (A.I.) backed system algorithms to alert you whenever a goal is soon to be scored. Or how many corners will potentially occur in the game. We even tell you if a team can win or not the match. This is especially interesting information for those of you who are interested in football betting.

Public and Personal Algorithms - Do you feel you have the skills to build your own Algorithm? Perfect! You can build your own algorithms, using our extensive data collections. And if you are not comfortable yet, you can always subscribe to other Algorithms build by the FBet - FidelisBet community!

Algorithms On and Off - All the System, Public and Personal algorithms can be switched On and Off at any time. You can check the success rate of each algorithm. If a certain algorithm is not doing well, switch it Off in just one tap. Easy!

All these features and more to come, are here to provide you the friendliest environment possible. If you love football, you will love that even more after using our app!

Stay tuned, as more features and services are to come out soon!!
short_description: Livescores, Football Stats, A.I. Algorithms & Bots, Predictions. Fidelisbet.

title: Astrolink: Birth Chart
description:
Download Astrolink, enter with your birth information and receive a free, complete and personalized horoscope and birth chart astrology with your astrological journey, zodiac signs, energy distribution, basic characteristics, positions of the stars, astrological houses, horoscope, tarot card reading, synastry and much more. It is not just a birth chart horoscope, it is a personalized birth chart horoscope made only for you.

Astrolink is a complete and easy to use app made for new and advanced people in the astrology world with all the tools you need to improve your knowledge about astrology and zodiac signs, tarot, horoscope and much more. 

Downloading Astrolink you will enjoy a lot of tools and contents:

FREE PERSONALIZED BIRTH CHART
With your birth information, we create a personalized birth chart. Find out which zodiac signs have the most influence on your personality and understand how astrology interacts in your relationship with family, friends, work, etc. In Astrolink, it is also possible to create and save the birth charts of the people you know, understanding the high and low points of the relationship. Save to consult them at any time!

SYNASTRY - ASTRAL COMPATIBILITY
Discover your level of compatibility with someone according to astrology and see the advantages and challenges of the relationship.

PERSONALIZED HOROSCOPE
See what the influences of the stars are on you in a super detailed and totally unique daily horoscope, suitable for your birth chart.

TAROT 
Consult the tarot and find answers to your questions at the moment and the best paths to follow. You can also record a diary about your queries and emotions and see the relationship between tarot and astrology.

LUNAR CYCLE
See daily information about the phases of the moon with tips on the influences of each lunation, relating to your mood and discovering the best days for making decisions.

ARTICLES AND KNOWLEDGE
Read our articles about astrology, self-knowledge and other interesting subjects and improve your knowledge about the astrology world.

LEARN ABOUT THE ZODIAC SIGNS
Your can learn all about your signs and risings signs:
- Aries
- Taurus
- Gemini
- Cancer
- Leo
- Virgo
- Libra
- Scorpio
- Sagittarius
- Capricorn
- Aquarius
- Pisces

Discover how they affect your personal, social and romantic life and how you can deal with its influencers in your life.

Astrolink has accurate and personalized horoscopes every day, generated specifically for your unique astrology chart.

DISCOVER MUCH MORE!
Astrolink gives you free and immediate access to several tools that will add to your self-knowledge journey. See some of the features you can enjoy:
- Free personalized birth chart astrology and horoscope;
- Tarot card reading;
- Synastry;
- Lunar Nodes;
- Lunar Cycle;
- Extra Chart;
- Articles and contents to improve your knowledge about astrology;
- Personalized daily horoscope;
- And much more.

Download for free and have access to a free personalized horoscope and birth chart with your astrological journey, zodiac signs, energy distribution, basic characteristics, positions of the stars, astrological houses, horoscope, tarot card reading, synastry and much more.

title: HelloBPCL
description:
Convenience & Trust now have a new name: Hello BPCL!!
With Hello BPCL, you can now get a new LPG connection, book & pay your gas cylinder, pay for fuel, find nearby petrol pumps, encash MAK lubricant coupons and learn more about industrial fuel & solvents. 

Join 8.5 crore+ customers & register for a new Bharatgas LPG connection; book & pay for your 14 kg or 19kg LPG gas cylinder; order mechanic services or even transfer your LPG connection to a new distributor. 

Enrol as a MAK Mechanic or a MAK Retailer to get instant cash redemption of your MAK lubricant coupons. 

Built for your personal and business needs, Hello BPCL offers the following products & services from Bharat Petroleum: 
-> For your personal needs: 
1. Bharatgas services in 13 languages – LPG Cylinder booking, payment, history, Change of distributor, seek emergency help, create mechanic requests etc. 
2. UFill is BPCL’s innovative touchless solution for fuelling. Currently active in 30+ cities across India, UFill is a pre-paid UPI based voucher solution to pay for fuel. Integrated with BPCL's fuel automation system, UFill vouchers enable you to pre-set the fuel dispensing machine automatically without any manual touch, assuring you receive the best quality fuel for the quantity you pay for. 
3. Smartdrive is BPCL’s digital wallet for fuel payment with digital incentives & loyalty rewards points “Petromiles”. Customers will also be able to locate and navigate to BPCLs petrol pumps across the country. 
4. Customers can scan MAK coupons available inside MAK lubricants packs and get instant cashback of upto Rs 1000/- directly in their bank accounts. Find the right oil for your vehicles. Mechanics can register for BPCL’s loyalty program for mechanics and get instant cashbacks/rewards etc. 

-> For your business needs
1. Smartfleet is BPCL’s fuelling and rewards solution for fleet customers. Fleet customers can control their fuel spends, carry out cashless transactions across petrol pumps, monitor vehicle movement and get rewards. 
2. Petro Corporate is an Expense management program for Corporate fuel purchases. Corporates can get complete control on the fuel payments by their business units & employees with Real-time visibility on the resource movement & 24X7Hours toll-free support 
3. Mak Retailers can now view the entire MAK product portfolio & assist customers & mechanics to scan MAK coupons. In the future, you will also be able to order for lubricants, make payments and earn loyalty points for your purchases 
4. Zip Fuel is our offering for Door Delivery of Diesel in 20 ltr PESO approved jerry cans. Customers can place orders for their diesel requirement, track delivery and be assured of the quality & quantity delivery. 
5. Commercial units & restaurants will be able to use Hello BPCL to place their orders for Bharatgas cylinders, track the delivery, make payments. 
6. Search and find out about BPCL's commercial products for lubricants, industrial fuels, jet fuels, natural gas and solvents. You can enquire and connect with BPCL officers 

Have some

title: myReach - AI Assistant
description:
myReach is a powerful AI-driven app for search and knowledge management. By unlocking your company’s collective insights, it empowers internal teams and external clients to find the answers they need – whether through a centralised knowledge base or an AI chatbot for customer interactions.

CENTRALISE YOUR KNOWLEDGE
- Save all data types (files, websites, audio, notes, etc.) in an interconnected 3D visualiser
- Search across your company’s information to find the answers you need
- Transcribe audios and summarise long PDFs automatically

GET INSTANT ANSWERS 24/7
- Get answers in Natural Language using myReach’s Generative AI capabilities
- Support for +72 languages with accurate, fact-checked answers from your knowledge base
- Every response includes a reference to the original source, paragraph and page of the information

BUILD A PERSONAL AI ASSISTANT
- Deploy a custom Genie on your website to manage customer inquiries and provide seamless support
- Tailor its appearance and behaviour to align with your brand while ensuring secure access controls
- Gain insights from live reports and analytics to understand user behaviour and improve decision-making

myReach integrates with popular tools like Google Drive, Evernote, Zapier and more, to optimise workflow management. With ISO 27001 certification and AES-256 bit and TLS 1.3 encryption, your data remains secured and protected.

Join now and discover the App that’s revolutionising knowledge management with AI.
