title: Indonesia Dating: Singles Chat
description:
💖 Are you attracted to Indonesian people or are you looking to meet people in Indonesia? We have a great new app for you! 

Indonesia Dating is the best free dating app to connect with Indonesian singles or to meet Indonesian singles from around the world. Indonesia Dating is a great way to meet people around you in Indonesia, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. Whether you are looking to see Indonesian girls or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Indonesia, Indonesia Dating will have someone for you!

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.

1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.

2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

✔️ What makes Indonesia Dating unique is this: 
- You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. 
- Meeting new people, making friends and even dating!
- Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! 
They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! 

✔️ Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

✔️ Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? 
Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. 

✔️ Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? 
It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. 
If they like you back, we will connect both of you. 

✔️ Want to help break the ice? 
Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

✔️ Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: Ling Learn Estonian Language
description:
Learn Estonian with Ling in just 10 minutes a day!

DOWNLOAD FREE - LEARN WITH GAMES - SPEAK WITH NATIVE SPEAKERS

Our free Estonian language learning app is designed to make learning Estonian as easy and as fun as possible! Using a variety of mini-games and interactive learning techniques, you’ll be able to immerse yourself in the Estonian language using just your smartphone! 

Whether you’re a complete beginner hoping to learn the basics of the language, or you’re already pretty fluent and want to learn even more advanced Estonian phrases, or brush up on your knowledge – Ling has you covered! 

FEATURED IN

Yahoo • VOGUE • Forbes • NBC

Traditional Estonian language lessons can be tedious and dull. At Ling, we’ve made the learning process fun by using puzzles, games, challenges, and quizzes to teach you how to read, write, speak, and understand Estonian! 

-------------------------------------------------------
OUR Estonian COURSE HIGHLIGHTS
-------------------------------------------------------
- Flashcards to test your knowledge
- Quizzes to track your progress 
- AI chatbot to practice daily conversations
- Speaking exercises to improve your pronunciation
- Finger tracing via your smartphone screen to become familiar with writing
- Match pictures with the corresponding word
- Put sentences into the correct order
- Complete the unfinished sentence
… And much, much more! 

With so many mini-games, challenges, quizzes, and puzzles to teach you Estonian, you’ll have hours of fun learning a new language. It won’t even feel like learning at all! 

--------------------------------
KEY FEATURES OF LING
--------------------------------
- User-friendly interface
- Easy to navigate
- Lessons cover the four aspects of the language (reading, writing, speaking, and listening)
- Courses for all fluency levels, from absolute beginner to advanced
- Mini-games, flashcards, challenges, and interactive games to help you learn faster and more effectively
- All courses were created with the help of native speakers of each language
- Learn helpful grammar tips while playing fun, interactive games
- Learn how to write the alphabet with cutting-edge finger tracing technology
- Learn how to speak about a variety of different topics

Ling is available for 60+ different languages:

Learn Afrikaans, Learn Albanian, Learn Arabic, Learn Armenian, Learn Bengali, Learn Bosnian, Learn Bulgarian, Learn Burmese, Learn Cantonese, Learn Chinese, Learn Croatian, Learn Czech, Learn Danish, Learn Dutch, Learn English, Learn Estonian, Learn Finnish, Learn French, Learn Georgian, Learn German, Learn Greek, Learn Hebrew, Learn Hindi, Learn Hungarian, Learn Indonesian, Learn Irish, Learn Italian, Learn Japanese, Learn Kannada, Learn Khmer, Learn Korean, Learn Lao, Learn Latvian, Learn Lithuanian, Learn Malayalam, Learn Malaysian, Learn Marathi, Learn Mongolian, Learn Nepali, Learn Norwegian, Learn Persian, Learn Polish, Learn Portuguese, Learn Punjabi, Learn Romanian, Learn Russian, Learn Serbian, Learn Slovak, Learn Slovenian, Learn Spanish, Learn Swahili, Learn Swedish, Learn Tagalog, Learn Tamil, Learn Telugu, Learn Thai, Learn Turkish, Learn Ukrainian, Learn Urdu, Learn Vietnamese

title: Hearts (7 of Hearts)
description:
7 of Hearts is an Indian variant of famous card game - Sevens, also known as Badam Satti or Badam Saat.

It's an addictive fun card game and gets quite interesting to play against game's artificial intelligence. Game consists of nice graphics and melodious background scores.

The game has many international variations known as Domino, Laying Out Sevens, Fan Tan, Sjuan and Crazy Sevens.

This is a card game for 4 players using a standard deck of 52 cards. The owner of the 7 of Hearts initiates the game by playing it. Similarly, the other three sevens may later be played as the first cards of their respective suits. Cards are played out to form a layout of sequences going up and down in suit from the sevens (as in many solitaire games). A player who cannot place a card passes. The game is won by emptying one's hand before the other players.

The game consists of total 7 rounds. A player who has "least total score" wins the game.

One doesn't have to play all 7 rounds at a time. Game progress gets saved by the rounds completed and one can resume from the next round anytime later.
short_description: 7 of Hearts is Indian variant of famous card game-Sevens also called Badam Satti
recent_changes_text: ** Latest Release Loaded with Exciting Features **New Feature List -- CARD EXCHANGE !Click the blue button and Exchange any card of your choice with a card from the other players during gameplay. This gives you tons of chances to win the game.- UNDO/CANCEL ROUND ! Now you can undo/cancel the previous round completely from Scoreboard ! Great way to undo your mistakes from previous rounds and replay with better score.- New enhanced graphics in gameplay.- Mute/Unmute the music/sounds.

Upgrade your keyboard style and typing game. The official Real Madrid Keyboard typing app!

Complete with personalized keyboard themes, perfect-reaction Real Madrid GIFs for text messaging, as well as Real Madrid custom stickers, emojis, and emoticons; this Android machine learning powered keyboard is free to download and can be customized to suit your style.

title: upGrad
description:
Right from MBA, M.Sc., or other PG degrees, to Bachelor's degrees, the upGrad app has it all! Explore programs in the field of Management, Data Science, Machine Learning, Software Engineering, Digital Marketing, SEO, Blockchain, Analytics, Product Management, Big Data, and more. Interact with professionals, master Kaggle competitions, network with like-minded professionals, all of it, in one app! 

📈 Supercharge your data science skills - Data science algorithms, Data Science Certificate course, Data Science full course, Data Science for beginners, and Data Science Interview questions. Meet the best Data Science Community! 

AI & Blockchain Courses: has a wide range of Artificial Intelligence 🤖 free courses and interview along with ⛓️ Blockchain course and Blockchain tutorial. 

✔️ Digital Marketing Collection - Whether you are looking for digital marketing for beginners, or digital marketing full course - we have a solution for you. Complete and get a digital marketing certificate and get access to digital marketing interview questions.

🖥 Learn Product Management, Machine Learning with Python, Machine Learning with R, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. Everything - right from, machine learning for beginners to advanced machine learning tutorials are on upGrad., 

🧑🏻‍💻 Level up your career skills with software engineering interview questions, various software development courses, build full-stack app. 

💡 Management Courses - Get access to a wide range of MBA courses and MBA interview questions. upGrad makes online learning easy and convenient and there’s a lot of free material to explore!

The upGrad app lets you connect and engage with industry professionals, teachers, and fellow students, allowing you to enhance your knowledge, expand your network, and explore various opportunities. You can also apply for our Data Science and Big Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Management, Software Engineering Courses, and get free career counseling.

✅ Why upGrad?

Stay ahead in your career with programs from top universities like IIT Madras, Liverpool Business School, Duke CE, MICA, and More.
Engage with industry experts closely
Get Placement support
1-on-1 mentoring from industry experts
Explore career paths in great detail
Upskill yourself with best programs
Thrive in the industry of your choice

🤔 How does our placement support stand out?

✔️ Exclusive opportunities on our job portal
✔️ Dedicated career coaches to help you find the best opportunities
✔️ Career fairs & hackathons to learn real industry problems
✔️ Networking sessions allowing access to an illustrious alumni base from fortune 500 companies
✔️ Just-in-time interviews to help you prepare a day prior to the actual interview
✔️ 300+ Hiring partners
✔️ 52% average hike
✔️ 3X increase in interview opportunities
✔️ Our alumni work in companies such as Amazon, Adobe, Microsoft, Flipkart, IBM, Visa, ESPN, Ola, Swiggy, etc.

upGrad provides online programs that are in-demand, delivered in an extremely disruptive environment. We offer the best online programs for individuals looking to stay sharp in their professional lives in domains that are up-and-coming, including Entrepreneurship, Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, Data Analytics, Digital Marketing, Product Management. Our online programs are designed keeping ambitious people in mind who believe that learning is lifelong.

Merging the latest technology, pedagogy, and support services, we have created a digital-first learning experience. We have collaborated with industry leaders to create programs that are rigorous, engaging, and industry-relevant. Our learning environment is designed to foster active learning and peer-to-peer collaboration. We also have dedicated teams to provide academic and non-academic support to guide learners through the entire journey, even after program completion, and ensure end-to-end support.

title: Chichewa English Dictionary
description:
Burn the words like a dragon with Dragoma!
 
The free Offline Chichewa English Dictionary & Translator application. Internet connection is not required! If you want to learn Chichewa or English the most effective way, there's no better choice than Dragoma! Dragoma shows the definition/meaning of Chichewa or English words as pop up without opening dictionary app ever. No hassle of switching between apps. You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the Offline Chichewa English Dictionary & Translator / Popanda Chingerezi Chichewa Matanthauzo & Wamasulira
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both Chichewa - English and English - Chichewa directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.

Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 

Facebook: 

Twitter: 

Instagram:

Email: 

DISCLAIMER:
The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.
If not installed, your device may ask you to install the TTS engine. An internet connection may be required. We recommend installing it before traveling as roaming data tariffs may be very expensive.

You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the Offline Chichewa English Dictionary & Translator / Popanda Chingerezi Chichewa Matanthauzo & Wamasulira
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both Chichewa - English and English - Chichewa directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.

Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 

Facebook: 

Twitter: 

Instagram:

Email: 

DISCLAIMER:
The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.
If not installed, your device may ask you to install the TTS engine. An internet connection may be required. We recommend installing it before traveling as roaming data tariffs may be very expensive.

title: Medela Family - Breast Feeding
description:
Winner of the Best Baby App of 2022 (Baby Innovation Awards).
Silver winner for Best Native Mobile App at the 2021 eHealthcare Leadership Awards. 
Winner of the 2022 Social Media and Digital Awards in the Mobile app category

Medela Family™ is the personal helper for pregnant and breastfeeding moms just like you. Designed by the world’s leading breast-pumping manufacturer, this pregnancy tracker app provides tools for pregnancy, breast feeding, breast pumping, and more. 👶🍼

After your breast pumping session, you can add the milk to the virtual milk storage feature to keep an overview of your milk stash.* Monitor lactation, baby development, sleep, and more. 

We take breastfeeding tracker tools a step ahead – you'll find interactive checklists, personalized articles, custom tips, reminders, and get all the support to meet your breast feeding and breast pumping goals. Save time and energy – so that you can enjoy baby nursing and development – or, maybe sleep?

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE MEDELA PREGNANCY & BREASTFEEDING TRACKER APP

PREGNANCY TRACKER & BABY TRACKER TOOLS 
- Monitor your contractions with the pregnancy tracker.
- See the size of your baby during pregnancy
- Check vital baby development indicators like sleep, diapers, feeds, length and weight with the baby tracker.
- View maternity & baby statistics along with insights on your dashboard.
- Easily export your records to share with your paediatrician.

BREASTFEEDING TRACKER, BREAST PUMPING & MILK MANAGEMENT
- With the breastfeeding app, you can monitor your baby nursing sessions and milk supply.
- Connect seamlessly to Medela Sonata and Freestyle Flex smart breast pumps for recording pumping sessions in real-time, helpful information and quick how-to's of breast feeding.
- Manage your breast milk stash and breast milk expiration dates with our virtual milk storage feature.*
- Set reminders for breast feeding, pumping sessions, diaper changes, and other important baby-related tasks.
- Save every single detail in your very own breastfeeding tracker and pump log.

WEAR OS APP
- Now available on our Wear OS app: See your milk inventory and track breastfeeding, pumping, bottle, sleep and diaper sessions. 
- You can also add complications on your watch face as shortcuts for even faster tracking. 
- Using the Medela Family Wear OS app is only possible if you have installed the Medela Family app on your smartphone and the smartphone is permanently connected to your watch via Bluetooth. You need to log-in on the Medela Family app on your smartphone to be able to use the Medela Family Wear OS app.
- The Wear OS app is available only after unlocking our VIP pack. The VIP Pack can be unlocked only by connecting a Medela Bluetooth pump.

GET TRUSTED ANSWERS TO YOUR MATERNITY & BABY DEVELOPMENT QUESTIONS
- Get access to expert tips and articles to overcome challenges and reach your maternity and breastfeeding goals.
- Your personal helper answers questions using the Medela knowledge base, created by certified lactation and baby nursing experts and based on 60 years of experience in breast feeding.
- Use pre-set and customizable checklists to help pack your hospital bag, prepare for returning to work, and much more.

With the pregnancy and breastfeeding tracker and more, you can save every detail that matters – while you get to enjoy the journey of motherhood.
You and your family deserve the best. 
Join for FREE with the Medela Family pregnancy tracker, baby tracker, breast pumping & breast feeding tracker app!

*The virtual milk storage and the VIP pack are available for Medela connected breast pumps users only.

title: Rhythm Taichi (+VR support)
description:
3D Rhythm, reinvented

Rhythm Taichi takes a fresh new approach to 3D rhythm games on mobile. Slide your fingers gracefully along the paths traced on the screen, following the beats of the music - it's like practicing Taichi with your fingers!

Swipe with style, swipe with ease

Rhythm Taichi is built from the ground up for mobile devices. A carefully crafted pathing algorithm provides a comfortable yet challenging amount of finger travel for each hand. We've also ruthlessly optimized the game's graphics pipeline to ensure that the game responds quickly and smoothly to your actions.

Looks good, feels good too

The new touch tracking algorithm is more precise then ever - and with the innovative 'rainfall' style timing effects, you get instant

title: Learning chinese words - kids
description:
Welcome to Galaxy Kids, a fun Chinese language learning app for kids and the best way for preschool children to learn Chinese as a second language! ⭐🇨🇳

Galaxy Kids is a free-to-use mandarin Chinese learning application for kids ages 3-6 years old to learn daily conversation and improve pronunciation! The app is developed using animated AI characters, speech recognition, and live teachers. 🐼 Children will enjoy varieties of stories, flashcards, word games, and Chinese-easy songs while having fun improving Chinese linguistic skills.🐾

Our lovable AI Buddies will serve as your children’s friends and tutors to guide them on the step-by-step learning path 🐱🐰 Galaxy Kids is designed for beginner learners with zero background in Mandarin as a home learning tool.Our learning path will teach children over 1000 new words, 50 sentence frames, and most importantly, develop interest and confidence to speak Chinese in daily life. 

Our curriculum is based on the YCT standard, packed with numerous storybooks, interactive Chinese lessons for kids, Chinese conversations for children, and many more!

*Inspire kids to speak Chinese frequently, confidently, and correctly.
*Adopt correct Chinese pronunciation.
*Fun activities that keep babies, preschool kids engaged with interactive animation.
*Learn over 1,000 imperative Chinese words through speaking practices.
*Developed by curriculum and children's education specialists, kid-friendly and has no advertisement.

Learning Path 
Highly structured YCT-based curriculum that teaches Chinese speaking lessons to children from beginner to advanced levels in the form of fun and interactive animation filled with songs, flashcards, conversation exercises, fun games, and Chinese speaking activities.

title: My 2nd Line Text Call Number
description:
★★ A Second Line Phone Number ★★ 

You can purchase a second phone number with the MySecondLine app on your mobile phone. 

Get started for just $8.99 / month with a USA/Canada local number. 

The pricing is the most affordable and the best rate in the market for such a quality app. 

Here are the benefits:

★★ Get a USA/Canada local number: starts at $8.99 only ★★

You can try the app for $8.99 only to get started! Enjoy an ad-free experience after purchase. The cost is fully transparent. It is super easy to get started. 

You will unblock many advanced features below in the premium version and get a dedicated phone number!

★★ A separate second phone number ★★

You can purchase a dedicated phone number from MySecondLine. You can choose a local area code while keeping yourself anonymous and private. You can also find the number based on letters related to your business, e.g., 212-Buy-Book, or 917-Go-Sales. The phone number is a memorable and great way to promote your business.

Besides that, we also provide:
- Toll-free numbers like 800, 888, and 855 in the US/Canada.
- International phone numbers from 60+ countries (GB, Israel, Hong Kong, Germany, etc.)
- You can import and transfer your current USA number to us

★★ Easy texting and quality phone calls (to the US/Canada) ★★ 

It offers easy texting and quality phone calls in the premium version. 

You can text your contacts. And you can receive messages from all over the world. It's also easy to make and receive calls just like your mobile phone. You will enjoy the best communication quality in the app with your mobile networks or Wi-Fi.

Note: For the US/Canada, you can upgrade with a small fee to enable international calls and messages in the settings.

Note: you can upgrade to enable an eSim data plan when you travel around.

★★ Private personal communications ★★

Get a second phone number for many personal usages such as:
- Stay safe and anonymous when you give out your number
- A fake number to avoid unwanted spam messages and calls
- A temporary number for dating, shopping, etc
- Website registration to receive SMS and still keep privacy

★★ Professional business team number ★★

MySecondLine is more than a second line for you and your business.

You can manage the work number with your team: more productive, happier customers!

You can also upgrade to get an AI chatbot to engage and get more customers!

★★ Great features and the best texting & calling app ★★

- Customizable text tone, ringtone & vibration
- Voicemail transcription: transcript of your voicemail
- Caller ID: show the incoming call's phone number and contact name
- Greeting: record your sounds to greet customers
- Auto-reply: automatically message reply when you are busy
- Great support service:

title: Learn Vietnamese
description:
Start learning Vietnamese 🇻🇳 quickly and effectively with Mondly’s free daily lessons! In just minutes you’ll start memorizing core Vietnamese words, form sentences, learn to speak Vietnamese phrases and take part in conversations. You’ll feel like having your own Vietnamese language tutor in your pocket.

Loved and trusted worldwide

🏆 Mondly was named "Editors’ Choice" in Google Play and "App of the Year" by Facebook.
🌍 Beginner or advanced learner, traveler or business professional - This Vietnamese app works great and dynamically adjusts to your needs.

Join over 50 million people that are learning new languages from their mother tongue!
Why Mondly? Because we build bridges between people by making language learning fun and easy through technological innovation.

TRY MONDLY

★ "The closest thing to classroom education." — Bloomberg
★ "A practical approach to language learning likely to be widely adopted." — Forbes
★ "The new way to learn languages ." — Inc.
★ "Mondly is like having a private tutor." — CNN
_____________________

This is how the future of language courses looks like
Our Vietnamese language learning app gets you started with a basic conversation between two people. You quickly start memorizing core words, use them to build sentences and phrases, and at the end of a 45-minutes module you are able to reconstruct that conversation with your own voice. It’s an effective way to learn Vietnamese phrases. State-of-the-art Natural Speech Recognition and Spaced Repetition Algorithms make our Vietnamese learning app effective for learning languages.

Here are the key features that make Mondly a great tutor for you:
✓ Crystal-clear audio and professional voice actors.
» Learn the right Vietnamese pronunciation from conversations between native speakers.

✓ State-of-the-art Speech Recognition.
» Mondly knows exactly how to listen to your Vietnamese words and phrases. You will only get a positive

title: Chord ai - learn any song
description:
Chord ai uses recent advances in artificial intelligence (ai) to give you the chords of any song automatically and reliably. You won't need to look for the chords of a song on the web anymore!

Chord ai listens to the music played from your device, from any video/audio streaming service or played live around you, and detects the chords instantly. Then it shows you the finger positions to play the song on your Guitar, Piano or Ukulele.

It is a great tool for a novice to learn his favorite song and for an experienced musician to transcribe the details of a song when rare chords are played.

Chord ai includes:
- Chord recognition (more precise than all other apps)
- Beats and tempo detection (BPM)
- Tonality detection
- Lyrics recognition and alignment (karaoke-like alignment)

Chord ai has a FREE version, enabling the recognition of basic chords:
- major and minor
- augmented, diminished
- 7th, M7th
- suspended (sus2, sus4)

In the PRO version, you can store playlists, and backup on your drive, and the chord recognition has more precision. It provides an optimal finger position and recognizes thousands of advanced chords such as: 
- power chords
- half-diminished, dim7, M7b5, M7#5
- 6th, 69th, 9th, M9th, 11th, M11th, 13th, M13th
- add9, add11, add#11, addb13, add13
- 7#5, 7b5, 7#9, 7b9, 69, 11b5, 13b9, 
and combinations of the above! (such as 9sus4, min7add13 etc.)
- chord inversions such as C/E are also included

Chord ai also comes with a massive library of chord positions for guitar and ukulele players. It is the ultimate guitar learning tool. Guitar tabs are not yet supported but it will come eventually.

Chord ai even works offline and it is full privacy preserving. You don't need an internet connection (unless you want to play a song from some video or audio streaming services).

How does Chord ai work? Chord ai can track the chords of a song in three ways:
1) Through your device microphone. Any song playing around you, or played by your device, is analyzed through your device microphone and the chord positions are shown in real time. You can go back in time and replay the song with the chords displayed on a timeline.

2) For audio files that you have on your device, Chord ai will process the file in a few seconds chordifying this whole song at once.

3) Chord ai is compatible with the common audio and video streaming services.

Any

title: Musica Voice Control Player
description:
Musica™ is an advanced music player for music voice control. It allows you to play songs stored on your device with the power of your voice. Just speak the name of the song, artist or album and this app will start playing the songs you want to listen. Musica player features a beautiful, fast and intuitive interface and lets you play all of the songs on your phone. It saves you time as you don't have to browse through the playlist for the song you want to play. Just speak and it will play!

MAIN FEATURES

• Music voice search and commands
• Wake word voice search activation for complete hands free operation (Pro feature)
• Tag Editor - The tag editor allows you to easily edit the tags of your music files such as title, artist, album name for single songs or whole albums. This helps in voice commands as you can create your custom keywords and speak them to play particular songs. Tag editor is also helpful for giving voice commands for songs with non English titles and tags.
• Create and edit playlists
• Homescreen widget and shortcuts
• Lockscreen playback controls
• Voice activation from headset / earphone media button double press (Pro feature)
• Supports many audio formats including: MP3, WAV, OGG, AIFF, MIDI (.mid, .xmf, .mxm), FLAC, AAC, 3GP, AAC, MP4, M4A, OTA etc.
• High quality audio rendering engine which provides the best sound quality on an Android device.
• Detects and plays all of the music files on your phone.
• Gap-less playback
• Shuffle and Sort
• Customizable UI theme colors

MUSIC VOICE COMMANDS

Musica player's speech recognition accurately detects your voice commands. To give voice commands, tap on the button with the microphone symbol on the bottom-right side and speak when it turns red. You may also say wake up word instead of tapping on mic button for hands free operation in Pro version. Not only you can play songs but also control music playback by speaking the following commands:

• Play - e.g. Play Hips don't lie
• Play - e.g. Play Akon
• Play - e.g. Play Euphoria
• Shuffle On - Enables shuffle play mode of music playback in which songs are played in a randomized order.
• Shuffle Off - Disables shuffle mode
• Next - Play next item
• Previous - Play previous item
• Stop - Pause/stop song
• Play - Resume playing

TIPS

• Make sure you are connected to internet to get accurate speech recognition results.
• You don't even need to speak full name of the song . For example if you want to play "Summer of 69" then just speak "Play Summer" or simply "Summer".
• If you speak artist (singer) or album name, then Musica player will play all songs of that artist or album back to back.

For support, send email to
short_description: Musica is an advanced music player for music voice control. Speak to Play songs!
recent_changes_text: Pro version now supports voice activation wake up word and voice activation by earphone/headset button double press.Better user interface, more customization and new features like custom playlists, tag editor etc.

title: CareAR
description:
CareAR, a Xerox Company, provides a smart augmented reality support platform visually enabling your customer service, field service, and IT service staff to drive greater outcomes and experiences. Deflect costly dispatches and reduce time-sensitive resolutions through self-solve content, remote AR guidance and troubleshooting while enhancing safety. Your customers, employees, and field staff now have the next generation support tool to deflect calls and reduce downtime.

CareAR provides enhanced augmented reality tools with visually immersive, self-solve content as well as live video collaboration and capturing pictures and video from support sessions into systems of record together as part of an end-to-end service management workflow, extending value to support teams.

Features
Multiparty: With CareAR's multiparty feature, you can invite as many collaborators as you like to work together in a live, high definition, remote solve session.

Annotation Tools: With one of the industry's deepest AR toolboxes, CareAR users can annotate live video feeds as well as shared images, providing detailed visual guidance to quickly resolve problems.

Session Recording: Hosts can enable session recording to capture video, audio, and AR annotations for post-session playback. Great for critiquing new hires, creating audit artifacts, building up knowledge base content, and more.

AR Measurement Tool:
Measure linear distances in an Assist session and copy/save or promote to be an annotation on the live video feed.

Groups: For enterprises, organizing support teams into groups helps to better manage users and study team member performance. You can create groups based on job function, location, corporate organization, language spoken, skillset, or any other attribute. Reporting can be filtered based on group assignment.

Rich Analytics and Dashboards: Administrators, managers, and team leaders get deeper insights in how teams are successfully resolving field issues by using the detailed dashboards provided by CareAR's admin portal.

KPI Builder: Instrument those Key Performance Indicators that matter to your organization using CareAR’s custom KPI builder. Get your customer's perspective on how you're doing. Collect information in a structured manner for rapid

title: Airbrush: Face & Photo Editor
description:
📸 Master Your Selfie Game with Airbrush – The Ultimate Photo and Video Editor! With our easy-to-use features, you can master your face, hair, body and backgrounds with AI-powered tools designed to enhance your natural beauty while maintaining your authentic charm.

✨ EXCELLENCE IN EVERY SHOT 
✔ AI Retouch – Upgrade your portraits with AI precision automatically, refining every detail to perfection.
✔ Teeth Whitening – Brighten your smile instantly.
✔ Blemish Removal – Instantly erases acne & imperfections for flawless skin.
✔ Smooth – Soften wrinkles and even out skin tones for a youthful glow.
✔ Highlighter – Accentuate your best features with added texture & glow.
✔ Reshape – Fine-tune your face & body proportions effortlessly.
✔ Contouring – Enhance your facial contours to always look your best.
✔ Eye Enhancer – Fix red-eye, remove under-eye shadows, or change eye color.
✔ Virtual Makeup – Apply AI-powered makeup for a polished look.
✔ Hairstyling – Discover fresh hair colors & trendy hair styles — from bold highlights to soft waves in Airbrush.
 
🎨 SPARK YOUR IMAGINATION 
- Background Editing – Blur, replace, or enhance your background with ease.
- AI Eraser – Remove unwanted objects in seconds.
- AI Enhancer – Adjust brightness, saturation, & temperature automatically.
- Filters & Effects – Transform your photos with stunning filters & artistic effects.
- AI Repair – Restores low-quality images and brings every detail back to life.

📹 VIDEO SELFIES REIMAGINED 
- Face Retouch – Apply real-time beautification to your videos.
- Object Removal – Remove distractions from your scenes.
- Quality Enhancement – Boost video clarity for a crisp & cinematic look.

😊 ENJOYMENT WITH AI 
- Pro Headshots – Generate studio-quality headshots instantly.
- Mood Swapper – Change expressions with AI-powered mood adjustments.
- Style Explorer – See yourself in different styles & artistic portraits.

Unlock Your Full Creative Power 
✨ 300+ exclusive presets & makeup looks
🎨 400+ filters and stunning effects
🎭 Unlimited access to all stylized tools
🔓 100+ premium-only features & retouch options

📷 Join millions of users who trust Airbrush to edit their photos & videos with ease! Whether you're making a quick touch-up or a full makeover, Airbrush gives you the best result.
📥 Download Airbrush now & start creating stunning selfies & videos today!

title: KBA-EZ Health Guide
description:
One of the best ways to take charge of your health is to be well-informed of your healthcare plan and everything it has to offer! The KBA-EZ Health Guide app is focused to your specific benefit coverage giving you access to all of your benefit information, in one place for a customized experience. *

•	Quickly view your Member ID and Group Number 
•	ID Card view, email, fax or request a copy
•	Claims look up with easy sorting by date and claim type
•	Explanation of benefits access
•	Check your Deductible and Out-of-Pocket Accumulators
•	Dashboard with customizable page links
•	Contact our friendly Customer Service
•	Recover member portal password

*Certain features are not available with every plan.
short_description: All your benefits, simplified, in one place. With our easy-to-navigate app.

title: Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT
description:
Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT is a premier meditation and self-help app for better sleep, stress relief and self-improvement. It provides personalized guided meditations, mindfulness life coaching, CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy), breathwork, soothing sleep sounds, sleep stories and much more.
 
Aura is an all-in-one app that offers daily meditations, CBT, hypnosis on subjects like better sleep, stress, anxiety, depression, insomnia, motivation and more topics for any situation. Learn mindfulness, choose guided meditations and take breathing exercises led by top coaches.
 
** Featured on: The New York Times, Forbes, The Oprah Magazine, Women’s & Men’s Health, and more.**
 
With a global community of 7 million users, a 98% user satisfaction rate, and advanced personalization, the Aura mobile app is the trusted choice for daily mental health, motivation, self-help, and self-care, all achievable in just 3 minutes a day.
 
WHAT YOU GET WHEN YOU DOWNLOAD
 
EXTENSIVE CONTENT LIBRARY:
Access to the world's largest premium wellness library. The content is divided into categories such as meditation, sleep, anxiety, breathwork, ASMR, affirmations, happiness, and more.
There is a large collection of self-care relaxing sounds: rain sounds, soothing sleep sounds, nature sounds, white noise, calming sea, and more.

EXPERT GUIDANCE: 
Content led by top motivational, mindfulness and insomnia coaches, therapists, and storytellers from around the world. Receive effective self-help & motivational guidance from daily meditations to cognitive behavioral therapies (CBT). Enjoy live sessions or schedule your activities at your preferred time.
 
BETTER SLEEP:
Meditations for sleep, sleep sounds & stories, cognitive behavioral therapies for insomnia (CBT-I) and relaxing sounds to promote restful & better sleep.
 
BREATHWORK:
Take breathing exercises with a coach at a guided session or take one of our offline breathwork courses.
 
PROGRAMS:
Explore subjects deeply and effectively with the following pre-designed programs:
 - Sleep Meditation,
- Calm Anxiety,
- Stress Relief,
- Hypnosis for Sleep,
- Intro to Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
- Cognitive Behavioral Therapies for Insomnia (CBT-I), and more.
 
GRATITUDE JOURNAL:
A tool for self-help, self-reflection and gratitude, which can have a positive impact on your mental health. Manage stress, anxiety, and depression by focusing on positive aspects and self-care of your life.
 
MOOD TRACKER:
A feature to help you become more aware of your moods and emotions, allowing you to visualize your progress over time.
 
WHY MILLIONS OF PEOPLE USE AURA? 
 
Daily Wellness Habit: An easy-to-follow, daily self-help routine that takes just 3 minutes a day to help you relax, become more mindful and motivational, and enhance your mental health with Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT.
 
Stress and Anxiety Relief: On-demand resources to reduce stress and anxiety, providing guided meditations, relaxing sounds, life coaching to find positivity and calm.
 
Personalization: Aura has the world's most advanced personalization engine powered by the latest research in machine learning. It offers highly personalized content and recommendations to each user's specific needs and preferences, making it a valuable and relevant resource to improve your mental health.
 
Сonstantly Updated Content: With a vast library of content spanning guided meditations, life coaching, CBT, and more.
 
Supportive Community: Join a passionate community of 7 million users worldwide who love Aura and benefit from its offerings.
 
Download Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT and get access to a world of personalized mental wellness resources, including guided meditations, life coaching, and CBT.

title: Mysocial: AI Creator Manager
description:
Mysocial is your AI Influencer Manager for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. It helps creators and influencers create content, find brand deals, analyze performance, and monetize their audience, all in one app.

Trusted by 70,000+ creators worldwide, Mysocial works like your influencer agent and social media agency in your pocket.

---

WHAT MYSOCIAL HELPS YOU DO

CREATE HIGH-PERFORMING CONTENT

* Discover trending topics and viral content ideas
* Generate scripts, captions, hooks, and post ideas with AI
* Repurpose content across Reels, TikTok, Shorts, and posts
* Create AI-generated YouTube thumbnails and social visuals
* Plan your content calendar with smarter structure

Built for creators who want consistent growth.

---

FIND BRAND DEALS AND MONETIZE

* Discover relevant brand deals and sponsorships
* Match with brands based on your niche and audience
* Generate AI-written pitches for brand collaborations
* Calculate your media value for sponsored posts
* Price content confidently and negotiate better deals

Perfect for influencers, UGC creators, and sponsored content creators.

---

TRACK INSTAGRAM, TIKTOK AND YOUTUBE ANALYTICS

* Unified analytics across platforms
* Track views, engagement, followers, and performance
* Identify top-performing content formats
* Get AI insights on what to post next

No spreadsheets. No guesswork.

---

MEDIA KIT AND CAMPAIGN REPORTING

* Live media kit updated daily with real-time stats
* Share professional metrics directly with brands
* Generate campaign reports instantly

Everything brands need, ready to send.

---

WHY CREATORS USE MYSOCIAL

* All-in-one influencer management app
* AI content creation and strategy
* Brand deals and sponsorship discovery
* Creator monetization tools
* Built for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Creators using Mysocial report faster growth, better brand deals, and higher earnings (some up to +800%).

---

BUILT FOR

* Influencers
* Content Creators
* UGC Creators
* Creator Entrepreneurs

Download Mysocial today and activate your AI Influencer Manager.

-----------------------------------------
MORE WAYS MYSOCIAL HELPS YOU WIN
-----------------------------------------

INFLUENCER MARKETING AND BRAND COLLABORATIONS
Mysocial supports modern influencer marketing, from your first UGC collaboration to long-term sponsorships.

Use it to:

* Prepare for influencer campaigns
* Present yourself professionally to brands
* Understand sponsorship performance
* Build stronger brand partnerships

-----------------------------------------

AI BUILT FOR THE CREATOR ECONOMY
Mysocial is trained specifically for creators and influencers, not generic AI chat.

It understands:

* Content formats and trends
* Creator monetization models
* Platform strategy across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

So recommendations stay practical, relevant, and actionable.

-----------------------------------------

GROW FASTER ON INSTAGRAM, TIKTOK AND YOUTUBE

* Improve engagement with better hooks and captions
* Identify what drives followers and retention
* Understand why certain posts perform better
* Optimize what to post across platforms

Designed to support Instagram growth, TikTok growth, and YouTube channel growth.

-----------------------------------------

BUILT FOR SERIOUS CREATORS

If content is more than a hobby, Mysocial helps you operate like a professional.

Manage your creator business in one place:

* Performance tracking
* Brand communication support
* Faster planning, reporting, and strategy

Less admin. More creation.

---

THE RESULT

A clearer strategy.
Better content decisions.
More professional brand deals.
More time to focus on creating.

---

LEGAL

text:
[TITLE] Learn Indonesian - 11000 Words
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Learn 11,000 words & sentences with our advanced vocabulary builder.
[DESCRIPTION]
Learn Indonesian from 61 native languages, for free & offline, with FunEasyLearn.

Learn to READ 📖 WRITE ✍ and SPEAK Indonesian 💬
Discover the fun & easy way to learn all the reading rules, all the words you’ll ever need and all the useful phrases in the Indonesian language.

🚀 Contents
• 6,000 Indonesian words (constantly growing): the most common nouns, verbs, adjectives, etc., categorized into 7 levels and 200 topics;
• 5,000 Indonesian phrases (frequently used): the most important phrases for daily conversations and travelling, categorized into 10 levels and 120 topics.

Enhance your vocabulary by learning words, sentences and expressions for beginner, intermediate and advanced learners. 

🔔 Why learn Indonesian with FunEasyLearn?
FunEasyLearn reinvents language learning. Our team of linguists and teachers have developed a unique language learning strategy. The secret lies in combining an alphabet with all the reading rules, all the necessary words and a practical phrasebook into one app. This allows our users to read a word or phrase, pronounce it correctly, associate it with an illustration and practice it with listening, writing and speaking games. 

🏆 Top features
Hand-drawn illustrations – memorize the new vocabulary faster with intuitive illustrations;
Professional audio recordings – listen to audios recorded by native speakers;
Detailed statistics – analyze your results and track your progress;
Review manager – review everything you learn;
Smart search – find quickly the words and phrases you need;
Hide what you know – hide the content you already know;
Speech recognition – improve your pronunciation;
Offline – use the app anywhere in the world, with no internet connection.

💼 Indonesian for business
Get access to special Indonesian lessons created for your business. We provide specialized courses for taxi drivers, hotel & restaurant staffs, flight-attendants, shop-assistants, etc.

✈ Indonesian for travelling
Learn how to book a hotel room, order a meal in a restaurant, ask for directions, carry out a conversation and speak confidently with the native speakers.

🙌 Indonesian for adults
We adapt the contents depending on the age of the learner. Both you and your kid can learn Indonesian and have fun.

FunEasyLearn Free
[RECENT_CHANGES]
- Improved the design;- Added a filter to the Search;- Made new Hint Packs;- Added new options to the Review;- Increased the font size;- Added sound effects in games;- Added stress marks for Arabic, German, Hebrew & Russian;New native languages, contents, levels and features are added regularly.Our bee fixes bugs instantly.Follow us on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram

title: AutoResponder for WA
description:
Automatically respond to custom received WhatsApp or WA Business messages with this bot. You have a lot of settings to customize each auto reply for your needs. Download now for free!

FEATURES & ADVANTAGES:
★ Auto-reply to WhatsApp or WA Business
★ Individually customizable
★ Many automation tools included
★ React to all messages when you're busy
★ Send replies to specific messages
★ Welcome message for new chats *
★ Live answer replacements (time, name...)
★ Multiple replies in one rule *
★ Works with contacts, groups and unknown numbers
★ Ignore and specify contacts and groups
★ Automatic scheduler with delay
★ AI with ChatGPT or Dialogflow.com (formerly api.ai) *
★ Working as a Tasker/MacroDroid plugin (Tasker is an automation tool) *
★ Control AutoResponder with Wear OS
★ Backup rules for easy recovery
★ Personal agent for your business
★ Almost everything is possible with this bot!
★ Many more features will follow!

📧 

Download NOW for free - Create the BEST EXPERIENCE for your contacts!

Tips & tricks: Update WhatsApp messenger to the latest version if the bot doesn't auto reply for you. In case the beta update doesn't work anymore, please contact me. Works with WhatsApp Business.

Notification access: This tool doesn't directly access WhatsApp, it replies to notifications.

* Pro required

Since this tool only uses a native Android API, errors can never be completely ruled out.

This app is NOT affiliated with WhatsApp.
WhatsApp is a registered Trademark of WhatsApp Inc.

title: AiDot – Smart Home Life
description:
1. Simplicity
Smart Homes Should be Easy

Intuitive and easy to use right from the start, just download and start using. Automatically detects new devices, and connects in just one touch.

2. Convenience

An Automated Home Is a Smarter Home

Set up recommended automations with one tap. Bring your own automation ideas to life. Set schedules for your devices to power on devices or change modes. All in just moments with the frictionless interface.

3.Atmosphere

Feel Your Home Come to Life

Create immersive spaces and the perfect vibe with smart lighting throughout your home. Sync with sound to enhance parties or moments of meditation. Link with your TV to bring another dimension to movie nights.

4. Customization

Control Your Home, Your Way

Create groups to be controlled as one for speed and convenience. Design your home screen for easy access to your most commonly used devices, appliances, groups, and scenes.

5. Protection

Your Home Is Your Sanctuary

Keeps an eye on what’s happening outside to keep you safe and healthy inside. Makes you aware of, and reacts to, motion, wildfires, high pollen counts, and poor air quality, all while maximizing energy efficiency.

Service Agreement：
* End-User License Agreement : 
*

2. Convenience

An Automated Home Is a Smarter Home

Set up recommended automations with one tap. Bring your own automation ideas to life. Set schedules for your devices to power on devices or change modes. All in just moments with the frictionless interface.

3.Atmosphere

Feel Your Home Come to Life

Create immersive spaces and the perfect vibe with smart lighting throughout your home. Sync with sound to enhance parties or moments of meditation. Link with your TV to bring another dimension to movie nights.

4. Customization

Control Your Home, Your Way

Create groups to be controlled as one for speed and convenience. Design your home screen for easy access to your most commonly used devices, appliances, groups, and scenes.

5. Protection

Your Home Is Your Sanctuary

Keeps an eye on what’s happening outside to keep you safe and healthy inside. Makes you aware of, and reacts to, motion, wildfires, high pollen counts, and poor air quality, all while maximizing energy efficiency.

title: Entri: Learning App for Jobs
description:
Entri App is India’s trusted vernacular learning platform for exam preparation and upskilling. Access 500+ high-quality courses taught by top educators and industry professionals. Learn in Malayalam, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Hindi with structured content, practice materials, and career-focused training.

📗 Why Choose Entri App

• Online & Recorded Classes by Expert Teachers & Toppers

• Study Materials in Regional Languages

• Daily Practice App: Mock Tests, Previous Papers, GK & Current Affairs

• 100+ Hiring Partners offering Internship & Placement Support

📚 Key Features

• Daily Rank Booster: Topic-wise quizzes updated every day

• Video Courses: HD video lessons with offline downloads

• Subject Tests: Quant, Reasoning, English & more

• Live Mock Tests: Practice with curated mock test sets

• Entri Groups: 24×7 community discussions with peers and mentors

• Analytics: AI-based performance tracking and insights

• Soft Skills: Personality development and motivation sessions

• Post-course Support: Guidance for interviews, jobs & internships

• Entri Eva: Virtual assistant for Spoken English

📗 Exam Preparation

Prepare for public and competitive exams with latest-pattern mock tests, quizzes, and expert-led video courses.

Get structured preparation for:

• PSC Exams (State-level Public Service Commission exams)

• Banking Exams (IBPS, SBI, RBI, etc.)

• SSC & RRB Exams (CHSL, CGL, MTS, NTPC, ALP, JE, and more)

📗 Upskilling Programs

Advance your career with Entri Elevate—specialized programs designed for real-world job readiness.

• Coding: Full Stack, Python, Data Science, Software Testing

• Commerce: SAP, Practical Accounting

• Teaching: Montessori, Yoga

• Technical: QS, MEP, Oil & Gas, Structural Design

• Language & Communication: Spoken English, IELTS, OET, German

• Finance: Stock Market, Forex, Technical & Fundamental Analysis

📗 Regional Learning Advantage

Learn complex topics in your native language with simple explanations and examples. Entri’s local-language approach helps learners from non-English backgrounds master concepts faster and stay confident in exams and workplaces.

🧭 Information Sources

Official updates and information are taken directly from the respective examination authorities and boards.

 A full list of valid Official Sources for Government Exam Information is available at: 

⚠️ Disclaimer

Entri App is a private learning platform.

It does not represent, endorse, or affiliate with any government entity.

All exam-related information and updates are sourced from publicly available official websites of the respective organizations.

🔒

title: CapCut - Video Editor
description:
CapCut offers easy-to-use video editing functions, in-APP fonts and effects, advanced features such as keyframe animation, smooth slow-motion, chroma key, and stabilization, to help you capture and snip moments.

Create fancy videos with other unique features: auto captions, text-to-speech, motion tracking, and background removal. Show your personality and go viral on TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook!

FEATURES
Basic video editing
• Trim and shorten clips and split or merge videos.
• Adjust video speed from 0.1x to 100x, and apply speed curves to clips.
• Animate video clips with incredible zoom in/out effects.
• Highlight the best moments with the freeze feature.
• Explore transition options with awesome effects on and between clips.

Advanced video editor
• Keyframe video animation is available for all settings.
• Edit videos to create smooth slow-motion with the optical flow feature and speed curve tool.
• Use the chroma key to remove specific colors from videos.
• Easy to arrange and preview clips on multi-track timeline.
• The stabilizing feature keeps video footage steady.

Intelligent features
• Auto captions: automate speech recognition and subtitles in videos.
• Text-to-speech: apply text-to-speech in multiple languages and voices.
• Background removal: automatically remove backgrounds.

Text & Stickers
• Add text to videos with different fonts and styles, choose unique text templates. Fonts can be imported locally.
• Subtitles can be added to the timeline of video tracks and can be moved and adjusted in one step.

Trending Effects & Filters
• Match video content with diverse filters that are updated weekly with the latest trends.
• Edit videos with hundreds of trending effects, including Glitch, Blur, 3D, etc.
• Add movie-style video filters or adjust video brightness, contrast, etc.

Music & Sound Effects
• Add millions of music clips and sound effects to videos.
• Extract audio, clips, and recordings from videos.

Easy to Share
• Custom video export resolution, HD video editor supports 4K 60fps exports and smart HDR.
• Adjust the format and share with your friends on social media platforms.

CapCut is an all-in-one video editor and video maker application with everything you need to create stunning, high-quality videos. Beginners can get started with CapCut in a matter of seconds, while advanced users can enjoy all the functions they need to edit videos.

title: Germany Social: Dating & Chat
description:
Want to meet other Germans locally or in Germany? Whether you are looking for online dating or meet new friends, Germany Social is the best app to connect with other Germans. 

Germany Social is a new cool and user-friendly online dating and matchmaking app who is looking for outgoing and fun single Men and Women in Germany, where you can make friends and meet German singles. Find an activity partner, new friends, a cool date or a soulmate, for a long term relationship.

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.

1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.

2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Germany Social will help you find the perfect mate for you by simply sharing photos, chat and even share videos with our growing online global network.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

You can meet people directly by looking at photos or watch videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video-based social app because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through!

Too shy to upload a video? 
- We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? 
- Then hang out in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. 

Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. 

We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete themselves forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hang out with tonight? 
- It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. 

Want to help break the ice? 
- Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos, and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video, and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: Truco Nat
description:
This version of Truco is based on the book by Francisco A. Solé and of course, the rules of this wonderful game of deception and strategy are almost completely implemented.

Facing the best artificial intelligence, no matter if you are a beginner or advanced in Truco, Nat Sensei will guide you to become a true teacher.

Our artificial intelligence is designed to be as natural as possible, with typical phrases from this card game so you don't lose the thread against your friends and it will often be difficult to tell the difference.

If you like challenges, face the best players for more than 10
Championships where losing is not an option. Be the best and improve your
guild.

Participate in tables of 1vs1 or 2vs2, the choice is yours.

Online multiplayer mode: If the AI ​​is no longer sufficient for your mastery level, you can play with your colleagues or random players over the internet. Create your own private room, have your own lunch and have fun.

Truco Nat has the chants: Envido including lack, flower, reserved flower, pass letters, to law and many more.

Available in English and Spanish languages.

What do you expect to play? Do not forget that to win you need "a Truco"

Any problem or suggestion write to us at or comment on our social networks, your

title: CoddyKit: Learn Coding with AI
description:
Dreaming of designing your own app, building a stunning website, or even creating the next big game? Solo Code Learn AI is your ultimate companion. Whether you're a beginner looking to learn programming for the first time, a self-learner exploring new technologies, or a parent encouraging coding for kids, this powerful AI-driven platform will guide you every step of the way. 
With Solo Code Learn AI, you’ll learn programming skills in a fun, engaging, and interactive way—all tailored to your learning style! Say goodbye to complicated coding books and hello to a more personalized, hands-on experience. 
Explore a World of Programming Languages 
Solo Code Learn AI offers extensive courses covering a wide range of programming languages and technologies. You’ll gain expertise with tools that lead to real-world applications. 
Learn JavaScript and master front-end development with our engaging tutorials. 
Build websites from scratch with Learn HTML, Learn CSS, and our intuitive HTML Editor, empowering you to craft stunning web pages. 
Develop skills to confidently work in the backend with Learn PHP, Python Editor, and Go Compiler. 
Create professional applications using Java IDE, C# IDE, and Learn Kotlin IDE tools. 
Immerse yourself in app and game development with Learn Swift and the comprehensive Kotlin Compiler. 
Learn React and dominate frontend development with cutting-edge libraries. 
Prepare for future advancements with Learn Machine Learning using an intuitive AI Code Editor that makes complex algorithms simple! 
What Makes Solo Code Learn AI Different? 
Personalized Learning Pathways 
Your learning experience is unique to you. Whether you’re starting with Learn Programming for Kids, trying to grasp the basics of Learn Python 3, or exploring advanced features with the robust TypeScript Compiler, our AI customizes lessons to match your pace, goals, and interests. 
Interactive JavaScript & HTML Editors 
Our interactive JS Editor and HTML Editor bring your imagination to life. Test, debug, and see results instantly. It’s coding made simple, efficient, and fun. 
Built-In Compilers for Practical Experience 
Dive into real-world coding projects as Solo Code Learn AI allows you to test your code directly. Use the Go IDE, Python Compiler, Java IDE, and C# Compiler for hands-on practice to see immediate results and improve your coding skills. 
Engaging Content for All Ages 
Introduce coding to everyone! Whether it’s coding for kids or helping adults learn new skills, Solo Code Learn AI creates an engaging environment with quizzes, games, and real-world projects to keep the learning process entertaining. 
Anywhere, Anytime Access 
Whether you’re at home or on the go, Solo Code Learn AI is always with you. Seamlessly switch between learning platforms—on mobile, desktop, or online. It’s as simple as opening your browser. 
Verified Certification 
After completing any course, earn a verified Solo Code Learn AI certificate. Whether you choose Learn React, Learn Go, Learn JavaScript, or any other language, this certification adds credibility to your resume or LinkedIn profile. 
Simple Steps to Start 
Tell Us Your Goals 
Want to become a full-stack developer? Start by mastering Learn Java, Learn Python 3, or Frontend Development. Interested in apps? Jump into Learn Swift or Learn Kotlin. 
Dive into Your Learning Kit 
Explore lessons with built-in features like the Python 3 IDE and practical insights for coding. Discover why learners rave about tools like the JavaScript Editor and Kotlin Compiler. 
Practice and Build 
Use our C# IDE, Python Editor, and Go Compiler to bridge the gap between theory and practice. Write, test, and refine your code until it’s perfect. 
Earn Your Certification 
Show off your new skills with a verified certificate, whether you're a parent enabling coding for kids or a professional learning to build apps with ReactJS.

title: Microsoft 365 Copilot
description:
The Microsoft 365 Copilot app is your AI-first productivity app for work and home. It provides one place for you to chat with your AI assistant1, create and edit content, scan documents, manage projects, and quickly find files on the go - helping you get more done, without doing more. 

With the Microsoft 365 Copilot app, you can[1]: 

• Chat with your AI assistant – Ask Copilot to summarize a document saved to the cloud (OneDrive or SharePoint) or on your phone, draft an email, or analyze a spreadsheet using natural language. 

• Interact with voice – Talk to Copilot to help you prepare for your day, get answers, and brainstorm ideas hands-free. 

• Find what matters fast – Find the strategy deck you were working on a month ago, a picture from your last family reunion, or a file that was attached to an email. 

• Accelerate your learning – Ask Copilot to explain a concept, summarize recent trends, or help you prepare for a presentation. 

• Get expert insights – Use built-in AI agents like Researcher and Analyst to generate research reports and analyze complex datasets. 

• Create polished content – Create and edit images, posters, banners, videos, surveys and more with easy-to-use templates. 

• Scan files – Scan documents, photos, notes and more with your mobile app. 

• Manage projects easily - Bring together ideas, documents, and links and ask Copilot to summarize and connect the dots with Copilot Notebooks. 

• Easily upload and save documents – Upload Word, Excel, or PDF files from your phone’s storage to get answers from Copilot — plus, save Copilot-created files directly to your phone. 

The Microsoft 365 Copilot app helps you find and edit files, scan documents, and create content on the go with access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDFs all in one app 

Sign in with your work, school, or personal Microsoft account to start using the free app today. 

[1] Availability of Microsoft 365 Copilot features may vary. Some capabilities require specific licenses or may be disabled by your organization's administrator. See this webpage for more information on feature availability by license. 

Please refer to Microsoft’s EULA for
short_description: Copilot, Word, Excel, and More
recent_changes_text: Thank you for using Office. We regularly release updates to the app, which include great new features, as well as improvements for speed and reliability.

title: WizeSMS: SMS to Email/Telegram
description:
📧 AUTO-FORWARD SMS TO EMAIL & TELEGRAM

Never miss important text messages again! Wize SMS automatically forwards your SMS and MMS to email (Gmail or any SMTP) and Telegram, so you can access your messages from any device, anywhere.
Perfect for remote workers, business professionals, travelers, dual SIM users, and anyone who needs their messages accessible beyond their phone.

✉️ FORWARD TO GMAIL & EMAIL

• Connect your Gmail account in seconds
• Or use any email via SMTP configuration
• Receive SMS as emails instantly
• Perfect for backing up OTP codes and verification messages
• Keep permanent records of important conversations

📱 FORWARD TO TELEGRAM

• Set up Telegram bot integration easily
• Get SMS delivered to your Telegram app
• Access messages on desktop, tablet, or any device
• Never miss messages when your phone is off or out of reach

🎯 SMART FORWARDING FEATURES

Unlike basic SMS forwarders, Wize SMS gives you complete control:
✅ Custom Filters - Forward only specific contacts, keywords, or message types
✅ Conditional Rules - Set forwarding based on sender, message content, or SIM card
✅ Dual SIM Support - Different forwarding rules for work and personal numbers
✅ Schedule Control - Set forwarding for specific times or days
✅ Priority Handling - Mark important senders for instant forwarding

🔐 PRIVACY & SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST

Unlike sketchy forwarding apps, Wize SMS prioritizes your privacy:
🔒 100% Open Source - Fully auditable code on GitHub
🔒 Community-Driven - Public development, transparent updates
🔒 On-Device Processing - Nothing uploaded to external servers
🔒 No Cloud Storage - Your messages stay on YOUR device
🔒 Transparent Permissions - Only requests necessary SMS & email access
🔒 Data Deletion - Everything deleted when you uninstall
🔒 No Tracking - We don't monitor, analyze, or sell your data
🔒 You Control Setup - You manually connect YOUR Gmail and Telegram

🌐 FULLY OPEN SOURCE

• View source code: github.com/fulldiveVR/DiveSMS
• Report issues & suggest features on GitHub
• Community-reviewed for security & privacy
• No hidden code or backdoors - everything is public
• Trusted by developers and privacy advocates worldwide

💼 REAL-WORLD USE CASES

📊 Business Users
• Forward client SMS to work email for documentation
• Never miss important messages during meetings
• Keep all communications in one email inbox
• Share message access with team members via email

✈️ Travelers & Expats
• Access home country SMS while abroad
• Get messages on Telegram when roaming is expensive
• Forward verification codes to accessible devices
• Stay connected without international phone plans

Comparing to popular forwarding-only apps:
✓ 100% OPEN SOURCE - Fully transparent code on GitHub
✓ HIGHER RATED - 3.9★ vs competitors' 3.4★
✓ BETTER VALUE - Full messenger + forwarding, not just forwarding
✓ NO AGGRESSIVE PAYWALLS - Free features stay free
✓ NO EXCESSIVE ADS - Reasonable monetization
✓ MORE FEATURES - 2 apps in 1 (messenger + forwarder)
✓ PRIVACY-FOCUSED - Everything processed locally
✓ COMMUNITY-DRIVEN - Report issues, contribute features
✓ ESTABLISHED & TRUSTED - 100,000+ downloads, 5,000+ reviews
✓ ACTIVELY MAINTAINED - Regular updates and improvements

💡 PERFECT FOR ANYONE WHO NEEDS:

• SMS backup to email automatically
• Text message forwarding to multiple devices
• Telegram SMS integration
• Gmail SMS notifications
• Dual SIM message management
• Remote SMS access
• OTP and verification code forwarding
• Professional SMS documentation
• Travel-friendly message access
• Beautiful SMS app with forwarding

📲 EASY SETUP IN 3 STEPS:

Install Wize SMS and set as default messaging app
Connect Gmail account or set up Telegram bot
Done! Messages forward automatically
short_description: Forward text messages to email & Telegram automatically. Powerful SMS messenger.

title: Party in my Dorm: Campus Life
description:
Hang with your crew in the best college game ever. Tear up a house party, collect swag, chat with cute girls, flirt with your favorite eboy, or just chill with your best friends. You can roleplay, send gifts, adopt a pet, decorate your room, or find new besties who are real people!

Enjoy college chat games with avatars? We have tons of avatars! You can be a Kpop star, a muscle bound gym daddy, a playful brat kitten, an Emo DJ or just a house party hero and many more!

✓ DECORATE your college dorm room like your inner designer desires. Whether your style is Skate Park, Japanese Anime, VIP Lounge, or the Dark Arts - you can have it all and take part in dorm design contests!
✓ RENT out dorm rooms and hire a squad, then UPGRADE their skills and challenge other squads to a dance fight.
✓ 1000+ AVATARS to choose from - like Sorority Girl, Frat Bro, Vogue Fashion Fanatic, or the girl who loves Pumpkin Spice a little TOO much.
✓ What’s your sign, baby? Aries? Gemini? Up your zodiac game with #aesthetic items in theme of your ZODIAC SIGN!
✓ GROUP CHAT is more fun with college chat games! You can roleplay, send stickers, ask the magic 8 ball, spin the bottle, and more!
✓ ADOPT a pet like a pug, a goose, or a rabbit. Dress them up in cute outfits. Sorry, Joseph Gordon Rabbit, do it for the gram!

School is in session... Now let’s ditch class and have a house PARTY!

PLEASE NOTE:
This is an ONLINE casual MMO game! Tablet users must be connected to the internet or WiFi in order to play this game.

title: UK Dating Meet British Singles
description:
Looking to meet British singles in a fun and simple way? With the UK Dating app, you can connect with people across England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Whether you’re living in the UK or just want to chat with British singles, this app makes it easy to discover new connections, start conversations, and see where things go.

The UK Dating app is built for everyone who wants a friendly place to meet, chat, and connect. We combine useful features with a community-driven approach so you can spend less time swiping and more time getting to know real people.

💬 Free Features Everyone Can Enjoy

 ➢ Unlimited chat after a match
 ➢ Profile actions: like, say hi, and rewind
 ➢ Basic filters to browse local singles
 ➢ Secret Chat based on Zodiac or personality
 ➢ AI help for icebreakers and your “About Me”
 ➢ 24/7 admin photo checks to block fraudulent or offensive uploads
 ➢ Anti-scam system that scans for suspicious activity

(Ads are included to support these free features)

💎 Power Account (Premium Upgrade)

✧ Take your experience further with extra benefits:
✧ Chat without matching first
✧ Boost your profile up to 300%
✧ Unlock advanced filters
✧ See if your messages were read
✧ Unlimited rewind
✧ Instantly know who liked you

title: Baccarat Card Counting
description:
The principle of card counting in Baccarat is based on calculating the impact of the remaining cards in each shoe on the chances of the Banker or Player. By doing so, it determines the probability of the Banker or Player winning the next round and increases the chances of placing successful bets.

You can view the changes in probabilities and Expectation Value for each card drawn during the calculation process on the “Statistical” page of the software.
The goal of card counting is to calculate these probabilities and expectation values.

AI Mode:
Using artificial intelligence calculations, it provides an indicator of the advantage for “Banker” or “Player” displayed on a scale of 0 to 10, where 0 indicates the weakest advantage and 10 indicates the strongest advantage. Based on your cashback ratio in the Baccarat game, you can refer to the strength indicator and choose when to place bets.

Advanced Mode:
Since card counting in Baccarat is less efficient compared to Blackjack, with fewer opportunities for betting, this software incorporates six additional calculation formulas to increase betting opportunities. Each formula is divided into three levels of strength indicator. You can use the formula results as a reference for your bets.

This software is for learning only, We are not responsible for your personal choices or actions before, during or after use of our software.
short_description: Use AI to calculate the probability of the next round being a Banker or Player.

title: Ant Farm Simulator
description:
Ants have artificial intelligence that mimics the full life cycle, behavior, nature and physics of real insects.

You need to take care of your ant colony, feed it, keep it hydrated, and clean up the trash.

The colony continues to develop even when the game is not running.

The game-simulator is constantly updated, adding different types of ants, new ant care modes, other types of food, new forms of formicaria and much more.

Buying a VIP status disables advertising in the game, gives you endless energy points and the ability to develop all available farms at once.

Thank you for the financial support of the game developers!
