title: Resume Builder - CV Engineer
description:
Looking for a free resume builder app?
CV Engineer is a simple way to build a PDF resume for your job applications.

Featuring helpful examples, advice, and resume templates. All written by a professional recruiter. We ensure you have the perfect CV to impress employers.

- Featured on the Play Store in 21 countries
- 6,100,000 people have used CV Engineer to help build their resume and find work

HOW DOES IT WORKS?
Getting started is easy. Choose a professional CV template and then fill it with your information. That's it! We provide examples to help you along the way.

FEATURES:

Professional CV templates
Choose from a selection of resume templates designed by a recruiter. They’re formatted to make your CV easy for hiring managers to read.

AI Assistant
Use our AI Assistant to help rewrite your CV sections according to best practices. Spelling and grammar correction included.

Easy resume editing options and CV writing tools
Quickly write and edit your CV. Our resume builder handles the formatting. Use bullet points to present your experience in an easy-to-read format.

Create your own custom CV sections
Quickly add sections to your resume with custom titles. Perfect if you have experience that doesn’t fit into traditional CV sections.

Step-by-step advice on how to write each resume section
Advice from a professional recruiter on how to write each section of your CV. Make your resume easy to read for hiring managers and avoid common mistakes.

Example CV sections to give you ideas
Looking for inspiration? We have examples for each CV section to give you intelligent ideas on what to include.

Example resume sections for healthcare, nursing, construction, data science, programming, students, graduates, executives, and sales managers. Our intelligent resume creator can help regardless of your profession!

Resume formatting options - font size, margins
Format your CV by changing font sizes and margins. This helps to fit your experience onto 1 or 2 pages (the recommended length for a curriculum vitae).

Download and share your new PDF resume
Easily download and share your CV in PDF format. Save to your device or Google Drive. Share as an attachment via email. Send your curriculum vitae to your contacts for

title: AI Benchmark
description:
Neural Image Generation, Face Recognition, Image Classification, Question Answering...

Is your smartphone capable of running the latest Deep Neural Networks to perform these and many other AI-based tasks? Does it have a dedicated AI Chip? Is it fast enough? Run AI Benchmark to professionally evaluate its AI Performance!

Current phone ranking: 

AI Benchmark measures the speed, accuracy, power consumption and memory requirements for several key AI, Computer Vision and NLP models. Among the tested solutions are Image Classification and Face Recognition methods, AI models performing neural image and text generation, neural networks used for Image / Video Super-Resolution and Photo Enhancement, as well as AI solutions used in autonomous driving systems and smartphones for real-time Depth Estimation and Semantic Image Segmentation. The visualization of the algorithms’ outputs allows to assess their results graphically and to get to know the current state-of-the-art in various AI fields.

In total, AI Benchmark consists of 83 tests and 30 sections listed below:

Section 1. Classification, MobileNet-V3
Section 2. Classification, Inception-V3
Section 3. Face Recognition, Swin Transformer
Section 4. Classification, EfficientNet-B4
Section 5. Classification, MobileViT-V2
Sections 6/7. Parallel Model Execution, 8 x Inception-V3
Section 8. Object Tracking, YOLO-V8
Section 9. Optical Character Recognition, ViT Transformer
Section 10. Semantic Segmentation, DeepLabV3+
Section 11. Parallel Segmentation, 2 x DeepLabV3+
Section 12. Semantic Segmentation, Segment Anything
Section 13. Photo Deblurring, IMDN
Section 14. Image Super-Resolution, ESRGAN
Section 15. Image Super-Resolution, SRGAN
Section 16. Image Denoising, U-Net
Section 17. Depth Estimation, MV3-Depth
Section 18. Depth Estimation, MiDaS 3.1
Section 19/20. Image Enhancement, DPED
Section 21. Learned Camera ISP, MicroISP
Section 22. Bokeh Effect Rendering, PyNET-V2 Mobile
Section 23. FullHD Video Super-Resolution, XLSR
Section 24/25. 4K Video Super-Resolution, VideoSR
Section 26. Question Answering, MobileBERT
Section 27. Neural Text Generation, Llama2
Section 28. Neural Text Generation, GPT2
Section 29. Neural Image Generation, Stable Diffusion V1.5
Section 30. Memory Limits, ResNet

Besides that, one can load and test their own TensorFlow Lite deep learning models in the PRO Mode.

A detailed description of the tests can be found here: 

Note: Hardware acceleration is supported on all mobile SoCs with dedicated NPUs and AI accelerators, including Qualcomm Snapdragon, MediaTek Dimensity / Helio, Google Tensor, HiSilicon Kirin, Samsung Exynos, and UNISOC Tiger chipsets. Starting from AI Benchmark v4, one can also enable GPU-based AI acceleration on older devices in the settings ("Accelerate" -> "Enable GPU Acceleration" / "Arm NN", OpenGL ES-3.0+ is required).
short_description: Is your phone ready for AI? Run AI Benchmark to check its performance!
recent_changes_text: 1. New Tasks: OCR, Text Completion and Parallel Model Execution. 2. NNAPI-1.2 compatible Neural Networks added.3. The total number of tests increased to 46.4. Native hardware acceleration on Snapdragon and Exynos SoCs using the Hexagon NN / Eden delegates.5. Extended accuracy measurements.6. DSP / NPU throttling tests (PRO mode).7. Running custom TFLite models (PRO mode).8. Optimizations for low-RAM devices.9. GPU-based AI acceleration is available on devices with OpenGL ES 3.0+ support.

title: RTA Dubai
description:
Introducing “RTA Dubai:” Your One-Stop Shop for All Roads, Traffic and Transportation Services.
“RTA Dubai” is the new digital platform from the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) that brings together all your traffic and transportation services in one place. With “RTA Dubai,” you can do everything you need to do, all in one app.
Here are some of the exciting things you can do with “RTA Dubai:”
•	Securely sign up to “RTA Dubai” app with UAE Pass in seconds. 
•	All on street / off street parking services and parking permits in one place, making it more convenient to park your car in Dubai.
•	Renew your driving license or book a vehicle test appointment with just a few taps. No more visits to RTA’s customer happiness centres.
•	Get help from Mahboub, RTA's chatbot, anytime you need it. Mahboub is always available to answer your questions and help you with your RTA transactions.
•	Link your nol plus account to “RTA Dubai” and earn rewards for parking your vehicle. Park smarter and save money.
•	View all of your driving-related documents in one place. No more searching for your documents.
•	Find all the RTA's locations such as happiness centres, Salik toll gates, RTA smart kiosks, eye test centres and driving schools. Easily find an RTA’s location nearest you.
•	View your services transaction history all at one place. Keep track of all of your RTA transactions.
•	Use Al Harees and Madinati services to report any violations & issues and stay safe. Stay safe on the road and report any violations or issues.
•	Link your Salik account to RTA Dubai and recharge your account with just a few taps. Recharge your Salik account quickly and easily.
“RTA Dubai” is the easy, convenient, and secure way to access all your traffic and transportation services. Sign up today and experience the difference!
short_description: RTA Dubai is the RTA’s mobile interactive based application for Dubai.
recent_changes_text: We update the RTA Dubai app as often as possible to enrich your experience and make it faster and more reliable for you. Here are the enhancements you'll find in the latest update:- new tariff for parking zone area 365L and enhancementsLove the app? Rate us! Your feedback keeps the RTA Dubai engine running.Have a question? Tap Help Centre in the RTA Dubai app, we are happy to assist.

•	All on street / off street parking services and parking permits in one place, making it more convenient to park your car in Dubai.
•	Renew your driving license or book a vehicle test appointment with just a few taps. No more visits to RTA’s customer happiness centres.
•	Get help from Mahboub, RTA's chatbot, anytime you need it. Mahboub is always available to answer your questions and help you with your RTA transactions.
•	Link your nol plus account to “RTA Dubai” and earn rewards for parking your vehicle. Park smarter and save money.
•	View all of your driving-related documents in one place. No more searching for your documents.
•	Find all the RTA's locations such as happiness centres, Salik toll gates, RTA smart kiosks, eye test centres and driving schools. Easily find an RTA’s location nearest you.
•	View your services transaction history all at one place. Keep track of all of your RTA transactions.
•	Use Al Harees and Madinati services to report any violations & issues and stay safe. Stay safe on the road and report any violations or issues.
•	Link your Salik account to RTA Dubai and recharge your account with just a few taps. Recharge your Salik account quickly and easily.
“RTA Dubai” is the easy, convenient, and secure way to access all your traffic and transportation services. Sign up today and experience the difference!

We update the RTA Dubai app as often as possible to enrich your experience and make it faster and more reliable for you. Here are the enhancements you'll find in the latest update:- new tariff for parking zone area 365L and enhancementsLove the app? Rate us! Your feedback keeps the RTA Dubai engine running.Have a question? Tap Help Centre in the RTA Dubai app, we are happy to assist.

title: Primo Nautic - Vessel Finder
description:
Primo Nautic is a vessel finder and ship tracker designed for people who care about ships and those aboard them. Track vessels worldwide with live marine traffic data and real-time AIS positioning.

WHO IS IT FOR
Families tracking loved ones on cruise ships. Business professionals monitor cargo and fleet movements. Maritime enthusiasts and ship spotters exploring vessels around the globe. Crew families stay connected with their shipmates while seafarers are at sea.

LIVE SHIP TRACKING
Find any vessel on the interactive map with AIS data. Get accurate ship positions, speeds in knots, courses, and destination information. Track cruise ships, cargo vessels, tankers, yachts, and boats of all types.

CRUISE TRACKER
Follow cruise ships in real-time. Know exactly where your family is sailing, check voyage progress, and see estimated arrival times. Perfect for parents tracking kids on cruise vacations or anyone wanting to know what's happening onboard.

VESSEL INFORMATION
Access detailed ship data, including vessel name, flag, type, size, and current voyage details. View port calls, departure and arrival info, and live location on the map.

SMART FEATURES
- Real-time marine traffic overview
- Search by ship name, MMSI, or IMO number
- Track multiple vessels simultaneously
- ETA predictions and voyage progress
- Port information and ship movements
- Live map with vessel positions worldwide

Whether you need a boat tracker for personal use, a fleet monitor for business, or simply want to explore maritime traffic, Primo Nautic puts the world's ships at your fingertips. Download now and start tracking vessels today.
short_description: Ship tracker & vessel finder. Live marine traffic, cruise ships & boat tracking

title: Gaminik: Auto Screen Translate
description:
Ad-Free Forever! Get Free Unlimited Translation Points Upon Login!
Has supported DeepL, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and other advanced translation engines

Gaminik provides the most realistic real-time translation of screen. Support translation of content such as Game, Chat, Comics, News, APP interface, Photo, etc. Support translation from 76 languages (including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, etc.) to 105 languages.

********
Advantage:
👍 Ad-Free experience, uninterrupted gameplay.
👍 Better yet, it's smarter and supports Automatic translation.
👍 More natural, the translation is integrated into the game screen, as if the game is natively supported.
👍 Faster, the translation displayed as fast as 1 second.
👍 More accurate, with the most advanced technology used for text in screen recognition and translation.
👍 Easier to use, double-tap the floating window to translate the entire screen. Translate text in input box with one tap.
👍 More versatile, supports automatic translation, partial screen translation, chat translation, photo translation, translation history, text copy, screenshot, etc.
👍 More flexible, supports adding private translation engines, cloud-based text recognition (OCR), and connection to Windows OCR.
 
********
More Features:
✔️ Floating Window: Double-tap for instant full-screen translation; 
✔️ Area Selection: Translate selected screen areas for faster and more precise results; 
✔️ Drag-to-Translate Icon: Supports dragging the icon onto text for quick translation;
✔️ Chat Translation: Real-time messaging translation + input box quick-translate; 
✔️ Photo/Camera Translation: Scan physical text via camera or gallery images; 
✔️ Offline Mode: Translation without internet connection; 
✔️ 76 Language Support: Game text recognition (including Chinese, Japanese, Korean and other East Asian languages) → 105 Output Languages; 
✔️ Default Local OCR: Screenshot text recognition without uploading to the internet, consumes minimal data traffic;; 
✔️ Cloud & Windows OCR: Cloud-based + Windows-connected OCR for superior manga/comic text accuracy; 
✔️ Private AI Translation Engines: Custom translators + private LLMs (Qwen-Turbo, Gemma 3, etc.)

********
This app uses AccessibilityService API: (android.permission.BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE to access the text displayed on your screen to be able to translate it)
When you select "Chat Translation Mode" the app uses the AccessibilityService: (android.permission.BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE is required to access text on the screen for translation). By default, it runs in "Universal Translation Mode" which does not use the AccessibilityService.

********
Translation support for the source languages:
English(English)
Spanish(español)
Portuguese(Português) 
Chinese(中文)
French(français)
German(Deutsch) 
Italian(italiano) 
Russian(русский)
Japanese(日本語) 
Korean(한국어) 
Turkish(Türkçe) 
Dutch(Nederlands) 
Polish(polski) 
Indonesian(Bahasa Indonesia)
Vietnamese(Tiếng Việt)
Hindi(हिंदी) 
Swedish(svenska)
Czech(čeština) 
Danish(dansk) 
Romanian(română)
Hungarian(magyar) 
Finnish(suomi) 
Malay(Bahasa Malaysia) 
Slovak(slovenčina) 
Croatian(hrvatski) 
Catalan(català) 
Lithuanian(lietuvių) 
Slovenian(slovenski) 
Marathi(मराठी) 
Latvian(latviešu)
...
and more 40+ languages

title: Wiki Pal™ (voice web browser)
description:
Turn downtime to fun time by listening to VoiceSee™ Wiki Pal in your walk, exercise, commute, or any other activity that requires your visual attention.

Stuck in traffic and you still need to check a piece of information before that meeting in the big city?

Or... trying to read in the outdoors on a beautiful sunny day?

Use your voice to tell Wikipedia which Wikipedia entry to search for. Speak to navigate through the overview, key highlights and entry section via voice only – no need to use your eyes (!) because Sadie (the voice of VoiceSee) will be reading you, the entry's content. All you have to do is listen.

Enjoy access to Wikipedia - ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. This is unlike anything you have seen before: No assistant app reads you websites. VoiceSee does! Screen readers don't listen. VoiceSee does!

As an added bonus, you can say: “Search via Google” and you will hear Wiki Pal prompting you for the search term. You can visit any website using Wiki Pal.

Tips:

There are also usage FAQs at:
 + 
 + 

1. When prompted to speak, always wait one or two seconds after the low tone double-beep.
2. Sometimes, you may need to repeat the answer in order to be heard. 
3. To interrupt Sadie in the middle of a paragraph, touch the Search button.
4. To interrupt Sadie at the end of paragraphs, talk as soon as you hear the double-beep: "stop!" or "pause!"
5. To continue from the next paragraph, say: "continue!".
6. To disable scrolling & link opening via touch, say: "Disable Touch!". To re-enable, say: "Enable Touch!"
7. To make Sadie speak faster (or slower) say: "Speak faster!" (or "Speak more slowly!").
8. To reset to default speech rate say: "Speak normal!"
9. To accurately spell a search term or phrase, enter SPELL mode by saying: "Let me spell it for you!" (or just "Let me spell!"). Then, spell each letter only after Sadie has acknowledged the recognition of the previous letter.
10. To exit SPELL mode, say: "finish spelling", "end spelling" or "spelling complete".
11. To skip 1-9 paragraphs when reading the overview or a section, just say the number (e.g. "one!", "three!", etc.)
12. Shake your phone to wake up listening if stuck (acknowledged by Sadie saying "Ouch!"13. If you're unsure what to say, just say: “Help!” 

To use a headset with PAUSE/PLAY, NEXT & PREV buttons, press:
1. PAUSE/PLAY (middle) to pause. Press it again to continue.
2. NEXT (bottom) to immediately skip to the next item in the list.
3. PREV (top) to immediately go back to the previous item in the list.
*Pressing headset buttons while NOT reading an item or an article may produce erratic results. Use this feature only when Sadie reads an item from a list.

Currently only Wikipedia is supported, but in the future, it will support other Wikis, be it LostPedia, Urban Dictionary or others -- Please tell us which ones you want to access via Wiki Pal.

.
Utilizing the latest state of the art text-to-speech and speech recognition technologies (backed by 3 patents (USPTO 8423365, 8918323, 9196251)), VoiceSee™ Wiki Pal is the world's first hands-free *and* eyes-free voice web browser for your Android mobile phone or tablet.

Language: English
Devices: Android (version 8.0 and higher)

Software Requirements:
Google Voice Search must be installed on the Android phone. Note: most devices are already equipped with Google Voice Search. Otherwise, it can be freely downloaded from Google Play.

VoiceSee™ Wiki Pal is FREE as long as it's in beta.

2. Sometimes, you may need to repeat the answer in order to be heard. 
3. To interrupt Sadie in the middle of a paragraph, touch the Search button.
4. To interrupt Sadie at the end of paragraphs, talk as soon as you hear the double-beep: "stop!" or "pause!"
5. To continue from the next paragraph, say: "continue!".
6. To disable scrolling & link opening via touch, say: "Disable Touch!". To re-enable, say: "Enable Touch!"
7. To make Sadie speak faster (or slower) say: "Speak faster!" (or "Speak more slowly!").
8. To reset to default speech rate say: "Speak normal!"
9. To accurately spell a search term or phrase, enter SPELL mode by saying: "Let me spell it for you!" (or just "Let me spell!"). Then, spell each letter only after Sadie has acknowledged the recognition of the previous letter.
10. To exit SPELL mode, say: "finish spelling", "end spelling" or "spelling complete".
11. To skip 1-9 paragraphs when reading the overview or a section, just say the number (e.g. "one!", "three!", etc.)
12. Shake your phone to wake up listening if stuck (acknowledged by Sadie saying "Ouch!"13. If you're unsure what to say, just say: “Help!” 

To use a headset with PAUSE/PLAY, NEXT & PREV buttons, press:
1. PAUSE/PLAY (middle) to pause. Press it again to continue.
2. NEXT (bottom) to immediately skip to the next item in the list.
3. PREV (top) to immediately go back to the previous item in the list.
*Pressing headset buttons while NOT reading an item or an article may produce erratic results. Use this feature only when Sadie reads an item from a list.

Currently only Wikipedia is supported, but in the future, it will support other Wikis, be it LostPedia, Urban Dictionary or others -- Please tell us which ones you want to access via Wiki Pal.

.
Utilizing the latest state of the art text-to-speech and speech recognition technologies (backed by 3 patents (USPTO 8423365, 8918323, 9196251)), VoiceSee™ Wiki Pal is the world's first hands-free *and* eyes-free voice web browser for your Android mobile phone or tablet.

Language: English
Devices: Android (version 8.0 and higher)

Software Requirements:
Google Voice Search must be installed on the Android phone. Note: most devices are already equipped with Google Voice Search. Otherwise, it can be freely downloaded from Google Play.

VoiceSee™ Wiki Pal is FREE as long as it's in beta.

title: Create My Notes - Notes, Diary
description:
Create My Notes is the all-in-one note taking app designed to help you capture, organize, and secure your thoughts, ideas, and important information effortlessly. Create My Notes offers an intuitive, feature-packed experience to create notes and reminders that works seamlessly across devices.

You can even use AI assistant to create the notes and make the note taking easier.

Key Features:

► Rich Text Editor: Create notes and format with ease using a powerful rich text editor. Bold, italicize, insert images, media, underline, or bullet-point your thoughts. Add links, headings, and tables to keep your notes organized and visually appealing.

► Attach Any File Type: Create notes and easily attach images, PDFs, documents, audio, and other file types to your notes. With Create My Notes, you can store everything in one place, making it the ideal tool for organizing both text and multimedia content.

► Sync Across Devices: Never worry about losing your notes. Create Notes and sync across all your devices in real-time. Whether you're on your phone, tablet, or desktop, your notes are always updated and accessible wherever you go.

► Calendar Integration: Stay organized and plan ahead by attaching dates and deadlines to your notes with the integrated calendar feature. Sync it with your daily schedule and never miss an important reminder.

► Handwritten Notes: Prefer to jot things down with your own hand? Create My Notes lets you create notes with handwriting directly on your device with a smooth, natural writing experience. Ideal for brainstorming, sketching, or quick doodles.

► Password Protection & Security: Your notes are private, and we take your security seriously. Protect sensitive information with robust password protection, PIN, or biometric login (Fingerprint/Face ID). You can even lock individual notes for added security.

► Powerful Search: Finding the note you need is fast and easy. Use our powerful search feature to quickly locate any note, file, or attachment, saving you time and effort.

► Customizable Themes & Fonts: Personalize your note-taking experience by choosing from a variety of themes and fonts. Whether you prefer a minimalist look or something vibrant, Create My Notes adapts to your personal style.

► Offline Only Mode: Stay productive even without an internet connection. Create and edit notes offline, no need to create account, if you want to sync to your notes you just have to create any account and login across devices.

► Widgets for Quick Access: With Create My Notes, you can add convenient widgets to your home screen for easy access to your most important notes or reminders.

► Export Notes and Group Notes: Share notes with colleagues, friends, or family in just a few taps. Create group notes for collaborative projects, meetings, or brainstorming sessions. Everyone can contribute, and changes sync in real time.

► Recurring Reminders: Never forget a task with recurring reminders! Set daily, weekly, or monthly alerts for important notes, deadlines, or tasks, so you're always on top of things.

► Location-Based Reminders: Set reminders that activate when you arrive at or leave a specific location. Perfect for picking up groceries, remembering meetings, or completing tasks when you're in the right place.

► Tag Notes: Organize and categorize your notes using tags for easy access and filtering. Tagging makes it simple to find related notes, whether you're looking for all your to-do lists or specific project information.
 
► Voice Search: Quickly find the note you're looking for with voice search. Simply speak the name or keywords of the note, and Create My Notes will locate it instantly.

And many more note taking features...

Create My Notes is more than just a note-taking app—it's a complete tool for managing all aspects of your personal and professional life. Whether you're keeping track of your daily tasks, storing important documents, or planning your next big project, our app helps you stay organized.

title: Photo To AI Silhouette Maker
description:
Photo to Silhouette Maker – AI Silhouette Creator
Turn your photos into clean, professional silhouette art in seconds.
Photo to Silhouette Maker is an AI-powered silhouette app that helps you create sharp, artistic silhouettes without manual editing. Just choose a photo and the app intellige ntly detects the subject, processes the background, and transforms your image into a beautiful silhouette—ideal for posters, profile pictures, minimalist art, and social media.
 
Why Choose Photo to Silhouette Maker?
✔ AI Silhouette Creation
Advanced AI accurately detects people, animals, and objects to generate smooth, well-defined silhouettes.
✔ Smart Background Processing
Unwanted background elements are automatically handled to produce clean silhouette shapes with clear edges.
✔ Multiple Silhouette Styles
Create classic black silhouettes, neon silhouettes, and artistic variations using effects and filters, including double exposure style effects.
✔ Creative Background Collections
Choose from nature, gradient, color, and artistic backgrounds to enhance your silhouette designs.
✔ Text & Typography Tools
Add names, quotes, or captions to design posters and share-ready artwork.
✔ Fast, Simple & Beginner-Friendly
No design skills required. Create high-quality silhouettes in just a few taps.
 
Key Features
• Photo to silhouette converter app
• AI-powered silhouette maker
• Clean-edge silhouette generation
• Neon silhouette effects
• Double exposure style effects
• Artistic filters & effects
• Text editor for images
• High-resolution save & export
• One-tap social sharing
 
Perfect For
• Profile pictures & display photos
• Human, animal & object silhouettes
• Posters, banners & creative designs
• Minimalist art & wallpapers
• Social media posts & stories
Create girl silhouette, man silhouette, dog silhouette, wolf silhouette, tree silhouette, palm silhouette, and more effortlessly.
 
Save & Share Instantly
Export your silhouette artwork in high quality and share it directly on Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, and other platforms.
 
Download Photo to Silhouette Maker today
Create stunning silhouette art with AI—simple, fast, and beautifully clean.

title: Leadflow
description:
Find and analyze real estate deals using the Leadflow Mobile App. Search by property address or by surrounding properties in real-time.

Use the “Sellability Score,” which uses Artificial Intelligence and thousands of data points to find the properties with the highest propensity to sell in the next 90 days. Leadflow Mobile assigns 3 scores from 0 - 1,000 based on how likely each property is to sell via a “Retail” (real estate agent), “Rental” (landlord purchase), or “Wholesale” (discounted sale) transaction.

Analyze properties quickly and easily with the “Leadflow Value,” an industry-leading property valuation model. “Leadflow Types” give you instant insight into the real story of each property, including whether the property is in a financially distressed situation, has high or low equity, is owner or non-owner occupied, and over 15 more key property flags that help you make quick decisions. You also get instant “Comps,” which are comparable recently sold properties, including all cash sales.

“Leadflow Insights” gives you an abundance of property information including square feet, beds/baths, house type, estimated mortgage amounts, loan to value, owner type, length of ownership, last sale information, and more critical information about each potential opportunity.

Found a property you're interested in? Simply open the app and use the seamless direct mail engine or direct-from-app calling to instantly connect with sellers. 

Built by real estate professionals for investors, agents, and brokers.

Features Include:

- Industry-leading Ai-driven Sellability Scores that help you analyze the potential for a deal and find motivated sellers every time.
- Detailed property information on over 150 million properties nationwide provides everything you need to know about each property at a glance. 
- Industry-leading Skip Tracing technology uncovers owner information with a single click.
- In-app Direct Mail Engine allows for on-the-spot direct mail marketing. 
- “Leadflow Insights” provides effortless access to information never before released in a free mobile app.
- “Leadflow Types” give you an insider’s understanding of the property’s current situation. 
- Geolocation technology lets you explore an area faster than ever before and knows where you are, pinpointing both your property of interest and related comparables. 
- All of this is conveniently located in the palm of your hand, 24/7.

title: Zoho People - HR Management
description:
Welcome to Zoho People, the ultimate cloud-based HR management app that simplifies and streamlines your HR processes. Whether you're an HR professional, a manager, or an employee, Zoho People has everything you need to make HR tasks a breeze.

Key features

Employee self-service: Empower your employees to manage their own HR tasks, from requesting time off to viewing payslips and updating personal information.

Attendance tracking: Enable employees to check in and out from their mobile devices through facial recognition, or native home screen widgets. If you have a field or remote workforce, Zoho People enables location tracking with spoof detection, along with geo and IP restrictions. Even if employees forget to clock time, they can always regularize attendance in a click of a button with appropriate approvals. 

Leave management: Efficiently manage leave requests, approvals, and accruals. Customize leave policies like on-duty, casual leave, sick leave, leave grant and more to fit your organization's needs. 

Performance management: Set and track performance goals, conduct appraisals, and provide continuous

title: Reverso Translate and Learn
description:
Reverso is the all-in-one tool that provides you high-quality translations and helps you improve your language skills seamlessly. It's magic, and it's free.

Teachers or translators, students or business professionals, beginners or advanced learners use Reverso to enrich their vocabulary and read, write, and speak with more accuracy and confidence.

Reverso Context relies on data collected from millions of real-life multilingual texts computed with powerful "big data" algorithms and machine learning techniques. This way, we make sure you enjoy the most accurate and relevant results as well as a learning experience customized to your needs. 

Download the Reverso app, and you'll have millions of words and expressions at your fingertips, with their translations in multiple languages. Just type or speak a word or an expression and find accurate translations, illustrated by examples of real usage. Then, you can easily memorize the ones that are relevant to you with our learning activities. 

How context helps you better translate? 

The search results (translations) for a specific word or expression are weaved within real-life sentences extracted from official documents, movie subtitles, product descriptions. The examples help you understand how translations can vary upon context and select the most suitable one to avoid embarrassing mistakes. 

Learn from your translations with fun activities 

Reverso goes far beyond a simple translation app, breaking new ground also in the language learning field. 

Our app includes flashcards, quizzes, and games generated based on your searches to help you focus on the words and expressions that matter to you. They use SRS (Spaced Repetition System) learning, enabling you to memorize new
short_description: Translation and dictionary app: Spanish, French, German, Italian, Arabic

[TITLE] Reverso Translate and Learn

[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Translation and dictionary app: Spanish, French, German, Italian, Arabic
[DESCRIPTION]
Reverso is the all-in-one tool that provides you high-quality translations and helps you improve your language skills seamlessly. It's magic, and it's free.

Teachers or translators, students or business professionals, beginners or advanced learners use Reverso to enrich their vocabulary and read, write, and speak with more accuracy and confidence.

Reverso Context relies on data collected from millions of real-life multilingual texts computed with powerful "big data" algorithms and machine learning techniques. This way, we make sure you enjoy the most accurate and relevant results as well as a learning experience customized to your needs. 

Download the Reverso app, and you'll have millions of words and expressions at your fingertips, with their translations in multiple languages. Just type or speak a word or an expression and find accurate translations, illustrated by examples of real usage. Then, you can easily memorize the ones that are relevant to you with our learning activities. 

How context helps you better translate? 

The search results (translations) for a specific word or expression are weaved within real-life sentences extracted from official documents, movie subtitles, product descriptions. The examples help you understand how translations can vary upon context and select the most suitable one to avoid embarrassing mistakes. 

Learn from your translations with fun activities 

Reverso goes far beyond a simple translation app, breaking new ground also in the language learning field. 

Our app includes flashcards, quizzes, and games generated based on your searches to help you focus on the words and expressions that matter to you. They use SRS (Spaced Repetition System) learning, enabling you to memorize new
[RECENT_CHANGES]
- Learn new words and expressions with various exercises and games, even when offline- Integrated conjugation module in 7 languages (and more to come) available for all forms of verbs in source and translation languages.- Improved performance and UX : faster responses, nicer graphics, and extended content.- Choose your learning strategy based on SRS (spaced repetition system), and tailored to your preferences.

title: ParagraphAI: GPT Writer & Chat
description:
This AI writer and keyboard helps you instantly write with fluent grammar and spelling in English, French, Spanish, Japanese and 30+ more languages.

"World's First AI Writing Assistant powered by GPT" - 

Improve your grammar, spelling, and writing skills using science-based writing strategies designed for effective communication. Quickly generate replies to any message, chat, or email using our AI keyboard. Effortlessly write and edit text directly in any app.

Introducing ParagraphAI, the AI writing assistant for students, professionals, and English learners ("ESL", "TEFL"). Our AI keyboard is powered by GPT and developed by engineers from Meta, MIT, and OpenAI. Stop worrying about which words go where and become a brilliant AI writer with our multilingual English writing assistant.

*Disclaimer* We are in no way associated with OpenAI, ChatGPT, GPT-3, GPT-4 or its affiliates.

Beyond basic ‘write for me’ capabilities, your AI writer and keyboard can:

*Fix grammar, correct spelling, and write in English and 30 plus languages flawlessly.
*Reply to emails in a tap with your one-click AI email writer.
*Edit text your way with personalized tones and a suite of GPT AI writing tools.
*Analyze tones and sentiment with summaries and a genius AI proofreader.
*Swipe or type like butter and autocorrect perfectly with enterprise-grade privacy and security.

If you are an AI writer, editor, or creator using Quillbot, Grammarly, Wordtune, Jasper AI, Copy AI, Rytr, Ginger, AI Writer, Writesonic, Anyword, or Hyperwrite, you must try ParagraphAI!

In-app features include:

*WRITE* articles, essays, emails, messages, reports, text, and outlines on any topic. Simply describe what you'd like the AI writer to create -- "an essay outline on Macbeth", "a sales email outreach" -- and ParagraphAI will generate text in the format of your choice from a short paragraph to a detailed essay.

*REPLY* to emails, messages & chat instantly. Even get rizz from your creative and personalized GPT AI chatbot. ParagraphAI instantly generates replies to a message or email, leaving it up to you to edit and press send.

*IMPROVE* the grammar, spelling, and tone of any text. Far more than a paragraph generator - edit, correct, rewrite, and proofread rough drafts and outlines with professional grammar and vocabulary. ESL writers can instantly communicate with English grammar effortlessly and learn English along the way.

*TRANSLATE* over 30+ languages with our multilingual AI keyboard to generate GPT content for complex translations, including multilingual live chat, website translations, ESL emails & more. A must-have for non-native English writers. Our GPT-powered Natural Language Processing ("NLP") can accurately translate nearly any language, including: Mandarin, English, Spanish, Arabic, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Urdu, Korean, Hindi, Japanese, Vietnamese & Tagalog. (use the prompt "output in *language*")

About Us:

ParagraphAI is a GPT Powered AI writer and keyboard. We embrace the potential of human-AI collaboration and power-up AI writing.

At ParagraphAI, your privacy and security are our first priority. We will never sell your personal information and we take extensive measures to ensure the security of your data.

Accessibility permission is used to enable ParagraphAI to provide writing assistance in all of your favorite apps. We only process the data that you choose to run writing assistance queries on.

Compare us to:

Quillbot, Grammarly, Wordtune, Jasper AI, Copy AI, Rytr, Ginger, AI Writer, Writesonic, Anyword, Hyperwrite, and others.

*Disclaimer* We are in no way associated with OpenAI, Quillbot, Grammarly, Wordtune, Jasper AI, Copy.AI, Rytr, Ginger, AI Writer, Writesonic, Anyword, Hyperwrite, ChatGPT, or their affiliates.

title: Belote-Rebelote
description:
A free, complete and realistic Belote and Coinche game!
An artificial intelligence that lives up to expectations!
The familiar cards of Belote and Coinche with detailed graphics!
Sound effects and voices to set the mood!
Multiplayer with friends or Belote and Coinche online!
Multiplatform: iOS, Android, Web!
Daily Belote and Coinche tournaments without tokens!

Fans of card games such as Tarot or Solitaire or even Poker, Belote-Rebelote will delight you!

Play:
- Classic Belote
- Coinchée Belote
- Contrée Belote
- Bridged Belote

Set your goal:
- game in 1 or 2 winning rounds (revenge and best)
- in number of points per round (1000 by default in classic)
- or in number of deals per round (12 by default)

Spice up the game with variations:
- Announcements (tierce, square...)
- No Trumps / All Trumps
- Forced Jack
- À la Stéphanoise
- À la vache

Many other game options and possible configurations.

Also available in Google Play, Tarot with Tarot-French and Whist 22.
short_description: Belote solo, with friends or online, without limits, just like at home!
recent_changes_text: Fixes blocking issues during Friends and Online gamesAdds a preference for Online games namely the minimum number of humans requiredAdds a new dialog to place Friends just before starting a new gameAdds a new menu "Avatars" to configure the robotsAdds an option to order the cards in ascending or descending order in HelpAdds the 5-by-5 ​​auctions to the Stéphanoise. Warning! the robots do not yet take this change into account!Changes the layout of the tokens when choosing colors and bidding

title: Miri - AI Assistant For Life
description:
Imagine having a personal assistant that can do almost anything for you with just a few words.
That's Miri, the app that uses AI to make your life easier and more fun. 

Miri is powered by ChatGPT API, a state-of-the-art natural language generation system that can create engaging and coherent texts on any topic. 

Here are some of the amazing features that Miri offers and how you can use them in your daily life:

🖼️ Image Generation: You can create beautiful images from text with Miri. Whether you want to see your dream vacation spot, your favorite celebrity, or a cute animal, just type what you want to see and Miri will generate it for you in seconds.

🔍 Get Info: You can get information with Miri. No need to search or browse the web. Just ask Miri any question and Miri will give you the answer or show you relevant results. You can use this feature when you want to learn something new, satisfy your curiosity, or settle a debate.

🎵 Music Time: Miri loves music and so do you. Forget about scrolling or typing to find songs. Just say what kind of music you feel like listening to and Miri will play it for you from your favorite music app. 

📞 Make a Call: You can call anyone in your contacts with Miri. No need to look for your phone or scroll through your contacts. Just say the name of the person and Miri will dial the number for you.

🚗 Navigation: You can get directions to any place with Miri. No need to type or search for the address. Just tell Miri where you want to go and Miri will open your preferred navigation app and guide you there.

📩 Send Text Message: You can send messages to your friends and family with Miri. No need to type or use your keyboard. Just choose the contact and type or say the message and Miri will send it via WhatsApp. 

📖 Read Messages: You can listen to your messages with Miri. No need to look at your screen or open your apps. Just ask Miri to read your messages and Miri will read them out loud for you. You can use this feature when you are busy, driving, or relaxing.

⏰ Set Reminder: You can set reminders with Miri. No need to write or set anything. Just tell Miri what you want to remember and when and Miri will remind you at the right time.

📱 Open App: You can open any app with Miri. No need to look for or tap on the app icon. Just say the name of the app and Miri will launch it for you.

🌦️ Get Weather: You can get weather updates with Miri. No need to check or open a weather app. Just ask Miri about the weather and Miri will tell you the current conditions and forecast.

The app uses the Accessibility Service API (accessibility permission) for the purpose of sending contactless text messages.
You can see a demo at the following link:

title: English-spanish dictionary
description:
Dictamp Spanish - English and English - Spanish (Diccionario Inglés Español) dictionary is a offline dictionary (vocabulary) with easy and functional user interface, covers over 110.000 words. 

★ Features:

• Favorite words
• Bookmark
 - Rename a bookmark
 - Sorting a bookmark
• Adding notes to word
• History( as day,month ...)
• Adding new words
• Editing words

• Random word button

• Search filters
 - suffix (starts with)
 - prefix (ends with)
• Text-to-speech (TTS) (word or selected text)
• Voice recognition 
• Night mode
• Backup/Restore (File & Dropbox )
• Tabs visibility - you can show or hide tabs (in settings).

✓ Supports Android N
✓ Tablet UI Support

• Changing text size on the description window
• Sharing in other apps
• The option of searching, sounding and sharing of marked word in the description window.

* Description window is opened as clicking on the word. You can minimize and maximize the description window with swipe function.

- Setting
• Changing option of text size
• Changing option of UI color
• Clearing option of Bookmark, Favorite, Note, History list

Dictamp is offline dictionary, offline dictionary needs memory.

You can give suggestions, comments and legal questions related to dictionary to this address.

title: World Map & Countries
description:
The best way to learn about countries! Explore the continents of Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, and Oceania, and discover information about the countries within them. This app allows you to quickly research countries.

By downloading the app:
- You can chat with AI about the country of your choice and do online research.
- You can better understand the world and the locations of countries with modern maps.
- You can take notes about countries—perfect for planning trips.
- You can mark the countries you’ve researched, want to visit, or have already visited.
- You can read articles about countries, history, economy, geography, culture, and art.

Ask the AI anything you’re curious about regarding world countries, cities, historical events, capitals, and tourist attractions, and get answers instantly. Improve your geography knowledge with AI-powered games: the Capital Game and the Country Guessing Game.

Perfect for travelers, students, geography enthusiasts, or anyone who wants to gain in-depth knowledge about countries. With a vast knowledge base, world map, and AI support, it’s a comprehensive information platform. Enhance your general knowledge with this app.

Start exploring the world right now by downloading the app! With just one tap, access in-depth information about countries and strengthen your knowledge with geography games. Broaden your horizons by discovering cultures, languages, flags, and geographical features from all around the world. Enjoy the pleasure of learning. This app will guide you in getting to know countries!
short_description: Explore the world with AI! Instantly learn what you wonder about countries.

title: FlashLearners: Study & CBT
description:
FlashLearners is an All-in-One Educational App for Toddlers, Primary School, Secondary School, Parents, Teachers and Candidates for Cambridge Checkpoint, JAMB, WAEC, ECZ, IGCSE, BECE, NCEE, Etc.

» KEY FEATURES

Learning Tools & Resources
1. AI Tutor
2. Offline Class Notes
3. Video Lessons
4. Solved Past Questions
5. Integrated Learning
6. Multi-Subject Practice
7. Bookmarks and Built-in Calculator
8. Study Guides And Hacks

Educational Content by Level
9. Resources for Toddlers
10. Resources for Nursery 1 & 2
11. Materials for Basic 1-12 Pupils
12. Secondary Education
13. The Lekki Headmaster Novel

Exam Preparation
14. NCEE And BECE Questions
15. WAEC And Post UTME Past Questions
16. 1978-Date JAMB Past Questions and Answers
17. Cambridge CheckPoint and IGCSE Questions

Curriculum & Skills Development
18. 90+ Scheme of Work
19. 20 Free Digital Skills Courses
20. Performance Analysis and Challenges
21. Educational Games and Puzzles

» WHO CAN BENEFIT?

1. Toddlers and Parents
2. Primary School Pupils
3. Secondary School Students
4. Exam Candidates
5. Teachers 
6. University Freshers
7. NYSC Members
8. Digital Skills Enthusiasts
9. Aptitude Test Candidates
10. Lifelong Learners

» SUBJECT COVERAGE (28+):

1. Mathematics
2. Chemistry
3. Physics
4. English
5. Biology
6. Economics
7. Digital Skills
8. Commerce
9. History
10. Marketing
...and many more!

» ALL-IN-ONE HIGHLIGHTS:

1. Access offline practice questions for WAEC, JAMB CBT, Post-UTME, and other major examinations with likely questions and complete answers.

2. Features the most effective elements from leading educational platforms including uLesson, Myschool, Testdriller, o3schools, Edurev, and Khan Academy.

3. Complete content for Mathematics, Sciences (Chemistry, Physics, Biology), Languages (English, Yoruba, Igbo, French), Humanities (Economics, History, Literature), and specialized subjects (Digital Skills, Commerce, Marketing, Agriculture, CRK, IRK, PHE).

4. Complete archive of JAMB questions (1978-Date) and course-specific Post-UTME materials for all disciplines—Engineering, Sciences, Medicine, Pharmacy, Law, Arts, Education, and more.

Contains Post UTME Past Questions for….

1. ABSU
2. UNIZIK
3. ABU Zaria
4. AAU
5. ANSU
6. Auchi Polytechnic
7. Babcock University
8. BUK
9. Bowen University
10. DELSU
11. ESUT
12. FUNAI
13. FUNAAB
14. FUTO
15. LASU
16. OAU
17. UNIBEN
18. UNICAL
19. UI
20. UNILORIN
21. UNIJOS
22. UNILAG
23. UNN
24. UNIPORT
25. UNIUYO

…. And other Federal, State and Private Universities, Polytechnics and colleges of Education in Nigeria.

Join millions of learners and prepare for your exams smarter and faster with FlashLearners.

title: Italian Spanish Dictionary
description:
Burn the words like a dragon with Dragoma!
 
The free disconnesso Spagnolo Italiano Dizionario & Traduttore application. Internet connection is not required! If you want to learn Spanish or Italian the most effective way, there's no better choice than Dragoma! Dragoma shows the definition/meaning of Spanish or Italian words as pop up without opening dictionary app ever. No hassle of switching between apps. You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the disconnesso Spagnolo Italiano Dizionario & Traduttore / desconectado italiano español Diccionario & Traductor
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both Spanish - Italian and Italian - Spanish directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.

Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 

Facebook: 

Twitter: 

Instagram:

Email: 

DISCLAIMER:
The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.
If not installed, your device may ask you to install the TTS engine. An internet connection may be required. We recommend installing it before traveling as roaming data tariffs may be very expensive.

title: Colorize Photos - AI Enhancer
description:
Unlock AI photo editing power.

Revive your old memories today with Colorize Photos - AI Photo Enhancer app that uses advanced AI to bring your old black-and-white photos to life! With just a few clicks, you can recolor, restore, and enhance your old photos, making them more vivid and clear than ever before. 📷✅

Ready to revive your old memories and give them new life? Try Colorize Photos app today and see the difference for yourself!
Using cutting-edge artificial intelligence techniques, Colorize Photos - Colorize black and white photos app automatically adds color to grayscale images, creating a seamless and natural look that no one will ever guess was artificially added. Colorize easily with black and white to colour photo tool!

Simple, yet powerful Image Editor.
You can choose photos that are totally grayscale, sepia-toned, or partially decolored, and our AI-powered technology will colorize photos from scratch. But that's not all! Colorize Photos - AI Photo Enhancer also has the power to restore old, damaged, and low-quality images, making them look brand new. 📷

Don't wait another day to restore and enhance your old photos! AI Photo Enhancer!
Our AI-powered technology removes noise from the image, better defines it, and works exceptionally well on people. This means your old photos will be colorful and vivid and restored, defined, and clear, making your memories more alive than ever before. ✅

Use black and white to colour photo tool!
Using Colorize Photos - black and white photos to the color app is easy, fast, effective, and free! Select the image you want to colorize or restore from your gallery or take a new one using your camera. The photo is sent to our server, where all the magic happens. Once complete, the result color or restored image is returned to you. 

Rest assured that our
short_description: Bring to life black and white photos colorizing them with AI and neural networks
recent_changes_text: General improvements: - The app will only recommend to use wifi when you are not using it. - The saved results now appear instantly on your gallery. - The slider for comparing the result has been moved in order to not interfere with gesture navigation. - Greater compressing to the images when not using wifi, in order to speed up the process. - Greater compressing to the images in mobile phones with 2GB or less of RAM to avoid memory errors. - Minor bug fix.

Don't wait another day to restore and enhance your old photos! AI Photo Enhancer!
Our AI-powered technology removes noise from the image, better defines it, and works exceptionally well on people. This means your old photos will be colorful and vivid and restored, defined, and clear, making your memories more alive than ever before. ✅

Use black and white to colour photo tool!
Using Colorize Photos - black and white photos to the color app is easy, fast, effective, and free! Select the image you want to colorize or restore from your gallery or take a new one using your camera. The photo is sent to our server, where all the magic happens. Once complete, the result color or restored image is returned to you. 

Rest assured that our

General improvements: - The app will only recommend to use wifi when you are not using it. - The saved results now appear instantly on your gallery. - The slider for comparing the result has been moved in order to not interfere with gesture navigation. - Greater compressing to the images when not using wifi, in order to speed up the process. - Greater compressing to the images in mobile phones with 2GB or less of RAM to avoid memory errors. - Minor bug fix.

title: Gradient: You Look Like
description:
Welcome to Gradient Photo Editor, the pinnacle of creativity and innovation in the world of digital imagery. Leveraging state-of-the-art AI technology, our app offers an unparalleled experience for both photo and video editing. Dive into a world of endless possibilities and artistic mastery with the following features:

* AI QUIZZES *
Unleash your creativity with our AI-driven quizzes & fun features. Find your Celebrity Look-Alike, turn yourself into a Cartoon Character, check out AI tests and more! The AI algorithms ensure realistic and breathtaking results that will leave you and your friends amazed.

* BEAUTY FILTERS *
Enhance your natural beauty with our extensive range of beauty filters. From skin smoothing to eye brightening, our AI-powered filters will make your photos look professionally retouched. Find the perfect look for every occasion with just a tap.* ARTISTIC FILTERS *
Channel your inner artist with our collection of artistic filters. Whether you prefer realistic paintings or cartoon animation, our AI-driven artistic filters will turn your photos into masterpieces.

* MAKEUP FILTERS *
Get the perfect makeup look without lifting a brush. Our makeup filters offer a wide range of cosmetics, from subtle enhancements to bold transformations. Experiment with different looks and find the one that suits you best.

* BODY FILTERS *
Achieve the perfect body shape with our intuitive body filters. Whether you want to slim down, tone up, or add curves, our AI-powered body filters will help you look your best in every photo.

* HAIRSTYLES *
Experiment with different hairstyles without a trip to the salon. Our AI-powered hairstyle feature lets you try on various haircuts and colors, helping you find the perfect look.* OBJECT REMOVAL *
Remove unwanted objects from your photos with ease. Our AI-driven object removal tool makes it simple to clean up your images, leaving only what you want to see.

* FACE RELIGHT *
Illuminate your face with our face relight feature. Adjust the lighting to create dramatic effects or simply enhance your natural glow. Our AI algorithms ensure that the lighting looks natural and flattering.

* TEETH AND SMILE *
Brighten your smile with our teeth and smile editing tools. Whiten your teeth, adjust your smile, and create a look that radiates confidence and joy.

* CLASSIC EDITING TOOLS *
For those who prefer a hands-on approach, our classic editing tools offer everything you need. Crop, rotate, adjust brightness and contrast, and much more. The intuitive interface makes it easy for both beginners and professionals to create stunning visuals.

---Gradient Unlimited

title: Next Big Idea – Books in 15min
description:
Next Big Idea: The World’s Leading Book Summaries & Reading Club. Loved by Thousands of Life-long Learners Across the Globe.

Learn from the Authors Themselves
Next Big Idea is the only app where you can read summaries written and spoken by the authors. You won’t find these exclusive gold nuggets anywhere else.

Featured Authors
- Adam Grant
- Malcolm Gladwell
- Daniel Pink
- Susan Cain
- James Clear
- Nir Eyal
- And so many more

Highlights
● Book Bites — Listen to or read 15 minute book overviews, as created and recorded by the authors themselves. 1000+ titles available!

● E-courses — 45 minute master classes, in audio, video and text formats starring the authors of the Next Big Idea’s best books of the year

● Conversations — Watch recorded live Q&As, podcast recordings, and author chats

● Next Big Idea Podcast — 45 minute ad-free episodes from our celebrated podcast

● Idea of the day — 2 minute daily insights from leading thinkers

● Exclusive Invitations – Receive invites to live author Q&As and book launches

● Original audio books

● AI Recommendation Assistant 

Testimonials
“Highly recommend to anyone who enjoys getting deeper insight into books.” – Buddy G.

"I love the app and listen to the Book Bites most mornings on my walk! Great job." – Kim S.

“There are so many book summary apps out there and I love some of them, like Blinkist and Uptime. “There are so many book summary apps out there and I love some of them, like Blinkist and Uptime. But NBI is different. NBI's summaries are written and narrated by the authors so you get the main points they want you to get.” – Hlyan H.

Deep Learning
Don’t just stop at 2 or 15 minutes a day. We have 45 minute e-courses of the best nonfiction books of the year, as selected by our legendary curators. Taught by the leading thinkers themselves, discover exclusive e-courses feature key takeaways, discussion questions, and interactive exercises and quizzes.

Ad-Free
The Next Big Idea app also gives you access to ad-free episodes of our podcast! Each episode is a deep dive into one big idea through immersive storytelling, narration and curator interviews with the most interesting authors at work today.

A Smarter Version of You Awaits
“A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.” What are you waiting for? Go deeper and start learning from the world’s leading experts today.

title: mEzee
description:
Integrate all your Prolink Smart Home Devices with a single App!
 
Prolink mEzee App provides users with a simple, convenient, easy to setup/paired with multiple Smart Home Devices. The app is designed to allow users to access, manage, as well as to preset automated scenarios; all from the convenience of your mobile.
 
Key Features include:
- Smart Home Scene Automation
- Smart Device Setup
- Manage Family Members and Rooms & many more.
 
Prolink Supported Models Include:
- SmartCam Plus (PIC3003WP)
- SmartCam Plus II (PIC3003WP)
- SmartCam Lite (PIC3005WN)
- Home Security Camera ( DS-3101,DS-3105,DS-3106,DS-3107)
- Smart Plug (DS-3201, DS-3202M)
- Smart Remote Controller (DS-3301 IR)
- Smart Remote Controller Plus ( DS-3301 IR+RF)
- Smart Bulb E27 (DS-3601)
- Smart Bulb GU10 (DS-3605)
- Smart Bulb E14 (DS-3606)
- Smart LED Strip (DS-3602)
 -Smart Zigbee Series Solution ( DS-3305,DS-3306,DS-3307,DS-3308)

title: Onvier - IP Camera Monitor
description:
Monitor, control, explore and configure IP cameras. 
It is much more than a simple IP camera viewer.
Support all modern (i.e. ONVIF® conformant) IP cameras.
Support older cameras via generic RTSP and MJPEG
Please note: IP CENTCOM is the name of our Windows 8.1/10, Windows Phone versions.

Dutch translation is kindly provided by Koen Zomers ( – and Elmer Verrijssen ( - - Elversoft)
Estonian translation is kindly provided by Mr. Olari Saul ().
French translation is kindly provided by Mr. Jean Bruder ().
German translation is kindly provided by Mr. Jörg Trampert and Mr. Dominik Trampert (trampert. joerg. com).
Italian translation is kindly provided by ipDoor (, a leader in IP Door Phones. Access Control and Home Automation Solution.
Polish translation is kindly provided by Mr. Paweł Łukasik ().
Portuguese translation is kindly provided by a Brazilian engineer.
Russian translation is kindly provided by Минин Максим().
Slovenian translation is kindly provided by Mr. Marjan Mirai ().
Spanish translation is kindly provided by Mr. Pedro Torres ().
Ukrainian translation is kindly provided by Минин Максим().

Main features:
ONVIF - Potentially compatible with over 5000 NVT devices (e.g. network cameras, servers).
Generic RTSP/MJPEG - Support non-ONVIF IP cameras as generic RTSP or MJPEG streams.
RTSP over HTTP - Help viewers traverse firewalls, and save servers from complex port configuration.
Explore - In-depth exploration of device properties.
H.264 - (a.k.a. Advanced Video Coding) The same format used by Blu-ray, YouTube. High compression allows smoother video for limited bandwidth..
Audio Support both AAC and G.711.
MP4 - Recording in standard MP4 format with H.264 video encoding and AAC audio encoding for high quality and player compatibility. 
Discovery - Discover all ONVIF devices instantly. Adding a camera can be as simple as a few button clicks.
PTZ - Flick to pan/tilt, click to zoom.Digital PTZ for non-PTZ cameras (Pro version).
Widget - Snapshot preview on Android home screen, and one-click to start video streaming.
Snapshot Preview - App home screen with snapshots updated periodically.
Multi-view - Viewing multiple cameras simultaneously.
Portrait/Landscape - Support both portrait and landscape, fit and crop-and-fill viewing.
App's web page:

ONVIF is a trademark of ONVIF, Inc.

The Amazon and eBay links in the app may lead to commissions for us from purchases.
short_description: Modern IP Camera Video Management System, Support 10,000+ models, Hi-Performance
recent_changes_text: 14.57, 14.55(PR)Improved PTZ UI.Accommodate some cameras deviating from ONVIF protocols.14.53, 14.51(PR)Improved digital PTZ.Fixed a bug of multi-view UI.14.49, 14.47(PR)Improved the UI for alternative license serving those who are unable to purchase the Pro license from either Google Play for Amazon AppStore.Fixed a minor bug related to two-way audio.

title: Horoscope by Fingerprint
description:
The world of astrology surprises us with its mystery and the opportunity to learn about ourselves and our future.

We are increasingly interested in such types of predictions as: horoscopes, tarot, numerology, esotericism, fortune telling, palmistry and clairvoyance.

The horoscope has a long history, from astrological research to modern technology.
Nowadays, when information is available to everyone at their fingertips, the horoscope has become an integral part of people's daily lives.

Until recently, they were provided only in a generalized form, focusing on the zodiac sign, stars and planetary positions.

But today we have a completely new approach to predicting fate - a fingerprint horoscope.

Fingerprint horoscope is a new method based on the unique traits and fingerprints of each person.

Every finger, every line, every indentation has its own meaning and can reveal a lot about a person.
This allows you to create more accurate and personalized horoscopes for every day.

This application is quite simple to use:

With the help of this unique and completely free horoscope, you can dive deeper into the analysis of your personality and destiny.
This will allow you to get more accurate predictions and discover new facets of your personality.

So, if you are interested in astrology and always strive to know more about yourself and the world around you, then a fingerprint horoscope is what you need.

Use our application today and immerse yourself in the wonderful world of astrology, where every day will be full of new opportunities for self-development and success.

The horoscope is suitable for all zodiac signs:

♈ Aries
♉ Taurus
♊ Gemini
♋ Cancer
♌ Leo
♍ Virgo
♎ Libra
♏ Scorpio
♐ Sagittarius
♑ Capricorn
♒ Aquarius
♓ Pisces

title: MacroDroid - Device Automation
description:
MacroDroid is the easiest way to automate tasks on your Android smartphone or tablet. Via the straightforward user interface MacroDroid makes it possible to build fully automated tasks in just a few taps.

A few examples of how MacroDroid can help you to get automated:

# Manage files on your device, for example automating file copying, moving and deleting to keep your file system clean.
# Auto reject incoming calls when in a meeting (as set in your calendar).
# Increase safety while commuting by reading your incoming notifications and messages (via Text to Speech) and send automated responses via email or SMS.
# Optimize your daily workflow on your phone; switch on bluetooth and start playing music when you enter your car. Or switch on WiFi when near your house.
# Reduce battery drain (e.g. dim screen and switch Wifi off)
# Make custom sound and notification profiles. 
# Remind you to do certain tasks using timers and stopwatches.

These are just a few examples out of limitless scenarios where MacroDroid can make your Android life a little easier. With only 3 simple steps this is how it works:

1. Select a Trigger.

The trigger is the cue for the macro to start. MacroDroid offers over 80 triggers to start your macro, i.e. location based triggers (like GPS, cell towers, etc), device status triggers (like battery level, app starting/closing), sensor triggers (like shaking, light levels, etc) and connectivity triggers (like Bluetooth, Wifi and Notifications).
You can also create a shortcut on the homescreen of your device or run using the unique and customizable Macrodroid sidebar.

2. Select the Actions you like to automate.

MacroDroid can perform over 100 different actions, that you typically would do by hand. Connect to your Bluetooth or Wifi device, select volume levels, speak text (like your incoming notifications or current time), start a timer, dim your screen, run Tasker plugin and many more.

3. Optionally: Configure Constraints.

Constraints help you to let the macro fire only when you want it to. 
Living near your work, but only want to connect to your company's Wifi during work days? With a constraint you can select specific times or days that the macro can be invoked. MacroDroid offers over 50 constraint types.

MacroDroid is compatible with Tasker and Locale plugins to expand the range of possibilities even further.

= For beginners =

MacroDroid's unique interface offers a Wizard that guides step by step through the configuration of your first macros. 
It is also possible to use an existing template from the template section and customize it to your needs.
The built-in forum allows you to get help from other users, allowing you to easy learn the ins and outs of MacroDroid.

= For more experienced users =

MacroDroid offers more comprehensive solutions like the use of Tasker and Locale plugins, system/user defined variables, scripts, intents, advance logic like IF, THEN, ELSE clauses, use of AND/OR

The free version of MacroDroid is ad-supported and allows up to 5 macros. The Pro version (a small one time fee) removes all adverts and allows an unlimited amount of macros.

= Support =

Please use the in-app forum for all usage questions and feature requests, or access via 

To report bugs please use the built in 'Report a bug' option available via the troubleshooting section.

= Accessibility Services =

MacroDroid makes use of accessibility services for certain features like automating UI Interactions. use of accessibility services is entirely at the users discretion. No user data is ever obtained or logged from any accessibility service.

= Wear OS =

This app contains a Wear OS companion app for interaction with MacroDroid. This is not a standalone app and requires the phone application installed. The Wear OS app supports complications populated by MacroDroid to use along with your watch face of choice.
short_description: Number one automation app for Android - Over 20 million Downloads.
recent_changes_text: Added Font Scale action.Added custom filename support and source selection to Record Microphone action.Added Empty action.Added ability to tint icons to a user selectable colour in the notification button bar.Added 'block next action until complete' option to Message Dialog and Option Dialog actions.Added ability to set specific TTS Engine for the Speak Text action.Fixed issue where the Screen On/Off action options were broken when configuring.

title: Regroup Poker Tools & Charts
description:
The best free app for tracking income, managing your bankroll, and mastering strategy. Whether you're logging wins, navigating GTO preflop charts, or calculating equity, Regroup offers everything you need to dominate the table. Download now and transform your poker performance!

* Keep Track of Your Poker Income
The best way to become a better player is to know how you're doing. Regroup is the fastest way to track your wins and losses, notes of the important details of your session, and track your poker income & bankroll. You can record unlimited sessions, always free. 

* GTO Preflop Range Charts
Crush the next tournament by using these fast and easy range charts. Click through preflop charts for a variety of stack sizes, and easily navigate between different player actions to see the right move. 

* Equity Calculator
We've built the fastest and easiest to use modern equity calculator. Plug in your hand, the board, and we'll give you the odds! See graphs to see how often you smash the flop or turn card. Supports Texas Holdem, Omaha, Big O, Lazy Pineapple, and Double Board games. 

* Poker Vlog Mode
Want to turn your hands into a video? Use the Equity Calculator's Vlog mode to get green screen graphics you can use in your favorite video editor. 

* Hand History Logger
Keep notes on important hands in a heartbeat. Then, share with your friends.

* Automatic Cloud Backups
Don't worry about losing your phone and your data. Your data is safely synced in the cloud. 

* Free Import / Export
Move your data easily between Regroup and other apps. Your data belongs to you, don't pay to get it back! We support importing from Poker Income, Poker Analytics, Poker Bankroll Tracker, RunGood, and your own spreadsheets. We're also happy to help you import your data!

* Home Game Organizing Tool
Organize games with friends? Keep track of everyone's buy-ins and see how much money is on the table. Then, easily calculate who pays who. Supports calculating payouts from Pokerrr 2 and PokerNow CSVs as well. 

* Get Advice from a Poker Chatbot
Need to rant to a friend or get poker advice? We've tailored a chatbot for poker help!

title: Braille Recognition
description:
Our artificial intelligence is proficient at identifying Braille dots in images and can effectively translate them into different languages. 
Simplify the homework review process for teachers and parents. With our app, effortlessly check Braille assignments, providing a valuable tool for educators and fostering collaboration between parents and teachers.
Embrace inclusivity with our app, breaking down barriers for the visually impaired. Join us in creating a world where education is accessible to everyone, regardless of their abilities!

title: Sports Betting Analyzer AI
description:
Sports Betting Analyzer AI is your essential tool for professional football betting analysis. Use our advanced AI predictions and powerful historical data repository to execute precise betting research.

Our platform provides three core analysis methods to guide your strategy.

🎯 Core Analysis Features:
1. Direct Match Analysis
Select any match. Create custom filters by tapping odds values. The platform searches our database for past matches matching your exact criteria. Our analytics provide the statistical outcomes of these comparable historical scenarios.

2. Filter Analytics Dashboard
View a deep-dive, pattern-based analysis of your filtered historical results. Tables and visuals summarize past outcomes, revealing weighted trends and success rates from similar scenarios.

3. AI Analysis Assistant
Our most advanced feature automatically combines all relevant data: odds analysis, team H2H records, form, odds movements, and late information. The assistant recommends the 5 most logical betting suggestions for each match.

🧠 Technology and Data Support:
Advanced AI & Professional Tools
Our machine learning algorithms process millions of data points across major leagues (Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, etc.) for highly accurate predictions. Access real-time odds comparison, a bet calculator, and comprehensive odds tracking.

Data Management
We maintain a constantly updated database with daily match additions. Access detailed football stats and historical data spanning multiple seasons globally.

User-Friendly Interface
Our intuitive design ensures effortless analysis. Customizable dashboards guarantee efficient research for all experience levels.

Important Notice: Sports Betting Analyzer AI is for analytical purposes only. We provide tools, but outcomes are not guaranteed. Use all predictions as part of your research.

Download Sports Betting Analyzer AI today and elevate your strategy with AI and professional analysis!

title: Mira Fertility & Cycle Tracker
description:
Welcome to smarter cycle tracking—powered by AI. 

Mira gets smarter every day. Track your cycles to reach your fertility goals, learn more about your reproductive health, and make informed and confident life decisions. 

The Mira app is free, with no ads, and no in-app purchases!

Why track your cycles with Mira? Because our algorithms are trained on real hormonal values—Mira has analyzed over 370k menstrual cycles and 4M+ hormone data points. Mira is more than just a cycle-tracking app—it learns from your data and gets smarter every day. 

Take your cycle tracking to the next level by tracking MORE data like hormone values, cycle stages, mood, basal body temperature, cervical mucus, medication, and more. 

Mira was designed to be part of your team. Understand more about what’s going on in your body and how you feel. Calculate your period & ovulation with Mira’s state-of-the-art technology, co-developed by renowned OBGYNs. 

Get FREE access to our expert library of articles, webinars, and free EBooks regarding your fertility and hormones. 

Use Partners Mode if you’re trying to conceive or tracking your cycles with a partner. Access your partner’s cycle data to check fertile days, PMS, or other cycle phases. 

Access multiple views within the app. See your calendar, hormone charts, scores, daily status, and receive personalized tips. 

To gain even more powerful insight, purchase the revolutionary Mira Hormone Tracker for an in-depth look into your cycle. Pinpoint your ovulation day, 6-day fertile window, confirm your ovulation, and say goodbye to guesswork for good. Purchasing the Mira Hormone Tracker IS NOT necessary to use the app. 

Reviews
Suzan J.
The Mira app is fantastic. It gives you your fertility levels and even a number! It could not be easier or clearer than this. I've been using it for over 1 month now and I can't be without it anymore.

Lea
With Mira, I found out that my ovulation was much later in my cycle than most of the apps predicted. Really love it so far!

Orshina I.
It’s great to see how different hormones change throughout the cycle and get much more accurate results than your usual app-only cycle predictions.

Jessy T.
I've always had irregular cycles, and the Mira app is already helping me understand some aspects of my cycle I've never considered before.

Melissa B.
The app is so comprehensive, and I do enjoy entering my data, unlike other period tracking apps I use.
short_description: AI-powered fertility and ovulation tracking app
recent_changes_text: Dear Mira Community,Glad to share our update with you:• You are able to capture your entire fertile window, not just the ovulation, with the newest Mira Fertility Plus test wands that measure both the LH and Estrogen hormones! • The App now works with the analyzer better! More logs can be recorded. The trends of cycles and ovulation are more intuitive to understand.Any questions, please let us know at ! If you like Mira, please rate and review us!Best,Mira Support
