title: Mexico Dating: Mexican Chat
description:
Are you attracted to Mexican people or are you looking to meet people in Mexico? We have a great new app for you.

Mexico Social is the best free dating app to connect with Mexican singles or to meet Mexican singles from around the world. Mexico Social is a great way to meet people around you in Mexico, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. Whether you are looking to see Mexican girls and their ‘Ballet Folklorico dance’ or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Mexico, Mexico Social will have someone for you!

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes Mexico Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. title: ExamGuide JAMB UTME CBT 2026
description:
ExamGuide JAMB UTME CBT offline practice software is a computer based testing and learning app curated to help candidates prepare adequately for the JAMB exam. 

ExamGuide UTME Learning app is a success guide, delivering content and quality that no other JAMB UTME CBT Practice App replicates and by far the best for students who desire to get high score in the JAMB exam.

ExamGuide JAMB Practice App has comprehensive curriculum based study notes, Video tutorial classes, an exhaustive bank of real JAMB UTME past questions complemented by model syllabus based questions all with answers and detailed explanations. 

Our questions are over 35000 spanning through 28 subjects. All questions are tied to topics and a student can choose to practice questions from the topics they have studied thus promoting focus based study.

The Classroom section is loaded with exhaustive study materials and video tutorial for all subjects covering all syllabus topics there is CBT exercises at the end of each study, which are different from the normal practice questions. 

The classroom section also contains flashcards which is a summary of everything taught on a topic for easy revision. Students can create a study plan that will ensures they cover their entire course work before examination day.

There is AI tutor to guide students in areas they need more clarification in the classroom section, The AI will not allow student to ask questions outside the scope of study and it can receive queries through texts, voice and images.

Robust and flexible - ExamGuide JAMB UTME CBT practice application is very flexible. You decides everything from the number of subject, topics to practice from, number of questions, exam year, exam time, exam mode etc.

ExamGuide JAMB App Science Note, a feature which enables students to solve mathematical and other related science problems. It works in an offline mode so can be used anywhere and anytime.

UTME CHALLENGE - Users participate in this contest to enhance JAMB UTME preparations. It is a mock Exams conducted on a weekly or fortnightly intervals for ExamGuide JAMB UTME Practice App Users. Compete in real time with your peers and win amazing cash prices when you come out amongst the top scorers. 

Summary of prescribed literature books - revise all recommended literature with summary provided by experienced teachers. There is also a pool of likely questions for each of the prescribed texts to ensure adequate preparation.

Rich and insightful result analysis on your performance in a practice test. Information we provide can be used in making a better study plan. The result shows performance in different topics and the amount of time spent on each question. This can show your strengths and weaknesses at a glance.

Career and Institution - Use to make a smarter decision on what school or course to enroll in and find out the subject combination for the course in your preferred institution. When you provide details of your O level results or subjects, it can guide you on a career path and recommend schools based on your strength to ensure you are offered the admission.

Educational games design to drill students to excellence. Our games are relaxing and captivating. We render JAMB past questions and contents to you in an interesting form ensuring you learn while relaxing.

ExamGuide JAMB UTME CBT SOFTWARE is a must have for a student who desires to get high score and pass JAMB Exam In One Sitting.

DISCLAIMER: ExamGuide JAMB UTME 2026 is NOT designed in affiliation with JAMB. The questions in the application are syllabus based model questions created by Zigmatech Consult Limited plus past JAMB UTME questions in public domain. ExamGuide JAMB UTME Learning App is designed to help student do a comprehensive study and test their readiness for the real exams using our practice questions. Our questions does not represent the questions you will be encountering in the main exam. We are strongly opposed to any form of exam malpractice

We have also added the summary for all 21 literature books. The last major update is the extension of the UTME Challenge by additional 5 rounds.

title: Tarot Reading
description:
Tarot Card Reading - The Mystery of Tarot Cards

Would you not want to get rid of all your life's ambiguities, questions, and unpredictability? Via this Free Tarot Reading - The Mystery of Tarot Cards app you will get Tarot Card Reading, Horoscope & Numerology predictions that will solve this problem for you.

In this app, all you have to do is ask a question regarding tarot card reading and anything related to your life and get quick response through our psychic reading.

For resolving queries, or any problems, you can choose from any of the following:

●	Daily horoscope
●	Common Spreads
●	Love Tarot Reading
●	Money Tarot Reading
●	Yes No Tarot Reading
●	Daily, Weekly, Monthly & Yearly Horoscope
●	Numerology
●	Name Numerology
●	Number Numerology

Tarot Card Reading

This Tarot app features an open borders Ryder Waite Tarot deck that is both exclusive and stunning. Discover how this Tarot reading app is among the greatest in the game, and take your daily Tarot Card Reading along with you everywhere you go.

What distinguishes this app as a strong Tarot reader?

This is a good Tarot app that is predictive and built to resemble a real psychic reading as accurately as possible. It can provide several Tarot readings on a wide range of subjects, such as income, work, family, and marriage, as well as differing views of several of the 78 Tarot cards from each set. The meanings vary based on which card is chosen and where it falls in the reading when doing a Tarot Spread Reading or a three-card reading, a Past, Present, Future set.

Horoscope

You will appreciate how simple it is to use this daily horoscope app. The app provides regular horoscopes. You can also choose to learn more about your zodiac sign, such as its aspect, emblem, and world. A fun attribute of the app is that you can send every horoscope to your mates. This will detail all zodiac signs, such as Aries Horoscope, Taurus Horoscope, Gemini Horoscope, Cancer Horoscope, Leo Horoscope, Virgo Horoscope, Libra Horoscope, Scorpio Horoscope, Sagittarius Horoscope, Pisces Horoscope, Capricorn Horoscope, and Aquarius Horoscope.

Numerology

It's a fantastic app that helps you to look up the definition of your name numerology, and birth date. It uses your name and date of birth to generate a numerology prediction for you in its numerology calculator. You can closely check the significant factors that impact your life with this app. It will assist you in determining numerology charts like your birthday number, life path number, expression number, and attitude number. Along with all these, it now includes additional sections such as your unknown skill, love affair, career choices, appropriate profession, fitness path, and prosperity path.

User Friendly

●	The user experience is designed in such a way that user won’t find it difficult to find any kind of Astrology readings.

●	Rather than depending upon someone, you can connect with your inner guide and read the Tarot cards easily.

Why should you install this app?

●	You could get a fast reading at any time.
●	The meanings of the Tarot cards do not need to be memorized.
●	You can start reading the Tarot card descriptions whenever you choose, without finding other sources.
●	You can also get advice on more than a wide range of topics, in areas including love, income, family, career, health & almost all topics related to your life. 
●	If you want to master the tarot techniques or want further enhance your knowledge, Tarot Card Reading - The Mystery of Tarot Cards app is a great place to start.
●	Newcomers can use this app to familiarize themselves with the Tarot cards and its interpretations.
●	Here on this app, you can find your tarot card reading, numerology predictions, and your Daily Horoscopes predictions, all in one place.

title: Kotobee Reader
description:
Kotobee Reader: Your ultimate interactive ebook reader and ad-free digital reading companion

Kotobee Reader is optimized for the EPUB 3.0 standard, supporting interactivity and multiple languages.

Access Kotobee Books; a free digital library where you can download classics and ebooks distributed by other users and read offline.

Kotobee Reader offers a powerful set of tools to enhance your reading experience:
- Note-taking: Add notes to words and paragraphs, and access them later.
- Highlighting: Mark important sentences with different color highlights.
- Bookmarking: Bookmark multiple pages at different locations
- Aggregate annotations: Aggregate your notes, highlights, and bookmarks, into a PDF.
- Search: Search inside the chapter or the entire book.
- Multiple languages: Use one of more than 16 different languages
- Copy to clipboard: Copy any text to your clipboard, to use in external programs.
- Text-to-speech: Let the reader speak out any text you choose
- Google lookup: Search definitions and explanations directly with a click.

Kotobee Reader is perfect for students, educators, and anyone looking for a customizable ebook reading experience. 

And the best part? No Ads! Read without interruptions. Kotobee Reader ensures an ad-free environment, and we don’t burden you with internal purchases either.

For information about Kotobee Reader, please visit 

For the creation of ebooks using our free software Kotobee Author, please visit 

Kotobee Reader and Kotobee Author are both part of the Kotobee platform:

title: TestDriller WAEC And NECO 2026
description:
TestDriller for WASSCE is a powerful e-learning and testing app designed to help candidates preparing for WAEC, NECO, and GCE exams learn and practice effectively. It combines past questions (objective, theory, and practical), detailed explanations, classroom materials, video lectures, flashcards, AI Tutor, Science Note, and much more—all in one place.

The app works offline, so you can study anytime, anywhere.

Key Features
	•	Extensive Question Bank – practice authentic WASSCE past questions with detailed explanations.
	•	Classroom – access curriculum-based study materials, interactive exercises, and get instant support from the AI Tutor powered by ChatGPT.
	•	Video Lectures – watch high-quality video lessons for all subjects. Download or import them for offline study.
	•	Flashcards – revise faster with smart flashcards that summarize each lesson.
	•	Science Note – an intelligent digital notebook for solving math and science problems.
	•	AI Tutor – your personal assistant for real-time homework help, study support, and practice guidance.
	•	Practice Objective, Theory & Practical Questions – prepare comprehensively across all exam question types.
	•	Practice by Topics – master any topic of your choice with focused practice sessions.
	•	WASSCE Challenge – compete with peers nationwide, test your knowledge, and win prizes.
	•	Educational Games – enjoy fun and engaging games while reinforcing your learning.
	•	Performance Insights – view corrections in result history, get advanced performance analysis, and receive voice-guided advice on areas to improve.
	•	Bookmarks - save important questions to review later.
	•	Dark Mode - study comfortably at any time of the day.
	•	Refined User Experience – enjoy a smoother design, updated materials aligned with the latest WAEC syllabus, and over 700 new Literature questions.

Disclaimer

TestDriller is not affiliated with WAEC. It is an independent platform built to help candidates prepare adequately for exams conducted by WAEC and NECO.
short_description: Learn differently and pass WASSCE/NEC/GCE in one sitting with TestDriller.

title: Unstuck: CBT Therapy Journal
description:
Take charge of your mental health. Overcome anxiety and depression with CBT journaling. 81% of people with moderate to severe anxiety see an improvement after just one month of using Unstuck.

By processing your thoughts and experiences with a guided CBT journal, you’ll develop the skills to take control of your mental health. Unstuck is based on cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), the gold standard treatment in psychotherapy. The techniques we use are backed by science, so expect results.

CBT is effective, not just for anxiety and depression, but also for stress, anger, trauma (PTSD), OCD, ADHD, and BPD.

JOURNALING

Unstuck includes multiple journal and diary types that work in unison to improve mental health.

Thought Journal: Understand and train your brain to overcome unhelpful thinking patterns. 80% of people with distress see an instant improvement after completing an entry.

Savoring Journal: Find joy and gratitude in daily life. 74% of people with anxiety see an immediate positive impact after completing an entry.

Exposure Journal: Fight your fears by facing them with exposure therapy. This extremely powerful method for overcoming anxiety is out now. Unstuck utilizes inhibitory retrieval, the most effective exposure therapy approach based on the latest research (Craske et al., 2022).

DISCOVER INSIGHTS

Unstuck will deliver personalized insights so you can understand how your thought patterns change over time. Discover which thinking traps you’ve overcome and which you’re still falling into. See how events in your life are tied to changing levels of anxiety and depression. Draw meaningful connections to accelerate your mental health improvement.

AI SECOND OPINION

Not just a chatbot that spoon-feeds responses, your AI partner will strengthen your Thought Journal by conducting an objective analysis, uncovering thinking traps, and offering a fresh perspective.

AI FEAR FINDER

Get AI assistance with exposure therapy. AI Fear Finder helps identify your underlying fears, so they can be effectively targeted with the Exposure Journal.

DARK MODE

Whether you love the soothing vibe of dark hues or want to ease the strain on your eyes during late-night journaling, Unstuck has you covered. Choose from Dark Mode, Light Mode, or sync with your device settings for a seamless experience.

ACCESS ON ALL YOUR DEVICES

Get the support you need on the go with our mobile app. Or, if you prefer typing on a keyboard, use our website to access Unstuck from your desktop computer.

KEEP YOUR DATA SAFE

Create an optional account and Unstuck will automatically keep your data backed up and synced. Or, create local backups with the data export feature.

TRY FOR FREE

Try Unstuck with a free trial. After that, we offer monthly and yearly

title: Barbu
description:
Play the famous card game known as Barbu (also called Tafferan or Tafaron) on your smartphone or Android tablet!!

Play Barbu against simulated opponents featuring high-level artificial intelligence.
This version is very faithful to the original card game, with many game play options available and customizable. 

*** SELECT GAME PLAY RULES ***

- Choose the contracts to use among the 8 contracts available in the application:
♠ Tricks
♠ The last two tricks
♠ Hearts
♠ Queens
♠ Barbu (King of Hearts)
♠ General (also known as salad)
♠ Trump
♠ Success

- Option to play with a 32-card or 52-card deck.
- Dealer's choice of contract or contract selected.
- Choose points corresponding to each contract.
- Choose the lead card in the success contract.
- And many others...

*** SEVERAL AI LEVELS ***

Four artificial intelligence levels are available in the application (from beginner to expert), in order to adapt each one's difficulty level.

*** A VERY COMPLETE APPLICATION ***

- Easy to learn, with fluid play, card animations, for a more realistic game play.
- Opponents have advanced AI with several available difficulty levels.
- Statistics for games played.
- Game rules are included in the application.
- Current game back-up in case the application is closed.

Questions about the game? 

Have fun!

title: Xeropan: Learn languages
description:
Join 3,000,000+ Xeropan players from over 160 countries! Improve your language skills by learning English, German, Spanish and French, as well as Business, IT, Engineering, Technical and 6 other Specialized English language courses! 

Xeropan has 5+ YEARS of language learning content. Improve all your language skills at every level. 

Learn a new language from anywhere. Continue your English, Spanish, French or German learning experience on mobile or web.

Welcome to Xeropan, the language learning app from the future. 

The year is 2157. 🤖 From outer space, a comet hits the Earth’s surface. ☄️ Suddenly, no one can communicate. 🤐

Without communication, the entire world—our future—is in total chaos. 🆘 
Professor Max, a language teacher from the future, builds a time machine. He travels back in time to save the world. Complete English, Spanish, French and German lessons to earn stars for his time machine. Together you can fight chaos and save the world! 

Let’s have a little fun learning a new language, shall we? 

FEATURES included in the Xeropan language learning app: 

- Learn real-life expressions from pop culture videos 

- Translated into 17+ languages for your understanding 

- Improve your pronunciation, grammar and vocabulary 

- Track and review your daily progress 

- Perfect for ALL LEVELS, beginner through expert 

- Practice your speaking skills with an intelligent bot 
 
- Compete with your friends and level up 

- No boring lessons allowed 

Built by trusted foreign language teachers with years of experience and a sense of humor 🤓📚🤪 

- You can learn Specialized English courses: 
 
- Prepare for your professional language exams and achieve your academic and career goals. 
 
- You can expand your English vocabulary and improve your pronunciation at B1-C+ levels. 
 
- You can learn up to 2000

Why Choose HeyChina?
HeyChina bridges the gap between traditional Chinese language learning methods and modern technology, ensuring you gain real-world Chinese proficiency. With HeyChina, you’re not just learning a language—you’re unlocking a new culture, conversational skills, and opportunities.

- Learn Chinese pronunciation effortlessly with advanced AI-powered speech recognition.
- Adaptive learning with personalized

title: Flo Ovulation & Period Tracker
description:
Welcome to Flo! The world’s leading period, pregnancy, and cycle tracker. Join over 430 million members who use Flo as their go-to pregnancy & ovulation tracker & cycle calendar. With seven million five-star ratings, we're paving the way to better female healthcare by empowering people with periods to harness their body's signals.

Flo for Partners
Link your Flo account with your partner so they can see updates on your cycle and pregnancy. Period and fertile days predictions, we'll provide them with insights and actions they can take to support you better. Use Flo for Partners to maximize your connection when tracking your period, ovulation, or pregnancy.

There's more to tracking your period:
- Menstrual and Period Tracker: Understand symptoms like vaginal discharge and mood swings by tracking your period with Flo's ovulation and period calendar, developed in collaboration with over 100 health experts.
- Ovulation & Fertility Window Tracker: Understand your fertile cycle and benefit from expert insights, tailored content, and information about conception and fertility.
- Women's Health Tracker: This is a calendar for your cycle, ovulation, weight, water intake, physical activity, and mood. Track your symptoms to prepare for your period.
- Pregnancy Tracker App: Receive expert information for a healthy pregnancy and birth with Flo's pregnancy calendar.
- New! Flo supports perimenopause: Know what might be perimenopause and how to tune in to your body’s changes. Get clarity on common perimenopause symptoms and what can help.

How to maximize your use of Flo’s menstrual, period, and ovulation tracker and calendar: 
- Anonymous Mode: Enjoy Flo while maintaining your privacy and protecting your identity. Your name, email address, and technical identifiers will not be connected to your health data in your new Flo account.
- Reminders: Personalize Flo's menstrual and period tracker with scheduled reminders to track your cycle's start and end date. Receive notifications about ovulation, birth control pills, sleep, water intake, and more.
- Secret Chats: Safely discuss intimate topics from fertility to birth control in our supportive global community.
- Content Library: Explore thousands of articles and videos on women's health, periods, ovulation, birth control, fertility, and pregnancy.
- Health Assistant: Chat with our virtual assistant about late periods, irregular cycles, PMS, etc.
- Check if symptoms match those common of PCOS, endometriosis, or perimenopause with our Symptom Checker tool.*
- Wear OS complications & tiles: Set up a tile and complication on your watch for insights about your cycle. Flo period tracker is compatible with Wear OS 3.

title: Escape from Backrooms - Horror
description:
Enjoy one of the best very scary games and horrors Escape the Backrooms!

In this scary game you should explore a huge abandoned amusement maze with a scary imposter.

Are you ready to face the true evil - the scary killer? Will you be able to solve all the puzzles that are waiting for you on the path to escape in these horror stories? You will have to play hide and seek with that monster and go through all the hard quests in order to survive throughout the night!

Explore a dark amusement maze: backrooms, old abandoned buildings, a horrifying hospital, dark basements, mysterious mazes and creepy circus, all this scares goosebumps.
Feeling you’re alone there? In this terrible adventure game you won’t ever end up being alone, because It will always be at your back… Put your attention on secret quests and hidden objects in this dreadful game - the only way to stay alive is to hide first and run away after this massacure!

Solve puzzles and search, collect and use items in order to understand the horror story and escape from haunted house and evil monster.

Do not make loud noise and be careful in the back rooms because the real evil neighbor killer-beast might see or hear you! It kills everyone who gets in its way! Keep your eyes open and use cover to hide from this deadly maniac to stay alive. Try to track it’s movements, otherwise it will find, scare and kill you!

If you like scary games and horror escape experiences – is the game for you!
It's not granny and not fnaf it's really a top chart game for adults 18+

This scary game features:

★ A huge map with locations to explore
★ A terrifying and crafty evil beast
★ Hardcore puzzles
★ Smart and horrible frenzy beast with it’s own artificial intelligence (AI)
★ Intense gameplay, unexpected encounters and a nightmarish atmosphere
★ Better avoid playing this game on Friday the 13th - we won’t be able to guarantee your safety!
short_description: Get out of the endless labyrinths of Backrooms. Survive with traps

title: PLC Ladder Simulator 2
description:
In industry, the PLC is the most important automation device because of its role as the brain in running industrial processes. This brain uses syntax to be able to perform tasks in an orderly, sequential manner.

The native language of the PLC is called “ladder logic”. Ladder logic is graphical, in that it can be laid out in a form that resembles a ladder with rails and rungs. Ladder logic diagrams were developed originally from relay-circuit diagrams that were used for electronic circuitry prior to the advent of PLCs.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 is a simulator for the Android operating system with input and output objects that simulate the I/O ports of a real PLC. You can use PLC Ladder Simulator to create ladder-logic diagrams using components from the standard set used in these diagrams.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 is the successor of PLC Ladder Simulator, this version comes with big changes like a better and more friendly user interface UI and user experience UX, better use of sub-rungs, more functions blocks, unlimited save files and the possibility to export them to other devices that run the app, and much more.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 allows to auto-generate Arduino code for some Arduino boards from your ladder designs.

IMPORTANT: Don't forget to check the help tutorial inside the app to understand how to use it.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 Website: 

If you have any question or problem, you can contact me at
short_description: Ladder logic language simulator and code generator for Arduino boards.

title: Explurger: Travel & Social App
description:
Get Out, Get Social with Explurger!

For all the explorers and travel addicts, Explurger is revolutionizing travel & social media in ways more than you can imagine. Explurge-in (Check in) at places you go to, post stunning pics and videos and watch as your miles, cities, countries and continents add up. And that’s not all. As you go around the world, the AI creates a vibrant map of your adventures!

Why Explurger?

For the first time ever, social media is gamified! Earn rewards, create personalized Bucket Lists and share Future Travel Plans. Explurger is the ultimate app for influencers, bloggers, vloggers, creators, backpackers and travelers who want to save and share their journeys.

Key Features to Get Pumped About:

⁠Automatic Travelogue: Say goodbye to temporary check-ins! Every post or Explurge-in you create updates your AI-powered Travelogue, capturing every mile, city, country, pub, club and more. Flaunt your epic journey to fellow Explurgers and earn your bragging rights!

⁠Explurger Levels: Gamify your travels and level up! Increase your Explurger level with every mile traveled, city visited, post shared and Kudos earned. The more you explore and engage, the higher you soar!

⁠Rewards: Be active and get rewarded! Explurger uniquely rewards users for their activity on the platform. The more you share and travel, the higher your level and the more rewards you unlock. It's a win-win!

Bucket List: Love what you see in a post? Add it to your Bucket List! Save interesting posts and pictures to your list for future adventures, making sure you never miss out on a must-see destination.

Explore A City: A never-heard-before novel feature that enables you to connect with local Explorers/travelers in the city you have just Explurged-in.

Ready to embark on new adventures and share your journey with the world? 
Join Explurger - Get Out, Get Social!

Download now and start your epic journey today!

title: Mind Switch - Stress & Anxiety
description:
Mind Switch is the ultimate solution for improving your mental health and wellbeing. Our innovative "mind hacking" technology is designed to help you reduce stress, overcome fears and anxieties, and improve focus and productivity in a simple and effective way. With Mind Switch, you can take control of your thoughts and emotions, and live the life you've always wanted.

Our user-friendly app is designed to be accessible and easy to use, making it the perfect choice for people of all ages and backgrounds. Whether you are looking to improve your mental health or simply want to live a more fulfilling life, Mind Switch is the app you've been searching for.

With a range of guided programs and the possibility to create your own aspects, you'll be able to tackle stress, anxiety, and other mental health issues head-on. Our app is backed by an fMRI brain scan study which proved the effectiveness, and has already helped over 1,000 people achieve their goals and transform their lives.

So why wait? Download Mind Switch today and start your journey towards better mental health and wellbeing. With Mind Switch, you'll be able to switch your mind and transform your life, just like that! 
Start your free trial to switch off your stress, fears and anxieties.

Benefits of using mind switch
-	Getting to the root cause: Mind Switch® resolves stress and fears by getting to the root cause in the neural network
-	True independence: Mind Switch® can be used anywhere and anytime: All you need is your smartphone. No further resources are required
-	Simple and empowering: The use of the Mind Switch® app is very simple and enables users to solve their problem(s) themselves
-	Works at record speed: With Mind Switch®, stress can be relieved within minutes – even fears and anxieties can be reduced with Mind Switch
-	Insurance in your pocket: The ultimate safety net for your mental health, always at your fingertips

MIND SWITCH FEATURES:

STRESS RELIEF & INSTANT HELP
-	Get immediate help when you're feeling stressed or unmotivated
-	Watch your stress fade away within minutes of using Mind Switch
-	Boost your motivation and get rid of negative thoughts
-	Emotional reset: Take control of your mood and emotions

JOB & STUDY
-	Overcome fear of public speaking, exam anxiety, stage fright, and racing thoughts
-	Improve your time management skills
-	Find your focus and improve productivity

PERSONALITY DEVELOPMENT & SELF-IMPROVEMENT
-	Eliminate negative thoughts and boost positivity
-	Establish new habits and achieve your goals
-	Improve your sleep and overall well-being

BOOST SELF-ESTEEM
-	Overcome feelings of inadequacy and dissatisfaction with your appearance
-	Stop taking things too personally
-	Get rid of limiting beliefs

OVERCOME FEARS & ANXIETIES
-	Find relief from anxieties and fears including fear of flying, heights, public speaking, spiders, driving, blood, and dentists and many more

title: AI Eng Spell Checker Keyboard
description:
AI English Spell Checker Keyboard – Spelling Corrector App

AI English Spell Checker Keyboard is a easy-to-use spelling corrector app that checks your text instantly while you type. With this spell checker keyboard, you don’t need to write first and check later. Every word is corrected in real time, so your messages, emails, and documents are always error-free.

Why Use AI English Spell Checker Keyboard?

Typing the wrong spelling can be frustrating, especially when sending professional emails, chatting with colleagues, or writing online. This English spelling checker keyboard highlights mistakes with a red underline and shows correct spelling suggestions when you tap the word. It improves your writing, helps you remember correct words, and makes communication more confident.

Key Features

Real-time spelling check: Words are corrected instantly while typing.

Red underline for errors: Wrong words are clearly marked so you don’t miss them.

One-tap correction: Tap the underlined word to see accurate spelling suggestions.

Fast and reliable keyboard: Works as smoothly as your default keyboard.

Learn correct spelling: Improve your English spelling every time you type.

Helps students and professionals: Useful for education, job tasks, emails, and daily messages.

Simple setup: Easy to install and activate with step-by-step instructions.

How It Works

Install and activate the AI English Spell Checker Keyboard.

Open any messaging or email app.

Type normally. If a word is wrong, it will show a red underline.

Tap the word and select the correct spelling from suggestions.

Continue typing with confidence knowing your English spelling is always correct.

Perfect For

Students learning English spelling.

Professionals writing emails, reports, or messages.

Anyone who wants fast and accurate spell checking on Android.

This English spelling corrector keyboard is lightweight, responsive, and designed to make writing easy. It not only corrects spelling mistakes but also helps you improve your vocabulary over time. Whether you are writing messages, emails, or documents, you can be sure your words are spelled correctly.

Download the AI English Spell Checker Keyboard today and write with accuracy, confidence, and ease.

title: Hearts online
description:
Play Hearts game wherever you are with Hearts online. Play alone against players controlled by a high level artificial intelligence with a realistic behavior, or compare yourself with other players from around the world.

Avoid the queen of spades and the hearts to keep your score as low as possible and finish first.

*** MANY GAME MODES ***

- train with the quick game mode
- compete against players from all around the globe with the ranked mode
- play online with real players and see your rank in the leaderboard
- defeat your friends with our online friendly mode
- take part in daily tournaments

*** A COMPLETE, FAST AND SMOOTH GAME ***

- a free Hearts game, full-featured and without any limitations
- a rich interface, adapted for all iOS devices, with many animations and a zoom effect for better visibility
- detailed scores and statistics on all your games and rounds

*** A GAME THAT ADAPTS TO YOU ***

- 3 levels of artificial intelligence adapted for beginners as well as experienced players
- 5 graphic themes and 3 sets of cards

Questions or suggestions about our application at : 

The game does not cheat and the artificial intelligence does not have any knowledge of the other players' cards.

Good game!

title: Gym WP - Workout Tracker & Log
description:
Build muscle, lose weight and gain strength with Personalized Workout Plan optimized just for you - for free.

With our Personalized Workout Plan, you'll perform the best exercises to build muscle, gain strength, tone muscle or lose weight at the Gym. 

Log your own gym workout plan with your favorite exercises and track your training sessions with the best Gym Workout Tracker App.

✅ Gym WP is your top choice for a Home and Gym Workout Tracker App. Install now and join over 5 million users.

Take your training to the next level with amazing features! 

FITNESS PLAN
Gym WP will create a Personalized Workout Plan and guide you through your training sessions. 

• For all goals: build muscle, gain strength, tone muscle, fitness, and lose weight. 
• Choose a muscle to focus on: chest, biceps, triceps, abdomen, legs, quads, shoulders, back, glutes, and more. Exercises available for all muscle groups.
• Pick your equipment, such as barbell, dumbbells, kettlebells, machines and more. You can filter the exercises by equipment.

GYM WORKOUT PLANNER & TRACKER
The most straightforward, intuitive, and customizable Gym Workout Tracker App ever developed. 
• Track your own workout routines with this Gym Workout Tracker App.
• Over 500 exercises with instructions.
• Log your sets, reps count, lifting weights, and rest time. 
• History and charts to see the progress of your exercises, sets, reps and lifting weights.

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AI) FOR YOUR TRAINING SESSIONS

• Our Personalized Workout Plan uses artificial intelligence (AI) to optimize your results. 
• Receive smart recommendations for exercises, sets, reps, weight lifting, rest time, and more. 
• Track muscle recovery and find out which muscle you should train. See exercises recommendations for those muscle group.
• Track your training sessions and generate insights with progress charts and statistics.

TRACK DIFFERENT TYPES OF TRAINING

• Intense workouts, like weightlifting, strength training, calisthenics, HIIT, and bodybuilding. 
• Home workout routines or gym workouts. 
• Bodyweight exercises, such as calisthenics, home workout, cardio exercises, and HIIT. 
• Different workout routines like push/pull/legs, full body, and cardio. 

AMAZING FEATURES
• Workout Tracker
• Fitness Plan & Workout Routines
• Muscle Recovery
• Exercises Guide
• Filter Exercises by Equipments and Muscle Group

Whether at the Gym, at Home, or Outdoors, you'll achieve fantastic results using Gym WP. 

✅ Install this Gym Workout Tracker App now and start your fitness journey.

CONTACTS
• 
• 
• 
•

title: Brainstorming
description:
Brainstorming assists you with your creative process by allowing you to interact with your thought hierarchy in a very intuitive and engaging way. Discover thematic clouds automatically generated by artificial intelligence from your initial subject. Harness a popular process and get relevant context suggestions. Discover nouns, verbs, adverbs, adjectives and antonyms. Add your own images, sketches, voice memos and URL links. Browse cultural references such as movies and TV shows, art history or even Wikipedia articles. Your only limit is your creativity !

Keep your Brainstormings forever by creating a free account, so you can share them with your friends and colleagues, open and edit them without limit. Search and discover our community's public Brainstormings to gather fresh ideas and share yours.

Creative investigations, catchphrases, names, themes... Simplify and streamline your Brainstormings !

Subscribe to Brainstorming Premium for 1,99$/month to enjoy :

 • Unlimited Brainstorming projects
 • Unlimited number of levels in your Brainstorming projects
 • Adding artificial intelligence powered suggestions, images and art references
 • Exporting and sharing your Brainstorming projects as images, videos or PDF.

This monthly

title: Portugal Chat: Meet Match Date
description:
Are you attracted to Portuguese people or are you looking to meet people in Portugal? We have a great new app for you.

Portugal Social is the best free dating app to connect with Portuguese singles or to meet Portuguese singles from around the world. Portugal Social is a great way to meet people around you in Portugal, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. Whether you are looking to see Portuguese girls or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Portugal, Portugal Social will have someone for you!

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes Portugal Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete itself forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. Want to help break the ice? Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: READO - All About Books
description:
Manage your library, discover new reads, explore reviews, and connect with an active community of passionate readers.

Whether you’re looking for your next favorite book or simply want to keep track of what you read — with READO, your entire reading world is always with you.

⸻

What Makes READO Special

SocialReads
Experience books together with others. With page-based, spoiler-free comments, you can share your thoughts as you read and see how others experience the same moments.

Detailed Book Attributes
Rate books beyond stars. Describe how a story feels — from pacing to mood — and discover books that truly match your taste.

Motivating Reading Stats
Track how much you read, when you read, and which genres captivate you most. READO turns your reading habits into inspiring insights.

Community & Reviews
Join discussions, explore book lists, and browse authentic reviews from other readers.

Goodreads / Library Import
Import your entire Goodreads library into READO and keep all your books, ratings, and progress in one place.

title: StudyX: AI Homework Helper
description:
StudyX - AI Homework Helper & Note App
Struggling with homework? Meet StudyX — your AI homework helper that solves any homework question instantly, summarizes notes, prepares for exams, and boosts your grades! Join 10M+ students to study smarter across all subjects!

► ALL-IN-ONE STUDY AI – EVERYTHING YOU NEED IN ONE APP
No more switching between apps. StudyX combines essential tools into one:

Whether it's a math word problem, a long lecture, or AP prep, StudyX is your go-to AI helper for fast, accurate, and personalized academic help. 

What can you do with StudyX?

Type, upload a PDF, or take a photo — math, science, or more — and get accurate solutions. Turn YouTube videos, lecture recordings, textbooks, PDFs, or slides into clean, editable notes in under 30 seconds. Ideal for exam help, SAT prep, or building your own study guide.

Not just an AI for homework — StudyX is your personal AI tutor. Ask follow-up questions to explore difficult concepts, receive similar examples, and better understand every step. Whether you're solving math equations, reviewing science problems, or tackling English homework, StudyX helps you master each topic with confidence.

From Math AI to Biology answers, Chemistry solvers to English essay helpers, this answer AI covers every subject. Get instant answers plus web results, academic papers, tutorial videos, and more. It's like having a full school toolbox—including math picture solver, physics solver, and geometry calculator—in your pocket.

► SHARE, EXPORT & STAY ORGANIZED – STUDY YOUR WAY

- Social Science: Law, Psychology, Sociology, Political Science, Education …and more!
Whether it’s a quick homework help, deep concept review, quiz practice, scanning math pictures, writing suggestion, or summarize help—you’ll find what you need.

► DOWNLOAD STUDYX TODAY

Everything you need — in one powerful app.

title: AI Voice to Text AI Note Taker
description:
Renote: AI Note Taker, Transcribe Voice to Text & AI Notebook – Powered by GPT-5 & Gemini 3 Pro!

Renote is an all-in-one AI Note Taker and AI Assistant that helps you transcribe voice to text, organize ideas, and generate AI notes in seconds. Turn meetings, lectures, and recordings into a smart, searchable notebook with accurate STT transcription and instant AI summaries—so you work smarter, learn faster, and never miss a key point.

No more replaying audio. No more messy notes. Just clear, structured productivity with Renote.

🔑 Core Features
🎙️ AI Voice to Text & Transcription
Just speak naturally—Renote transcribes audio to text in real time, converting voice recordings into accurate transcripts using AI Notes Voice to Text AI Chat, powered by Gemini 3 Pro & GPT-5. Unlike traditional tools such as Plaud, Renote doesn’t just transcribe—it organizes and integrates your content into a living knowledge base.

✨ AI Voice Summary
Long recordings? No problem. With the new AI Summary, Renote can generate structured summaries from long audio in seconds. Instantly transform meeting recordings into action points, interview audio into organized notes, or lectures into concise study materials. Ideal for professionals writing meeting minutes or year-end summaries, and students preparing for exams.

🤖 AI Voice Chat
Want to refine or expand a thought? Speak or type to Renote—its AI Notes Voice to Text AI Chat, built on Gemini 3 Pro & GPT-5, offers context-aware suggestions, provides instant AI-generated transcripts, and updates your knowledge base dynamically.

🗂️ Create & Manage Notes
Organize everything with tags and AI-powered transcription structuring. Whether you upload an audio file, dictate a meeting, or import a lecture recording, Renote automatically transcribes your content, updating your knowledge base instantly—making it a smarter alternative to Plaud and other transcription apps.

📑 Various Note Templates
Use ready-made templates for meetings, lectures, or personal goals. Each template integrates with AI transcription and real-time summaries, ensuring your multimodal knowledge base stays complete and well-organized.

🗃️ Handle Multiple Resources
Import PDFs, meeting recordings, voice memos, images, or slides. Renote transcribes, extracts, and merges everything into one intelligent, multimodal notebook—ready for quick search and review.

⚡ AI Note Summary
Too much text? Let Renote summarize your transcripts instantly. From long-form lectures to detailed meeting minutes, AI summary condenses it all while keeping key points intact.

📸 Scan Image to Text
Turn handwritten notes or slides into editable text. Renote uses OCR and transcription context to integrate them into your knowledge base, ready for quick review.

⚙️ Multimodal & AI-Powered
Renote is fully multimodal—voice, audio recordings, images, and text work together seamlessly. Built on Gemini 3 Pro & GPT-5, it delivers AI transcription, real-time summaries, and voice-to-text capabilities, updating your knowledge base at every step.

📌 Who Benefits from Renote?
✅ Professionals: Record meetings, interviews, or discussions and generate AI summaries for reports or year-end reviews.
✅ Students: Transcribe lectures, organize class notes, and prepare efficiently for finals.
✅ Researchers: Convert long interviews and audio materials into structured, searchable transcripts.
✅ Creators: Capture inspiration by voice and turn it into organized ideas instantly.

Renote AI Note Assistant empowers your workflow with advanced voice to text, AI transcription, and AI summaries, all built on GPT-5 & Gemini 3 Pro. Build, review, and expand your knowledge base with less effort and more clarity.

Download Renote now — the smarter way to transcribe, summarize, and organize your ideas with AI.

title: JyotishApp - Astrology Jyotish
description:
JyotishApp is a free, offline and Ad-less Vedic Astrology or Hindu Astrology or Jyotisha software application with PDF support.
NO PREDICTION: This App does not give any prediction.
The App supports voice commands. Generate horoscope using voice commands ( speech recognition ) without manually entering birth details.

The main features of JyotishApp are:
==============================
-- Generate detailed Horoscope or Kundli in South-Indian, North-Indian or East-Indian style.
-- Option to save complete Horoscope as PDF. Option to share Horoscope PDF using Gmail, WhatsApp, etc, directly from App.
-- Shodasha Varga (all 20 Varga) charts like Rashi, Navamsha, Hora, Drekkana, Chaturthamsha, Saptamsha, Dashamsha, Dwadashamsha, Shodashamsha, Vimshamsha, Chaturvimshamsha, Saptavimshamsha, Trimshamsha, Khavedamsha, Akshavedamsha, and Shashtyamsha.
-- Different Dasha systems like Vimshottari, Ashtottari, Yogini, Tribhagi and Chara Dasha. Dasha details up to Prana-antara Dasha.
-- Yogas, Shadbala, Bhava Bala and Vimsopaka Bala with graphical representation.
-- Ashtakavarga, Sarvashtakavarga and Bhinna Ashtakavarga of all Vargas. Trikona Shodhana, Ekadhipatya Shodhana and Shodhya Pinda.
-- Choose between True Nodes and Mean Nodes.
-- Support for different Bhava (House) systems like Placidus (KP), Equal Houses, Porphyry (Sripathi).
-- Panchang details like Tithi, Weekday, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Hindu Sunrise / Sunset, Ayana, Abhijit Muhurta, Amrit Kalam, etc., for any date and time.
-- Muhurta - Hora, Choghadiya, Chogadiya and Tamil Gowri Panchangam (Nalla Neram).
-- Gochar or Transit results of all the planets for all Rashi-Nakshatra.
-- Forecast based on Chandra-Bala, Tara-Bala, Guru-Bala and Gochara-Phala according to your Janma Rashi.
-- Horoscope or Kundali matching based on Ashta Kuta. Shows matching points of 8 Kutas, Varna Kuta, Vashya Kuta, Dina or Tara Kuta, Yoni Kuta, Graha Maitri Kuta, Gana Kuta, Rashi Kuta or Bhakuta and Nadi Kuta.
-- Has a Chart Widget which shows the position of planets for the current date, time and default place. This is used to analyze Gochara or Transit results.
-- Panchanga widget shows basic Panchang details along with current Hora.
-- JyotishApp requires permission to run at startup to load the Widget.
-- All the features of Jyotish App work offline and do not require internet connection.
-- The application contains longitude and latitude of more than 10000 Indian cities/towns and also major cities of other countries.
-- Unlike similar Astrology and Horoscope applications, Jyotish App is not only Free, but will not annoy you with any advertisements.
-- Krishnamurti paddhati ( KP ) chart, cusp, sub lord, sub-sub lord, planet and house significators. KP Horary / Prashna / Prasna Chart.
-- Ephemeris of planets and panchanga.
-- Mrityu Bhaga, Pushkaramsa, Pushkara Bhaga, Special Lagnas, Bhrigu Bindu, Yogi, Ava Yogi, Beeja, Kshetra Sphuta.
-- Aspect (western) on Planets and Bhava middle. KP Aspect on Planets and KP Cusp.
-- House rotation option for North-Indian charts.
-- Varshaphala (Tajaka) charts.
-- Five-Fold Planets Relationship, Planetary Avasthas, Navatara Chakra.
-- KP Nakshatra Nadi and 4-Step Signification.
-- An unsubscribed user can generate UNLIMITED PARTIAL horoscope PDF report. For UNLIMITED COMPLETE horoscope PDF report, please opt for yearly or half-yearly

title: Ping: AI To‑Do & Reminders
description:
Ping is the fastest way to capture tasks. 
Talk, star an email, or snap a photo – Ping’s AI instantly turns it into a clear to-do with title, due date, reminder and a short action summary. See tasks on your calendar, get smart reminders, and manage work solo or with your team. 

Capture with AI 
• Voice / Dictation → Task: Just speak. Dictate your to-do or use voice input – AI sets the title, date and reminder automatically. 
• Speech-to-text capture: Turn quick voice notes into tasks instantly. 
• Gmail → Task: Star an email and get a task with a clean title and AI summary. 
• Photo / Screenshot → Task: Turn WhatsApp messages, notes and screenshots into actions. 

Plan & execute 
• Calendar sync: Deadlines appear in Google Calendar. 
• Smart reminders & snooze: Nudges that adapt to your day. 
• Tags, checklists & recurring tasks: Stay organized and automate routines. 
• Projects & Kanban boards: Plan work, assign tasks and track progress. 
• Collaboration: Share lists, mention teammates and move faster together. 
• Integrations: ChatGPT and Slack to capture tasks where you talk. 
• Cross-platform: iOS, Android, Mac and Windows. 

Who it’s for 
Ping works in Simple mode (personal to-do list) and Advanced mode (projects, boards, collaboration). Perfect for quick capture and powerful enough for small teams.
short_description: AI task list. Create tasks from voice, emails & screenshots. Sync with Calendar.
recent_changes_text: Bug fixes and improvements

title: Inoreader: News & RSS reader
description:
Take back control of your newsfeed and filter out the noise! With Inoreader, information comes straight to you the minute it’s available.

Follow your favorite websites, content creators, newsletters, and social media feeds. Discover and collect articles from across the web, share and collaborate with others. No more algorithms and editorial picks – you decide what’s important to you. Read or listen on the go, mark the essential bits and customize your view for the best experience. Use our advanced features to set up powerful automation and let Inoreader do the work!

-----

“Inoreader offers a well-designed interface, good search and discovery options, and a nice set of features that are beginner-friendly and offer plenty of options for advanced users.” – WIRED

“If you're feeling media burnout from overfed social feeds, Inoreader is a news tool that still sparks joy. It's a research tool, intelligence briefing portal, and social media filtration system.” – CNET

“Inoreader is one of the most feature-packed free RSS readers. A great tool for power users, but it's very accessible for beginners as well.” – Zapier

-----

DISCOVER AND SHARE GREAT CONTENT

• Follow your favorite websites, blogs, and creators
• Collect articles from across the web and save them for future reading
• Subscribe to newsletters with custom emails and declutter your inbox
• Explore collections curated by our team to feature the best sources
• Monitor Facebook pages, Reddit feeds, and Telegram channels
• Subscribe to YouTube channels and listen to podcasts
• Easily distribute content across social media and messaging apps
• Stay up to date with breaking news and create monitoring feeds

BECOME A MINDFUL READER

• Use automation tools to create rules and filter content
• Enhance your reading experience with custom layouts and themes
• Curate your own content with folders and tags
• Annotate the essential bits and keep them forever
• Highlight keywords to speed up your reading
• Translate articles in your language without additional extensions
• Load and keep the full content of articles without leaving the app
• Listen to the news on the go with our text-to-speech feature
• Download articles for offline reading
• Save to Pocket, Evernote, OneNote, Google Drive, and Dropbox

-----

Inoreader Pro is available with an annual

title: Luzia: Your Virtual Coach
description:
Luzia is the Artificial Intelligence at your service. She helps you to become aware at times when you don't have anyone to talk to and you need a helping hand, that is able to look at your problems with perspective.
It will help you reflect with questions, exercises and inductions. And above all, it will make you discover the magic of Prosperity and balance in different areas of your life.

Luzia is completely confidential, your identity will remain anonymous and your conversations are protected. It is a conversational platform that uses Artificial Intelligence to respond to the emotions you express.

What can you do with Luzia? 🤗

👉 Unburden yourself whenever daily problems overwhelm you
👉 Express your feelings and vision regarding your relationships, fears and concerns
👉 Find possibilities and alternatives to your problems
👉 You will achieve peace and relaxation in times of crisis
👉 Practical exercises to train your emotional intelligence
👉 Challenge your negative thoughts
👉 Take your place in life with a definite purpose
👉 Strategies to achieve your goals
👉 Improve your self-esteem and personal confidence
👉 Manage stress and anxiety
👉 Improve your mood
👉 Emotional support
👉 Speak from heart to heart and express what you feel to manage daily stress, anguish and stress

Luzia helps you in the following Areas, so that your life is in balance and you enjoy prosperity:

🌟 Personal Development
🌟 Relations with your Family
🌟 Couple Relationships
🌟 Relationship with your body and health
🌟 Profession and Money
🌟 Relationship with your friends
🌟 Relationship with enjoyment
🌟 Relationship with yourself
🌟 Relationship in service to humanity

Luzia is full of tools that will help you on a personal level and in all your relationships, through reflection and practice.
You will learn through dialogue, questions, key exercises and the interactions with Luzia.

If you want to improve your quality of life and achieve balance and inner peace, you will get training step by step to achieve your personal growth.

With exercises to manage emotions from emotional cognitive psychology and brief therapy.
You will be able to train yourself and achieve your goals. We have a holistic and comprehensive approach to life coaching.

We use Cognitive Behavioral Therapy tools, positive psychology, Gestalt, Adlerian Psychotherapy, Logotherapy, Life Coaching, NLP, Systemic, among others.
short_description: Get to know yourself and learn to manage your emotions

title: Link2Home Pro
description:
At Link2Home, we make products that are attractive, helpful and easy to use and our app enhances this experience.  

Control your Link2Home devices, switch on and off your sockets, see inside and outside your home with our cameras, control your environment with our lights and receive alerts from our doorbells and never miss a visitor. Receive notifications on your phone or tablet whenever motion is detected from an applicable device.  

Link2Homes, smart function and the location of your phone allow you to do the right thing automatically, turning on the lights when you arrive home using your location, send alerts through the app and via text when motion is detected and much much more…

  Link2Home Cameras Indoor and Outdoor

 The security cameras that let you see your home on your phone, inside and out.

  - Receive alerts when there's activity and respond to get someone's attention. (alarm* and two way audio)
 - See what you've missed with snapshots of previous activity 
- Check in anytime with clear 1080p HD video  
- Record video straight to memory card**, the cloud*** or your device when using the app  

Link2Home Doorbells  

See who’s knocking.  

- 24/7 video streaming means that you’ll never miss a moment.
 - See what you've missed with snapshots of previous activity
 - Notifies you about visitors, even if they don’t ring the bell.
 - HD Talk and Listen lets you have a seamless conversation with someone at your door.  

Link2home lights  

Control your lighting though voice and in app  

- Turn your lights on and off, dim and change the colour 
- Set scenes for quick changes such as “movie time” or “work time”
 - Make sure the lights are off when not at home or activate lights through the smart function or with timers for extra automation and security  

Some features require a working Internet connection, and Wi-Fi
 
*alarm function available on floodlight camera devices
**memory card no included
*** cloud storage is additional purchase through the app

GPTalk AI Chat Bot is developed on the powerful fusion of GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, and Gemini 3.0 Pro. We support an unparalleled model ecosystem: DeepSeek R1, Claude 4.5, Grok 4.1, DeepSeek V3.2, and Qwen3. GPTalk is the definitive multi-modal reasoning model agent—not just ChatGPT—but a superior, All-in-one AI Generator experience providing elite tools and expert chat.

GPTalk AI Chat is a top-ranked intelligent friend client developed with VIDEOSHOW AI Chat Generator capabilities, leveraging OpenAI Service & GPT-5.2’s latest chatbot technology in a friendly and expert manner. Its advanced natural language processing, built on GPT-5.2 & GPT-4o & Gemini, ensures natural and intuitive responses.

🎨 All-in-One AI Generator: Nano Banana Pro, Flux & Sora
Unleash boundless creativity. GPTalk is the ultimate All-in-one AI Generator, driven by the industry’s most potent media models:

AI Photo Generator: Generate stunning, high-fidelity visuals using Nano Banana Pro Image and Flux. Produce everything from photorealistic portraits to abstracts instantly.

Sora AI Video Generation: Transform simple text prompts into dynamic, cinematic videos using the groundbreaking Sora AI Video capability.

AI Music: Easily compose unique music.

💖 Soulful AI Mate & AI Character
GPTalk transcends utility to become your Soulful AI Mate and AI Companion.

AI Friend & Character: Choose your AI Character for engaging interaction. Your AI Mate is available 24/7 as an empathetic listener and fun role-play partner.

Personalized Conversation: Built on the empathy of GPT-4o and Gemini, your AI Companion learns from every interaction, providing personalized emotional support and companionship that feels genuinely human.

Entertainment & Daily Fun: Your AI Friend can joke, role-play, recommend movies or music, or simply keep you company with expressive, emotionally rich conversation. AI Characters make interaction playful and personal.

🎓 AI Study Companion & Deep Reasoning
Powered by DeepSeek R1, GPT-5.2, and Gemini 3.0 Pro, GPTalk is your expert learning partner.

Smart Learning Assistant: Helps you master concepts, tackle complex coding challenges, and practice clear reasoning.

title: GitMind: AI Mind Mapping App
description:
GitMind is an AI-powered mind mapping tool built on cutting-edge AI models like GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek R1, and more. It seamlessly transforms text, videos, articles, audio, PDFs, PPTs, websites, and images into concise summaries and intuitive mind maps. Featuring an AI chatbot, copilot, advanced search features, and realistic AI image generator, GitMind simplifies complex information and empowers you to work smarter and faster.

GitMind is ideal for note-taking, schedule planning, brainstorming, decision-making, and project management. Easily create outlines, to-do lists, and project plans while syncing your ideas seamlessly across devices. Whether you are an educator, student, or professional, GitMind turns every piece of content into a dynamic visual map, sparking creativity and boosting productivity anytime, anywhere.

💡 AI Features
• Youtube Video Summarizer: Extract subtitles, distinguish speakers, and summarize videos into mind maps with key insights.
• Text Summarizer: Simplify lengthy text into clear, structured summaries for quick understanding.
• Article Summarizer: Summarize articles and blogs into well-organized mind maps.
• PDF Summarizer: Extract essential points from PDFs and transform them into structured visual maps.
• Audio Summarizer: Transcribe audio to text and summarize recordings into easy-to-read notes and mind maps.
• Image Summarizer: Use OCR to extract text from images and summarize key information into structured content.
• Website Summarizer: Summarize entire web pages into organized mind maps for quick insights.
• Prompt to Mind Map: Enter any idea or topic, and GitMind will instantly generate a detailed outline and mind map.
• AI Chatbot: Upload PDFs or images to ask questions directly.
• AI Search: Find the most relevant and up-to-date information with AI-powered smart search.
• AI Image Generator: Generate high-quality AI images from text to visually enhance your mind maps and presentations.

Other Features
• Presentation Mode: Seamlessly present your mind maps with a structured, engaging slideshow, perfect for meetings, lectures, and brainstorming sessions.
• Premade Templates & Themes: Access a variety of professionally designed templates and themes to quickly create visually appealing mind maps.
• Advanced Formatting Options: Customize fonts, colors, sizes, and backgrounds to tailor your mind maps to your style and needs.
• Insert Stickers & Illustrations: Enrich your mind maps with icons, stickers, and illustrations to enhance visualization and creativity.
• Find & Locate Text: Quickly search and locate specific words or phrases within your mind maps for easy editing and navigation.
• Share & Collaborate: Share your mind maps via links, invite teammates for real-time collaboration, and work seamlessly across multiple devices.

🚀 Use Cases
• AI-Powered Summary
Summarize articles, videos, websites, PDFs, and audio into structured mind maps, outlines, and key takeaways. Use AI Chat to refine ideas and boost comprehension.
• Brainstorming & Idea Generation
Convert fleeting thoughts into structured mind maps, notes, concept maps, whiteboards, and slides. Use AI-generated mind maps for fresh ideas, and chat with AI to refine concepts.
• Project & Business Planning
Visualize tasks, streamline workflows, and break down projects into clear, actionable steps. Use tree charts, fishbone diagrams, and timelines for structured planning.
• Study & Research
Organize notes, create study guides, and boost learning retention with interactive mind maps. Ideal for students, researchers, and educators.
• Task & Life Organization
Manage to-do lists, schedules, and daily plans with customizable mind maps. Sync ideas across devices and collaborate in real time.

title: Ezlogz: ELD & Truck Navigation
description:
Ezlogz ELD app is designed for truck drivers so they could think less about receipts, paths, inspections, Hours of Service (or just HOS), and concentrate on the road.

What is Ezlogz and how can it help you as a truck load driver? It's a digitized driver’s logbook where you don’t need to spend much time writing something down. The first and one of the most important functions is GPS which will help you to plan your route. All sorts of timers that will keep a driving log and give information to a trucker about every minute HOS, ELD timer. The easiest way to install Electronic Logging Device (ELD, eld device, or E-Log) on the market. Ezlogz ELD app will inform truckers about HOS violations with a smart alert system. Also, you can create a DVIR where you have all the tools to describe what you need and an electronic signature to prove that it’s valid. Points of interest that will help you with your road trip. On detailed maps you will find rest stops, gas stations, hotels, travel centers, truck parking, weigh stations, and even road conditions. The review system will tell you what place is better.

Ezlogz’s mission is to provide the best ELD service with all features that are essential to fleet management:

Electronic Logging Device | EzSmart ELD
* FMCSA certified ELD
* Hours of Service (HOS) violation alerts
* Truck GPS navigation
* Trip planner
* Upgraded IFTA reports
* Electronic DVIR
* Document scan, attach BOL
* No renting fees and no additional payments

AI Chatbot I EzChatAI
* Answer questions about Hours of Service (HOS), drivers' logbook, Electronic Logging Device (ELD), and other questions related to driver's work
* Notify the driver about missing data in their ELD or HOS logbook, driving condition changes, etc.
* Real-time weather, traffic, and route information to help drivers make informed decisions on the road
* Reduce costs by automating and optimizing logistics-related processes
* Improve productivity, efficiency, and safety on the road
* Technical support to drivers
* Emotion recognition and personalized recommendations
* Natural language processing and voice commands
* Analyze drivers' behavior. Export analytics
* Possibility of integrating with CRM systems
* User verification

Dashcam | EzSmartCam
* Real-time GPS tracking
* Fix risky or distracted driving instantly with audio
short_description: Truck driver tools: Maps, GPS, rest stops, logbook, booking loads and more.
recent_changes_text: Ezlogz is thrilled to announce about new App version 2.0! We’ve upgraded the mobile app with the modernized and optimized platform to provide more stability for our users. Additionally, our update offers a renovated, user-friendly interface as well as more advanced and useful features!

title: Ukraine Social Meet Ukrainians
description:
Let's begin your online dating journey with Ukraine Social. Ukraine Social is a new and cool dating app that are looking for amusing, marvelous single Ukrainian men and women who are looking to find the perfect mate in Ukraine. Ukraine Social is a user-friendly app that helps you interact, meet, date amazing single men and women in Ukraine.

Introducing Our AI Assistant! Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.
1. AI IceBreaker:
- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.
2. AI AboutMe:
- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile. 

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes Ukraine Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video-based social app because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. We are also introducing our newest feature Flash Chat. With flash chat, you send pictures, videos, or even audio clips that will delete itself forever after you set the timer. It’s a really fun and cool feature. 

Love to meet new people, make friends, or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. Want to help break the ice? Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos, and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

Our Features?

- private inbox with photo, video, and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: MedIQ Smart Healthcare
description:
Going Beyond Physical Hospitals with Digital, Virtual, and Hybrid Care
MedIQ Smart Healthcare is a hybrid healthcare platform that connects digital health services with a nationwide network of hospitals, pharmacies, and laboratories across Pakistan. We enable users to access healthcare through both online services and physical walk in visits, offering flexibility, convenience, and continuity of care.
All medical services are delivered by licensed healthcare professionals and registered partner institutions.
What MedIQ Helps You Do
Medication Fulfillment Support
MedIQ enables users to place requests for prescription-based and over the counter medicines through verified partner pharmacies. Users may choose home delivery or visit partner pharmacies directly. All medications are dispensed by licensed pharmacies in accordance with applicable regulations.
Lab and Diagnostic Service Booking
Users can book laboratory and diagnostic services offered by partner laboratories. Sample collection may be available at home or at physical lab locations, depending on service availability. All testing is performed by certified laboratories and trained professionals.
Corporate and Insurance Utilisation Support
For eligible corporate and insured users, MedIQ supports digital tracking and record keeping of healthcare utilisation and approved benefits. The platform helps organise service usage information and does not make medical or financial approval decisions.
Payment Convenience
MedIQ supports multiple payment options including mobile wallets, debit cards, credit cards, online bank transfers, and cash on delivery. Cashless services may be available for users covered under participating corporate or insurance programs.
Personal Health Records Storage
Users can securely store and access their personal medical documents and records within the application. Records can be shared with healthcare providers at the user’s discretion. MedIQ does not interpret or analyse medical records for clinical purposes.
Informational Health Summaries
The platform may display general, non diagnostic summaries and usage insights related to healthcare services accessed through MedIQ. This information is provided for informational and administrative purposes only.
Customer Support
MedIQ provides customer support to assist users with service coordination, bookings, account related queries, and general platform assistance.
Important Medical Disclaimer
MedIQ Smart Healthcare does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical decision-making. The application is intended for healthcare access, coordination, and record management only. All medical services are provided by independent licensed healthcare professionals and registered partner institutions. Users must consult a qualified healthcare professional for any medical concerns, diagnosis, or treatment decisions.

title: Grammarly-AI Writing Assistant
description:
Edit and correct your grammar, spelling, punctuation, and more with your personal writing assistant, grammar checker, and editor.

The Grammarly writing app and proofreader allows you to write clearly, confidently, and mistake-free in all your apps. Advanced features such as the AI-powered rewrite tool help you enhance your vocabulary, spell check words, and improve your writing - from emails to social media posts.

Grammarly grammar checker and editor - how does it work?

Simply download Grammarly and start typing in any app. Grammarly will check each word, your grammar, spelling, punctuation, and tone, and help you improve your communication skills.

Whether you’re typing emails on the go, editing an important LinkedIn post, sending a text message, or composing an essential tweet, the Grammarly writing assistant and grammar checker lets you spell check, correct, edit and perfect your message from your mobile device with confidence.

Leveraging the power of generative AI, Grammarly allows you to easily rewrite your messages by composing new versions for you to choose from. Simply select the rewrite option that makes your writing more descriptive, confident, formal - and much more! 

Grammarly works with any Android keyboard, such as Gboard or SwiftKey, so you’ll never have to switch keyboards when you

title: Learn to Read - Readability
description:
Discover the ultimate reading app for kids in Kindergarten, 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, and 6th grades. Readability is the top-rated AI-powered reading tutor designed to dramatically improve reading fluency, vocabulary, and comprehension skills.

Our advanced Smart Reading Program uses cutting-edge speech recognition and AI technology to make learning to read enjoyable and highly effective. Perfect for 1st grade reading up through 6th grade reading.

🚀 Key Features of Your Personal Reading Tutor

 Guided Oral Reading with Real-Time AI: Watch your child excel! The app encourages your child to read aloud while our advanced AI instantly corrects pronunciation. This makes learning how to read fun and interactive.
 Interactive Voice-based Questions & Answers (IVQA™): Boost reading comprehension! IVQA™ offers 1-on-1 comprehension checks where your child responds verbally to questions, fostering critical thinking and deeper understanding.
 Personalized Vocabulary Builder: Easily expand your child’s word list. Long-press any word while reading to get the pronunciation and meaning, and add it to a personal list for review.
 Tailored Learning for Every Grade: We automatically select suitable reading materials spanning Kindergarten through 6th grade levels, ensuring the content is always challenging but never overwhelming.

📊 Empowering Parent Dashboard
Stay fully informed about your child's reading progress! The dedicated Parent Dashboard allows you to easily track:

 Total time spent reading
 Accuracy and reading duration
 Comprehension scores and progress across all grade levels
 Customizable reading schedule

📚 What Sets Readability Apart?
While other reading apps offer games or simple phonics drills, Readability provides a unique, comprehensive learning to read experience with individualized attention:

 Real-Time Reading Help: True AI 1-on-1 tutoring that instantly corrects and supports.
 Engaging Leveled Books: Vibrant, grade-level stories with captivating illustrations.
 Flexibility: Up to 3 Kids per
