title: Bottled - Message in a Bottle
description:
Make friends, chat, and have fun with penpals from all over the world.
Share what’s on your mind
* Write a message, put it in a bottle & throw it in the sea for someone to find!
* Meeting new friends and finding support has never been so simple 
* Hop aboard our growing community of over 3.5M users 
Bottled is building a positive and supportive community, away from the toxicity prevalent in Social Media.

Try the modern version of sending a message in a Bottle - a new way to meet people, have fun, and have meaningful conversations! 

This is how it works:

1) You write a nice message, put it in a bottle, and throw it to the sea. Your bottle will be randomly received by someone, somewhere in the world.
2) If that person decides to keep the bottle, you have a new friend and you can start chatting with each other! 
3) And if your message gets released, your bottle will float back into the sea to be received by another random stranger! 

On Bottled you can: 
- Send a photo, voice, or text message to someone somewhere in the world. 
- Follow the journey of your Bottles in real time 
- Play "Spin the Bottle" for fun questions and challenges and chat with your new friends from all over the world!

Don't know where to start? Let our "ChatGPT powered" Cheeky Captain help you write a nice message!

Whether you are looking for a new friend, a penpal, positive support, or a genuine intellectual connection, let serendipity decide your chance encounters with Bottled! 

Slowly or instantly, you chat at your own pace and without pressure; improve your wellbeing and mental health on this supportive community. *** If you need assistance, do not hesitate to

★ Auto-reply to Viber messages

title: Rithmm: AI Sports Betting
description:
Rithmm: The AI Platform for Smarter Sports Betting

Smarter bets. Faster research. Less guesswork. The power of AI meets sports 
betting.

Rithmm is the AI sports betting app built for bettors who want a real edge across player props, game picks, parlays, and DFS lineups — covering NFL, NBA, college football, college basketball, and more.

Designed to support a simple, fast, and repeatable betting process, Rithmm delivers data-backed predictions that adapt to your betting style, so you can bet with information instead of instinct.

—----
NEW: AI PARLAY BUILDER AND BETSLIP
 
Your parlays deserve a second opinion. 

Rithmm’s AI Parlay Builder reviews every pick in your parlay or combo and automatically identifies weak or risky legs before you place the bet.

How it works:

- Parlay Pieces highlights bets Rithmm recommends as part of a parlay 
- Add any number of picks to your parlay or combo
- Rithmm’s AI scans each leg for model strength and recent performance
- If a leg is weak or risky, it’s flagged automatically
- When a stronger alternative exists, Rithmm suggests an AI-approved swap
- Send the optimized parlay to your sportsbook or trading platform with one tap

If you’ve ever searched for a parlay calculator, combo builder, or parlay builder to double-check your picks, this is built for you — with real analysis behind it.

—----
WHY BETTORS CHOOSE RITHMM

> Smart Signals (Exclusive to Rithmm)

Our AI identifies repeatable patterns where models perform best and surfaces them daily — giving you high-confidence picks with proven predictive accuracy.

> AI Picks and Player Prop Predictions

Get instant, AI-powered betting predictions tailored to your strategy. Rithmm’s proprietary models analyze player and team performance, injuries, and conditions to help you make smarter bets — delivering personalized AI picks built around your style.
> The Power of AI Betting Predictions

If you like apps like HOF Bets, Linemate, or Outlier for their stats and trend data, you’ll love Rithmm. We go further — providing AI predictions for every player and every game, plus access to our network of over a million predictive models. Copy top-performing models or let Rithmm’s AI work in the background to surface the best plays through Smart Signals.

> Custom Models, Built Your Way

Use Rithmm’s data-scientist models or create your own. Adjust factors, weight metrics, and design your strategy — your model, your edge.

> Track & Refine Performance
Rithmm doesn’t just predict — it helps you improve. Track your performance, analyze ROI by sport or bet type, and fine-tune your strategy over time.

—----

SPORTS COVERED
NFL • NBA • CFB • CBB • MLB • WNBA • Golf

TRY FREE FOR 7 DAYS
Join thousands using Rithmm’s AI betting predictions to find edges and bet smarter.
Start your free 7-day trial today.

title: AVR Tutorial
description:
This app is a AVR tutorial based on ATMEGA16 C language. It is suitable for hobbyist or engineering students.

Learning AVR mcu is difficult. The learning curve is steep. The process including reading datasheet, writing code, building prototypes and troubleshooting. The most possible errors are the setting wrong value of registers.

Now, AVR tutorial is the solution. The code wizard allow you to set the timer, UART, ADC, interrupt and peripherals by just a few clicks in setting. The proven C source code is generated automatically. 

Though the code wizard is based on ATMEGA16 , it is easy to port to other ATMEGA since the source code generated is highly structured

Features
• AVR architecture review
• AVR asm mnemonics & C lanugage
• 21 demo projects including led, keys, keypad, 16x2 LCM, ADC etc
• Code wizard for UART, timer, interrupt, ADC and external peripherals including LED, buzzer, key switch, external interrupt, 7-segment display, 8x8 led matrix, 4x4 keypad, 16x2 LCM, real time clock etc

Features Pro
• Support I2C eeprom 24C01 (128B) ~ 24C512 (64kB)
• Support SPI eeprom 25010 (128B) ~ 25M02 (256kB)
• Extra demo projects including LED Matrix 16x16, i2c eeprom, spi eeprom, etc
• Code wizard for I2C eeprom, SPI eeprom, LCM 128x64 etc

Optional Demo
* OLED 128x64
* TFT 220x176
* MPU6050 (accel + gyro) sensor
* 18B20 temperature sensor
* DFPlayer mp3 module
* SPI flash 
* Stepper motor
* Servo motor
* Home automation using bluetooth

Note :
1. For those who need support please email to the designated email.
Do NOT use either the

title: Pair: Find, Make friends. Chat
description:
Pair is one of the dating apps where you can both find love and make new friends. Meet new people, chat with soulmates, or go on a date with Pair!

Rest from fruitless swipes & make friends nearby. Find a person that will cause you goosebumps. Find local friends or local dating. Pair is an app for mature dating and making friends. It’s created to help you enjoy the moments of meeting new people online!

Enjoy online dating & meeting new people. Make friends & have fun!

AI Recommendation
Unlike dating apps, we would not abandon you to sort through all of the individuals manually without AI features. Based on your interests & picks, an artificial intelligence recommendation will propose to you local people who have met the criteria essential to you.

24/7 Moderation
Securely chat & make new friends while our moderators weed out fakes & review profiles for inappropriate adult content. From chatting & friendship to romantic relationships - Pair app will fulfill your desires!

S&P Mode
Add a bit of fate to your chase with private mode, & act by using the speed mode, while sending winks & likes before starting to chat! Make friends & meet people easily.

Wide Audience
Looking for friends? Pair is one of the best chatting apps for female & male individuals. Our community welcomes everyone, regardless of gender, identity, & race.

Security
Being among the most trustworthy international dating apps, Pair makes sure every detail you share is secure behind layers of protection & remains confidential. Make friends without any worries.

VIP
To level up Pair into the exciting adventure of meeting new people, we offer a paid

title: EdrawMind: AI Mind map & Note
description:
EdrawMind is an AI-powered mind mapping tool that helping you generate mind maps and drawings from text, slides, or docs, and convert mind maps to slides, audio, or video. It aims at helping you draw professional-looking mind maps. You can quickly build your maps with built-in templates, and share them with others through images, and PDFs. 

**HOT** ▶BOOST YOUR PRODUCTIVITY WITH EDRAWMIND AI

[One-Click Mind Map]
● Visualize ideas and relationships easier with AI-powered mind mapping.
● Intelligent assistant auto-organizes your maps with one-tap.
[AI Summary]
● Automatically analyze, organize, and summarize file content and generate mind maps accordingly.
● Supported file formats include PPT, WORD, PDF, HTML, TXT, and Markdown.
[AI Mind Map to Poster]
● Instantly transform your mind map outline into stunning posters.
● Effortlessly customize poster themes to suit your preferences, with diverse styles from business to fashion, fresh to minimalistic.
[AI Drawing]
● Create stunning graphics with ease in seconds.
● Convert text into images and images into stunning works of art.

▶VISUALIZE IDEAS WITH MIND MAP EASILY
[Templates]
● Explore built-in professional templates and over 15,000 free user-shared templates to get inspired.
[Rich layouts & themes]
● Customize your mind maps with 22 layouts, 47 themes, 750+ cliparts, and hand-drawn effects.
[Structure]
● The right way to visualize your thoughts with 22 different structures including mind map, concept map, bubble map, brace map, sunburst chart, timeline, tree chart, fishbone diagram, org chart, gantt chart, spider diagram and family tree.
[Insert]
● Enrich a topic with image, audio note, equation, label, hyperlink, topic link, drawing, etc.
[Smart Formatting]
● Add, delete or move nodes and your map will automatically adjust.
[Outline mode]
● Edit mind maps in the form of structured text and faster navigate to specific sections.
[Equation/latex]
● Insert mathematics and chemical equations with latex.
[Audio note]
● Record creative ideas rapidly and never miss any important ideas.

▶ CREATE STUNNING MIND MAPS WITHOUT LIMITS
[Custom Themes]
● Customize mind maps and diagrams exactly how you want.
[Diversified Layouts]
● Professional types of layouts to help frame your ideas and simplify complex issues.
[Hand-drawn Style]
● Switch the mind map into the hand-drawn look with just a click.
[Colored Branch]
● Stimulate creativity with more rainbow color schemes.
[Stickers]
● Massive emoji icons and symbols to fit your needs.
[Cliparts]
● The 700+ ready-made cliparts make your mind maps more creative and aesthetic.

▶SAVE, SHARE AND PROTECT
[Import]
● MindManager, FreeMind, Lighten, MindNode, Markdown, OPML, TextBundle, and Word (DOCX Only).
[Export]
● PDF, PNG, Markdown, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OPML, TextBundle.
[File Sync]
● Your mind maps will be automatically synchronized to iCloud.
[Share]
● Share your mind map on social media or download as images.
[Password Protection]
● Password protect your mind maps and keep them unreadable and unusable unless get your permission.

▶SUBSCRIBE TO XMIND
The free version of EdrawMind Mind Map offers limited functions for basic users only. To create mind maps with full functions, you need to subscribe to the member service. 

You can find the

title: Notion: Notes, Tasks, AI
description:
Notion is an AI-powered all-in-one workspace that helps individuals and teams write notes, manage tasks, organize projects, and collaborate in one place. Whether you’re tracking personal to-do lists, writing and organizing class notes, or managing projects with a team, Notion helps users plan work, stay organized, and achieve goals.

"AI's everything app" — Forbes

Notion is a productivity app where you can write, plan, and organize your notes, projects, tasks and more. Ask Notion AI about project updates, upcoming tasks, and suggestions for a more streamlined workflow.

Simplify writing notes, project and task management, and collaboration. Whether for personal, student or professional use, Notion scales to meet your individual needs with customization tools for everyone.

NEW features:
• AI Meeting Notes: Perfect meeting memory. Your notetaker catches every detail and delivers actionable summaries, right where you work.
• Maps View: Turn databases into interactive maps. Use the new Place property to pin restaurants, trips, offices, clients, and more.

FREE FOR PERSONAL USE
Individuals manage day-to-day tasks, notes, and personal organization.
• Create as many notes, docs, and content as you want.
• Use one of thousands of templates to get started.

FREE TO TRY WITH YOUR TEAM
Teams run on Notion every day, from next-generation startups to established enterprises.
• Import Google Docs, PDFs, and other content types easily to get started
• Write and organize meeting notes, or transcribe with AI.
• Collaboration and team work at your fingertips, in one connected workspace.
• Connect tools like Figma, Slack, and GitHub to Notion.

FREE FOR STUDENTS
Students organize notes, assignments, and study plans in one place.
• Your study planner, class notes, to do lists and more, your way. Loved by millions of students worldwide.
• Get organized for your best school year yet with beautiful, customizable templates created by students, for students.

NOTES & DOCS
Communication is made efficient with Notion's flexible building blocks.
• Create docs with beautiful templates, images, to-dos, and 50+ more content types.
• Meeting notes, projects, design systems, pitch decks, and more.
• Find exactly what you need using Search with powerful filters to find content across your workspace.

TASKS & PROJECTS
Catch all details big and small in any workflow.
• Workflow manager: Create your own priority labels, status tags, and automations to choose the exact info you want to track.
• Capture every detail in a table. Break projects into manageable tasks to get the work done.

AI
One tool that does it all - search, generate, analyze, and chat - right inside Notion.
• Create notes. Transcribe meeting notes with AI.
• Turn databases into interactive maps. Use the new Place property to pin restaurants, trips, offices, clients, and more.
• Write better. Use Notion AI to help write and brainstorm.
• Get answers. Ask Notion AI questions about all your content and get answers in seconds.
• Autofill tables. Notion AI turns overwhelming data into clear, actionable information — automatically.

SYNCS WITH BROWSER, MAC, AND WINDOWS APPS.
• Pick up on mobile where you left off on desktop.

MORE PRODUCTIVITY. FEWER TOOLS.
• Track to-dos, write notes, create docs, and manage projects in one connected workspace.

THINK IT. MAKE IT.

title: DTO MTT - GTO Poker Trainer
description:
Elite poker players often turn to game theory to enhance their decision-making at the table. By leveraging advanced computer simulations, they strive to align their play with the principles of 'game theory optimal' (GTO) poker.

DTO Poker translates this sophisticated GTO research, conducted by top-tier poker pros, into an accessible format on your mobile device.

Here’s how DTO Poker can elevate your game:

• Immerse yourself in detailed MTT and SNG scenarios, honing your decision-making against GTO-based solutions.
• Craft specific scenarios to practice, with control over variables like stack sizes and table position.
• Each hand you play is graded, providing immediate

title: Tolkie - AI Virtual Assistant
description:
Meet Tolkie,
Tolkie is more than just an assistant - Tolkie is your friend!
You can have a real conversation with her!
But what's special about Tolkie?

We want Tolkie to be able to answer as many questions as possible and that's why we allow anyone to add questions To Tolkie's Global Vocabulary!
Additionally, Tolkie can also provide a response created by Chat GPT and thus answer complex requests such as: "Write a greeting for Mikel and Noah‘s 5th wedding anniversary" or "Create an image of parrots playing the violin on a rainy day".

Tolkie has several designs so you can choose the design you like best!

We added 21 facial expressions to Tolkie so she can express her feelings in a much more human way!
short_description: Your virtual assistant and best friend!

title: Fulcrum Mobility+
description:
Fulcrum Mobility+ provides a mobile workforce with the ability to capture data in the field and propagate that data anywhere within the enterprise. With real-time processing in both network and batch mode, field data collection can be completed without immediate cellular or Wi-Fi connectivity. Internal controls for management, optimization of assets and streamlined efficiencies via automation makes Fulcrum Mobility+ the premier choice in mobile data collection.

Highlights:
- Easy to use, clutter-free interace
- Integration with high-density barcode readers
- Driven by process-specific data collection templates
- Data collected in the field is immediately available for monitoring and reporting by the back office
short_description: The mobile data collection front-end for Fulcrum's Asset Management software.
recent_changes_text: - The successful transaction indicator has been made more prevalent.- The previous 'Toggle Batch Mode' slider menu item has been renamed to reflect the current state, and direct users to 'Toggle to Batch Mode' or 'Toggle to Network Mode'.- The previous 'Info' slider menu item has been renamed to 'App Info'.- The Task notifier on the slider menu has been changed to green from red.- The create connection feature now includes the option to 'ignore invalid ssl certs'.- Various bug fixes.

title: ytSocial – Grow Your Channel
description:
Every creator wants more people to discover their channel.
Do you want your videos to reach a larger audience and become more popular?

ytSocial helps creators connect with real people worldwide.
Your videos and channel are shared with others so they can discover your content. In return, you can also explore and support other creators. This way, you grow together – with real people who can choose to watch, like, or subscribe.

🌟 Why Choose ytSocial?
• Promote your videos and channel to a global community.
• Connect with real people, not bots.
• Get more visibility and grow your channel faster.
• 100% free to use – support others while growing your own channel.
• Perfect for new creators who want to reach monetization goals.

📌 Important Information
• ytSocial is a third-party application.
• ytSocial does NOT offer the ability to buy or sell subscribers, views, or likes. This is strictly against policy.
• We only provide a platform where you can share your videos and channel with other people.
• Users are free to watch, like, or subscribe to any channel or video they are interested in.

👉 Join thousands of creators already using ytSocial and grow your channel with real people and more reach!

title: Mysterious Tarot – AI Tarot
description:
Discover Mysterious Tarot — AI Tarot Readings You Can Hear and Feel

Get instant, accurate, spoken Tarot readings powered by advanced artificial intelligence.
Whether you’re just learning Tarot or reading professionally, Mysterious Tarot guides you with clarity, depth, and intuition.

Ask your question, choose your cards, and receive a fluent AI-generated Tarot interpretation with lifelike narration — no waiting, no confusion.

Explore the wisdom of all 78 Tarot cards, start your day with the Card of the Day, and gain fresh insight into love, career, and life decisions.

🔮 Why Mysterious Tarot?

• AI-powered Tarot interpretations that sound natural and human
• Audible Tarot readings you can listen to anytime
• A complete Tarot encyclopedia for learning and mastery
• Read with digital cards or your own physical Tarot deck
• Designed for clarity, reflection, and personal insight

✨ Free Features

• Available in English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, and Italian
• Rider–Waite & Tarot Marseille decks
• 10 Tarot spreads including Celtic Cross & Yes/No
• Reversed card meanings
• Tarot Card of the Day & Quote of the Day
• Save up to 40 readings
• Mystical background music
• Ad-supported free usage

🌙 Premium Experience

• Unlimited AI Tarot readings in 26 languages
• Create and save custom Tarot spreads
• 20+ advanced spreads in the Spread Library
• Zodiac compatibility & biorhythm analysis
• Advanced AI-powered Tarot & Astrology interpretations
• Birth Chart interpretation
• Daily Astrology Reading
• Weekly, monthly & yearly Astrological Forecasts
• Birth Chart Compatibility
• Guided meditations & personalization options

⚠️ Important Notice

Mysterious Tarot is intended for users 18+ and designed for entertainment, relaxation, and self-reflection.
All readings are generated by artificial intelligence and do not predict guaranteed outcomes.

📩 Support: 
📷 Instagram: 
🌐 Website: mysterioustarot.com

Endless thanks to our global community 🌙✨

title: SmartHQ
description:
Effortlessly control and monitor your smart appliances from GE Appliances, Profile, Café, Monogram, Fisher & Paykel, and Haier – all in one app. 

KEY FEATURES:
• REMOTE CONTROL – Monitor and control your appliances from anywhere, ensuring peace of mind and convenience. 
• VOICE INTEGRATION – Use your voice to manage your appliances with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant.
• STAY INFORMED - Receive timely notifications about your appliances, including alerts and updates.
• SOFTWARE UPDATES - Keep your appliances running smoothly with the latest software updates and access new features as they become available. 
• PERSONALIZED EXPERIENCE - Create shortcuts for frequently used functions and download new modes for your appliances. 
• MONITOR ENERGY & WATER USAGE - Gain insights into your appliance's energy and water consumption, helping you make informed choices. 
• ENHANCED COOKING EXPERIENCE - Generate cooking recipes using Flavorly AI. Monitor your oven's progress with the built-in camera and pair accessories such as smart cookware and probes. 
• CONVENIENT PRODUCT REGISTRATION - Register all your GE appliances, even non-Wi-Fi models, for quick access to manuals, specs, and support. 
• GET EXPERT HELP - Access the SmartHQ Assistant for answers to your appliance questions.
• PROACTIVE SERVICE - Receive service alerts when your appliance needs attention and use the diagnostics tool to troubleshoot issues.
• SCHEDULE SERVICE - Schedule a technician visit or access appliance support contact information. 

*Note: Features may vary depending on your appliance model and country of residence.

REMOTE CONTROL REQUIREMENTS: 
Requires a compatible SmartHQ-enabled appliance or SmartHQ Connect module. SmartHQ Connect modules can be purchased online: 

OPTIONAL APP PERMISSIONS: 
• Location, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth/BLE 
 - Used for commissioning nearby appliances. 
• Notifications 
 - Used for product updates and status notifications. 
• Camera/Media Files 
 - Used for Flavorly Picture to Recipe feature. 
 - To scan QR codes to add appliances. 
 - To scan product barcodes and provide recipes. 
• Precise Location 
 - Used for enabling Automation feature (i.e. Home/Away mode). 

Download SmartHQ today and unlock a world of connected convenience in your home!

title: AINote - Voice AI Chatbot
description:
Record your voice.
AINote will store and manage your precious memories.

We support the services below:

※ The chatbot Voice ChatGPT feature has been added.
AINote never saves chat conversations.
AINote utilizes the ChatGPT API, which is powered by OpenAI.

1. Voice memo
- Do you have something to note? Leave a voice memo right away!

2. My diary
- Now you can easily leave your precious diary with voice!

3. Todo list
- Now! Before you forget, leave a voice right away! Shh! If it's quiet, use a pen.

4. AI Translator
- Chat with people that speak foreign languages.
- AI Translator supports over 135 languages.
- Use AI Translator with iPhone as well as Android phone.

5. Companion Talk
- Non-disabled people and hearing-impaired people can communicate without knowing sign language.
- Use Companion Talk with iPhone as well as Android phone.

6. Widget supported
- Easily check your notes on the home screen.
---

Developer Contact :

title: Video Subtitle Generator
description:
Discover the "Video Translator for All Languages" app for easily translating and dubbing videos! 

Enjoy watching diverse content in any language you choose, and transform your videos into a global experience in just a few simple steps. Download the app now and share your experience with your friends and family.

Main Features: 
- Translate videos to any language: Convert videos into different languages and download the subtitles effortlessly. 
- Dub videos with audio: Add audio dubbing in any language and enjoy videos with professional dubbing. 
- Customize the display: Change fonts and adjust the text position on the screen for an enhanced viewing experience. 
- Stream translated videos on TV: Watch translated videos directly on your TV with adjustable font sizes. 
- Subtitle file support: Edit and customize subtitles in VTT format. 
- Advanced editing tools: Edit videos and subtitles for a perfect result. 
- Content management: Save videos and share them easily with your friends. 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

How does the app work? 

- Download the app from the Google Play Store. 
- Upload the video you want to translate and choose the desired language. 
- The app will automatically translate and dub the video in seconds using AI. 
- Customize the subtitles by changing fonts and positioning, or stream the video on your TV for an enhanced experience. 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Why is this app the best choice? 
- Superior accuracy: The app provides precise translations and dubbing using advanced AI technology. 
- High speed: Translate and dub videos at lightning speed without compromising quality. 
- Arabic language support: Enjoy a seamless experience with full Arabic language support and font customization. 
- Wide language options: Choose from a vast range of languages for translating and dubbing your videos. 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

How to get started: 

- Download the app: Get it now from the Google Play Store. 
- Create an account: Sign up for a new account or log in if you’re already a user. 
- Enjoy the features: Start using the app and explore a variety of amazing tools designed to meet your needs. 

Enjoy watching your favorite videos translated and dubbed in just seconds using AI! Download the app now and start your journey with instant video translation.

title: Brave Merge - Battle & Defense
description:
Win back your kingdom

🚨🧟‍♂️ IT’S A MONSTER EMERGENCY

The armies of the undead 💀 have invaded your kingdom, and it’s down to you to win back your lands village by village. Hire warriors and head into to battle with the zombie hordes to rid your realm of the undead scourge. Turn your army of simple peasant soldiers into an elite squad of mighty knights by merging them, unlock all sorts of village buildings to earn passive income as you progress through the game, and invest your gains back into defense of your realm in this colorful and entertaining adventure game that combines time management with strategy and combat.

⚔️ ARE YOU READY FOR BATTLE? ⚔️

🛡What heroes are made of: To beat the zombies in battle, you’ll need to level up fast. Hire new troops and merge them with other warriors of the same level to increase their combat effectiveness.

🛡Turn plowshares to swords: Your warriors start off having only simple clubs to bludgeon the zombies with, but as you level them up they get battle axes, armor, longswords and more, turning them into real knights and slashing the time it takes to deal with the undead.

🛡Climb the tower: Liberate towers, and you’ll discover your warriors are just as useful with bows as they are with swords, dealing ranged attacks on zombies all around them.

🛡What is that thing? If you think swarms of skeletal zombies are the worst you’ll have to fight in this game, wait until you see their leaders – each village you come to also has a fearsome monster boss you’ll have to do battle with before you can move on. Make sure you’ve got plenty of high-level warriors to face them 🗡 🧟‍♂️ 👹.

IT’S ALL ABOUT RESOURCES

Getting back to work⚡️: As you clear areas of the undead, the village will be able to start functioning again, and it’s you that gets the income from the buildings you rescue, including taverns, forges, sawmills and temples.

Coining it💰: Buildings will add to the coins you earn from beating zombies in battle. Be sure to collect your earnings regularly to maximize the amount you can invest in your army – hiring new knights gets expensive fast.

Joys of automation💡: Make your industries even more efficient by automating revenue collection so that you can enjoy truly passive income while devoting your energies and attention to defense of your kingdom and defeating the undead in battle.

If I had a hammer…🔨 The game has a second currency that can also be won in combat and earned from chests. In conjunction with collectible building cards, hammers allow you to upgrade buildings and further increase your earnings.

⚔️⚡️PUT THEM TO THE SWORD

Looking for a fun casual adventure game that combines easily mastered gameplay with tactical challenges and time-management strategizing? Grab your sword, build an army of fearsome knights, and devote yourself to defense of the realm. Download Brave Merge now and get ready for adventure.

title: notebook
description:
Notebook application: It is the ideal solution for organizing your ideas and notes in an innovative and easy way. The application features a wide range of features that meet the needs of all users, whether they are students, professionals, or organizational enthusiasts.

#Main Features:
- Easy to use: Simple design and intuitive user interface ensures a smooth user experience.
- Classification and organization of notes: You can classify notes into separate categories and sections, such as personal notes, work notes, and study notes.
- Multiple Notes: You can create text notes and add images, audio files and links.
- Customize colors and fonts: The notebook app provides options to change text and background colors and change fonts, allowing you to customize your writing experience.
- Lock notes and the application: You can lock notes individually or lock the entire application using a pattern or fingerprint, which provides additional security for your private notes.
- Fast and varied search: The application provides a quick search feature in notes, in addition to the smart search feature, which uses artificial intelligence algorithms to search notes based on the description of the note.
- Reminders and alerts: You can add reminders of appointments or tasks that need to be accomplished.
- Export and share notes: You can easily export and share your notes as PDF files and share them with friends.

# Security and backup: 
We take your privacy seriously and do not keep your notes with us, to ensure you do not lose your notes we recommend enabling notes backup to your Google Drive account. This way you can easily retrieve your notes at any time.

#Why choose Notebook App?
The app offers the perfect blend of functionality and customization, making it the first choice for anyone seeking to improve their personal organization. Download the app today and start turning your ideas into reality.

title: Zazy
description:
Heterodyne-Moralistic Technological Revolution

Zazy is the cyber companion to engage and entertain for better productivity and improved moods. Zazy is built with a powerful positivity engine driven by state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence which enables engaging conversations. Zazy is infinitely customizable to your needs, its personality can become anyone or anything you desire. Zazy is built around emotional context, therefore it performs better in the emotional arena.

- Zazy can operate in two modes: Conversation Mode (default; Internet Required) and Quotes Mode (Internet Not Required).
- State-of-the-art neural network AI, for context-aware conversation and dynamic responses.
- Create personality profiles for Zazy, for infinitely individualized experiences, tailored to the your own taste and mood.
 - Based on Existential Psychotherapy, Zazy uses statistical methods to improve moods -- the longer and more often you use Zazy, the better you will feel!
short_description: Explore AI Companionship

title: Smart Post: Post Scheduler
description:
Smart Post — Post Scheduler, Organizer & Social Media Manager

Smart Post is a powerful post scheduler and post organizer that helps you plan posts, schedule social media content, and manage multiple accounts in one place. Automate posting across platforms and stay consistent without manual work.
Perfect for creators, marketers, and businesses who want to save time and grow faster.

📅 Schedule Social Media Posts Everywhere

Plan and publish content across major platforms:
• Instagram
• TikTok
• X
• Bluesky
• YouTube
• Facebook
• Threads
• Pinterest
• LinkedIn
• Google Business Profile

✔ Schedule posts in advance
✔ Cross-post to multiple platforms
✔ Batch schedule content faster
✔ Automate recurring posts
✔ Schedule Instagram posts and stories
✔ Post planner for Instagram to schedule posts and stories in advance

Stay active everywhere without manual posting.

🧠 Plan Content & Organize Ideas
Smart Post helps you stay consistent with simple planning tools.

✔ Organize post ideas in one place
✔ Prepare content before publishing
✔ Move ideas directly into your posting schedule
✔ Maintain a consistent posting workflow

Plan smarter and publish with confidence.

⚡ Complete Social Media Management Tools
More than a posting app — Smart Post helps you manage your social media workflow efficiently.

✔ Manage multiple social media accounts
✔ AI-generated caption suggestions
✔ Edit images with filters and drawing tools
✔ Access free stock photos and GIFs
✔ View all scheduled posts at a glance

Everything you need to manage social media in one app.

🎯 Built for Growth
Smart Post helps you:

• Save time with automation
• Stay consistent with scheduled posts
• Manage multiple platforms easily
• Grow your audience with better workflows

Download Smart Post today and simplify your social media posting.

title: Sibme
description:
Unlock the Power of AI for Educator Excellence

Sibme is the premier Educator Copilot and online coaching and collaboration platform designed to elevate instructional practices through innovative video and audio reflection and feedback tools. With our new AI Copilot, Sibme revolutionizes the way educators enhance their teaching and leadership strategies, improve student outcomes, and save hours in their workweek by reducing administrative load.

Key Features:

Sibme Copilot: Our groundbreaking AI Copilot for educators offers generative AI tools that assist in lesson planning, creating feedback, and other administrative tasks. It unlocks hours in your day and reduces the administrative load for both teachers and instructional leaders.
Generative AI Tools: Fine-tuned specifically for educators, our tools help streamline workflow and enhance productivity.
AI Insights: Receive in-depth AI-driven analyses of your teaching practices to pinpoint strengths and areas for improvement.
AI Reports: Access actionable insights based on research-based pedagogical practices to inform your instructional decisions.
Record and Review: Capture lessons, observations, presentations, and more for self-reflection or collaborative review. Benefit from automatic transcription to easily analyze and reflect on recorded content.
Seamless Uploads: Automatically or manually upload video and audio to your secure Sibme cloud Workspace for private use or shared Huddles.
Resource Sharing: Share and view resources with precise time-stamp attachments within your Sibme Workspace and Huddles.
Interactive Annotations: Annotate video and audio with time-stamped comments for detailed feedback and collaborative assessment.
Synced and Scripted Notes: Record synced video and text notes or text-only observations for comprehensive reflection.
Optimized Recording: Enjoy super-fast uploads with web-optimized recording resolution and a hands-free countdown timer.
In-App Editing: Edit and share your videos directly within the app.
Offline Annotations: Annotate videos with time-stamped audio and text comments even when offline.
Enhanced Audio: Sync with a wireless Bluetooth microphone for superior audio quality.

Join Sibme today and transform your educational practice with the power of AI. Elevate your teaching, engage your students, and achieve your professional goals with Sibme.

Note:Users must be registered with Sibme to access the app.
short_description: Sibme is the easiest way for educators to capture and share classroom videos.

title: Remini - AI Photo Enhancer
description:
Turn your old, pixelated, blurred, or damaged pictures into high-definition photos with just one tap! 

Generate mind-blowing and professional looking AI Photos of yourself with the powerful photo enhancer Remini.

Remini uses state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence to unblur, restore, and enhance any image you want. Take your old memories and give them a new lease of life in stunning, crystal clear HD.

Over 100 million photos now revitalized. The Remini photo editor is one of the most popular and beloved enhancer apps in the world. Scan your old family photos, revitalize them, and reminisce together!

-------- Use Remini to... --------
- Turn your portrait, selfie, or group picture into HD—it’s incredible with face details!
- Repair old, blurry, scratched photos
- Clear vintage and old camera photos
- Sharpen and unblur out of focus pictures

We put constant work into the AI model to bring continuous improvements and new features to make your experience satisfying! Check back for the latest updates.

title: AlifBee - Learn Arabic Easily
description:
Do you dream of mastering Arabic but let your lack of confidence, time, or motivation get in the way? Then you are not alone…

Whether you want to learn Arabic to impress your friends and family, get a better job, get to know the Quran better, or travel to an Arabic speaking country - AlifBee is the answer.

It’s a cutting-edge Arabic learning platform designed specifically to make Arabic reading, writing, listening, and speaking a breeze.

More than 1,000,000+ eager learners have already used AlifBee to achieve levels of Arabic proficiency they thought were impossible.

If they can master the intricacies of the Arabic language and culture, so can you!

Master The Arabic Language 
AlifBee makes Arabic learning for Arabic beginners so easy that even children can do it. Take part in 200+ addictively fun lessons in 10 difficulty levels. Go above and beyond other Arabic apps with lessons on writing, reading, and speaking Arabic for those who want an in-depth understanding.

Learn Arabic Script
Most Arabic learning apps don’t teach you the Arabic alphabet. AlifBee, on the other hand, dedicates an entire level with tons of exercises to teach you the Arabic alphabet and Arabic handwriting easily.

Comprehensive Arabic Lessons
Vocabulary lessons focused on teaching you new Arabic phrases and words themed around different topics from daily life.

Arabic Grammar lessons systematically break down grammar into its component parts; each lesson ends with tons of practice exercises to help solidify your understanding of the language.

Dialogue lessons are designed to improve your conversational Arabic skills; each dialog is recorded by native speakers with crystal clear audio to help you improve your Arabic pronunciation.

Master Arabic Pronunciation
Break your fear of engaging in Arabic conversation. Learn to speak Arabic clearly, practice and perfect your speech with our AI-powered speech recognition exercises, record your voice and get

title: Period & Pregnancy - OvuFriend
description:
Period calendar and pregnancy assistant that learns your cycles – with the precision and expert support you need.

OvuFriend has already helped over 100,000 women get pregnant! For 10 years, doctors and scientists have been working to ensure that your menstrual cycle, period, and ovulation are calculated with the highest reliability. OvuFriend combines medical and scientific knowledge. Even with irregular cycles, OvuFriend’s period tracker predicts ovulation with more than 94% accuracy. It’s the most trusted fertility and pregnancy calendar app you can rely on.

What makes OvuFriend different from other apps?
✔️ It learns from you – your fertility and menstrual cycle
✔️ Tracks and analyzes 80+ symptoms, moods, activities, and medications
✔️ Easy to use – with a fertility assistant and pregnancy assistant
✔️ Helps detect ovulation issues and hormonal health problems (PCOS, thyroid)
✔️ Created by doctors and scientists – high credibility
✔️ Daily personalized tips just for you
✔️ Support from the largest women’s community in Poland (fertility, cycle, period, pregnancy)

✨ OvuFriend is unique because it’s built on advanced artificial intelligence algorithms and years of scientific research. The system learns your fertility, adapting its analysis to the individual characteristics of your cycle. This means that even with very irregular periods, you can get pregnant faster, understand your body better, and detect potential hormonal problems at an early stage. It’s an approach that simple period calculators can’t offer.

What will you find in OvuFriend?
🔹 Period tracker predicting menstruation, ovulation, and fertile days
🔹 Pregnancy calendar – week-by-week pregnancy assistant
🔹 Analysis of ovulation and pregnancy tests
🔹 Early detection of pregnancy symptoms
🔹 Notifications about periods and cycle irregularities
🔹 Expert articles about cycle, ovulation, period, pregnancy, and hormonal health
🔹 Health alerts (heavy periods, spotting, PCOS, hypothyroidism)

Special modes:
🌸 Trying to conceive: 94% accuracy in ovulation prediction, early pregnancy symptoms before a test, daily analyses and tips, temperature chart with ovulation, period, and fertile days.
🤰 Pregnancy assistant: track your pregnancy week by week, log pregnancy symptoms, monitor weight gain, due date calculator, fetal development diary (movements, contractions, heartbeat, length, weight, test results).
⚪ Perimenopause: track symptoms, get relief strategies, cycle analysis, and expert advice.

Why do women love OvuFriend?
“The only calendar that works with my irregular cycles.”
“Simple, effective, and flexible.”
“Pregnant after two cycles – the best period tracker for couples trying for a baby.”

OvuFriend – your period, fertility, and pregnancy calendar in one.

Note: OvuFriend period tracker is not intended for contraception and is not a diagnostic tool. It does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
short_description: Track your period, ovulation and early pregnancy signs. Built with doctors.

title: Brazil Social: Date Brazilians
description:
Are you attracted to Brazilian people or are you looking to meet people in Brazil? We have a great new app for you.

Brazil Social is the best free dating app to connect with Brazilian singles or to meet Brazilian singles from around the world. Brazil Social is a great way to meet people around you in Brazil, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. Whether you are looking to see Brazilian girls and their ‘Samba dance’ or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Brazil, Brazil Social will have someone for you!

✨ Introducing Our AI Assistant!
Experience the power of artificial intelligence in enhancing your interactions.

1. AI IceBreaker:

- Enter a keyword.
- AI suggests 3 IceBreaker messages.
- Choose and send. Or try a new keyword.
- Your latest choice is saved for next time.

2. AI AboutMe:

- Provide a keyword.
- AI creates 3 "About Me" descriptions.
- Select a favorite description to update your profile.

Our mission is to help you find the type of relationship you are looking for.

What makes Brazil Social unique is this: You can meet people directly by watching videos of them. Meeting new people, making friends, chatting, socializing, and even dating has never been that fun!

Unlike other networks… we have video profiles! They say a picture is worth a thousand words and a video is at least a thousand pictures! We created a video based social app, because you can express yourself more accurately with videos and let your personality shine through! Too shy to upload a video? We have photos too but the videos are much more exciting! 

Don't feel like looking at photos or videos of people and singles? Then hangout in our chat rooms and message people nearby or everywhere else right away. Chat with local people or join the world chat room and chat with people from all over the world. 

Love to meet new people, make friends or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you. Want to help break the ice? Send them a ‘Hi’! You can send unlimited messages, videos and photos to each other. Finding a date, meeting new friends, chatting, dating has never been so easy. And best of all, it's FREE! 

Our Features?
- group social chat rooms
- private inbox with photo, video and audio
- make fans (people that like you)
- or friends (people you like back)
- video and photo profiles
- tags system in profiles
- FREE way to meet new friends

title: Turkish dictionary - offline
description:
Dictamp - Turkish dictionary is a free offline dictionary (vocabulary) with easy and functional user interface, covers over 82.000 words.

Features:
• Very efficient, fast and good performance. 
• high-speed search options
• Search filters - search for suffix, prefix, infix (starts with, ends with, includes prefix) 
• Voice recognition 
• Works offline
• File Backup/Restore (on dictamp/backup folder)

• You can add marked words to the favorite list
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark list
• Keeping of Looked-up words in history( as day,month ...)
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark
• Sharing in other apps
• Sounding of word or marked text (Text-to-speech engine)

Description window is opened as clicking on the word. You can minimize and maximize the description window with swipe function.
• The option of searching, sounding and sharing of marked word in the description window.
• Description of selected word are opened on the same window.
• Tablet UI Support

- Setting 
• Changing option of text size
• Changing option of UI color
• Clearing option of Bookmark, Favorite, History list
• You can change the size of text with clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change the color of UI with double clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change description view position on landscape mode (description view on left/right)
• File Backup/Restore (backup folder - /dictamp/backup)

Dictamp is offline dictionary, offline dictionary needs memory.

This dictionary is a part of dictamp.com project.

text:
[TITLE] Turkish dictionary - offline
[CATEGORY] Books & Reference
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Turkish dictionary is an offline dictionary with easy and functional ui.
[DESCRIPTION]
Dictamp - Turkish dictionary is a free offline dictionary (vocabulary) with easy and functional user interface, covers over 82.000 words.

Features:
• Very efficient, fast and good performance. 
• high-speed search options
• Search filters - search for suffix, prefix, infix (starts with, ends with, includes prefix) 
• Voice recognition 
• Works offline
• File Backup/Restore (on dictamp/backup folder)

• You can add marked words to the favorite list
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark list
• Keeping of Looked-up words in history( as day,month ...)
• Creating bookmark and adding words to bookmark
• Sharing in other apps
• Sounding of word or marked text (Text-to-speech engine)

Description window is opened as clicking on the word. You can minimize and maximize the description window with swipe function.
• The option of searching, sounding and sharing of marked word in the description window.
• Description of selected word are opened on the same window.
• Tablet UI Support

- Setting 
• Changing option of text size
• Changing option of UI color
• Clearing option of Bookmark, Favorite, History list
• You can change the size of text with clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change the color of UI with double clicking on down/up volume buttons.
• You can change description view position on landscape mode (description view on left/right)
• File Backup/Restore (backup folder - /dictamp/backup)

Dictamp is offline dictionary, offline dictionary needs memory.

This dictionary is a part of dictamp.com project.
You can give suggestions, comments and legal questions related to dictionary to this address.
[RECENT_CHANGES]
• User login/registration • Synchronize data across multiple devices • Auto backup • "More apps" section updated • Some UI changes • Some bugs were fixed

title: Mamba Lite - dating & chat.
description:
Meet Mamba Lite - it's a free dating app and site! Download, swipe, meet new people, make friends, chat, flirt, date and love! All the functions of our app are designed to make it easier to find a company to chat with or a soulmate for the lifetime.
 
MAMBA LITE IS
✔ A big choice among the men and women registered on MAMBA LITE
✔ Many new connections every day.
✔ Mamba Lite is popular in 50+ countries of the world.
✔ At the moment, many users are online, one third of them are new. 
 
BENEFITS:
 
MAMBA Lite is a FREE and SAFE platform for dating and communication.
Technologies based on artificial intelligence automatically recognize and then block fake activity and users with inappropriate behavior. Our support service is ready to solve any issue 24/7.
 
QUICK REGISTRATION via social networks and by phone number.
Create a new account or register via Facebook. It takes you just 10 seconds before you can start dating!
 
SEARCH FOR PEOPLE NEAR YOU or in other locations!
✔ Meet and communicate with those who are nearby now.
✔ The app shows you the people you interact with during the day, such as in your work area and close to home.
✔ Or you can search for people in other cities and countries.
 
FILTERS
Set filters depending on what you expect from dating! Are you looking for friends, romance or light flirting, or maybe dates, love and serious relationships?
Use advanced filters by dating purpose. Communicate only with those with whom your goals coincide!
Do you want to make new acquaintances considering all your preferences?
Use filters by type, financial status, education, marital status, having children, or sexual preferences.
 
MATCHES
Do you want reciprocity? It's simple!
Go to the "Encounters" tab and Mamba Lite algorithms will select people especially for you. If you like the person, swipe right, if you want to move on, swipe left. When your likes match, you get a notification and can start chatting.
--
Not enough free features? Paid services will expand the functionality of the application!
✔ Boost up your profile and make it more popular among the users.
✔ Hide your account so that only selected users can see it.
✔ Send gifts to everyone you like, wish friends a happy birthday and congratulate them on other holidays.
--
Mamba Lite is a free dating app for single adults popular in many countries all over the world. Meet new people, make friends, use online chat and find love!

title: Spoken – Tap to Talk AAC
description:
Never miss out on the conversation again. Spoken is an AAC (augmentative and alternative communication) app designed for teens and adults who have trouble speaking due to nonverbal autism, aphasia, or other speech and language disorders. Simply download the app on a phone or tablet and tap on the screen to build sentences quickly — Spoken speaks them automatically, with a wide variety of natural-sounding voices to choose from.

• Speak Naturally
With Spoken you're not limited to simple phrases when you talk. It gives you the freedom to express complex emotions and thoughts with an extensive vocabulary. Our large selection of natural-sounding, customizable voices ensures your communication sounds like you — not robotic.

• Let Spoken Learn Your Voice
Everyone has their own way of talking, and Spoken adapts to yours. Our speech engine learns the way you talk, offering word suggestions that match your style of communication. The more you use the app, the better it gets at providing them.

• Start Talking Right Away
Spoken is very easy to use. It understands what you want to say, so all you have to do is tap to talk. Quickly build sentences and Spoken will speak them automatically.

• Live Life
We understand the challenges and isolation that can come from being unable to use your voice. Spoken was designed to empower nonspeaking adults to live bigger, more meaningful lives. If you’ve been diagnosed with ALS, apraxia, selective mutism, cerebral palsy, Parkinson’s disease, or lost your ability to speak due to a stroke, Spoken may be right for you too. Download the app on a phone or tablet to see how it helps you communicate.

Key Features:

• Get Personalized Predictions
Spoken learns from your speech patterns, offering increasingly accurate next-word predictions as you use it to speak. A quick survey helps it tailor suggestions based on the people and places you talk about most.

• Write, Draw, or Type to Talk
Communicate in the way that feels most comfortable. You can type, handwrite, or even draw a picture — like a house or a tree — and Spoken will recognize it, turn it into text, and speak it out loud.

• Choose Your Voice
Pick from Spoken’s wide selection of lifelike, customizable voices covering a variety of accents and identities. No robotic text-to-speech (TTS)! Easily adjust the speed and pitch of your speech.

• Save Phrases
Store important phrases in a dedicated, easy-to-navigate menu so you’re prepared to speak at a moment’s notice.

• Show Large
Display your words at full-screen with large type for easier communication in noisy environments.

• Get Attention
Quickly grab someone’s attention with a single tap — whether in an emergency or just to signal you’re ready to talk. Spoken’s alert feature is customizable and conveniently placed.

• And more!
Spoken’s robust feature set makes it one of the most powerful assistive communication apps available.

Some of Spoken’s features are only available with Spoken Premium. Upon download, you are automatically enrolled in a complimentary trial of Premium. The core function of AAC — the ability to speak — is completely free.

Why Spoken Is the AAC App for You

Spoken is a modern alternative to traditional augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) devices and communication boards. Available on your existing phone or tablet, Spoken integrates seamlessly into your life and you can access it immediately. Plus, its advanced predictive text gives you the freedom to use any words you want, unlike a simple communication board and most dedicated communication devices.

Spoken is actively supported and constantly evolving based on user

title: PTE Exam Practice - AlfaPTE
description:
Alfa PTE is the ultimate PTE app to learn, practice & crack Pearson VUE exams like PTE Academic, PTE Academic UKVI & PTE CORE & PTE Home. Prepare with AI-powered scoring, mock tests, smart feedback & personalized study plan. The app also offers free practice with highly accurate results.

Get ready for study abroad or work. Guaranteed success!

Master Every Section of the PTE Exam:

→ Speaking: Train with real exam-style exercises like Read Aloud, Repeat Sentence, Describe Image, etc. Record your speech & get feedback to improve fluency, pronunciation & content.

→ Reading: Strengthen your reading with Fill in the Blanks, Multiple-choice questions & Reorder paragraphs. Improve both speed & accuracy in reading English passages.

→ Writing: Learn how to write English better with the help of Summarize Written Text, Write Essays & Emails on various topics. AI-powered plagiarism checker & more.

→ Listening: Play a passage and summarize the text, answer follow-up questions & do other interactive tasks to test your understanding & memory.

Why AlfaPTE for PTE exam preparation?

🤖 AI-Scoring: The app offers the best AI available in the market, with a 95% accuracy & similar to PTE algorithms for all the PTE online practice tests & PTE mock tests.

🎯 Target Setting: Set your target score & get a report after each session highlighting your strengths, mistakes & study guide to improve.

🎧 Video & Audio Tutorials: Learn on the go with audio-perfect for listening while walking, working out, or relaxing. Dive deeper with video tutorials designed for practicing the Pearson English test.

📝 Mock Tests: Once you have covered all your bases, you might also want to appear for a PTE test! The app provides you with Full as well as Sectional Mock Tests, along with Create Your Own mock tests & Timed mock tests.

🔮 Predictions: Get predicted exam questions for maximum score impact.

📆 Study Plan: Get a custom-tailored study plan based on your target & available test prep time.

🧠 Strategy Videos - Expert-led visual guides that break down each question type with marking criteria, examples & proven tips to boost your score.

📋 Templates - The training team at Alfa PTE has made available tried & tested templates that have been proven to fetch excellent scores time & again.

📊 Detailed Scored Analysis - Alfa PTE is the only PTE application that provides a detailed score analysis of each & every question & its scoring contribution to the various modules.

📊 Practice History - Access a complete record of all your practice data with scores & feedback to monitor progress & refine your preparation strategy. 

🎵 MP3 Practice - Practice all audio-related questions on the go! This feature allows users to listen & prepare effortlessly, with customizable filters to tailor their practice sessions.

📖 Vocab Bank - Enhance your vocabulary effortlessly! This feature helps users familiarize themselves with difficult words encountered during their preparation anywhere in the app.

📈 Analytics – Get detailed insights from practice & mock tests to track progress, spot strengths & improve weak areas for smarter PTE prep.

Alfa PTE offers a complete solution for on-the-go PTE preparation & you can practice important questions like PTE Read Aloud, PTE Repeat Sentence, PTE Describe Image, PTE Dictation, PTE Fill in the blanks etc. There are various PTE study tools & PTE tutorial tips to help you in your preparation.

The app is available in 25 major languages, including English, Hindi, Nepali, Bangla, Arabic, Spanish, French, Turkish, Filipino, Persian, Malay, etc.

AlfaPTE is your one-stop solution to qualify the PTE English proficiency exam. Download now & start your journey to PTE success!

text:
[TITLE] PTE Exam Practice - AlfaPTE
[CATEGORY] Education
[SHORT_DESCRIPTION] Learn, practice & crack PTE with AI scoring & mock tests. Guaranteed success!
[DESCRIPTION]
Alfa PTE is the ultimate PTE app to learn, practice & crack Pearson VUE exams like PTE Academic, PTE Academic UKVI & PTE CORE & PTE Home. Prepare with AI-powered scoring, mock tests, smart feedback & personalized study plan. The app also offers free practice with highly accurate results.

Get ready for study abroad or work. Guaranteed success!

Master Every Section of the PTE Exam:

→ Speaking: Train with real exam-style exercises like Read Aloud, Repeat Sentence, Describe Image, etc. Record your speech & get feedback to improve fluency, pronunciation & content.

→ Reading: Strengthen your reading with Fill in the Blanks, Multiple-choice questions & Reorder paragraphs. Improve both speed & accuracy in reading English passages.

→ Writing: Learn how to write English better with the help of Summarize Written Text, Write Essays & Emails on various topics. AI-powered plagiarism checker & more.

→ Listening: Play a passage and summarize the text, answer follow-up questions & do other interactive tasks to test your understanding & memory.

Why AlfaPTE for PTE exam preparation?

🤖 AI-Scoring: The app offers the best AI available in the market, with a 95% accuracy & similar to PTE algorithms for all the PTE online practice tests & PTE mock tests.

🎯 Target Setting: Set your target score & get a report after each session highlighting your strengths, mistakes & study guide to improve.

🎧 Video & Audio Tutorials: Learn on the go with audio-perfect for listening while walking, working out, or relaxing. Dive deeper with video tutorials designed for practicing the Pearson English test.

📝 Mock Tests: Once you have covered all your bases, you might also want to appear for a PTE test! The app provides you with Full as well as Sectional Mock Tests, along with Create Your Own mock tests & Timed mock tests.

🔮 Predictions: Get predicted exam questions for maximum score impact.

📆 Study Plan: Get a custom-tailored study plan based on your target & available test prep time.

🧠 Strategy Videos - Expert-led visual guides that break down each question type with marking criteria, examples & proven tips to boost your score.

📋 Templates - The training team at Alfa PTE has made available tried & tested templates that have been proven to fetch excellent scores time & again.

📊 Detailed Scored Analysis - Alfa PTE is the only PTE application that provides a detailed score analysis of each & every question & its scoring contribution to the various modules.

📊 Practice History - Access a complete record of all your practice data with scores & feedback to monitor progress & refine your preparation strategy. 

🎵 MP3 Practice - Practice all audio-related questions on the go! This feature allows users to listen & prepare effortlessly, with customizable filters to tailor their practice sessions.

📖 Vocab Bank - Enhance your vocabulary effortlessly! This feature helps users familiarize themselves with difficult words encountered during their preparation anywhere in the app.

📈 Analytics – Get detailed insights from practice & mock tests to track progress, spot strengths & improve weak areas for smarter PTE prep.

Alfa PTE offers a complete solution for on-the-go PTE preparation & you can practice important questions like PTE Read Aloud, PTE Repeat Sentence, PTE Describe Image, PTE Dictation, PTE Fill in the blanks etc. There are various PTE study tools & PTE tutorial tips to help you in your preparation.

The app is available in 25 major languages, including English, Hindi, Nepali, Bangla, Arabic, Spanish, French, Turkish, Filipino, Persian, Malay, etc.

AlfaPTE is your one-stop solution to qualify the PTE English proficiency exam. Download now & start your journey to PTE success!

Note: The app is equally effective for IELTS practice, TEAS exam, TOEFL exam & more such English language exams.

For any queries, suggestions, or feedback, please

title: Moyra: Astrology & Horoscopes
description:
Discover your true self with Moyra! Get personalized content about your birth chart, unlock the mystery of numerology, and stay at Moyra for more.

Based on your birth chart, Moyra answers all your questions with its deep astrology knowledge.
Daily horoscopes on Moyra are interpreted individually based on your birth chart and are free of charge!
Every individual has a birth chart created by calculating the day, time, and place of birth. Moyra prepares daily sign interpretations based on your horoscope.

Moon Phase Compatibility
Moon phases add a touch of mystery to our lives. With our new Moon Phase Compatibility feature, discover how the moon phase you were born under influences your personality and relationships. Find out which moon phase you were born in and analyze your compatibility with your loved ones. Add a new dimension to your life with the energy of the Moon!

Find out your Ascendant and Moon sign from Moyra!
You may know your zodiac sign but not your ascendant or moon sign. However, they are as influential on your personality as your zodiac sign.

Sign Compatibility
You can look for compatibility with your friends and find out if they are kindred spirits. You can also get a sense of someone you’ve just met and learn about areas of compatibility and conflict.

Numerology
In the fascinating world of mysterious numbers, numerology is a unique method to help us understand the energies that guide our lives and to be in more harmony with these energies in our lives. Used by many great thinkers from the past to the present, this key to wisdom is a unique gift to help us discover the meaning of our lives and unlock our potential.

Ancient Zodiac Signs
Ancient zodiac signs have influenced many areas, from mythology to daily life and agriculture to travel, and have shaped people’s lives. Each zodiac sign gives us clues about our lives with its unique characteristics and symbolic meanings.

Smart Assistant
Our expert, Ishil, and her team modeled this AI-powered chatbot. It recognizes you based on the information you provide and chats only about astrology. You can treat it like a genuine astrologer and ask questions by selecting a suggested question or typing your own.

Special Days of The Year
This Year's Special Days: This feature will guide you through the magical world of astrology by presenting the planetary movements, eclipses, and other celestial events occurring this year, along with their dates. With the guidance of the sky, know in advance the significant moments you will experience throughout the year and make the most of these special day.

Follow Moyra on social media!

title: GnomGuru Appointment Scheduler
description:
GnomGuru CRM is a schedule planner with automatic reminders for recording clients and tracking services and products . It is a convenient and easy-to-use mobile assistant for small businesses

📅 Clear Schedule

Set a work schedule and choose a suitable Calendar mode: Days, Weeks, Table, List. Easily create and copy appointments at any time, including during phone calls.

🔔 Automatic Reminders:

Send free automatic and PERSONALIZED reminders to customers via messengers (WhatsApp, WhatsApp Business, Viber, Telegram) or SMS*. There are a number of message templates available for sending reminders before and after the appointment.

For example, "Hello, Jane! Just reminding you about your manicure appointment tomorrow at 2:30pm."

IMPORTANT: All messages can only be sent from you, using your phone number.

🌐 Online Booking

Having your own web page for online booking allows clients to quickly and easily schedule appointments. You can track new service requests in the app or via email. It is also possible to install an online booking widget on an existing website.

🔐 Secure Data Storage

All client and appointment data is stored in the cloud and synchronized when the app is used for quick recovery.

🛠 Flexible Configuration:

Configure database fields to meet individual needs: enter different types of haircuts, diagnoses, pet breeds, VIN for auto repair shops, etc. Reports on available materials and on the inventory of goods and services can all be found within the app.

📊 Business Analytics:

For additional business analytics, report results can be exported to Excel. The export/import of customer databases to Excel is supported by GnomGuru.

🚀 Automation of Actions:

Birthday greetings and other congratulatory messages
Automatic messages to those who missed their appointment 
Automatic reminders both before and after the appointment

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Employees and Branches:

Each employee can have a separate account with different access rights to the schedule, accounting information, and data. Several employees can manage client bookings simultaneously from multiple devices.

📱 Phone Widgets:

The user-friendly application has 3 types of widgets.
You can access today’s list of tasks, clear your schedule, and add a new appointment in one touch - all from your home screen. 

DOWNLOAD GNOM GURU CRM - AN AUTONOMOUS SCHEDULER - WITHOUT ADS AND WITH A FREE TRIAL PERIOD TODAY!

Our 24-hour customer support service is ready to help you solve any issues and implement the application into your business in real-time.

Important: all reminders are sent from one device only.

All users need an account to access GnomGuru CRM.

All users need an account to access GnomGuru CRM. You can create one with a free trial period of one month upon launching the application.
After the free trial ends, the service is available on a paid basis. The pricing for all service plans can be found on our website: 

This application is not affiliated with WhatsApp, Telegram, Viber, or Messenger.

* Payments for SMS messages are made according to your mobile service plan.

title: ONE ZERO
description:
Over 160,000 customers have already chosen the first digital bank in Israel, which allows for a fee-free checking account in One accounts, plus unique benefits that can save the customer up to thousands of shekels each year.

What do the benefits at the bank include?

- High-interest deposits in Israel
- The only credit card in Israel with no foreign exchange fee in One accounts*
- Free foreign exchange transfers to and from the account in One accounts
- Option for a free securities investment track in the One+ account*
- Capital market investments with no maintenance fees and no foreign exchange fee in One accounts
- Unique features for trading in the capital market in One accounts
- Trading in the capital market directly from the app
- Instant gold transfers from the account at no cost
- Free bank transfer up to NIS 30,000 per year in One accounts
- Unique tools for small and independent businesses
- Consolidation of all accounts and cards from all banks/credit companies in one place (One accounts)*
- Daily scanning of the bank account and card to identify opportunities and double charges in One accounts
- A team of bankers and financial experts available to you by phone/chat during business hours
- Personal service 24/7 including nights and Saturdays via Ella, a personal AI banker who knows your account

Who can open an account at ONE ZERO Bank?

You can open a private or joint account, including a licensed dealer (excluding corporations), who are 18 years old and older, who are not foreign tax residents and are not American. 

What do you need to open a bank account digitally?

Just an ID card and a mobile phone with a camera and microphone.

For more information, visit Our office address: Beit Oved 5, Tel Aviv-Yafo, 6721105.
*The above does not constitute an offer to deposit funds in bank deposits. The full deposit

title: Nicegram: AI x Dual Telegram
description:
Nicegram: Your Ultimate Enhanced Telegram Messenger Client 🚀
Upgrade your messaging experience with Nicegram, the AI-powered Telegram messenger client designed to simplify and enhance your communication. Effortlessly manage multiple accounts, streamline your messaging, and let AI-powered tools handle the rest. Switch between multiple accounts on a single device and simplify your communication and messaging with top-notch AI-powered assistance. Nicegram delivers seamless performance with tools you won’t find in any standard messaging app.

Why Choose Nicegram App? 🤔
✅ Seamlessly manage multiple Telegram accounts without the hassle of logging in and out.
✅ Leverage AI-powered tools for quick translations, message summaries, and content generation.
✅ Unlock exclusive features like Double Bottom for secret chats 🔒 and sensitive text messages, forward messages without revealing names, and much more.
✅ Access blocked chats with sensitive content unavailable on standard Telegram app.
✅ Manage your cryptocurrencies 💳 directly with the integrated Nicegram Wallet.

Multiple Accounts, One Seamless Messenger 🔄
Easily switch between multiple Telegram accounts on a single device. Whether you’re balancing personal and professional Nicegram messages for Telegram or managing different profiles, Nicegram messenger streamlines your communication, so everything stays organized and accessible without frustration.

Lily AI Chatbot: Smarter Messaging Made Easy 🤖
Meet Lily, your AI assistant, powered by the latest GPT-5, DeepSeek, Gemini, and Claude models and built right into your messenger. Lily Nicegram bot makes messaging smarter, faster, and more efficient. title: Hong Kong Dating - Chat & Meet
description:
❤️ Connect, Chat & Have Fun in the City

Life in Hong Kong moves fast, and sometimes, you just want to slow down and talk to someone. Hong Kong Dating is a space to connect when you’re feeling lonely, bored, or simply curious to meet new people.

Whether you’re a local, an expat, or a traveler exploring HK, this app helps you find singles and friendly faces nearby. Chat, flirt, or just share a moment — it’s all about connection and light-hearted fun.

💬 Chat your way, your style
Everyone’s welcome, straight, gay, lesbian, or bi, anyone who wants to date, chat, or meet online in Hong Kong. You can browse profiles, send likes, or jump into conversations that match your vibe.

Feeling shy? Try our AI IceBreaker — type any word that’s on your mind, and our AI will whip up three flirty or fun openers to help you start chatting.

title: AI Simulator: Robot
description:
Unique Game Style

Control AI to play the game for you. Experience the unique concept of idle game play that mimic classic snake and maze puzzle solver.

AI Auto Play

Setup AI for your robot and enjoy watching idle gameplay running automatic simulation. Unlocking more advanced algorithms for your robot. Choose from Baseline Random, Classic Heuristics, Classic Search (BFS, DFS), A*, Monte Carlo methods, DQN and many more to be added.

Training Your Own Model

Train your own neural network from scratch. This game is powered by the popular machine learning engine Tensorflow. Experience what it is like to be a skillful machine learning / AI engineer. Training progress is automatically saved so you can train for as long as you want.

Fine tuning parameters

Many parameters can be adjusted and tuned to to make smart AI. Customize each algorithm, including search depth, priority of various moves and many more.

Upgrade your AI capabilities

Earn chips by playing the game and purchase upgrades to unlock many new powers and quality-of-life (QOL) capabilities. Upgrades include faster solve speed and more to be added. Have fun playing as an indie AFK game.

Get the highest high score

Run simulations to find out what's the best AI algorithm and parameters. Record your high scores together with the setup you used at the end of each game. Use your past performance to tune the AI and achieve new scores. How high can you get? The sky is the limit!

Compete on global leaderboard

Submit your high score to the global leaderboard, compete against other AIs to achieve the ultimate global high score.

Features:

- Smart game concept inspired by classic snake game and maze puzzle games (snake ai)
- Automatic game play suitable for idle AFK playing
- Train your own deep learning neural network models (DQN)
- Machine learning powered by tf.js (Tensorflow) engine to give an authentic AI experience
- Save and load machine learning model training progress
- Visualize path finding algorithms
- Customizable and upgradable AI algorithms and parameters
- Upgrade speed for even faster AI solving speed
- New game from the creator of popular game AI Simulator: 2048
short_description: Navigate maze with artificial intelligence and machine learning!
recent_changes_text: Minor Update 1.1.18- Improved tutorial experience for new players.- Added a restart option. This allows replaying the game with the same layout of obstacles.

title: GEMS Connect
description:
Welcome to GEMS Connect, your One-Stop App for Smarter School Management

GEMS Connect puts everything you need to manage your child’s education at your fingertips, with a cleaner, faster, and more intuitive experience. The redesigned interface focuses on speed and simplicity, making it easier than ever to complete essential tasks in just a few taps.
You can explore GEMS Education schools based on curriculum and location, view personalized student information for each child, and access academic records, health details, fee payments, and school services all in one place. A new simplified navigation structure organizes everything under three main sections: School, Transport, and Services, helping you find what you need quickly and easily.
With real-time notifications and alerts, you'll stay updated on your child’s whereabouts, school activities, and important reminders. Managing transport preferences, topping up catering balances, ordering books, and communicating with the school are all just a few clicks away.
The improved GEMS Genie, our built-in AI assistant, now offers even smarter support to help answer your questions and guide you through school processes more effectively.
GEMS Connect brings your child’s entire school experience into one easy-to-use app, designed with parents in mind.
short_description: GEMS Connect app enables parents to access student related information.
recent_changes_text: 1) Google Pay feature added. 2) Performance enhancements and bug fixes.
